function VT(e, t, r) {
    let {reference: n, floating: a} = e;
    const i = yf(t)
      , o = ZC(t)
      , l = GC(o)
      , c = Qu(t)
      , d = i === "y"

      , f = n.y + n.height / 2 - a.height / 2
      , g = n[l] / 2 - a[l] / 2;
    let p;
    switch (c) {
    case "top":
        p = {
            x: h,
            y: n.y - a.height
        };
        break;
    case "bottom":
        p = {
            x: h,
            y: n.y + n.height
        };
        break;
    case "right":
        p = {
            x: n.x + n.width,
            y: f
        };
        break;
    case "left":
        p = {
            x: n.x - a.width,
            y: f
        };
        break;
    default:
        p = {
            x: n.x,
            y: n.y
        }
    }
    switch (kx(t)) {
    case "start":
        p[o] -= g * (r && d ? -1 : 1);
        break;
    case "end":
        p[o] += g * (r && d ? -1 : 1);
        break
    }
    return p
}

function Zte(e, t) {
    const r = Math.abs(t.top - e.y)
      , n = Math.abs(t.bottom - e.y)
      , a = Math.abs(t.right - e.x)
      , i = Math.abs(t.left - e.x);
    switch (Math.min(r, n, a, i)) {
    case i:
        return "left";
    case a:
        return "right";
    case r:
        return "top";
    case n:
        return "bottom";
    default:
        throw new Error("unreachable")
    }
}
function Kte(e, t, r=5) {
    const n = [];
    switch (t) {
    case "top":
        n.push({
            x: e.x - r,
            y: e.y + r
        }, {
            x: e.x + r,
            y: e.y + r
        });
        break;
    case "bottom":
        n.push({
            x: e.x - r,
            y: e.y - r
        }, {
            x: e.x + r,
            y: e.y - r
        });
        break;
    case "left":
        n.push({
            x: e.x + r,
            y: e.y - r
        }, {
            x: e.x + r,
            y: e.y + r
        });
        break;
    case "right":
        n.push({
            x: e.x - r,
            y: e.y - r
        }, {
            x: e.x - r,
            y: e.y + r
        });
        break
    }
    return n
}
function Qte(e) {
    const {top: t, right: r, bottom: n, left: a} = e;
    return [{
        x: a,
        y: t
    }, {
        x: r,
        y: t
    }, {
        x: r,
        y: n
    }, {
        x: a,
        y: n
    }]
}
function Yte(e, t) {
    const {x: r, y: n} = e;
    let a = !1;
    for (let i = 0, o = t.length - 1; i < t.length; o = i++) {
        const l = t[i].x
          , c = t[i].y
          , d = t[o].x
          , h = t[o].y;
        c > n != h > n && r < (d - l) * (n - c) / (h - c) + l && (a = !a)
    }
    return a
}
function Xte(e) {
    const t = e.slice();
    return t.sort( (r, n) => r.x < n.x ? -1 : r.x > n.x ? 1 : r.y < n.y ? -1 : r.y > n.y ? 1 : 0),
    Jte(t)
}
function Jte(e) {
    if (e.length <= 1)
        return e.slice();
    const t = [];
    for (let n = 0; n < e.length; n++) {
        const a = e[n];
        for (; t.length >= 2; ) {
            const i = t[t.length - 1]
              , o = t[t.length - 2];
            if ((i.x - o.x) * (a.y - o.y) >= (i.y - o.y) * (a.x - o.x))
                t.pop();
            else
                break
        }
        t.push(a)
    }
    t.pop();
    const r = [];
    for (let n = e.length - 1; n >= 0; n--) {
        const a = e[n];
        for (; r.length >= 2; ) {
            const i = r[r.length - 1]
              , o = r[r.length - 2];
            if ((i.x - o.x) * (a.y - o.y) >= (i.y - o.y) * (a.x - o.x))
                r.pop();
            else
                break
        }
        r.push(a)
    }
    return r.pop(),
    t.length === 1 && r.length === 1 && t[0].x === r[0].x && t[0].y === r[0].y ? t : t.concat(r)
}

function po() {
    const {data: e, isLoading: t, error: r, isError: n} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/auth/user"],
        queryFn: async () => {
            const a = new AbortController
              , i = setTimeout( () => a.abort(), 1e4);
            try {
                const o = await fetch("/api/auth/user", {
                    credentials: "include",
                    signal: a.signal
                });
                if (clearTimeout(i),
                o.status === 401)
                    return null;
                if (!o.ok)
                    throw new Error(`${o.status}: ${o.statusText}`);
                return await o.json()
            } catch (o) {
                throw clearTimeout(i),
                o.name === "AbortError" ? (console.warn("Auth check timeout, will retry..."),
                new Error("Auth check timeout - please check your connection")) : o
            }
        }
        ,
        retry: 2,
        retryDelay: a => Math.min(1e3 * 2 ** a, 3e3),
        staleTime: 3e4,
        gcTime: 3e5,
        refetchOnWindowFocus: !1,
        refetchOnMount: !0,
        refetchOnReconnect: !0,
        networkMode: "online"
    });
    return {
        user: e,
        isLoading: t,
        isError: n,
        error: r,
        isAuthenticated: !!e && !n
    }
}

const ux = (e, t) => {

    case It.invalid_type:

        break;
    case It.invalid_literal:
        r = `Invalid literal value, expected ${JSON.stringify(e.expected, Tn.jsonStringifyReplacer)}`;

    case It.unrecognized_keys:

    case It.invalid_union:
        r = "Invalid input";

    case It.invalid_union_discriminator:

        break;
    case It.invalid_enum_value:

    case It.invalid_arguments:

    case It.invalid_return_type:

    case It.invalid_date:

    case It.invalid_string:

        break;
    case It.too_small:

    case It.too_big:

        this.pipe = this.pipe.bind(this),
        this.readonly = this.readonly.bind(this),
        this.isNullable = this.isNullable.bind(this),
        this.isOptional = this.isOptional.bind(this),
        this["~standard"] = {
            version: 1,
            vendor: "zod",
            validate: r => this["~validate"](r)
        }
    }
    optional() {
        return Xd.create(this, this._def)
    }
    nullable() {
        return jf.create(this, this._def)
    }
    nullish() {
        return this.nullable().optional()
    }
    array() {
        return td.create(this)
    }
    promise() {
        return fx.create(this, this._def)
    }
    or(t) {
        return Kv.create([this, t], this._def)
    }
    and(t) {
        return Qv.create(this, t, this._def)
    }
    transform(t) {
        return new od({
            ...Kr(this._def),
            schema: this,
            typeName: Or.ZodEffects,
            effect: {
                type: "transform",
                transform: t
            }
        })
    }
    default(t) {
        const r = typeof t == "function" ? t : () => t;
        return new t1({
            ...Kr(this._def),
            innerType: this,
            defaultValue: r,
            typeName: Or.ZodDefault
        })
    }
    brand() {
        return new E3({
            typeName: Or.ZodBranded,
            type: this,
            ...Kr(this._def)
        })
    }
    catch(t) {
        const r = typeof t == "function" ? t : () => t;
        return new r1({
            ...Kr(this._def),
            innerType: this,
            catchValue: r,
            typeName: Or.ZodCatch
        })
    }
    describe(t) {
        const r = this.constructor;
        return new r({
            ...this._def,
            description: t
        })
    }
    pipe(t) {
        return U1.create(this, t)
    }
    readonly() {
        return n1.create(this)
    }
    isOptional() {
        return this.safeParse(void 0).success
    }
    isNullable() {
        return this.safeParse(null).success
    }
}

        return !!this._def.checks.find(t => t.kind === "ulid")
    }
    get isIP() {
        return !!this._def.checks.find(t => t.kind === "ip")
    }
    get isCIDR() {
        return !!this._def.checks.find(t => t.kind === "cidr")
    }
    get isBase64() {
        return !!this._def.checks.find(t => t.kind === "base64")
    }
    get isBase64url() {
        return !!this._def.checks.find(t => t.kind === "base64url")
    }
    get minLength() {
        let t = null;
        for (const r of this._def.checks)
            r.kind === "min" && (t === null || r.value > t) && (t = r.value);
        return t
    }
    get maxLength() {
        let t = null;
        for (const r of this._def.checks)
            r.kind === "max" && (t === null || r.value < t) && (t = r.value);
        return t
    }
}

function aae(e, t) {
    const r = (e.toString().split(".")[1] || "").length
      , n = (t.toString().split(".")[1] || "").length
      , a = r > n ? r : n
      , i = parseInt(e.toFixed(a).replace(".", ""))
      , o = parseInt(t.toFixed(a).replace(".", ""));
    return i % o / Math.pow(10, a)
}
class _f extends sn {

            return tr(i, {

            }),

                message: i.message
            }),
            a.dirty()) : Tn.assertNever(i);

            status: a.value,
            value: t.data
        }
    }

        }
        return Number.isFinite(r) && Number.isFinite(t)
    }

class td extends sn {
    _parse(t) {
        const {ctx: r, status: n} = this._processInputParams(t)
          , a = this._def;
        if (r.parsedType !== ir.array)
            return tr(r, {
                code: It.invalid_type,
                expected: ir.array,
                received: r.parsedType
            }),
            Rr;
        if (a.exactLength !== null) {
            const o = r.data.length > a.exactLength.value
              , l = r.data.length < a.exactLength.value;
            (o || l) && (tr(r, {
                code: o ? It.too_big : It.too_small,
                minimum: l ? a.exactLength.value : void 0,
                maximum: o ? a.exactLength.value : void 0,
                type: "array",
                inclusive: !0,
                exact: !0,
                message: a.exactLength.message
            }),
            n.dirty())
        }
        if (a.minLength !== null && r.data.length < a.minLength.value && (tr(r, {
            code: It.too_small,
            minimum: a.minLength.value,
            type: "array",
            inclusive: !0,
            exact: !1,
            message: a.minLength.message
        }),
        n.dirty()),
        a.maxLength !== null && r.data.length > a.maxLength.value && (tr(r, {
            code: It.too_big,
            maximum: a.maxLength.value,
            type: "array",
            inclusive: !0,
            exact: !1,
            message: a.maxLength.message
        }),
        n.dirty()),
        r.common.async)
            return Promise.all([...r.data].map( (o, l) => a.type._parseAsync(new nu(r,o,r.path,l)))).then(o => Bi.mergeArray(n, o));
        const i = [...r.data].map( (o, l) => a.type._parseSync(new nu(r,o,r.path,l)));
        return Bi.mergeArray(n, i)
    }
    get element() {
        return this._def.type
    }
    min(t, r) {
        return new td({
            ...this._def,
            minLength: {
                value: t,
                message: _r.toString(r)
            }
        })
    }
    max(t, r) {
        return new td({
            ...this._def,
            maxLength: {
                value: t,
                message: _r.toString(r)
            }
        })
    }
    length(t, r) {
        return new td({
            ...this._def,
            exactLength: {
                value: t,
                message: _r.toString(r)
            }
        })
    }
    nonempty(t) {
        return this.min(1, t)
    }

function $p(e) {
    if (e instanceof Bs) {
        const t = {};
        for (const r in e.shape) {
            const n = e.shape[r];
            t[r] = Xd.create($p(n))
        }
        return new Bs({
            ...e._def,
            shape: () => t
        })
    } else
        return e instanceof td ? new td({
            ...e._def,
            type: $p(e.element)
        }) : e instanceof Xd ? Xd.create($p(e.unwrap())) : e instanceof jf ? jf.create($p(e.unwrap())) : e instanceof su ? su.create(e.items.map(t => $p(t))) : e
}
class Bs extends sn {
    constructor() {
        super(...arguments),
        this._cached = null,
        this.nonstrict = this.passthrough,
        this.augment = this.extend
    }
    _getCached() {
        if (this._cached !== null)
            return this._cached;
        const t = this._def.shape()
          , r = Tn.objectKeys(t);
        return this._cached = {
            shape: t,
            keys: r
        }
    }
    _parse(t) {
        if (this._getType(t) !== ir.object) {
            const d = this._getOrReturnCtx(t);
            return tr(d, {
                code: It.invalid_type,
                expected: ir.object,
                received: d.parsedType
            }),
            Rr
        }
        const {status: n, ctx: a} = this._processInputParams(t)
          , {shape: i, keys: o} = this._getCached()
          , l = [];
        if (!(this._def.catchall instanceof Yu && this._def.unknownKeys === "strip"))
            for (const d in a.data)
                o.includes(d) || l.push(d);
        const c = [];
        for (const d of o) {
            const h = i[d]
              , f = a.data[d];
            c.push({
                key: {
                    status: "valid",
                    value: d
                },
                value: h._parse(new nu(a,f,a.path,d)),
                alwaysSet: d in a.data
            })
        }
        if (this._def.catchall instanceof Yu) {
            const d = this._def.unknownKeys;
            if (d === "passthrough")
                for (const h of l)
                    c.push({
                        key: {
                            status: "valid",
                            value: h
                        },
                        value: {
                            status: "valid",
                            value: a.data[h]
                        }
                    });
            else if (d === "strict")
                l.length > 0 && (tr(a, {
                    code: It.unrecognized_keys,
                    keys: l
                }),
                n.dirty());
            else if (d !== "strip")
                throw new Error("Internal ZodObject error: invalid unknownKeys value.")
        } else {
            const d = this._def.catchall;
            for (const h of l) {
                const f = a.data[h];
                c.push({
                    key: {
                        status: "valid",
                        value: h
                    },
                    value: d._parse(new nu(a,f,a.path,h)),
                    alwaysSet: h in a.data
                })
            }
        }
        return a.common.async ? Promise.resolve().then(async () => {
            const d = [];
            for (const h of c) {
                const f = await h.key
                  , g = await h.value;
                d.push({
                    key: f,
                    value: g,
                    alwaysSet: h.alwaysSet
                })
            }
            return d
        }
        ).then(d => Bi.mergeObjectSync(n, d)) : Bi.mergeObjectSync(n, c)
    }
    get shape() {
        return this._def.shape()
    }
    strict(t) {
        return _r.errToObj,
        new Bs({
            ...this._def,
            unknownKeys: "strict",
            ...t !== void 0 ? {
                errorMap: (r, n) => {
                    var a, i, o, l;
                    const c = (o = (i = (a = this._def).errorMap) === null || i === void 0 ? void 0 : i.call(a, r, n).message) !== null && o !== void 0 ? o : n.defaultError;
                    return r.code === "unrecognized_keys" ? {
                        message: (l = _r.errToObj(t).message) !== null && l !== void 0 ? l : c
                    } : {
                        message: c
                    }
                }
            } : {}
        })
    }
    strip() {
        return new Bs({
            ...this._def,
            unknownKeys: "strip"
        })
    }
    passthrough() {
        return new Bs({
            ...this._def,
            unknownKeys: "passthrough"
        })
    }
    extend(t) {
        return new Bs({
            ...this._def,
            shape: () => ({
                ...this._def.shape(),
                ...t
            })
        })
    }
    merge(t) {
        return new Bs({
            unknownKeys: t._def.unknownKeys,
            catchall: t._def.catchall,
            shape: () => ({
                ...this._def.shape(),
                ...t._def.shape()
            }),
            typeName: Or.ZodObject
        })
    }
    setKey(t, r) {
        return this.augment({
            [t]: r
        })
    }
    catchall(t) {
        return new Bs({
            ...this._def,
            catchall: t
        })
    }
    pick(t) {
        const r = {};
        return Tn.objectKeys(t).forEach(n => {
            t[n] && this.shape[n] && (r[n] = this.shape[n])
        }
        ),
        new Bs({
            ...this._def,
            shape: () => r
        })
    }
    omit(t) {
        const r = {};
        return Tn.objectKeys(this.shape).forEach(n => {
            t[n] || (r[n] = this.shape[n])
        }
        ),
        new Bs({
            ...this._def,
            shape: () => r
        })
    }
    deepPartial() {
        return $p(this)
    }
    partial(t) {
        const r = {};
        return Tn.objectKeys(this.shape).forEach(n => {
            const a = this.shape[n];
            t && !t[n] ? r[n] = a : r[n] = a.optional()
        }
        ),
        new Bs({
            ...this._def,
            shape: () => r
        })
    }
    required(t) {
        const r = {};
        return Tn.objectKeys(this.shape).forEach(n => {
            if (t && !t[n])
                r[n] = this.shape[n];
            else {
                let i = this.shape[n];
                for (; i instanceof Xd; )
                    i = i._def.innerType;
                r[n] = i
            }
        }
        ),
        new Bs({
            ...this._def,
            shape: () => r
        })
    }
    keyof() {
        return j$(Tn.objectKeys(this.shape))
    }
}

class Kv extends sn {
    _parse(t) {

          , n = this._def.options;
        function a(i) {
            for (const l of i)

                    return l.result;
            for (const l of i)

                    return r.common.issues.push(...l.ctx.common.issues),
                    l.result;

                        data: r.data,
                        path: r.path,
                        parent: o
                    }),

                    },

                    data: r.data,
                    path: r.path,
                    parent: d
                });

class jb extends sn {
    _parse(t) {

                expected: ir.object,
                received: r.parsedType
            }),
            Rr;
        const n = this.discriminator
          , a = r.data[n]
          , i = this.optionsMap.get(a);
        return i ? r.common.async ? i._parseAsync({
            data: r.data,
            path: r.path,
            parent: r
        }) : i._parseSync({
            data: r.data,
            path: r.path,
            parent: r
        }) : (tr(r, {

            options: Array.from(this.optionsMap.keys()),
            path: [n]
        }),
        Rr)
    }

    }

    }

            if (!o.length)
                throw new Error(`A discriminator value for key \`${t}\` could not be extracted from all schema options`);
            for (const l of o) {

                    throw new Error(`Discriminator property ${String(t)} has duplicate value ${String(l)}`);
                a.set(l, i)
            }

            typeName: Or.ZodDiscriminatedUnion,

        })
    }

function BS(e, t) {
    const r = Au(e)
      , n = Au(t);
    if (e === t)
        return {
            valid: !0,
            data: e
        };
    if (r === ir.object && n === ir.object) {
        const a = Tn.objectKeys(t)
          , i = Tn.objectKeys(e).filter(l => a.indexOf(l) !== -1)
          , o = {
            ...e,
            ...t
        };
        for (const l of i) {
            const c = BS(e[l], t[l]);
            if (!c.valid)
                return {
                    valid: !1
                };
            o[l] = c.data
        }
        return {
            valid: !0,
            data: o
        }
    } else if (r === ir.array && n === ir.array) {
        if (e.length !== t.length)
            return {
                valid: !1
            };
        const a = [];
        for (let i = 0; i < e.length; i++) {
            const o = e[i]
              , l = t[i]
              , c = BS(o, l);
            if (!c.valid)
                return {
                    valid: !1
                };
            a.push(c.data)
        }
        return {
            valid: !0,
            data: a
        }
    } else
        return r === ir.date && n === ir.date && +e == +t ? {
            valid: !0,
            data: e
        } : {
            valid: !1
        }
}

class Km extends sn {
    _parse(t) {
        const {status: r, ctx: n} = this._processInputParams(t);
        if (n.parsedType !== ir.set)
            return tr(n, {
                code: It.invalid_type,
                expected: ir.set,
                received: n.parsedType
            }),
            Rr;
        const a = this._def;
        a.minSize !== null && n.data.size < a.minSize.value && (tr(n, {
            code: It.too_small,
            minimum: a.minSize.value,
            type: "set",
            inclusive: !0,
            exact: !1,
            message: a.minSize.message
        }),
        r.dirty()),
        a.maxSize !== null && n.data.size > a.maxSize.value && (tr(n, {
            code: It.too_big,
            maximum: a.maxSize.value,
            type: "set",
            inclusive: !0,
            exact: !1,
            message: a.maxSize.message
        }),
        r.dirty());

        function o(c) {
            const d = new Set;
            for (const h of c) {
                if (h.status === "aborted")
                    return Rr;
                h.status === "dirty" && r.dirty(),
                d.add(h.value)
            }
            return {
                status: r.value,
                value: d
            }
        }
        const l = [...n.data.values()].map( (c, d) => i._parse(new nu(n,c,n.path,d)));
        return n.common.async ? Promise.all(l).then(c => o(c)) : o(l)
    }

        return new Km({
            ...this._def,
            minSize: {
                value: t,
                message: _r.toString(r)
            }
        })
    }
    max(t, r) {
        return new Km({
            ...this._def,
            maxSize: {
                value: t,
                message: _r.toString(r)
            }
        })
    }
    size(t, r) {
        return this.min(t, r).max(t, r)
    }
    nonempty(t) {
        return this.min(1, t)
    }

class Nf extends sn {

    }

            return tr(r, {
                expected: Tn.joinValues(n),

            }),
            Rr

        !Jw(this, Rg).has(t.data)) {

              , n = this._def.values;

                received: r.data,
                code: It.invalid_enum_value,
                options: n
            }),
            Rr
        }
        return uo(t.data)
    }

        return this._def.values
    }
    get enum() {
        const t = {};
        for (const r of this._def.values)
            t[r] = r;
        return t
    }
    get Values() {
        const t = {};
        for (const r of this._def.values)
            t[r] = r;
        return t
    }
    get Enum() {
        const t = {};
        for (const r of this._def.values)
            t[r] = r;
        return t
    }
    extract(t, r=this._def) {
        return Nf.create(t, {
            ...this._def,
            ...r
        })
    }
    exclude(t, r=this._def) {
        return Nf.create(this.options.filter(n => !t.includes(n)), {
            ...this._def,
            ...r
        })
    }
}

        if (l !== void 0 && typeof l != "function") {
            a[i] = l;
            continue
        }
        const c = _a(o, qv) ? o : void 0
          , d = c ? T$(c, n) : Ge.any()
          , h = typeof l == "function" ? l(d) : d;
        r.never(c) || (a[i] = h,
        c && (r.nullable(c) && (a[i] = a[i].nullable()),
        r.optional(c) && (a[i] = a[i].optional())))
    }
    return Ge.object(a)
}

    }

    const r = A$(e);

}

function ud(e) {
    const t = Object.prototype.toString.call(e);
    return e instanceof Date || typeof e == "object" && t === "[object Date]" ? new e.constructor(+e) : typeof e == "number" || t === "[object Number]" || typeof e == "string" || t === "[object String]" ? new Date(e) : new Date(NaN)
}
function Qm(e, t) {
    return e instanceof Date ? new e.constructor(t) : new Date(t)
}
const I$ = 6048e5
  , Eie = 864e5;
let kie = {};
function Sb() {
    return kie
}
function s1(e, t) {
    var l, c, d, h;
    const r = Sb()
      , n = (t == null ? void 0 : t.weekStartsOn) ?? ((c = (l = t == null ? void 0 : t.locale) == null ? void 0 : l.options) == null ? void 0 : c.weekStartsOn) ?? r.weekStartsOn ?? ((h = (d = r.locale) == null ? void 0 : d.options) == null ? void 0 : h.weekStartsOn) ?? 0
      , a = ud(e)
      , i = a.getDay()
      , o = (i < n ? 7 : 0) + i - n;
    return a.setDate(a.getDate() - o),
    a.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0),
    a
}
function s_(e) {
    return s1(e, {
        weekStartsOn: 1
    })
}
function R$(e) {
    const t = ud(e)
      , r = t.getFullYear()
      , n = Qm(e, 0);
    n.setFullYear(r + 1, 0, 4),
    n.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
    const a = s_(n)
      , i = Qm(e, 0);
    i.setFullYear(r, 0, 4),
    i.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
    const o = s_(i);
    return t.getTime() >= a.getTime() ? r + 1 : t.getTime() >= o.getTime() ? r : r - 1
}
function kA(e) {
    const t = ud(e);
    return t.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0),
    t
}
function TA(e) {
    const t = ud(e)
      , r = new Date(Date.UTC(t.getFullYear(), t.getMonth(), t.getDate(), t.getHours(), t.getMinutes(), t.getSeconds(), t.getMilliseconds()));
    return r.setUTCFullYear(t.getFullYear()),
    +e - +r
}
function Tie(e, t) {
    const r = kA(e)
      , n = kA(t)
      , a = +r - TA(r)
      , i = +n - TA(n);
    return Math.round((a - i) / Eie)
}

            a = e.values[l] || e.values[o]
        }

    }

function Ud(e) {
    return (t, r={}) => {
        const n = r.width
          , a = n && e.matchPatterns[n] || e.matchPatterns[e.defaultMatchWidth]
          , i = t.match(a);
        if (!i)
            return null;
        const o = i[0]
          , l = n && e.parsePatterns[n] || e.parsePatterns[e.defaultParseWidth]
          , c = Array.isArray(l) ? Yie(l, f => f.test(o)) : Qie(l, f => f.test(o));
        let d;
        d = e.valueCallback ? e.valueCallback(c) : c,
        d = r.valueCallback ? r.valueCallback(d) : d;
        const h = t.slice(o.length);
        return {
            value: d,
            rest: h
        }
    }
}
function Qie(e, t) {
    for (const r in e)
        if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(e, r) && t(e[r]))

function Yie(e, t) {
    for (let r = 0; r < e.length; r++)
        if (t(e[r]))
            return r
}
function M$(e) {
    return (t, r={}) => {
        const n = t.match(e.matchPattern);
        if (!n)
            return null;
        const a = n[0]
          , i = t.match(e.parsePattern);
        if (!i)
            return null;
        let o = e.valueCallback ? e.valueCallback(i[0]) : i[0];
        o = r.valueCallback ? r.valueCallback(o) : o;
        const l = t.slice(a.length);
        return {
            value: o,
            rest: l
        }
    }
}

function B$(e, t) {

function ts(e, t) {
    const r = e < 0 ? "-" : ""
      , n = Math.abs(e).toString().padStart(t, "0");
    return r + n
}
const Sh = {
    y(e, t) {
        const r = e.getFullYear()
          , n = r > 0 ? r : 1 - r;
        return ts(t === "yy" ? n % 100 : n, t.length)
    },
    M(e, t) {
        const r = e.getMonth();
        return t === "M" ? String(r + 1) : ts(r + 1, 2)
    },
    d(e, t) {
        return ts(e.getDate(), t.length)
    },
    a(e, t) {
        const r = e.getHours() / 12 >= 1 ? "pm" : "am";
        switch (t) {
        case "a":
        case "aa":
            return r.toUpperCase();
        case "aaa":
            return r;
        case "aaaaa":
            return r[0];
        case "aaaa":
        default:
            return r === "am" ? "a.m." : "p.m."
        }
    },
    h(e, t) {
        return ts(e.getHours() % 12 || 12, t.length)
    },
    H(e, t) {
        return ts(e.getHours(), t.length)
    },
    m(e, t) {
        return ts(e.getMinutes(), t.length)
    },
    s(e, t) {
        return ts(e.getSeconds(), t.length)
    },
    S(e, t) {
        const r = t.length
          , n = e.getMilliseconds()
          , a = Math.trunc(n * Math.pow(10, r - 3));
        return ts(a, t.length)
    }
}

function PA(e, t="") {
    const r = e > 0 ? "-" : "+"
      , n = Math.abs(e)
      , a = Math.trunc(n / 60)
      , i = n % 60;
    return i === 0 ? r + String(a) : r + String(a) + t + ts(i, 2)
}
function LA(e, t) {
    return e % 60 === 0 ? (e > 0 ? "-" : "+") + ts(Math.abs(e) / 60, 2) : em(e, t)
}
function em(e, t="") {
    const r = e > 0 ? "-" : "+"
      , n = Math.abs(e)
      , a = ts(Math.trunc(n / 60), 2)
      , i = ts(n % 60, 2);
    return r + a + t + i
}
const FA = (e, t) => {
    switch (e) {
    case "P":
        return t.date({
            width: "short"
        });
    case "PP":
        return t.date({
            width: "medium"
        });
    case "PPP":
        return t.date({
            width: "long"
        });
    case "PPPP":
    default:
        return t.date({
            width: "full"
        })
    }
}
  , z$ = (e, t) => {
    switch (e) {
    case "p":
        return t.time({
            width: "short"

    case "pp":
        return t.time({
            width: "medium"
        });
    case "ppp":
        return t.time({
            width: "long"
        });
    case "pppp":
    default:
        return t.time({
            width: "full"
        })
    }

  , xoe = (e, t) => {
    const r = e.match(/(P+)(p+)?/) || []
      , n = r[1]
      , a = r[2];

        return FA(e, t);
    let i;
    switch (n) {
    case "P":
        i = t.dateTime({
            width: "short"
        });

            width: "medium"
        });
        break;
    case "PPP":
        i = t.dateTime({
            width: "long"
        });
        break;
    case "PPPP":
    default:
        i = t.dateTime({
            width: "full"
        });
        break
    }
    return i.replace("{{date}}", FA(n, t)).replace("{{time}}", z$(a, t))
}

const OA = ["bg-blue-500 text-white", "bg-green-500 text-white", "bg-purple-500 text-white", "bg-orange-500 text-white", "bg-red-500 text-white", "bg-pink-500 text-white", "bg-indigo-500 text-white", "bg-teal-500 text-white", "bg-yellow-500 text-white", "bg-cyan-500 text-white"]
  , zS = e => {
    let t = 0;
    for (let r = 0; r < e.length; r++) {
        const n = e.charCodeAt(r);
        t = (t << 5) - t + n,
        t = t & t
    }
    return OA[Math.abs(t) % OA.length]
}
  , $S = e => {
    const t = e.trim().split(" ");
    return t.length === 1 ? t[0].substring(0, 2).toUpperCase() : (t[0][0] + t[t.length - 1][0]).toUpperCase()
}
;

    const l = IA(a) ? a : A3;
    n !== null && !RA(n, l) && console.error(hle(`${n}`, "Progress"));
    const c = RA(n, l) ? n : null
      , d = a_(c) ? i(c, l) : void 0;
    return s.jsx(lle, {
        scope: r,
        value: c,
        max: l,
        children: s.jsx(lr.div, {
            "aria-valuemax": l,
            "aria-valuemin": 0,
            "aria-valuenow": a_(c) ? c : void 0,
            "aria-valuetext": d,
            role: "progressbar",
            "data-state": H$(c, l),
            "data-value": c ?? void 0,
            "data-max": l,
            ...o,
            ref: t
        })
    })
}
);
V$.displayName = T3;
var U$ = "ProgressIndicator"
  , q$ = C.forwardRef( (e, t) => {
    const {__scopeProgress: r, ...n} = e
      , a = cle(U$, r);
    return s.jsx(lr.div, {
        "data-state": H$(a.value, a.max),
        "data-value": a.value ?? void 0,
        "data-max": a.max,
        ...n,
        ref: t
    })
}
);
q$.displayName = U$;
function dle(e, t) {
    return `${Math.round(e / t * 100)}%`
}
function H$(e, t) {
    return e == null ? "indeterminate" : e === t ? "complete" : "loading"
}
function a_(e) {
    return typeof e == "number"
}
function IA(e) {
    return a_(e) && !isNaN(e) && e > 0
}
function RA(e, t) {
    return a_(e) && !isNaN(e) && e <= t && e >= 0
}
function ule(e, t) {
    return `Invalid prop \`max\` of value \`${e}\` supplied to \`${t}\`. Only numbers greater than 0 are valid max values. Defaulting to \`${A3}\`.`
}
function hle(e, t) {
    return `Invalid prop \`value\` of value \`${e}\` supplied to \`${t}\`. The \`value\` prop must be:
  - a positive number
  - less than the value passed to \`max\` (or ${A3} if no \`max\` prop is set)
  - \`null\` or \`undefined\` if the progress is indeterminate.

Defaulting to \`null\`.`
}

  , fle = q$;

    ...r,
    children: s.jsx(fle, {
        className: "h-full w-full flex-1 bg-primary transition-all",
        style: {
            transform: `translateX(-${100 - (t || 0)}%)`
        }
    })
}));
hc.displayName = W$.displayName;

function gle({syncType: e="omie_complete", compact: t=!1}) {
    const {data: r, isLoading: n} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/sync-status"],
        refetchInterval: 3e4
    })
      , a = r == null ? void 0 : r.find(c => c.syncType === e);
    if (n)
        return s.jsxs("div", {
            className: "flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground",
            "data-testid": "sync-status-loading",
            children: [s.jsx(Kn, {
                className: "h-4 w-4 animate-pulse"
            }), s.jsx("span", {
                children: "Carregando status..."
            })]
        });
    if (!a)
        return s.jsxs("div", {
            className: "flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground",
            "data-testid": "sync-status-empty",
            children: [s.jsx(Kn, {
                className: "h-4 w-4"
            }), s.jsx("span", {
                children: "Nenhuma sincronização realizada ainda"
            })]
        });
    const i = kn(new Date(a.lastSyncAt), "dd/MM/yyyy 'às' HH:mm", {
        locale: ys
    })
      , o = {
        success: "text-green-600",
        error: "text-red-600",
        in_progress: "text-yellow-600"
    }
      , l = {
        success: "Sucesso",
        error: "Erro",
        in_progress: "Em progresso"
    };
    return t ? s.jsxs("div", {
        className: "flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground",
        "data-testid": "sync-status-compact",
        children: [s.jsx(Kn, {
            className: "h-4 w-4"
        }), s.jsxs("span", {
            children: ["Última atualização: ", i]
        })]
    }) : s.jsxs("div", {
        className: "flex flex-col gap-1 text-sm",
        "data-testid": "sync-status-full",
        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
            className: "flex items-center gap-2",
            children: [s.jsx(Kn, {
                className: "h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground"
            }), s.jsx("span", {
                className: "text-muted-foreground",
                children: "Última sincronização:"
            }), s.jsx("span", {
                className: "font-medium",
                children: i
            })]
        }), s.jsxs("div", {
            className: "flex items-center gap-2 pl-6",
            children: [s.jsx("span", {
                className: `font-medium ${o[a.status]}`,
                children: l[a.status]
            }), a.recordsProcessed !== void 0 && s.jsxs("span", {
                className: "text-muted-foreground",
                children: ["(", a.recordsProcessed, " registros)"]
            })]
        }), a.message && a.status === "error" && s.jsx("div", {
            className: "pl-6 text-xs text-red-600",
            "data-testid": "sync-error-message",
            children: a.message
        })]
    })
}
function MA() {
    var D, P, V, Q, Y, H, te, G, z, de, Ce, se, k;
    const {toast: e} = en()
      , {user: t, isAuthenticated: r, isLoading: n} = po()
      , a = os()
      , [i,o] = C.useState(!1)
      , [l,c] = C.useState(!1);
    C.useEffect( () => {
        if (!n && !r) {
            e({
                title: "Unauthorized",
                description: "You are logged out. Logging in again...",
                variant: "destructive"
            }),
            setTimeout( () => {
                window.location.href = "/api/login"
            }
            , 500);
            return
        }
    }
    , [r, n, e]);
    const {data: d, isLoading: h} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/dashboard/stats"],
        retry: !1
    })
      , {data: f, isLoading: g} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/dashboard/today-clients"],
        retry: !1
    })
      , {data: p, isLoading: _} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/dashboard/overdue-clients"],
        retry: !1
    })
      , [x,y] = C.useState(Date.now())
      , {data: v, isLoading: N} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/dashboard/sellers-stats", x],
        enabled: t && ["admin", "coordinator"].includes(t.role),
        retry: !1
    })
      , {data: j, isLoading: E} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/dashboard/visit-performance"],
        retry: !1
    });
    if (h || g || _ || E)
        return s.jsx("div", {
            className: "space-y-6",
            children: s.jsx("div", {
                className: "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6",
                children: [...Array(4)].map( (B, q) => s.jsx(Oe, {
                    className: "animate-pulse",
                    children: s.jsx(Re, {
                        className: "p-6",
                        children: s.jsx("div", {
                            className: "h-20 bg-gray-200 rounded"
                        })
                    })
                }, q))
            })
        });
    const R = B => new Intl.NumberFormat("pt-BR",{
        style: "currency",
        currency: "BRL"
    }).format(B)
      , U = async () => {
        o(!0);
        try {
            await a.removeQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/dashboard/sellers-stats"]
            });
            const B = Date.now();
            y(B),
            e({
                title: "Dados atualizados",
                description: "Performance dos vendedores atualizada com sucesso!"
            })
        } catch (B) {
            console.error("Erro ao atualizar dados dos vendedores:", B),
            e({
                title: "Erro",
                description: "Falha ao atualizar dados dos vendedores",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        } finally {
            o(!1)
        }
    }
      , O = async () => {
        var B;
        c(!0);
        try {
            e({
                title: "Sincronização Iniciada",
                description: "Processando em segundo plano. Aguarde...",
                variant: "default"
            });
            const q = await dr("POST", "/api/omie/sync-complete");
            if (q.success) {
                a.invalidateQueries({
                    queryKey: ["/api/sync-status"]
                });
                let K = null;
                const re = async () => {
                    var le;
                    try {
                        const ke = await dr("GET", "/api/sync-status")
                          , Ee = ke == null ? void 0 : ke.find(Te => Te.syncType === "omie_complete");
                        Ee ? Ee.status === "success" ? (c(!1),
                        e({
                            title: "Sincronização Concluída",
                            description: `✅ ${Ee.recordsProcessed || 0} registros processados com sucesso!`,
                            variant: "default"
                        }),
                        await Promise.all([a.invalidateQueries({
                            queryKey: ["/api/dashboard/stats"]
                        }), a.invalidateQueries({
                            queryKey: ["/api/dashboard/today-clients"]
                        }), a.invalidateQueries({
                            queryKey: ["/api/dashboard/overdue-clients"]
                        }), a.invalidateQueries({
                            queryKey: ["/api/customers"]
                        }), a.invalidateQueries({
                            queryKey: ["/api/billings"]
                        }), a.invalidateQueries({
                            queryKey: ["/api/omie/overdue-debts"]
                        }), a.invalidateQueries({
                            queryKey: ["/api/sync-status"]
                        })])) : Ee.status === "error" ? (c(!1),
                        e({
                            title: "Erro na Sincronização",
                            description: Ee.message || "Falha na sincronização",
                            variant: "destructive"
                        })) : Ee.status === "in_progress" && (K = setTimeout(re, 5e3)) : K = setTimeout(re, 5e3)
                    } catch (ke) {
                        if (ke.name === "AbortError" || (le = ke.message) != null && le.includes("abort")) {
                            console.log("Polling cancelado");
                            return
                        }
                        console.error("Erro ao verificar status da sincronização:", ke),
                        c(!1)
                    }
                }
                ;
                return K = setTimeout(re, 5e3),
                () => {
                    K && clearTimeout(K)
                }
            } else
                throw new Error(q.message || "Erro desconhecido")
        } catch (q) {
            if (q.name === "AbortError" || (B = q.message) != null && B.includes("abort"))
                return;
            console.error("Erro na sincronização completa:", q),
            c(!1),
            e({
                title: "Erro na Sincronização",
                description: q.message || "Falha ao iniciar sincronização",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    }

function ZS(e, t, r, n, a, i, o) {

        case R6:
        case Cj:
        case efe:

            this.ended = !0,
            !1
        }

        r.next_out && (r.avail_out === 0 || i === Sj))

                this.onEnd(i),
                this.ended = !0,
                !0;

                break
        }
    }
    return !0
}

const B6 = 4294967295;
function ufe(e, t, r) {

        n = Pq[(n ^ t[a]) & 255] ^ n >>> 8;

function hfe(e, t) {

}
function z6(e, t, r) {

      , a = hfe(new Uint8Array(e.buffer,e.byteOffset + e.offset - t - 4,t), t);

function Lq(e, t, r) {
    for (let n = 0; n < r; n++)
        t[n] = e[n]
}
function Fq(e, t, r, n) {
    let a = 0;
    for (; a < n; a++)
        t[a] = e[a];
    for (; a < r; a++)
        t[a] = e[a] + t[a - n] & 255
}
function Dq(e, t, r, n) {
    let a = 0;
    if (r.length === 0)
        for (; a < n; a++)
            t[a] = e[a];
    else
        for (; a < n; a++)
            t[a] = e[a] + r[a] & 255
}
function Oq(e, t, r, n, a) {
    let i = 0;
    if (r.length === 0) {
        for (; i < a; i++)
            t[i] = e[i];
        for (; i < n; i++)
            t[i] = e[i] + (t[i - a] >> 1) & 255
    } else {

        for (; i < n; i++)
            t[i] = e[i] + (t[i - a] + r[i] >> 1) & 255
    }
}
function Iq(e, t, r, n, a) {
    let i = 0;

    }

function ffe(e, t, r) {
    const n = e + t - r
      , a = Math.abs(n - e)
      , i = Math.abs(n - t)
      , o = Math.abs(n - r);
    return a <= i && a <= o ? e : i <= o ? t : r
}
function mfe(e, t, r, n, a, i) {
    switch (e) {
    case 0:
        Lq(t, r, a);
        break;
    case 1:
        Fq(t, r, a, i);
        break;
    case 2:
        Dq(t, r, n, a);
        break;
    case 3:
        Oq(t, r, n, a, i);
        break;
    case 4:
        Iq(t, r, n, a, i);
        break;
    default:
        throw new Error(`Unsupported filter: ${e}`)
    }
}
const pfe = new Uint16Array([255])
  , xfe = new Uint8Array(pfe.buffer)
  , gfe = xfe[0] === 255;
function vfe(e) {
    const {data: t, width: r, height: n, channels: a, depth: i} = e
      , o = [{
        x: 0,
        y: 0,
        xStep: 8,
        yStep: 8
    }, {
        x: 4,
        y: 0,
        xStep: 8,
        yStep: 8
    }, {
        x: 0,
        y: 4,
        xStep: 4,
        yStep: 8
    }, {
        x: 2,
        y: 0,
        xStep: 4,
        yStep: 4
    }, {
        x: 0,
        y: 2,
        xStep: 2,
        yStep: 4
    }, {
        x: 1,
        y: 0,
        xStep: 2,
        yStep: 2
    }, {
        x: 0,
        y: 1,
        xStep: 1,
        yStep: 2
    }]
      , l = Math.ceil(i / 8) * a
      , c = new Uint8Array(n * r * l);
    let d = 0;
    for (let h = 0; h < 7; h++) {
        const f = o[h]
          , g = Math.ceil((r - f.x) / f.xStep)
          , p = Math.ceil((n - f.y) / f.yStep);
        if (g <= 0 || p <= 0)
            continue;
        const _ = g * l
          , x = new Uint8Array(_);
        for (let y = 0; y < p; y++) {
            const v = t[d++]
              , N = t.subarray(d, d + _);
            d += _;
            const j = new Uint8Array(_);
            mfe(v, N, j, x, _, l),
            x.set(j);
            for (let E = 0; E < g; E++) {
                const R = f.x + E * f.xStep
                  , U = f.y + y * f.yStep;
                if (!(R >= r || U >= n))
                    for (let O = 0; O < l; O++)
                        c[(U * r + R) * l + O] = j[E * l + O]
            }
        }
    }
    if (i === 16) {
        const h = new Uint16Array(c.buffer);
        if (gfe)
            for (let f = 0; f < h.length; f++)
                h[f] = yfe(h[f]);
        return h
    } else
        return c
}
function yfe(e) {
    return (e & 255) << 8 | e >> 8 & 255
}
const wfe = new Uint16Array([255])
  , _fe = new Uint8Array(wfe.buffer)
  , bfe = _fe[0] === 255
  , Nfe = new Uint8Array(0);
function $6(e) {
    const {data: t, width: r, height: n, channels: a, depth: i} = e
      , o = Math.ceil(i / 8) * a
      , l = Math.ceil(i / 8 * a * r)
      , c = new Uint8Array(n * l);
    let d = Nfe, h = 0, f, g;
    for (let p = 0; p < n; p++) {
        switch (f = t.subarray(h + 1, h + 1 + l),
        g = c.subarray(p * l, (p + 1) * l),
        t[h]) {
        case 0:
            Lq(f, g, l);
            break;
        case 1:
            Fq(f, g, l, o);
            break;
        case 2:
            Dq(f, g, d, l);
            break;
        case 3:
            Oq(f, g, d, l, o);
            break;
        case 4:
            Iq(f, g, d, l, o);
            break;
        default:
            throw new Error(`Unsupported filter: ${t[h]}`)
        }
        d = g,
        h += l + 1
    }
    if (i === 16) {
        const p = new Uint16Array(c.buffer);
        if (bfe)
            for (let _ = 0; _ < p.length; _++)
                p[_] = jfe(p[_]);
        return p
    } else
        return c
}
function jfe(e) {
    return (e & 255) << 8 | e >> 8 & 255
}

function Mq(e) {

function Lfe(e, t) {

const cl = {
    UNKNOWN: -1,
    GREYSCALE: 0,
    TRUECOLOUR: 2,
    INDEXED_COLOUR: 3,

    TRUECOLOUR_ALPHA: 6

    DEFLATE: 0

    ADAPTIVE: 0

class Ffe extends q3 {
    constructor(r, n={}) {
        super(r);
        Pe(this, "_checkCrc");
        Pe(this, "_inflator");
        Pe(this, "_png");
        Pe(this, "_apng");
        Pe(this, "_end");
        Pe(this, "_hasPalette");
        Pe(this, "_palette");
        Pe(this, "_hasTransparency");
        Pe(this, "_transparency");
        Pe(this, "_compressionMethod");
        Pe(this, "_filterMethod");
        Pe(this, "_interlaceMethod");
        Pe(this, "_colorType");
        Pe(this, "_isAnimated");
        Pe(this, "_numberOfFrames");
        Pe(this, "_numberOfPlays");
        Pe(this, "_frames");
        Pe(this, "_writingDataChunks");
        const {checkCrc: a=!1} = n;
        this._checkCrc = a,
        this._inflator = new M6,
        this._png = {
            width: -1,
            height: -1,
            channels: -1,
            data: new Uint8Array(0),
            depth: 1,
            text: {}
        },
        this._apng = {
            width: -1,
            height: -1,
            channels: -1,
            depth: 1,
            numberOfFrames: 1,
            numberOfPlays: 0,
            text: {},
            frames: []
        },
        this._end = !1,
        this._hasPalette = !1,
        this._palette = [],
        this._hasTransparency = !1,
        this._transparency = new Uint16Array(0),
        this._compressionMethod = Ej.UNKNOWN,
        this._filterMethod = U6.UNKNOWN,
        this._interlaceMethod = kj.UNKNOWN,
        this._colorType = cl.UNKNOWN,
        this._isAnimated = !1,
        this._numberOfFrames = 1,
        this._numberOfPlays = 0,
        this._frames = [],
        this._writingDataChunks = !1,
        this.setBigEndian()
    }
    decode() {
        for (V6(this); !this._end; ) {
            const r = this.readUint32()
              , n = this.readChars(4);
            this.decodeChunk(r, n)
        }
        return this.decodeImage(),
        this._png
    }
    decodeApng() {
        for (V6(this); !this._end; ) {
            const r = this.readUint32()
              , n = this.readChars(4);
            this.decodeApngChunk(r, n)
        }
        return this.decodeApngImage(),
        this._apng
    }
    decodeChunk(r, n) {
        const a = this.offset;
        switch (n) {
        case "IHDR":
            this.decodeIHDR();
            break;
        case "PLTE":
            this.decodePLTE(r);
            break;
        case "IDAT":
            this.decodeIDAT(r);
            break;
        case "IEND":
            this._end = !0;
            break;
        case "tRNS":
            this.decodetRNS(r);
            break;
        case "iCCP":
            this.decodeiCCP(r);
            break;
        case Cfe:
            Pfe(this._png.text, this, r);
            break;
        case "pHYs":
            this.decodepHYs();
            break;
        default:
            this.skip(r);
            break
        }
        if (this.offset - a !== r)
            throw new Error(`Length mismatch while decoding chunk ${n}`);
        this._checkCrc ? z6(this, r + 4, n) : this.skip(4)
    }
    decodeApngChunk(r, n) {
        const a = this.offset;
        switch (n !== "fdAT" && n !== "IDAT" && this._writingDataChunks && this.pushDataToFrame(),
        n) {
        case "acTL":
            this.decodeACTL();
            break;
        case "fcTL":
            this.decodeFCTL();
            break;
        case "fdAT":
            this.decodeFDAT(r);
            break;
        default:
            this.decodeChunk(r, n),
            this.offset = a + r;
            break
        }
        if (this.offset - a !== r)
            throw new Error(`Length mismatch while decoding chunk ${n}`);
        this._checkCrc ? z6(this, r + 4, n) : this.skip(4)
    }
    decodeIHDR() {
        const r = this._png;
        r.width = this.readUint32(),
        r.height = this.readUint32(),
        r.depth = Dfe(this.readUint8());
        const n = this.readUint8();
        this._colorType = n;
        let a;
        switch (n) {
        case cl.GREYSCALE:
            a = 1;
            break;
        case cl.TRUECOLOUR:
            a = 3;
            break;
        case cl.INDEXED_COLOUR:
            a = 1;
            break;
        case cl.GREYSCALE_ALPHA:
            a = 2;
            break;
        case cl.TRUECOLOUR_ALPHA:
            a = 4;
            break;
        case cl.UNKNOWN:
        default:
            throw new Error(`Unknown color type: ${n}`)
        }
        if (this._png.channels = a,
        this._compressionMethod = this.readUint8(),
        this._compressionMethod !== Ej.DEFLATE)
            throw new Error(`Unsupported compression method: ${this._compressionMethod}`);
        this._filterMethod = this.readUint8(),
        this._interlaceMethod = this.readUint8()
    }
    decodeACTL() {
        this._numberOfFrames = this.readUint32(),
        this._numberOfPlays = this.readUint32(),
        this._isAnimated = !0
    }
    decodeFCTL() {
        const r = {
            sequenceNumber: this.readUint32(),
            width: this.readUint32(),
            height: this.readUint32(),
            xOffset: this.readUint32(),
            yOffset: this.readUint32(),
            delayNumber: this.readUint16(),
            delayDenominator: this.readUint16(),
            disposeOp: this.readUint8(),
            blendOp: this.readUint8(),
            data: new Uint8Array(0)
        };
        this._frames.push(r)
    }
    decodePLTE(r) {
        if (r % 3 !== 0)
            throw new RangeError(`PLTE field length must be a multiple of 3. Got ${r}`);
        const n = r / 3;
        this._hasPalette = !0;
        const a = [];
        this._palette = a;
        for (let i = 0; i < n; i++)
            a.push([this.readUint8(), this.readUint8(), this.readUint8()])
    }
    decodeIDAT(r) {
        this._writingDataChunks = !0;
        const n = r
          , a = this.offset + this.byteOffset;
        if (this._inflator.push(new Uint8Array(this.buffer,a,n)),
        this._inflator.err)
            throw new Error(`Error while decompressing the data: ${this._inflator.err}`);
        this.skip(r)
    }
    decodeFDAT(r) {
        this._writingDataChunks = !0;
        let n = r
          , a = this.offset + this.byteOffset;
        if (a += 4,
        n -= 4,
        this._inflator.push(new Uint8Array(this.buffer,a,n)),
        this._inflator.err)
            throw new Error(`Error while decompressing the data: ${this._inflator.err}`);
        this.skip(r)
    }
    decodetRNS(r) {
        switch (this._colorType) {
        case cl.GREYSCALE:
        case cl.TRUECOLOUR:
            {
                if (r % 2 !== 0)
                    throw new RangeError(`tRNS chunk length must be a multiple of 2. Got ${r}`);
                if (r / 2 > this._png.width * this._png.height)
                    throw new Error(`tRNS chunk contains more alpha values than there are pixels (${r / 2} vs ${this._png.width * this._png.height})`);
                this._hasTransparency = !0,
                this._transparency = new Uint16Array(r / 2);
                for (let n = 0; n < r / 2; n++)
                    this._transparency[n] = this.readUint16();
                break
            }
        case cl.INDEXED_COLOUR:
            {
                if (r > this._palette.length)
                    throw new Error(`tRNS chunk contains more alpha values than there are palette colors (${r} vs ${this._palette.length})`);
                let n = 0;
                for (; n < r; n++) {
                    const a = this.readByte();
                    this._palette[n].push(a)
                }
                for (; n < this._palette.length; n++)
                    this._palette[n].push(255);
                break
            }
        case cl.UNKNOWN:
        case cl.GREYSCALE_ALPHA:
        case cl.TRUECOLOUR_ALPHA:
        default:
            throw new Error(`tRNS chunk is not supported for color type ${this._colorType}`)
        }
    }
    decodeiCCP(r) {
        const n = Mq(this)
          , a = this.readUint8();
        if (a !== Ej.DEFLATE)
            throw new Error(`Unsupported iCCP compression method: ${a}`);
        const i = this.readBytes(r - n.length - 2);
        this._png.iccEmbeddedProfile = {
            name: n,
            profile: dfe(i)
        }
    }
    decodepHYs() {
        const r = this.readUint32()
          , n = this.readUint32()
          , a = this.readByte();
        this._png.resolution = {
            x: r,
            y: n,
            unit: a
        }
    }
    decodeApngImage() {
        this._apng.width = this._png.width,
        this._apng.height = this._png.height,
        this._apng.channels = this._png.channels,
        this._apng.depth = this._png.depth,
        this._apng.numberOfFrames = this._numberOfFrames,
        this._apng.numberOfPlays = this._numberOfPlays,
        this._apng.text = this._png.text,
        this._apng.resolution = this._png.resolution;
        for (let r = 0; r < this._numberOfFrames; r++) {
            const n = {
                sequenceNumber: this._frames[r].sequenceNumber,
                delayNumber: this._frames[r].delayNumber,
                delayDenominator: this._frames[r].delayDenominator,
                data: this._apng.depth === 8 ? new Uint8Array(this._apng.width * this._apng.height * this._apng.channels) : new Uint16Array(this._apng.width * this._apng.height * this._apng.channels)
            }
              , a = this._frames.at(r);
            if (a) {
                if (a.data = $6({
                    data: a.data,
                    width: a.width,
                    height: a.height,
                    channels: this._apng.channels,
                    depth: this._apng.depth
                }),
                this._hasPalette && (this._apng.palette = this._palette),
                this._hasTransparency && (this._apng.transparency = this._transparency),
                r === 0 || a.xOffset === 0 && a.yOffset === 0 && a.width === this._png.width && a.height === this._png.height)
                    n.data = a.data;
                else {
                    const i = this._apng.frames.at(r - 1);
                    this.disposeFrame(a, i, n),
                    this.addFrameDataToCanvas(n, a)
                }
                this._apng.frames.push(n)
            }
        }
        return this._apng
    }
    disposeFrame(r, n, a) {
        switch (r.disposeOp) {
        case i2.NONE:
            break;
        case i2.BACKGROUND:
            for (let i = 0; i < this._png.height; i++)
                for (let o = 0; o < this._png.width; o++) {
                    const l = (i * r.width + o) * this._png.channels;
                    for (let c = 0; c < this._png.channels; c++)
                        a.data[l + c] = 0
                }
            break;
        case i2.PREVIOUS:
            a.data.set(n.data);
            break;
        default:
            throw new Error("Unknown disposeOp")
        }
    }
    addFrameDataToCanvas(r, n) {
        const a = 1 << this._png.depth
          , i = (o, l) => {
            const c = ((o + n.yOffset) * this._png.width + n.xOffset + l) * this._png.channels
              , d = (o * n.width + l) * this._png.channels;
            return {
                index: c,
                frameIndex: d
            }
        }
        ;
        switch (n.blendOp) {
        case Tj.SOURCE:
            for (let o = 0; o < n.height; o++)
                for (let l = 0; l < n.width; l++) {
                    const {index: c, frameIndex: d} = i(o, l);
                    for (let h = 0; h < this._png.channels; h++)
                        r.data[c + h] = n.data[d + h]
                }
            break;
        case Tj.OVER:
            for (let o = 0; o < n.height; o++)
                for (let l = 0; l < n.width; l++) {
                    const {index: c, frameIndex: d} = i(o, l);
                    for (let h = 0; h < this._png.channels; h++) {
                        const f = n.data[d + this._png.channels - 1] / a

                data: r,

function hP(e, t, r, n) {
    for (var a = e[t++], i = 1 << a, o = i + 1, l = o + 1, c = a + 1, d = (1 << c) - 1, h = 0, f = 0, g = 0, p = e[t++], _ = new Int32Array(4096), x = null; ; ) {
        for (; h < 16 && p !== 0; )
            f |= e[t++] << h,
            h += 8,
            p === 1 ? p = e[t++] : --p;
        if (h < c)
            break;
        var y = f & d;
        if (f >>= c,
        h -= c,
        y !== i) {
            if (y === o)
                break;
            for (var v = y < l ? y : x, N = 0, j = v; j > i; )
                j = _[j] >> 8,
                ++N;
            var E = j;
            if (g + N + (v !== y ? 1 : 0) > n)
                return void fs.log("Warning, gif stream longer than expected.");
            r[g++] = E;
            var R = g += N;
            for (v !== y && (r[g++] = E),
            j = v; N--; )
                j = _[j],
                r[--R] = 255 & j,
                j >>= 8;
            x !== null && l < 4096 && (_[l++] = x << 8 | E,
            l >= d + 1 && c < 12 && (++c,
            d = d << 1 | 1)),
            x = y
        } else
            l = o + 1,
            d = (1 << (c = a + 1)) - 1,
            x = null
    }
    return g !== n && fs.log("Warning, gif stream shorter than expected."),
    r
}

function Mc(e, t) {
    if (this.pos = 0,
    this.buffer = e,
    this.datav = new DataView(e.buffer),
    this.is_with_alpha = !!t,
    this.bottom_up = !0,
    this.flag = String.fromCharCode(this.buffer[0]) + String.fromCharCode(this.buffer[1]),
    this.pos += 2,
    ["BM", "BA", "CI", "CP", "IC", "PT"].indexOf(this.flag) === -1)
        throw new Error("Invalid BMP File");

    this.parseBGR()

function fP(e) {
    function t(T) {
        if (!T)
            throw Error("assert :P")
    }
    function r(T, D, P) {
        for (var V = 0; 4 > V; V++)
            if (T[D + V] != P.charCodeAt(V))
                return !0;
        return !1
    }
    function n(T, D, P, V, Q) {
        for (var Y = 0; Y < Q; Y++)
            T[D + Y] = P[V + Y]
    }
    function a(T, D, P, V) {
        for (var Q = 0; Q < V; Q++)
            T[D + Q] = P
    }
    function i(T) {
        return new Int32Array(T)
    }
    function o(T, D) {
        for (var P = [], V = 0; V < T; V++)
            P.push(new D);
        return P
    }
    function l(T, D) {
        var P = [];
        return function V(Q, Y, H) {
            for (var te = H[Y], G = 0; G < te && (Q.push(H.length > Y + 1 ? [] : new D),
            !(H.length < Y + 1)); G++)
                V(Q[G], Y + 1, H)
        }(P, 0, T),
        P
    }
    var c = function() {
        var T = this;
        function D(w, S) {
            for (var I = 1 << S - 1 >>> 0; w & I; )
                I >>>= 1;
            return I ? (w & I - 1) + I : w
        }
        function P(w, S, I, W, J) {
            t(!(W % I));
            do
                w[S + (W -= I)] = J;
            while (0 < W)
        }
        function V(w, S, I, W, J) {
            if (t(2328 >= J),
            512 >= J)
                var ae = i(512);
            else if ((ae = i(J)) == null)
                return 0;
            return function(oe, ue, pe, be, Be, nt) {
                var Ne, Ve, Qe = ue, mt = 1 << pe, tt = i(16), gt = i(16);
                for (t(Be != 0),
                t(be != null),
                t(oe != null),
                t(0 < pe),
                Ve = 0; Ve < Be; ++Ve) {
                    if (15 < be[Ve])
                        return 0;
                    ++tt[be[Ve]]
                }
                if (tt[0] == Be)
                    return 0;
                for (gt[1] = 0,
                Ne = 1; 15 > Ne; ++Ne) {
                    if (tt[Ne] > 1 << Ne)
                        return 0;
                    gt[Ne + 1] = gt[Ne] + tt[Ne]
                }
                for (Ve = 0; Ve < Be; ++Ve)
                    Ne = be[Ve],
                    0 < be[Ve] && (nt[gt[Ne]++] = Ve);
                if (gt[15] == 1)
                    return (be = new Q).g = 0,
                    be.value = nt[0],
                    P(oe, Qe, 1, mt, be),
                    mt;
                var yt, Dt = -1, Et = mt - 1, Er = 0, hr = 1, Yr = 1, gr = 1 << pe;
                for (Ve = 0,
                Ne = 1,
                Be = 2; Ne <= pe; ++Ne,
                Be <<= 1) {
                    if (hr += Yr <<= 1,
                    0 > (Yr -= tt[Ne]))
                        return 0;
                    for (; 0 < tt[Ne]; --tt[Ne])
                        (be = new Q).g = Ne,
                        be.value = nt[Ve++],
                        P(oe, Qe + Er, Be, gr, be),
                        Er = D(Er, Ne)
                }
                for (Ne = pe + 1,
                Be = 2; 15 >= Ne; ++Ne,
                Be <<= 1) {
                    if (hr += Yr <<= 1,
                    0 > (Yr -= tt[Ne]))
                        return 0;
                    for (; 0 < tt[Ne]; --tt[Ne]) {
                        if (be = new Q,
                        (Er & Et) != Dt) {
                            for (Qe += gr,
                            yt = 1 << (Dt = Ne) - pe; 15 > Dt && !(0 >= (yt -= tt[Dt])); )
                                ++Dt,
                                yt <<= 1;
                            mt += gr = 1 << (yt = Dt - pe),
                            oe[ue + (Dt = Er & Et)].g = yt + pe,
                            oe[ue + Dt].value = Qe - ue - Dt
                        }
                        be.g = Ne - pe,
                        be.value = nt[Ve++],
                        P(oe, Qe + (Er >> pe), Be, gr, be),
                        Er = D(Er, Ne)
                    }
                }
                return hr != 2 * gt[15] - 1 ? 0 : mt
            }(w, S, I, W, J, ae)
        }
        function Q() {
            this.value = this.g = 0
        }
        function Y() {
            this.value = this.g = 0
        }
        function H() {
            this.G = o(5, Q),
            this.H = i(5),
            this.jc = this.Qb = this.qb = this.nd = 0,
            this.pd = o(qi, Y)
        }
        function te(w, S, I, W) {
            t(w != null),
            t(S != null),
            t(2147483648 > W),
            w.Ca = 254,
            w.I = 0,
            w.b = -8,
            w.Ka = 0,
            w.oa = S,
            w.pa = I,
            w.Jd = S,
            w.Yc = I + W,
            w.Zc = 4 <= W ? I + W - 4 + 1 : I,
            ke(w)
        }
        function G(w, S) {
            for (var I = 0; 0 < S--; )
                I |= Te(w, 128) << S;
            return I
        }
        function z(w, S) {
            var I = G(w, S);
            return Ee(w) ? -I : I
        }
        function de(w, S, I, W) {
            var J, ae = 0;
            for (t(w != null),
            t(S != null),
            t(4294967288 > W),
            w.Sb = W,
            w.Ra = 0,
            w.u = 0,
            w.h = 0,
            4 < W && (W = 4),
            J = 0; J < W; ++J)
                ae += S[I + J] << 8 * J;
            w.Ra = ae,
            w.bb = W,
            w.oa = S,
            w.pa = I
        }
        function Ce(w) {
            for (; 8 <= w.u && w.bb < w.Sb; )
                w.Ra >>>= 8,
                w.Ra += w.oa[w.pa + w.bb] << el - 8 >>> 0,
                ++w.bb,
                w.u -= 8;
            K(w) && (w.h = 1,
            w.u = 0)
        }
        function se(w, S) {
            if (t(0 <= S),
            !w.h && S <= So) {
                var I = q(w) & bd[S];
                return w.u += S,
                Ce(w),
                I
            }
            return w.h = 1,
            w.u = 0
        }
        function k() {
            this.b = this.Ca = this.I = 0,
            this.oa = [],
            this.pa = 0,
            this.Jd = [],
            this.Yc = 0,
            this.Zc = [],
            this.Ka = 0
        }
        function B() {
            this.Ra = 0,
            this.oa = [],
            this.h = this.u = this.bb = this.Sb = this.pa = 0

        function jc(w, S) {
            if (w == null)
                return 0;
            if (w.a = 0,
            w.sc = "OK",
            S == null)
                return bs(w, 2, "null VP8Io passed to VP8GetHeaders()");
            var I = S.data
              , W = S.w
              , J = S.ha;
            if (4 > J)
                return bs(w, 7, "Truncated header.");
            var ae = I[W + 0] | I[W + 1] << 8 | I[W + 2] << 16
              , oe = w.Od;
            if (oe.Rb = !(1 & ae),
            oe.td = ae >> 1 & 7,
            oe.yd = ae >> 4 & 1,
            oe.ub = ae >> 5,
            3 < oe.td)
                return bs(w, 3, "Incorrect keyframe parameters.");
            if (!oe.yd)

        function Ko(w, S, I, W, J, ae, oe) {

                    I = 0,
                    J == 16)

                      , Be = 0;

        }
        function Ir(w) {

        function An(w, S, I, W, J) {
            J = w[S + I + 32 * W] + (J >> 3),
            w[S + I + 32 * W] = -256 & J ? 0 > J ? 0 : 255 : J
        }
        function Sc(w, S, I, W, J, ae) {

        function ps(w) {
            return (20091 * w >> 16) + w
        }
        function za(w, S, I, W) {
            var J, ae = 0, oe = i(16);
            for (J = 0; 4 > J; ++J) {

                  , pe = w[S + 0] - w[S + 8]
                  , be = (35468 * w[S + 4] >> 16) - ps(w[S + 12])
                  , Be = ps(w[S + 4]) + (35468 * w[S + 12] >> 16);

                oe[ae + 2] = pe - be,
                oe[ae + 3] = ue - Be,

            }

        }
        function Jx(w, S, I, W) {

        function md(w, S, I, W) {

                  , ue = w[S + 4 + J] + w[S + 8 + J]

                ae[12 + J] = be - pe
            }

                oe = (w = ae[0 + 4 * J] + 3) + ae[3 + 4 * J],
                ue = ae[1 + 4 * J] + ae[2 + 4 * J],

                I[W + 32] = oe - ue >> 3,

                W += 64
        }
        function _o(w, S, I) {

            }
        }

        function Hn(w, S) {

        function xp(w, S) {

        function Yo(w, S) {

        function kc(w, S) {

              , W = w[S - 1 + 32]

        function gd(w, S) {

        }

        function Ac(w, S, I) {
            var W = w[S - I]
              , J = w[S + 0]
              , ae = 3 * (J - W) + xh[1020 + w[S - 2 * I] - w[S + I]]
              , oe = Sd[112 + (ae + 4 >> 3)];
            w[S - I] = ji[255 + W + Sd[112 + (ae + 3 >> 3)]],
            w[S + 0] = ji[255 + J - oe]
        }
        function pu(w, S, I, W) {
            var J = w[S + 0]
              , ae = w[S + I];
            return Wi[255 + w[S - 2 * I] - w[S - I]] > W || Wi[255 + ae - J] > W
        }
        function ch(w, S, I, W) {

            }
        this.path.push({
            type: "close"
        }),
        this.ctx.lastPoint = new o(k.x,k.y)
    }

    f.prototype.arc = function(k, B, q, K, re, le) {

        !this.ctx.transform.isIdentity) {

              , Te = this.ctx.transform.applyToPoint(new o(0,0));

        re = 2 * Math.PI),

    var g = function(k) {
        var B, q, K, re;
        if (k.isCanvasGradient === !0 && (k = k.getColor()),
        !k)
            return {
                r: 0,
                g: 0,
                b: 0,
                a: 0,
                style: k
            };
        if (/transparent|rgba\s*\(\s*(\d+)\s*,\s*(\d+)\s*,\s*(\d+)\s*,\s*0+\s*\)/.test(k))
            B = 0,
            q = 0,
            K = 0,
            re = 0;
        else {
            var le = /rgb\s*\(\s*(\d+)\s*,\s*(\d+)\s*,\s*(\d+)\s*\)/.exec(k);
            if (le !== null)
                B = parseInt(le[1]),
                q = parseInt(le[2]),
                K = parseInt(le[3]),
                re = 1;
            else if ((le = /rgba\s*\(\s*(\d+)\s*,\s*(\d+)\s*,\s*(\d+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)\s*\)/.exec(k)) !== null)
                B = parseInt(le[1]),
                q = parseInt(le[2]),
                K = parseInt(le[3]),
                re = parseFloat(le[4]);
            else {
                if (re = 1,
                typeof k == "string" && k.charAt(0) !== "#") {
                    var ke = new Bq(k);
                    k = ke.ok ? ke.toHex() : "#000000"
                }
                k.length === 4 ? (B = k.substring(1, 2),
                B += B,
                q = k.substring(2, 3),
                q += q,
                K = k.substring(3, 4),
                K += K) : (B = k.substring(1, 3),
                q = k.substring(3, 5),
                K = k.substring(5, 7)),
                B = parseInt(B, 16),
                q = parseInt(q, 16),
                K = parseInt(K, 16)
            }
        }
        return {
            r: B,
            g: q,
            b: K,
            a: re,
            style: k
        }
    }
      , p = function() {

    }
      , _ = function() {

    f.prototype.measureText = function(k) {

                }

        }
        ({

    f.prototype.drawImage = function(k, B, q, K, re, le, ke, Ee, Te) {
        var qe = this.pdf.getImageProperties(k)
          , ve = 1
          , ce = 1
          , Ae = 1
          , fe = 1;
        K !== void 0 && Ee !== void 0 && (Ae = Ee / K,
        fe = Te / re,
        ve = qe.width / K * Ee / K,
        ce = qe.height / re * Te / re),

        ke = q,
        B = 0,
        q = 0),

        for (var Ct, ot = this.ctx.transform.decompose(), Lt = z(ot.rotate.shx), pt = new c, $e = (pt = (pt = (pt = pt.multiply(ot.translate)).multiply(ot.skew)).multiply(ot.scale)).applyToRectangle(new l(le - B * Ae,ke - q * fe,K * ve,re * ce)), dt = y.call(this, $e), he = [], ee = 0; ee < dt.length; ee += 1)
            he.indexOf(dt[ee]) === -1 && he.push(dt[ee]);
        if (j(he),
        this.autoPaging)
            for (var Ie = he[0], at = he[he.length - 1], ze = Ie; ze < at + 1; ze++) {
