    ;
    var y = function(k, B, q) {
        var K = [];
        B = B || this.pdf.internal.pageSize.width,
        q = q || this.pdf.internal.pageSize.height - this.margin[0] - this.margin[2];
        var re = this.posY + this.ctx.prevPageLastElemOffset;
        switch (k.type) {
        default:
        case "mt":
        case "lt":
            K.push(Math.floor((k.y + re) / q) + 1);
            break;
        case "arc":
            K.push(Math.floor((k.y + re - k.radius) / q) + 1),
            K.push(Math.floor((k.y + re + k.radius) / q) + 1);
            break;
        case "qct":
            var le = de(this.ctx.lastPoint.x, this.ctx.lastPoint.y, k.x1, k.y1, k.x, k.y);
            K.push(Math.floor((le.y + re) / q) + 1),
            K.push(Math.floor((le.y + le.h + re) / q) + 1);
            break;
        case "bct":
            var ke = Ce(this.ctx.lastPoint.x, this.ctx.lastPoint.y, k.x1, k.y1, k.x2, k.y2, k.x, k.y);
            K.push(Math.floor((ke.y + re) / q) + 1),
            K.push(Math.floor((ke.y + ke.h + re) / q) + 1);
            break;
        case "rect":
            K.push(Math.floor((k.y + re) / q) + 1),
            K.push(Math.floor((k.y + k.h + re) / q) + 1)
        }
        for (var Ee = 0; Ee < K.length; Ee += 1)
            for (; this.pdf.internal.getNumberOfPages() < K[Ee]; )
                v.call(this);
        return K
    }
      , v = function() {
        var k = this.fillStyle
          , B = this.strokeStyle
          , q = this.font
          , K = this.lineCap
          , re = this.lineWidth
          , le = this.lineJoin;
        this.pdf.addPage(),
        this.fillStyle = k,
        this.strokeStyle = B,
        this.font = q,
        this.lineCap = K,
        this.lineWidth = re,
        this.lineJoin = le
    }
      , N = function(k, B, q) {
        for (var K = 0; K < k.length; K++)
            switch (k[K].type) {
            case "bct":
                k[K].x2 += B,
                k[K].y2 += q;
            case "qct":
                k[K].x1 += B,
                k[K].y1 += q;
            default:
                k[K].x += B,
                k[K].y += q
            }
        return k
    }
      , j = function(k) {
        return k.sort(function(B, q) {
            return B - q
        })
    }
      , E = function(k, B) {
        for (var q, K, re = this.fillStyle, le = this.strokeStyle, ke = this.lineCap, Ee = this.lineWidth, Te = Math.abs(Ee * this.ctx.transform.scaleX), qe = this.lineJoin, ve = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.path)), ce = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.path)), Ae = [], fe = 0; fe < ce.length; fe++)
            if (ce[fe].x !== void 0)
                for (var Ct = y.call(this, ce[fe]), ot = 0; ot < Ct.length; ot += 1)
                    Ae.indexOf(Ct[ot]) === -1 && Ae.push(Ct[ot]);
        for (var Lt = 0; Lt < Ae.length; Lt++)
            for (; this.pdf.internal.getNumberOfPages() < Ae[Lt]; )
                v.call(this);
        if (j(Ae),
        this.autoPaging)
            for (var pt = Ae[0], $e = Ae[Ae.length - 1], dt = pt; dt < $e + 1; dt++) {
                this.pdf.setPage(dt),
                this.fillStyle = re,
                this.strokeStyle = le,
                this.lineCap = ke,
                this.lineWidth = Te,
                this.lineJoin = qe;
                var he = this.pdf.internal.pageSize.width - this.margin[3] - this.margin[1]
                  , ee = dt === 1 ? this.posY + this.margin[0] : this.margin[0]
                  , Ie = this.pdf.internal.pageSize.height - this.posY - this.margin[0] - this.margin[2]
                  , at = this.pdf.internal.pageSize.height - this.margin[0] - this.margin[2]
                  , ze = dt === 1 ? 0 : Ie + (dt - 2) * at;
                if (this.ctx.clip_path.length !== 0) {
                    var rt = this.path;
                    q = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.ctx.clip_path)),
                    this.path = N(q, this.posX + this.margin[3], -ze + ee + this.ctx.prevPageLastElemOffset),
                    R.call(this, k, !0),
                    this.path = rt
                }
                if (K = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(ve)),
                this.path = N(K, this.posX + this.margin[3], -ze + ee + this.ctx.prevPageLastElemOffset),
                B === !1 || dt === 0) {
                    var ct = (dt > pt || dt < $e) && x.call(this);
                    ct && (this.pdf.saveGraphicsState(),
                    this.pdf.rect(this.margin[3], this.margin[0], he, at, null).clip().discardPath()),
                    R.call(this, k, B),
                    ct && this.pdf.restoreGraphicsState()
                }
                this.lineWidth = Ee
            }
        else
            this.lineWidth = Te,
            R.call(this, k, B),
            this.lineWidth = Ee;
        this.path = ve
    }
      , R = function(k, B) {
        if ((k !== "stroke" || B || !_.call(this)) && (k === "stroke" || B || !p.call(this))) {
            for (var q, K, re = [], le = this.path, ke = 0; ke < le.length; ke++) {
                var Ee = le[ke];
                switch (Ee.type) {
                case "begin":
                    re.push({
                        begin: !0
                    });
                    break;
                case "close":
                    re.push({
                        close: !0
                    });
                    break;
                case "mt":
                    re.push({
                        start: Ee,
                        deltas: [],
                        abs: []
                    });
                    break;
                case "lt":
                    var Te = re.length;
                    if (le[ke - 1] && !isNaN(le[ke - 1].x) && (q = [Ee.x - le[ke - 1].x, Ee.y - le[ke - 1].y],
                    Te > 0)) {
                        for (; Te >= 0; Te--)
                            if (re[Te - 1].close !== !0 && re[Te - 1].begin !== !0) {
                                re[Te - 1].deltas.push(q),
                                re[Te - 1].abs.push(Ee);
                                break
                            }
                    }
                    break;
                case "bct":
                    q = [Ee.x1 - le[ke - 1].x, Ee.y1 - le[ke - 1].y, Ee.x2 - le[ke - 1].x, Ee.y2 - le[ke - 1].y, Ee.x - le[ke - 1].x, Ee.y - le[ke - 1].y],
                    re[re.length - 1].deltas.push(q);
                    break;
                case "qct":
                    var qe = le[ke - 1].x + 2 / 3 * (Ee.x1 - le[ke - 1].x)
                      , ve = le[ke - 1].y + 2 / 3 * (Ee.y1 - le[ke - 1].y)
                      , ce = Ee.x + 2 / 3 * (Ee.x1 - Ee.x)
                      , Ae = Ee.y + 2 / 3 * (Ee.y1 - Ee.y)
                      , fe = Ee.x
                      , Ct = Ee.y;
                    q = [qe - le[ke - 1].x, ve - le[ke - 1].y, ce - le[ke - 1].x, Ae - le[ke - 1].y, fe - le[ke - 1].x, Ct - le[ke - 1].y],
                    re[re.length - 1].deltas.push(q);
                    break;
                case "arc":
                    re.push({
                        deltas: [],
                        abs: [],
                        arc: !0
                    }),
                    Array.isArray(re[re.length - 1].abs) && re[re.length - 1].abs.push(Ee)
                }

Rp.splitTextToSize = function(e, t, r) {

    r = this.internal.getNumberOfPages()) : (t = new RegExp(this.pdfEscape16(e, this.internal.getFont()),"g"),

    return this

function Rme(e) {

}
function Mme(e) {

function Bme(e, t) {

        count: 0,
        height: 0
    }, n = 0, a = e.allRows(); n < a.length; n++) {
        for (var i = a[n], o = 0, l = e.columns; o < l.length; o++) {
            var c = l[o]
              , d = i.cells[c.index];
            if (d) {
                t.applyStyles(d.styles, !0);
                var h = d.width - d.padding("horizontal");
                if (d.styles.overflow === "linebreak")
                    d.text = t.splitTextToSize(d.text, h + 1 / t.scaleFactor(), {
                        fontSize: d.styles.fontSize
                    });
                else if (d.styles.overflow === "ellipsize")
                    d.text = xP(d.text, h, d.styles, t, "...");
                else if (d.styles.overflow === "hidden")
                    d.text = xP(d.text, h, d.styles, t, "");
                else if (typeof d.styles.overflow == "function") {
                    var f = d.styles.overflow(d.text, h);
                    typeof f == "string" ? d.text = [f] : d.text = f
                }
                d.contentHeight = d.getContentHeight(t.scaleFactor(), t.getLineHeightFactor());
                var g = d.contentHeight / d.rowSpan;
                d.rowSpan > 1 && r.count * r.height < g * d.rowSpan ? r = {
                    height: g,
                    count: d.rowSpan
                } : r && r.count > 0 && r.height > g && (g = r.height),
                g > i.height && (i.height = g)
            }
        }
        r.count--
    }
}

        e = e.substring(0, e.length - 1);

}

function Bj(e, t, r, n, a, i) {

function Yme(e, t, r, n) {

function Xu(e, t, r, n, a) {

            })]
        })
    }) : null
}
function rpe({isOpen: e, onClose: t, cardId: r, customerLatitude: n, customerLongitude: a, onSuccess: i}) {
    const {toast: o} = en()
      , [l,c] = C.useState("location")
      , [d,h] = C.useState(null)
      , [f,g] = C.useState(null)
      , [p,_] = C.useState(null)
      , [x,y] = C.useState(null)
      , v = C.useRef(null)
      , N = (T, D, P, V) => {
        const Y = (P - T) * Math.PI / 180
          , H = (V - D) * Math.PI / 180
          , te = Math.sin(Y / 2) * Math.sin(Y / 2) + Math.cos(T * Math.PI / 180) * Math.cos(P * Math.PI / 180) * Math.sin(H / 2) * Math.sin(H / 2);
        return 6371e3 * (2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(te), Math.sqrt(1 - te)))
    }
      , j = async () => {
        c("location");
        try {
            const T = await new Promise( (P, V) => {
                navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(P, V, {
                    enableHighAccuracy: !0,
                    timeout: 1e4,
                    maximumAge: 0
                })
            }
            )
              , D = {
                latitude: T.coords.latitude,
                longitude: T.coords.longitude
            };
            if (h(D),
            n && a) {
                const P = N(D.latitude, D.longitude, parseFloat(n), parseFloat(a));
                g(P)
            }
            c("photo"),
            E()
        } catch (T) {
            o({
                title: "Erro ao capturar localização",
                description: T instanceof Error ? T.message : "Erro desconhecido",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    }
      , E = async () => {
        try {
            const T = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({
                video: {
                    facingMode: "environment"
                }
            });
            y(T),
            v.current && (v.current.srcObject = T)
        } catch (T) {
            o({
                title: "Erro ao acessar câmera",
                description: T instanceof Error ? T.message : "Erro desconhecido",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    }
      , R = () => {
        if (!v.current)
            return;
        const T = document.createElement("canvas");
        T.width = v.current.videoWidth,
        T.height = v.current.videoHeight;
        const D = T.getContext("2d");
        if (D) {
            D.drawImage(v.current, 0, 0);
            const P = T.toDataURL("image/jpeg");
            _(P),
            x && (x.getTracks().forEach(V => V.stop()),
            y(null))
        }
    }
      , U = () => {
        _(null),
        E()
    }
      , O = async () => {
        if (!(!d || !p)) {
            c("submitting");
            try {
                const D = await (await fetch(p)).blob()
                  , P = new FormData;
                if (P.append("photo", D, "checkin.jpg"),
                P.append("latitude", d.latitude.toString()),
                P.append("longitude", d.longitude.toString()),
                !(await fetch(`/api/sales-cards/${r}/check-in`, {
                    method: "POST",
                    credentials: "include",
                    body: P
                })).ok)
                    throw new Error("Erro ao realizar check-in");
                o({
                    title: "Check-in realizado!",
                    description: f ? `Distância: ${f.toFixed(0)}m do cliente` : "Check-in registrado com sucesso"
                }),
                i(),
                M()
            } catch (T) {
                o({
                    title: "Erro ao realizar check-in",
                    description: T instanceof Error ? T.message : "Erro desconhecido",
                    variant: "destructive"
                }),
                c("photo")
            }
        }
    }
      , M = () => {
        x && (x.getTracks().forEach(T => T.stop()),
        y(null)),
        c("location"),
        h(null),
        g(null),
        _(null),
        t()
    }
    ;
    return s.jsx(xn, {
        open: e,
        onOpenChange: M,
        children: s.jsxs(gn, {
            className: "max-w-lg",
            children: [s.jsx(Dn, {
                children: s.jsx(On, {
                    children: "Check-in no Cliente"
                })
            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                className: "space-y-4",
                children: [l === "location" && s.jsxs("div", {
                    className: "text-center py-8",
                    children: [s.jsx(Sr, {
                        className: "h-16 w-16 mx-auto mb-4 text-blue-500"
                    }), s.jsx("h3", {
                        className: "text-lg font-semibold mb-2",
                        children: "Capturar Localização"
                    }), s.jsx("p", {
                        className: "text-gray-600 mb-6",
                        children: "Primeiro, vamos capturar sua localização para registrar o check-in"
                    }), s.jsxs(je, {
                        onClick: j,
                        "data-testid": "button-capture-location",
                        children: [s.jsx(Sr, {
                            className: "mr-2 h-4 w-4"
                        }), "Capturar Localização"]
                    })]
                }), l === "photo" && !p && s.jsxs("div", {
                    className: "space-y-4",
                    children: [f !== null && s.jsx("div", {
                        className: "bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-lg p-3 text-center",
                        children: s.jsxs("p", {
                            className: "text-sm text-blue-800",
                            children: ["📍 Distância do cliente: ", s.jsxs("strong", {
                                children: [f.toFixed(0), "m"]
                            })]
                        })
                    }), s.jsx("div", {
                        className: "relative bg-black rounded-lg overflow-hidden aspect-video",
                        children: s.jsx("video", {
                            ref: v,
                            autoPlay: !0,
                            playsInline: !0,
                            className: "w-full h-full object-cover",
                            "data-testid": "video-camera"
                        })
                    }), s.jsxs(je, {
                        onClick: R,
                        className: "w-full",
                        "data-testid": "button-take-photo",
                        children: [s.jsx(Hd, {
                            className: "mr-2 h-4 w-4"
                        }), "Tirar Foto"]
                    })]
                }), l === "photo" && p && s.jsxs("div", {
                    className: "space-y-4",
                    children: [f !== null && s.jsx("div", {
                        className: "bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-lg p-3 text-center",
                        children: s.jsxs("p", {
                            className: "text-sm text-blue-800",
                            children: ["📍 Distância do cliente: ", s.jsxs("strong", {
                                children: [f.toFixed(0), "m"]
                            })]
                        })
                    }), s.jsx("div", {
                        className: "relative rounded-lg overflow-hidden",
                        children: s.jsx("img", {
                            src: p,
                            alt: "Check-in",
                            className: "w-full",
                            "data-testid": "img-checkin-photo"
                        })
                    }), s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "flex gap-2",
                        children: [s.jsx(je, {
                            variant: "outline",
                            onClick: U,
                            className: "flex-1",
                            "data-testid": "button-retake-photo",
                            children: "Refazer Foto"
                        }), s.jsx(je, {
                            onClick: O,
                            className: "flex-1",
                            "data-testid": "button-confirm-checkin",
                            children: "Confirmar Check-in"
                        })]
                    })]
                }), l === "submitting" && s.jsxs("div", {
                    className: "text-center py-8",
                    children: [s.jsx(ba, {
                        className: "h-16 w-16 mx-auto mb-4 animate-spin text-blue-500"
                    }), s.jsx("p", {
                        className: "text-gray-600",
                        children: "Enviando check-in..."
                    })]
                })]
            })]
        })
    })
}
function J3({isOpen: e, onClose: t, card: r, onStartSale: n, onStartNoSale: a}) {
    var de, Ce;
    const {toast: i} = en()
      , o = os()
      , [l,c] = C.useState(!1)
      , [d,h] = C.useState(!1)
      , [f,g] = C.useState(!1)
      , [p,_] = C.useState(!1)
      , {data: x} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/auth/user"],
        retry: !1
    })
      , {data: y} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/sales-cards", r == null ? void 0 : r.id],
        queryFn: async () => {
            if (!(r != null && r.id))
                return null;
            const se = await fetch(`/api/sales-cards/${r.id}`);
            return se.ok ? se.json() : r
        }
        ,
        enabled: !!(r != null && r.id) && e,
        refetchInterval: !1,
        staleTime: 0
    })
      , v = y || r
      , {data: N} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/sales-cards", r == null ? void 0 : r.id, "orders"],
        queryFn: async () => {
            if (!(r != null && r.id))
                return [];
            const se = await fetch(`/api/sales-cards/${r.id}/orders`);
            return se.ok ? se.json() : []
        }
        ,
        enabled: !!(r != null && r.id) && e
    })
      , j = ["admin", "coordinator", "administrative"].includes(x == null ? void 0 : x.role);
    C.useEffect( () => {
        v != null && v.customer && g(v.customer.virtualService || !1)
    }
    , [v]);
    const E = () => new Promise( (se, k) => {
        if (!navigator.geolocation) {
            k(new Error("Geolocalização não é suportada neste navegador"));
            return
        }
        navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(B => {
            se({
                latitude: B.coords.latitude,
                longitude: B.coords.longitude
            })
        }
        , B => {
            k(new Error("Erro ao obter localização: " + B.message))
        }
        , {
            enableHighAccuracy: !0,
            timeout: 1e4,
            maximumAge: 6e4
        })
    }
    )
      , R = Gt({
        mutationFn: async se => {
            await dr("POST", `/api/sales-cards/${se.cardId}/check-out`, {
                latitude: se.latitude,
                longitude: se.longitude
            })
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            o.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/sales-cards"]
            }),
            o.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/sales-cards/by-day"],
                exact: !1
            }),
            h(!1),
            i({
                title: "Check-out Realizado",
                description: "Check-out registrado com sucesso!"
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: se => {
            h(!1),
            i({
                title: "Erro no Check-out",
                description: se.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , U = Gt({
        mutationFn: async se => {
            await dr("POST", `/api/sales-cards/${se}/send-to-omie`)
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            o.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/sales-cards"]
            }),
            o.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/sales-cards/by-day"],
                exact: !1
            }),
            i({
                title: "Sucesso",
                description: "Pedido enviado para Omie com sucesso!"
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: se => {
            i({
                title: "Erro ao Enviar para Omie",
                description: se.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , O = Gt({
        mutationFn: async ({customerId: se, virtualService: k}) => {
            await dr("PUT", `/api/customers/${se}`, {
                virtualService: k
            })
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: (se, k) => {
            g(k.virtualService),
            o.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/sales-cards"]
            }),
            o.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/sales-cards/by-day"],
                exact: !1
            }),
            o.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/customers"]
            }),
            i({
                title: "Sucesso",
                description: "Tipo de atendimento atualizado com sucesso!"
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: se => {
            i({
                title: "Erro ao Atualizar",
                description: se.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , M = () => {
        if (!(r != null && r.saleValue) || parseFloat(r.saleValue) === 0) {
            i({
                title: "Aviso",
                description: "Este card não possui uma venda registrada para enviar ao Omie.",
                variant: "destructive"
            });
            return
        }
        U.mutate(r.id)
    }
      , T = () => {
        var se;
        if (r) {
            if ((se = r.customer) != null && se.virtualService) {
                i({
                    title: "Cliente Virtual",
                    description: "Clientes virtuais não requerem check-in",
                    variant: "destructive"
                });
                return
            }
            _(!0)
        }
    }
      , D = async () => {
        if (r) {
            h(!0);
            try {
                const se = await E();
                R.mutate({
                    cardId: r.id,
                    latitude: se.latitude,
                    longitude: se.longitude
                })
            } catch (se) {
                h(!1),
                i({
                    title: "Erro na Localização",
                    description: se instanceof Error ? se.message : "Erro ao capturar localização",
                    variant: "destructive"
                })
            }
        }
    }
      , P = (se, k) => {
        const B = encodeURIComponent(`Olá ${k}! Somos da Honest Sucos. Gostaria de agendar uma visita para apresentar nossos produtos frescos e naturais. Qual o melhor horário para você?`)
          , q = `https://wa.me/55${se.replace(/\D/g, "")}?text=${B}`;
        Ex(q)
    }
      , V = (se, k) => {
        if (!se || !k) {
            i({
                title: "Localização não disponível",
                description: "É necessário cadastrar a latitude e longitude do cliente para usar a navegação.",
                variant: "destructive"
            });
            return
        }
        const B = `https://waze.com/ul?ll=${se},${k}&navigate=yes&zoom=17`;
        window.open(B, "_blank")
    }
      , Q = se => {
        switch (se) {
        case "completed":
            return {
                label: "Finalizado",
                color: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
                icon: fi,
                iconColor: "text-green-600"
            };
        case "in_progress":
            return {
                label: "Em Atendimento",
                color: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
                icon: Tm,
                iconColor: "text-yellow-600"
            };
        case "pending":
            return {
                label: "Pendente",
                color: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
                icon: Kn,
                iconColor: "text-blue-600"
            };
        case "no_sale":
            return {
                label: "Não Venda",
                color: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
                icon: Bl,
                iconColor: "text-red-600"
            };

            return {
                label: se,
                color: "bg-gray-100 text-gray-800",
                icon: Tm,
                iconColor: "text-gray-600"
            }
        }
    }
      , Y = se => {
        switch (se) {
        case "a_vista":
            return "À Vista";
        case "boleto":
            return "Boleto";
        case "pix":
            return "PIX";
        default:
            return "À Vista"
        }
    }
      , H = se => {
        switch (se) {
        case "venda":
            return "Venda";
        case "troca":
            return "Troca";
        case "amostra":
            return "Amostra";
        default:
            return "Venda"
        }
    }
      , te = se => {
        switch (se) {
        case "semanal":
            return "Semanal";
        case "quinzenal":
            return "Quinzenal";
        case "mensal":
            return "Mensal";
        default:
            return "Semanal"
        }
    }
    ;
    if (!r)
        return null;
    const G = Q(r.status)
      , z = G.icon;
    return s.jsxs(xn, {
        open: e,
        onOpenChange: t,
        children: [s.jsxs(gn, {
            className: "max-w-4xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto",

                children: s.jsxs(On, {
                    className: "flex items-center space-x-3",
                    children: [s.jsx(z, {
                        className: `h-6 w-6 ${G.iconColor}`
                    }), s.jsx("span", {
                        children: "Detalhes da Venda"
                    }), s.jsx($t, {
                        className: G.color,
                        children: G.label
                    })]
                })
            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                className: "space-y-6",
                children: [s.jsxs(Oe, {
                    children: [s.jsx(ut, {
                        children: s.jsxs(ht, {
                            className: "flex items-center space-x-2",
                            children: [s.jsx(co, {
                                className: "h-5 w-5 text-blue-600"
                            }), s.jsx("span", {
                                children: "Informações do Cliente"
                            })]
                        })
                    }), s.jsxs(Re, {
                        className: "space-y-4",
                        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4",
                            children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                                children: [s.jsx("p", {
                                    className: "text-sm text-gray-600",
                                    children: "Nome"
                                }), s.jsx("p", {

                                    children: r.customer.fantasyName || r.customer.name

                                })]

                            })]

                            }), s.jsx("span", {

                                    })
                                })]

                                })]

                                })]

                                    hour: "2-digit",

                                })]
                            })]
                        }), r.noSaleReason && s.jsxs("div", {
                            children: [s.jsx("p", {
                                className: "text-sm text-gray-600",
                                children: "Motivo da Não Venda"
                            }), s.jsx("p", {
                                className: "font-medium text-red-600",
                                children: r.noSaleReason
                            })]
                        }), r.exclusiveVehicle && s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "border-t border-gray-200 pt-4 mt-4",
                            children: [s.jsxs("div", {

                                })]

                                }), s.jsx("div", {

                                    }, se))

                    })]
                }), r.products && r.products.length > 0 && s.jsxs(Oe, {

                                        children: new Intl.NumberFormat("pt-BR",{
                                            style: "currency",
                                            currency: "BRL"
                                        }).format(se.totalPrice)
                                    })
                                })]
                            }, k)), s.jsx("div", {
                                className: "border-t pt-4 mt-4",
                                children: s.jsxs("div", {
                                    className: "flex items-center justify-between",
                                    children: [s.jsx("span", {
                                        className: "text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900",
                                        children: "Total Geral:"
                                    }), s.jsx("span", {
                                        className: "text-2xl font-bold text-green-600",
                                        children: r.saleValue ? new Intl.NumberFormat("pt-BR",{
                                            style: "currency",
                                            currency: "BRL"
                                        }).format(parseFloat(r.saleValue)) : new Intl.NumberFormat("pt-BR",{
                                            style: "currency",
                                            currency: "BRL"
                                        }).format(r.products.reduce( (se, k) => se + k.totalPrice, 0))

                                })
                            })]

                    })]

                    children: [s.jsx(ut, {

                            children: [s.jsx(ox, {
                                className: "h-5 w-5 text-gray-600"
                            }), s.jsx("span", {
                                children: "Observações"
                            })]
                        })
                    }), s.jsx(Re, {
                        children: s.jsx("div", {
                            className: "bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded-lg",
                            children: s.jsx("p", {
                                className: "whitespace-pre-wrap",
                                children: r.notes
                            })
                        })
                    })]
                }), r.status === "completed" && r.saleValue && parseFloat(r.saleValue) > 0 && s.jsxs(Oe, {

                            })]
                        })
                    })]
                })]
            }), (r.status === "pending" || r.status === "in_progress") && s.jsxs("div", {

                        "data-testid": "button-check-in",

                            className: "h-4 w-4 mr-2"
                        }), v != null && v.checkInTime ? "Check-in Realizado" : "Check-in"]
                    }), s.jsxs(je, {
                        onClick: D,
                        disabled: d || !(v != null && v.checkInTime),

                        className: "border-purple-600 text-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-50",
                        "data-testid": "button-check-out",
                        children: [d ? s.jsx(ba, {

                        }) : s.jsx(k7, {
                            className: "h-4 w-4 mr-2"
                        }), "Check-out"]
                    })]
                }), (r.checkInTime || r.checkOutTime) && s.jsxs("div", {

                            }), s.jsx("span", {

                            })]
                        }), r.checkInLatitude && r.checkInLongitude && s.jsxs("div", {

                            children: ["Distância até o cliente: ", parseFloat(r.distanceToCustomer).toFixed(0), "m"]
                        }), r.checkInPhotoUrl && r.checkInPhotoUrl.length > 100 && s.jsxs("div", {

                                onClick: () => r.checkInPhotoUrl && window.open(r.checkInPhotoUrl, "_blank"),
                                "data-testid": "img-check-in-photo"
                            })]
                        })]
                    }), r.checkOutTime && s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "border-l-4 border-purple-500 pl-3",
                        children: [s.jsxs("div", {

                                children: "✓ Check-out Realizado"
                            }), s.jsx("span", {
                                className: "text-sm text-gray-600",
                                children: new Date(r.checkOutTime).toLocaleString("pt-BR")
                            })]
                        }), r.checkOutLatitude && r.checkOutLongitude && s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "text-xs text-gray-500",
                            children: ["Localização: ", parseFloat(r.checkOutLatitude).toFixed(6), ", ", parseFloat(r.checkOutLongitude).toFixed(6)]
                        }), r.checkOutDistanceToCustomer && s.jsxs("div", {

                            children: ["Distância até o cliente: ", parseFloat(r.checkOutDistanceToCustomer).toFixed(0), "m"]
                        })]
                    })]
                }), N && N.length > 0 && s.jsxs(Oe, {
                    className: "mt-4",
                    children: [s.jsx(ut, {
                        children: s.jsxs(ht, {
                            className: "flex items-center space-x-2",
                            children: [s.jsx(mi, {
                                className: "h-5 w-5 text-orange-600"
                            }), s.jsxs("span", {
                                children: ["Histórico de Pedidos (", N.length, ")"]
                            })]
                        })
                    }), s.jsx(Re, {
                        children: s.jsx("div", {
                            className: "space-y-3 max-h-64 overflow-y-auto",
                            children: N.map( (se, k) => s.jsxs("div", {
                                className: "border-l-4 border-orange-500 pl-3 py-2 bg-gray-50 rounded-r",
                                "data-testid": `order-history-${k}`,
                                children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                                    className: "flex items-center justify-between mb-2",
                                    children: [s.jsx("span", {
                                        className: "font-semibold text-gray-800",
                                        children: new Date(se.orderDate).toLocaleDateString("pt-BR")
                                    }), s.jsx($t, {
                                        className: se.status === "completed" ? "bg-green-500" : se.status === "cancelled" ? "bg-red-500" : "bg-blue-500",
                                        children: se.status === "completed" ? "Concluído" : se.status === "cancelled" ? "Cancelado" : "Pendente"
                                    })]
                                }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                    className: "text-sm space-y-1",
                                    children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                                        className: "flex justify-between",
                                        children: [s.jsx("span", {
                                            className: "text-gray-600",
                                            children: "Valor Total:"
                                        }), s.jsxs("span", {
                                            className: "font-medium text-green-600",
                                            children: ["R$ ", parseFloat(se.totalValue || "0").toFixed(2)]
                                        })]
                                    }), se.products && se.products.length > 0 && s.jsxs("div", {
                                        className: "mt-2",
                                        children: [s.jsx("span", {
                                            className: "text-gray-600 text-xs",
                                            children: "Produtos:"
                                        }), s.jsxs("ul", {
                                            className: "list-disc list-inside text-xs text-gray-700 mt-1",
                                            children: [se.products.slice(0, 3).map( (B, q) => s.jsxs("li", {
                                                children: [B.name, " - ", B.quantity, "x R$ ", parseFloat(B.unitPrice || "0").toFixed(2)]
                                            }, q)), se.products.length > 3 && s.jsxs("li", {
                                                className: "text-gray-500 italic",
                                                children: ["...e mais ", se.products.length - 3, " produto(s)"]
                                            })]
                                        })]
                                    }), se.notes && s.jsxs("div", {
                                        className: "mt-2 text-xs text-gray-600 italic",
                                        children: ["Obs: ", se.notes]
                                    }), se.invoiceNumber && s.jsxs("div", {
                                        className: "mt-1 text-xs text-blue-600",
                                        children: ["NF: ", se.invoiceNumber]
                                    })]
                                })]
                            }, se.id))
                        })
                    })]
                }), s.jsxs("div", {
                    className: "flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-3",
                    children: [s.jsxs(je, {
                        onClick: () => {
                            console.log("Finalizar Venda clicked, calling onStartSale with card:", r.id),
                            n == null || n(r)
                        }
                        ,
                        className: "bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white",
                        "data-testid": "button-start-sale",
                        children: [s.jsx(OJ, {
                            className: "h-4 w-4 mr-2"
                        }), "EFETUAR VENDA"]
                    }), s.jsxs(je, {
                        onClick: () => a == null ? void 0 : a(r),
                        variant: "outline",
                        className: "border-red-600 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50",
                        "data-testid": "button-start-no-sale",
                        children: [s.jsx(PJ, {
                            className: "h-4 w-4 mr-2"
                        }), "Não Venda"]
                    })]
                })]
            }), s.jsx("div", {
                className: "flex justify-end space-x-3 pt-4",
                children: s.jsx(je, {
                    variant: "outline",
                    onClick: t,
                    children: "Fechar"
                })
            })]
        }), r && s.jsx(rpe, {
            isOpen: p,
            onClose: () => _(!1),
            cardId: r.id,
            customerLatitude: r.customerLatitude,
            customerLongitude: r.customerLongitude,
            onSuccess: async () => {
                await o.invalidateQueries({
                    queryKey: ["/api/sales-cards"]
                }),
                await o.invalidateQueries({
                    queryKey: ["/api/sales-cards/by-day"],
                    exact: !1
                }),
                await o.refetchQueries({
                    queryKey: ["/api/sales-cards", r == null ? void 0 : r.id]
                }),
                await o.refetchQueries({
                    queryKey: ["/api/sales-cards/by-day"],
                    exact: !1
                }),
                _(!1),
                i({
                    title: "Sucesso",
                    description: "Check-in realizado! Você já pode fazer check-out."
                })
            }
        })]
    })
}
function fH({isOpen: e, onClose: t, card: r}) {
    const [n,a] = C.useState([])
      , [i,o] = C.useState("a_vista")
      , [l,c] = C.useState("venda")
      , [d,h] = C.useState("")
      , [f,g] = C.useState("")
      , [p,_] = C.useState("")
      , [x,y] = C.useState(["Seg", "Ter", "Qua", "Qui", "Sex"])
      , [v,N] = C.useState(["08:00", "09:00", "10:00", "11:00", "12:00", "13:00", "14:00", "15:00", "16:00", "17:00", "18:00"])
      , [j,E] = C.useState("")
      , [R,U] = C.useState("")
      , [O,M] = C.useState("")
      , [T,D] = C.useState("")
      , [P,V] = C.useState([])
      , [Q,Y] = C.useState("")
      , [H,te] = C.useState("")
      , [G,z] = C.useState(!1)
      , [de,Ce] = C.useState(!1)
      , [se,k] = C.useState(7)
      , {toast: B} = en()
      , q = os()
      , {user: K, isLoading: re} = po();
    re || K && ["admin", "coordinator", "administrative"].includes(K.role);
    const {data: le} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/products"],
        retry: !1
    });
    C.useEffect( () => {
        var Fe, kt;
        if (r) {
            a(r.products || []),
            o(r.paymentMethod || "a_vista"),
            c(r.operationType || "venda"),
            h(r.notes || ""),
            g(r.routeDay || ""),
            _(r.recurrenceType || ""),
            k(r.boletoDays || 7);
            const Tt = ["Seg", "Ter", "Qua", "Qui", "Sex"]
              , Ht = ["08:00", "09:00", "10:00", "11:00", "12:00", "13:00", "14:00", "15:00", "16:00", "17:00", "18:00"];
            if (y(((Fe = r.deliveryWeekdays) == null ? void 0 : Fe.length) > 0 ? r.deliveryWeekdays : Tt),
            N(((kt = r.deliveryTimeSlots) == null ? void 0 : kt.length) > 0 ? r.deliveryTimeSlots : Ht),
            E(r.customerLatitude || ""),
            U(r.customerLongitude || ""),
            r.customer) {
                try {
                    const rr = r.customer.weekdays || "[]"
                      , qr = typeof rr == "string" ? JSON.parse(rr) : rr;
                    V(Array.isArray(qr) ? qr : [])
                } catch {
                    V([])
                }
                Y(r.customer.visitPeriodicity || ""),
                te(r.customer.phone || ""),
                M(r.customer.latitude || ""),
                D(r.customer.longitude || "")
            }
        } else
            a([]),
            o("a_vista"),
            c("venda"),
            h(""),
            g(""),
            _(""),
            k(7),
            y(["Seg", "Ter", "Qua", "Qui", "Sex"]),
            N(["08:00", "09:00", "10:00", "11:00", "12:00", "13:00", "14:00", "15:00", "16:00", "17:00", "18:00"]),
            E(""),
            U(""),
            V([]),
            Y("")
    }
    , [r]),
    C.useEffect( () => {
        Q && Q !== "semanal" && P.length > 1 && (V([P[0]]),
        B({
            title: "Dias ajustados",
            description: `Para periodicidade ${Q}, apenas 1 dia de visita é permitido. O primeiro dia foi mantido.`
        }))
    }
    , [Q]);
    const ke = Gt({
        mutationFn: async ({id: Fe, data: kt}) => {
            await dr("PUT", `/api/sales-cards/${Fe}`, kt)
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            q.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/sales-cards"]
            }),
            B({
                title: "Sucesso",
                description: "Venda finalizada com sucesso!"
            }),
            t()
        }
        ,
        onError: Fe => {
            B({
                title: "Erro",
                description: Fe.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , Ee = Gt({
        mutationFn: async ({id: Fe, data: kt}) => await dr("PUT", `/api/sales-cards/${Fe}`, kt),
        onSuccess: Fe => {
            q.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/sales-cards"]
            }),
            console.log("✅ Produtos salvos (modal permanece aberto):", Fe)
        }
        ,
        onError: Fe => {
            console.error("❌ Erro ao salvar produtos:", Fe)
        }
    })
      , Te = Gt({
        mutationFn: async ({id: Fe, data: kt}) => {
            await dr("PUT", `/api/customers/${Fe}`, kt)
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            q.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/customers"]
            }),
            q.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/sales-cards"]
            }),
            B({
                title: "Sucesso",
                description: "Dados do cliente atualizados com sucesso!"
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: Fe => {
            B({
                title: "Erro",
                description: Fe.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , qe = Gt({
        mutationFn: async Fe => {
            await dr("POST", `/api/sales-cards/${Fe}/send-to-omie`)
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            q.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/sales-cards"]
            }),
            B({
                title: "Sucesso",
                description: "Pedido enviado para faturamento!"
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: Fe => {
            B({
                title: "Erro ao Enviar",
                description: Fe.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , ve = (Fe, kt) => {
        if (kt) {
            if (!Array.isArray(le))
                return;
            const Tt = le.find(Ht => Ht.id === Fe);
            Tt && a([...n, {
                id: Tt.id,
                name: Tt.name,
                quantity: 1,
                unitPrice: parseFloat(Tt.price || "0"),
                totalPrice: parseFloat(Tt.price || "0")
            }])
        } else
            a(n.filter(Tt => Tt.id !== Fe))
    }
      , ce = (Fe, kt) => {
        const Tt = n.map(Ht => {
            if (Ht.id === Fe) {
                const rr = kt || 1;
                return {
                    ...Ht,
                    quantity: rr,
                    totalPrice: rr * Ht.unitPrice
                }
            }
            return Ht
        }
        );
        a(Tt)
    }
      , Ae = (Fe, kt) => {
        const Tt = n.map(Ht => Ht.id === Fe ? {
            ...Ht,
            unitPrice: kt,
            totalPrice: Ht.quantity * kt
        } : Ht);
        a(Tt)
    }
      , fe = () => n.reduce( (Fe, kt) => Fe + kt.totalPrice, 0)
      , Ct = async () => {
        if (n.length === 0) {
            B({
                title: "Erro",
                description: "Adicione pelo menos um produto para finalizar a venda.",
                variant: "destructive"
            });
            return
        }
        const Fe = fe()
          , kt = l === "venda" ? 10 : 0;
        if (Fe < kt) {
            B({
                title: "Erro",
                description: `Valor mínimo para venda é R$ ${kt.toFixed(2)}`,
                variant: "destructive"
            });
            return
        }
        if (r) {
            Ce(!0);
            try {
                await ke.mutateAsync({
                    id: r.id,
                    data: {
                        status: "completed",
                        saleValue: Fe.toFixed(2),
                        products: n,
                        paymentMethod: i,
                        operationType: l,
                        notes: d,
                        routeDay: f,
                        recurrenceType: p,
                        deliveryWeekdays: x,
                        deliveryTimeSlots: v,
                        customerLatitude: j || null,
                        customerLongitude: R || null,
                        boletoDays: se,
                        scheduledDate: void 0
                    }
                })
            } finally {
                Ce(!1)
            }
        }
    }
      , ot = async () => {
        r != null && r.id && (await Ct(),
        setTimeout( () => {
            qe.mutate(r.id)
        }

                                  , Tt = !!kt;

                            })]
                        }), ee && s.jsxs("div", {

                            }), "Gerar PDF"]

                            }), " Marca como concluído e envia para faturamento no Omie."]
                        }), s.jsxs(je, {

                            }), "Finalizar e Enviar p/ Faturamento"]
                        })]

                })]
            })]
        })
    })
}
function mH({isOpen: e, onClose: t, card: r}) {
    const [n,a] = C.useState("")
      , [i,o] = C.useState("")
      , [l,c] = C.useState(!1)
      , {toast: d} = en()
      , h = os()
      , f = Gt({
        mutationFn: async ({id: x, data: y}) => {
            await dr("PUT", `/api/sales-cards/${x}`, y)
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            h.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/sales-cards"]
            }),
            d({
                title: "Sucesso",
                description: "Card marcado como 'Venda Não Realizada' com sucesso!"
            }),
            t(),
            g()
        }
        ,
        onError: x => {
            d({
                title: "Erro",
                description: x.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , g = () => {
        a(""),
        o(""),
        c(!1)
    }
      , p = async () => {
        if (!n) {
            d({
                title: "Erro",
                description: "Selecione um motivo para a não venda.",
                variant: "destructive"
            });
            return
        }
        if (r) {
            c(!0);
            try {
                await f.mutateAsync({
                    id: r.id,
                    data: {
                        status: "no_sale",
                        noSaleReason: n,
                        notes: i,
                        completedDate: new Date
                    }
                })
            } finally {
                c(!1)
            }
        }
    }
      , _ = x => ({
        sem_interesse: "Cliente sem interesse",
        sem_dinheiro: "Cliente sem dinheiro",
        fechado: "Estabelecimento fechado",
        outro_fornecedor: "Já possui fornecedor",
        produto_inadequado: "Produto inadequado",
        preco_alto: "Preço muito alto",
        nao_atendeu: "Cliente não atendeu",
        reagendado: "Reagendado para outra data",
        outro: "Outro motivo"
    })[x] || x;
    return r ? s.jsx(xn, {
        open: e,
        onOpenChange: t,
        children: s.jsxs(gn, {
            className: "max-w-2xl",
            children: [s.jsx(Dn, {
                children: s.jsxs(On, {
                    className: "flex items-center space-x-2",
                    children: [s.jsx(Bl, {
                        className: "h-6 w-6 text-red-600"
                    }), s.jsx("span", {
                        children: "Venda Não Realizada"
                    })]
                })
            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                className: "space-y-6",
                children: [s.jsxs(Oe, {
                    children: [s.jsx(ut, {
                        children: s.jsxs(ht, {
                            className: "text-lg flex items-center space-x-2",
                            children: [s.jsx(Ts, {
                                className: "h-5 w-5 text-orange-500"
                            }), s.jsx("span", {
                                children: "Registrar Motivo da Não Venda"
                            })]
                        })
                    }), s.jsx(Re, {
                        children: s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "mb-4 p-3 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg",
                            children: [s.jsx("p", {
                                className: "font-semibold",
                                children: r.customer.fantasyName || r.customer.name
                            }), s.jsx("p", {
                                className: "text-sm text-gray-600",
                                children: r.customer.phone
                            }), s.jsx("p", {
                                className: "text-sm text-gray-600",
                                children: r.customer.address
                            })]
                        })
                    })]
                }), s.jsxs("div", {
                    className: "space-y-4",
                    children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                        children: [s.jsx(We, {
                            htmlFor: "reason",
                            children: "Motivo da Não Venda *"
                        }), s.jsxs(yr, {
                            value: n,
                            onValueChange: a,
                            children: [s.jsx(pr, {
                                children: s.jsx(wr, {
                                    placeholder: "Selecione o motivo"
                                })
                            }), s.jsxs(xr, {
                                children: [s.jsx(Ue, {
                                    value: "sem_interesse",
                                    children: "Cliente sem interesse"
                                }), s.jsx(Ue, {
                                    value: "sem_dinheiro",
                                    children: "Cliente sem dinheiro"
                                }), s.jsx(Ue, {
                                    value: "fechado",
                                    children: "Estabelecimento fechado"
                                }), s.jsx(Ue, {
                                    value: "outro_fornecedor",
                                    children: "Já possui fornecedor"
                                }), s.jsx(Ue, {
                                    value: "produto_inadequado",
                                    children: "Produto inadequado"
                                }), s.jsx(Ue, {
                                    value: "preco_alto",
                                    children: "Preço muito alto"
                                }), s.jsx(Ue, {
                                    value: "nao_atendeu",
                                    children: "Cliente não atendeu"
                                }), s.jsx(Ue, {
                                    value: "reagendado",
                                    children: "Reagendado para outra data"
                                }), s.jsx(Ue, {
                                    value: "outro",
                                    children: "Outro motivo"
                                })]
                            })]
                        })]
                    }), n && s.jsx("div", {
                        className: "p-3 bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-lg",
                        children: s.jsxs("p", {
                            className: "text-sm font-medium text-blue-800",
                            children: ["Motivo selecionado: ", _(n)]
                        })
                    }), s.jsxs("div", {
                        children: [s.jsx(We, {
                            htmlFor: "notes",
                            children: "Observações Adicionais"
                        }), s.jsx(au, {
                            id: "notes",
                            value: i,
                            onChange: x => o(x.target.value),
                            placeholder: "Descreva detalhes sobre o motivo da não venda...",
                            rows: 4,
                            className: "resize-none"
                        }), s.jsx("p", {
                            className: "text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1",
                            children: "Opcional: Adicione informações que possam ajudar em futuras abordagens"
                        })]
                    })]
                }), s.jsx("div", {
                    className: "p-4 bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-lg",
                    children: s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "flex items-start space-x-2",
                        children: [s.jsx(Ts, {
                            className: "h-5 w-5 text-red-600 mt-0.5"
                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                            children: [s.jsx("p", {
                                className: "font-medium text-red-800",
                                children: "Importante:"
                            }), s.jsxs("ul", {
                                className: "text-sm text-red-700 mt-1 space-y-1",
                                children: [s.jsx("li", {
                                    children: '• Este card será marcado como "Venda Não Realizada"'
                                }), s.jsx("li", {
                                    children: "• As informações serão utilizadas para análise e melhorias"
                                }), s.jsx("li", {
                                    children: "• Você pode reagendar uma nova visita posteriormente"
                                })]
                            })]
                        })]
                    })
                })]
            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                className: "flex justify-end space-x-3 pt-6 border-t",
                children: [s.jsx(je, {
                    variant: "outline",
                    onClick: () => {
                        t(),
                        g()
                    }
                    ,
                    disabled: l,
                    children: "Cancelar"
                }), s.jsx(je, {
                    onClick: p,
                    disabled: l || !n,
                    className: "bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600",
                    children: l ? s.jsxs(s.Fragment, {
                        children: [s.jsx("div", {
                            className: "animate-spin h-4 w-4 border-2 border-white border-t-transparent rounded-full mr-2"
                        }), "Registrando..."]
                    }) : s.jsxs(s.Fragment, {
                        children: [s.jsx(Bl, {
                            className: "h-4 w-4 mr-2"
                        }), "Confirmar Não Venda"]
                    })
                })]
            })]
        })
    }) : null
}
function npe() {
    const [e,t] = C.useState("all")
      , [r,n] = C.useState("all")
      , [a,i] = C.useState("")
      , [o,l] = C.useState(!1)
      , [c,d] = C.useState(null)
      , [h,f] = C.useState({
        type: null,
        card: null
    })
      , [g,p] = C.useState(!1)
      , [_,x] = C.useState(null)
      , [y,v] = C.useState(!1)
      , [N,j] = C.useState(null)
      , [E,R] = C.useState(!1)
      , [U,O] = C.useState(null)
      , [M,T] = C.useState(!1)
      , [D,P] = C.useState(null)
      , [V,Q] = C.useState(!1)
      , [Y,H] = C.useState(null)
      , [te,G] = C.useState(!1)
      , {toast: z} = en()
      , de = os()
      , {user: Ce} = po()
      , se = () => {
        const $e = new URLSearchParams;
        return r && r !== "all" && $e.append("route_day", r),
        e && e !== "all" && $e.append("status", e),
        $e.toString() ? `?${$e.toString()}` : ""
    }
      , {data: k, isLoading: B} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/sales-cards", r, e],
        queryFn: () => fetch(`/api/sales-cards${se()}`, {
            credentials: "include"
        }).then($e => $e.json()),
        retry: !1
    })
      , q = Gt({
        mutationFn: async ({id: $e, data: dt}) => {
            await dr("PUT", `/api/sales-cards/${$e}`, dt)
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            de.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/sales-cards"]
            }),
            f({
                type: null,
                card: null
            }),
            z({
                title: "Sucesso",
                description: "Card atualizado com sucesso!"
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: $e => {
            z({
                title: "Erro",
                description: $e.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , K = Gt({
        mutationFn: async $e => {
            await dr("DELETE", `/api/sales-cards/${$e}`)
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            de.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/sales-cards"]
            }),
            z({
                title: "Sucesso",
                description: "Card excluído com sucesso!"
            })
        }

        }), s.jsx(mH, {

            }

                            className: "text-xs text-blue-700 mt-2",
                            children: "💡 Se o CNPJ não existir no sistema, o cliente será cadastrado automaticamente via Receita Federal."
                        })]
                    }), s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "space-y-2",
                        children: [s.jsx(We, {
                            htmlFor: "import-file",
                            children: "Selecionar Arquivo"
                        }), s.jsx(xt, {
                            id: "import-file",
                            type: "file",
                            accept: ".xlsx,.xls,.csv",
                            onChange: $e => {
                                var he;
                                const dt = (he = $e.target.files) == null ? void 0 : he[0];
                                dt && H(dt)
                            }
                            ,
                            "data-testid": "input-import-file"
                        }), Y && s.jsxs("p", {
                            className: "text-sm text-gray-600",
                            children: ["Arquivo selecionado: ", Y.name]
                        })]
                    }), s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "flex justify-end gap-2",
                        children: [s.jsx(je, {
                            variant: "outline",
                            onClick: () => {
                                Q(!1),
                                H(null)
                            }
                            ,
                            "data-testid": "button-cancel-import",
                            children: "Cancelar"
                        }), s.jsx(je, {
                            onClick: Te,
                            disabled: !Y || ke.isPending,
                            className: "bg-honest-blue hover:bg-blue-700",
                            "data-testid": "button-confirm-import",
                            children: ke.isPending ? s.jsxs(s.Fragment, {
                                children: [s.jsx("i", {
                                    className: "fas fa-spinner fa-spin mr-2"
                                }), "Importando..."]
                            }) : s.jsxs(s.Fragment, {
                                children: [s.jsx(lx, {
                                    className: "w-4 h-4 mr-2"
                                }), "Importar"]
                            })
                        })]
                    })]
                })]
            })
        }), s.jsx(H1, {
            open: te,
            onOpenChange: G,
            children: s.jsxs(Ix, {
                children: [s.jsxs(Rx, {
                    children: [s.jsx(Bx, {
                        children: "Tem certeza que deseja eliminar todos os cards?"
                    }), s.jsx(zx, {
                        children: "Esta ação não pode ser desfeita. Todos os cards de vendas serão permanentemente eliminados do sistema."
                    })]
                }), s.jsxs(Mx, {
                    children: [s.jsx(Vx, {
                        "data-testid": "button-cancel-delete-all",
                        children: "Cancelar"
                    }), s.jsx($x, {
                        onClick: () => Ee.mutate(),
                        disabled: Ee.isPending,
                        className: "bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700",
                        "data-testid": "button-confirm-delete-all",
                        children: Ee.isPending ? s.jsxs(s.Fragment, {
                            children: [s.jsx("i", {
                                className: "fas fa-spinner fa-spin mr-2"
                            }), "Eliminando..."]
                        }) : "Eliminar Todos"
                    })]
                })]
            })
        })]
    })
}
const spe = [{
    value: "Seg",
    label: "Segunda-feira"
}, {
    value: "Ter",
    label: "Terça-feira"
}, {
    value: "Qua",
    label: "Quarta-feira"
}, {

    label: "Quinta-feira"
}, {
    value: "Sex",
    label: "Sexta-feira"
}, {
    value: "Sab",
    label: "Sábado"
}, {
    value: "Dom",
    label: "Domingo"
}];
function ape(e) {
    const t = {
        seg: "Seg",
        ter: "Ter",
        qua: "Qua",
        qui: "Qui",
        sex: "Sex",
        sab: "Sab",
        dom: "Dom",
        SEG: "Seg",
        TER: "Ter",
        QUA: "Qua",
        QUI: "Qui",
        SEX: "Sex",
        SAB: "Sab",
        DOM: "Dom",
        sáb: "Sab",
        SÁB: "Sab",
        "sáb.": "Sab",
        "SÁB.": "Sab",
        segunda: "Seg",
        terca: "Ter",
        quarta: "Qua",
        quinta: "Qui",
        sexta: "Sex",
        sabado: "Sab",
        domingo: "Dom",
        terça: "Ter",
        sábado: "Sab",
        SEGUNDA: "Seg",
        TERCA: "Ter",
        TERÇA: "Ter",
        QUARTA: "Qua",
        QUINTA: "Qui",
        SEXTA: "Sex",
        SABADO: "Sab",
        SÁBADO: "Sab",
        DOMINGO: "Dom",
        "segunda-feira": "Seg",
        "terca-feira": "Ter",
        "terça-feira": "Ter",
        "quarta-feira": "Qua",
        "quinta-feira": "Qui",
        "sexta-feira": "Sex",
        "sabado-feira": "Sab",
        "sábado-feira": "Sab",
        "domingo-feira": "Dom",
        monday: "Seg",
        tuesday: "Ter",
        wednesday: "Qua",
        thursday: "Qui",
        friday: "Sex",
        saturday: "Sab",
        sunday: "Dom",
        MONDAY: "Seg",
        TUESDAY: "Ter",
        WEDNESDAY: "Qua",
        THURSDAY: "Qui",
        FRIDAY: "Sex",
        SATURDAY: "Sab",
        SUNDAY: "Dom"
    };
    let r = [];
    if (typeof e == "string")
        try {
            r = JSON.parse(e)
        } catch {
            r = [e]
        }
    else
        r = e || [];
    return r.map(n => t[n.toLowerCase().trim()] || n).filter(n => n)
}
function ipe({isOpen: e, onClose: t, customer: r}) {
    const [n,a] = C.useState(!1)
      , [i,o] = C.useState(null)
      , [l,c] = C.useState(!1)
      , [d,h] = C.useState(!1)
      , {toast: f} = en()
      , g = os()
      , {user: p} = po()
      , _ = (p == null ? void 0 : p.role) !== "vendedor"
      , x = (p == null ? void 0 : p.role) !== "vendedor"
      , {data: y} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/users"],
        retry: !1
    })
      , v = Bu({
        resolver: N0(bie),
        defaultValues: {
            customerType: "pessoa_fisica",
            name: "",
            cpf: "",
            cnpj: "",
            companyName: "",
            fantasyName: "",
            phone: "",
            email: "",
            address: "",
            city: "",
            state: "",
            zipCode: "",
            route: "",
            sellerId: "",
            weekdays: '["Dom"]',
            visitPeriodicity: "semanal",
            isActive: !0,
            latitude: "",
            longitude: "",
            coordinatesLocked: !1,
            virtualService: !1,
            serviceStartDate: void 0
        }
    })
      , [N,j] = C.useState("pessoa_fisica")
      , E = v.watch("coordinatesLocked")
      , R = v.watch("weekdays");
    C.useEffect( () => {
        if (r) {
            const H = r.customerType || "pessoa_fisica";
            j(H);
            const te = ape(r.weekdays || "[]")
              , G = JSON.stringify(te);
            v.reset({
                customerType: H,
                name: r.name || "",
                cpf: r.cpf || "",
                cnpj: r.cnpj || "",
                companyName: r.companyName || "",
                fantasyName: r.fantasyName || "",
                phone: r.phone || "",
                email: r.email || "",
                address: r.address || "",
                city: r.city || "",
                state: r.state || "",
                zipCode: r.zipCode || "",
                route: r.route || "",
                sellerId: r.sellerId || "",
                weekdays: G,
                visitPeriodicity: r.visitPeriodicity || "semanal",
                isActive: r.isActive !== void 0 ? r.isActive : !0,
                latitude: r.latitude || "",
                longitude: r.longitude || "",
                coordinatesLocked: r.coordinatesLocked || !1,
                virtualService: r.virtualService || !1,
                serviceStartDate: r.serviceStartDate || void 0
            })
        } else
            j("pessoa_fisica"),
            v.reset({
                customerType: "pessoa_fisica",
                name: "",
                cpf: "",
                cnpj: "",
                companyName: "",
                fantasyName: "",
                phone: "",
                email: "",
                address: "",
                city: "",
                state: "",
                zipCode: "",
                route: "",
                sellerId: "",
                weekdays: '["Dom"]',
                visitPeriodicity: "semanal",
                isActive: !0,
                latitude: "",
                longitude: "",
                coordinatesLocked: !1,
                virtualService: !1,
                serviceStartDate: void 0
            })
    }
    , [r, v]);
    const U = () => {
        if (c(!0),
        !navigator.geolocation) {
            f({
                title: "Geolocalização não suportada",
                description: "Seu navegador não suporta geolocalização.",
                variant: "destructive"
            }),
            c(!1);
            return
        }
        navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(H => {
            const te = H.coords.latitude.toString()
              , G = H.coords.longitude.toString();
            v.setValue("latitude", te),
            v.setValue("longitude", G),
            f({
                title: "Localização capturada!",
                description: `Latitude: ${te}, Longitude: ${G}`
            }),
            c(!1)
        }
        , H => {
            console.error("Erro ao capturar localização:", H),
            f({
                title: "Erro ao capturar localização",
                description: "Não foi possível obter sua localização. Verifique as permissões do navegador.",
                variant: "destructive"
            }),
            c(!1)
        }
        , {
            enableHighAccuracy: !0,
            timeout: 1e4,
            maximumAge: 0
        })
    }
      , O = () => {
        const H = v.watch("latitude")
          , te = v.watch("longitude");
        if (!H || !te) {
            f({
                title: "Localização não disponível",
                description: "É necessário capturar ou inserir a latitude e longitude primeiro.",
                variant: "destructive"
            });
            return
        }
        const G = `https://waze.com/ul?ll=${H},${te}&navigate=yes&zoom=17`;
        window.open(G, "_blank")
    }
      , M = async H => {
        if (!H || H.replace(/\D/g, "").length !== 14) {
            f({
                title: "Erro",
                description: "CNPJ deve conter 14 dígitos",
                variant: "destructive"
            });
            return
        }
        a(!0);
        try {
            const te = await fetch("/api/receita/cnpj", {
                method: "POST",
                headers: {
                    "Content-Type": "application/json"
                },
                body: JSON.stringify({
                    cnpj: H
                }),
                credentials: "same-origin"
            });
            if (!te.ok) {
                const z = await te.json();
                throw new Error(z.message || "Erro ao consultar CNPJ")
            }
            const G = await te.json();
            o(G),
            v.setValue("companyName", G.razaoSocial),
            v.setValue("fantasyName", G.nomeFantasia),
            v.setValue("name", G.nomeFantasia || G.razaoSocial),
            v.setValue("address", G.endereco),
            v.setValue("city", G.cidade),
            v.setValue("state", G.estado),
            v.setValue("zipCode", G.cep),
            G.telefone && v.setValue("phone", G.telefone),
            G.email && v.setValue("email", G.email),
            f({
                title: "Sucesso",
                description: "Dados do CNPJ carregados com sucesso!"
            })
        } catch (te) {
            f({
                title: "Erro",
                description: te instanceof Error ? te.message : "Erro ao consultar CNPJ",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        } finally {
            a(!1)
        }
    }
      , T = Gt({
        mutationFn: async H => {
            const te = r ? "PUT" : "POST"
              , G = r ? `/api/customers/${r.id}` : "/api/customers";
            return await dr(te, G, H)
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            g.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/customers"]
            }),
            f({
                title: "Sucesso",
                description: r ? "Cliente atualizado com sucesso!" : "Cliente criado com sucesso!"
            }),
            t()
        }
        ,
        onError: H => {
            f({
                title: "Erro",
                description: H.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , D = Gt({
        mutationFn: async () => {
            if (!r)
                throw new Error("Cliente não encontrado");
            return await dr("PATCH", `/api/customers/${r.id}`, {
                omieStatus: "inativo"
            })
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            g.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/customers"]
            }),
            f({
                title: "Cliente inativado",
                description: "O cliente foi inativado com sucesso. Ele não aparecerá mais nas rotas de visitas."
            }),
            h(!1),
            t()
        }
        ,
        onError: H => {
            f({
                title: "Erro",
                description: H.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , P = () => {
        D.mutate()
    }
      , V = H => {
        T.mutate(H)
    }
      , Q = H => {
        const te = JSON.parse(R || "[]");
        if (te.includes(H)) {
            const G = te.filter(z => z !== H);
            v.setValue("weekdays", JSON.stringify(G))
        } else {
            const G = [...te, H];
            v.setValue("weekdays", JSON.stringify(G))
        }
    }
      , Y = H => {
        const te = H.replace(/\D/g, "");
        return te.length <= 10 ? te.replace(/(\d{2})(\d{4})(\d{4})/, "($1) $2-$3") : te.replace(/(\d{2})(\d{5})(\d{4})/, "($1) $2-$3")
    }
    ;
    return s.jsxs(xn, {
        open: e,
        onOpenChange: t,
        children: [s.jsxs(gn, {
            className: "max-w-4xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto",
            children: [s.jsx(Dn, {
                children: s.jsxs(On, {
                    className: "flex items-center space-x-2",
                    children: [s.jsx(co, {
                        className: "h-5 w-5 text-honest-blue"
                    }), s.jsx("span", {
                        children: r ? "Editar Cliente" : "Novo Cliente"
                    })]
                })
            }), s.jsx(j0, {
                ...v,
                children: s.jsxs("form", {
                    onSubmit: v.handleSubmit(V),
                    className: "space-y-6",
                    children: [s.jsx(Oe, {
                        children: s.jsx(Re, {
                            className: "pt-6",
                            children: s.jsx(mn, {
                                control: v.control,
                                name: "customerType",
                                render: ({field: H}) => s.jsxs(un, {
                                    children: [s.jsx(hn, {
                                        children: "Tipo de Cliente"
                                    }), s.jsxs(yr, {
                                        onValueChange: te => {
                                            H.onChange(te),
                                            j(te),
                                            te === "pessoa_fisica" ? (v.setValue("cnpj", "", {
                                                shouldValidate: !1
                                            }),
                                            v.setValue("companyName", "", {
                                                shouldValidate: !1
                                            }),
                                            v.setValue("fantasyName", "", {
                                                shouldValidate: !1
                                            })) : v.setValue("cpf", "", {
                                                shouldValidate: !1
                                            })
                                        }
                                        ,
                                        value: H.value,
                                        children: [s.jsx(_n, {
                                            children: s.jsx(pr, {

                                                })
                                            })
                                        }), s.jsxs(xr, {

                                                    })]
