                                            })]
                                        })]
                                    }), s.jsx(pn, {})]
                                })
                            })
                        })
                    }), s.jsx(Oe, {
                        children: s.jsxs(Re, {
                            className: "pt-6",
                            children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                                className: "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4",
                                children: [s.jsx(mn, {
                                    control: v.control,
                                    name: "cpf",
                                    render: ({field: H}) => s.jsxs(un, {
                                        children: [s.jsx(hn, {
                                            children: "CPF"
                                        }), s.jsx(_n, {
                                            children: s.jsx(xt, {
                                                "data-testid": "input-cpf",
                                                placeholder: "000.000.000-00",
                                                maxLength: 14,
                                                value: H.value || "",
                                                disabled: !!v.watch("cnpj"),
                                                onChange: te => {
                                                    let G = te.target.value.replace(/\D/g, "")
                                                      , z = "";
                                                    G.length <= 3 ? z = G : G.length <= 6 ? z = G.replace(/(\d{3})(\d{0,3})/, "$1.$2") : G.length <= 9 ? z = G.replace(/(\d{3})(\d{3})(\d{0,3})/, "$1.$2.$3") : z = G.replace(/(\d{3})(\d{3})(\d{3})(\d{0,2})/, "$1.$2.$3-$4"),
                                                    H.onChange(z),
                                                    z && (v.setValue("cnpj", ""),
                                                    v.setValue("customerType", "pessoa_fisica"),
                                                    j("pessoa_fisica"))
                                                }
                                                ,
                                                onBlur: H.onBlur,
                                                name: H.name,
                                                ref: H.ref
                                            })
                                        }), s.jsx(pn, {})]
                                    })
                                }), s.jsx(mn, {
                                    control: v.control,
                                    name: "cnpj",
                                    render: ({field: H}) => s.jsxs(un, {
                                        children: [s.jsx(hn, {
                                            children: "CNPJ"
                                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                            className: "flex space-x-2",
                                            children: [s.jsx(_n, {
                                                children: s.jsx(xt, {
                                                    "data-testid": "input-cnpj",
                                                    placeholder: "00.000.000/0000-00",
                                                    maxLength: 18,
                                                    value: H.value || "",
                                                    disabled: !!v.watch("cpf"),

                                                          , z = "";
                                                        G.length <= 2 ? z = G : G.length <= 5 ? z = G.replace(/(\d{2})(\d{0,3})/, "$1.$2") : G.length <= 8 ? z = G.replace(/(\d{2})(\d{3})(\d{0,3})/, "$1.$2.$3") : G.length <= 12 ? z = G.replace(/(\d{2})(\d{3})(\d{3})(\d{0,4})/, "$1.$2.$3/$4") : z = G.replace(/(\d{2})(\d{3})(\d{3})(\d{4})(\d{0,2})/, "$1.$2.$3/$4-$5"),
                                                        H.onChange(z),
                                                        z && (v.setValue("cpf", ""),
                                                        v.setValue("customerType", "pessoa_juridica"),
                                                        j("pessoa_juridica"))
                                                    }

                                                    name: H.name,
                                                    ref: H.ref
                                                })
                                            }), s.jsx(je, {
                                                type: "button",
                                                variant: "outline",

                                                onClick: () => M(H.value || ""),
                                                disabled: n || !H.value,
                                                className: "px-3",
                                                children: n ? s.jsx("div", {
                                                    className: "animate-spin rounded-full h-4 w-4 border-b-2 border-honest-blue"

                                                })
                                            })]
                                        }), s.jsx(pn, {})]
                                    })
                                })]
                            }), i && s.jsx("div", {
                                className: "mt-4",
                                children: s.jsx(Oe, {

                                    children: s.jsxs(Re, {
                                        className: "pt-4",
                                        children: [s.jsxs("div", {

                                                variant: "secondary",
                                                className: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
                                                children: "Dados da Receita Federal"
                                            }), s.jsx($t, {
                                                variant: i.situacao === "ATIVA" ? "default" : "destructive",
                                                className: i.situacao === "ATIVA" ? "bg-green-600" : "",
                                                children: i.situacao

}
var Vj = "rovingFocusGroup.onEntryFocus"
  , ope = {
    bubbles: !1,
    cancelable: !0
}
  , Mb = "RovingFocusGroup"
  , [v4,pH,lpe] = RC(Mb)
  , [cpe,xH] = zi(Mb, [lpe])
  , [dpe,upe] = cpe(Mb)
  , gH = C.forwardRef( (e, t) => s.jsx(v4.Provider, {
    scope: e.__scopeRovingFocusGroup,
    children: s.jsx(v4.Slot, {
        scope: e.__scopeRovingFocusGroup,
        children: s.jsx(hpe, {
            ...e,
            ref: t
        })
    })
}));
gH.displayName = Mb;
var hpe = C.forwardRef( (e, t) => {
    const {__scopeRovingFocusGroup: r, orientation: n, loop: a=!1, dir: i, currentTabStopId: o, defaultCurrentTabStopId: l, onCurrentTabStopIdChange: c, onEntryFocus: d, preventScrollOnEntryFocus: h=!1, ...f} = e
      , g = C.useRef(null)
      , p = on(t, g)
      , _ = Cb(i)
      , [x=null,y] = sd({
        prop: o,
        defaultProp: l,
        onChange: c
    })
      , [v,N] = C.useState(!1)
      , j = Js(d)
      , E = pH(r)
      , R = C.useRef(!1)
      , [U,O] = C.useState(0);
    return C.useEffect( () => {
        const M = g.current;
        if (M)
            return M.addEventListener(Vj, j),
            () => M.removeEventListener(Vj, j)
    }
    , [j]),
    s.jsx(dpe, {
        scope: r,
        orientation: n,
        dir: _,
        loop: a,
        currentTabStopId: x,
        onItemFocus: C.useCallback(M => y(M), [y]),
        onItemShiftTab: C.useCallback( () => N(!0), []),
        onFocusableItemAdd: C.useCallback( () => O(M => M + 1), []),
        onFocusableItemRemove: C.useCallback( () => O(M => M - 1), []),
        children: s.jsx(lr.div, {
            tabIndex: v || U === 0 ? -1 : 0,
            "data-orientation": n,
            ...f,
            ref: p,
            style: {
                outline: "none",
                ...e.style
            },
            onMouseDown: or(e.onMouseDown, () => {
                R.current = !0
            }
            ),
            onFocus: or(e.onFocus, M => {
                const T = !R.current;
                if (M.target === M.currentTarget && T && !v) {
                    const D = new CustomEvent(Vj,ope);
                    if (M.currentTarget.dispatchEvent(D),
                    !D.defaultPrevented) {
                        const P = E().filter(te => te.focusable)
                          , V = P.find(te => te.active)
                          , Q = P.find(te => te.id === x)
                          , H = [V, Q, ...P].filter(Boolean).map(te => te.ref.current);
                        wH(H, h)
                    }
                }
                R.current = !1
            }
            ),
            onBlur: or(e.onBlur, () => N(!1))
        })
    })
}
)

  , yH = C.forwardRef( (e, t) => {
    const {__scopeRovingFocusGroup: r, focusable: n=!0, active: a=!1, tabStopId: i, ...o} = e
      , l = pi()
      , c = i || l
      , d = upe(vH, r)

    }

        scope: r,

            tabIndex: h ? 0 : -1,
            "data-orientation": d.orientation,
            ...o,
            ref: t,
            onMouseDown: or(e.onMouseDown, _ => {
                n ? d.onItemFocus(c) : _.preventDefault()
            }
            ),
            onFocus: or(e.onFocus, () => d.onItemFocus(c)),
            onKeyDown: or(e.onKeyDown, _ => {
                if (_.key === "Tab" && _.shiftKey) {
                    d.onItemShiftTab();
                    return
                }
                if (_.target !== _.currentTarget)
                    return;
                const x = ppe(_, d.orientation, d.dir);
                if (x !== void 0) {
                    if (_.metaKey || _.ctrlKey || _.altKey || _.shiftKey)
                        return;
                    _.preventDefault();
                    let v = f().filter(N => N.focusable).map(N => N.ref.current);
                    if (x === "last")
                        v.reverse();
                    else if (x === "prev" || x === "next") {
                        x === "prev" && v.reverse();
                        const N = v.indexOf(_.currentTarget);
                        v = d.loop ? xpe(v, N + 1) : v.slice(N + 1)
                    }
                    setTimeout( () => wH(v))
                }
            }
            )
        })
    })
}

var fpe = {
    ArrowLeft: "prev",
    ArrowUp: "prev",
    ArrowRight: "next",
    ArrowDown: "next",
    PageUp: "first",
    Home: "first",
    PageDown: "last",
    End: "last"
};
function mpe(e, t) {
    return t !== "rtl" ? e : e === "ArrowLeft" ? "ArrowRight" : e === "ArrowRight" ? "ArrowLeft" : e
}
function ppe(e, t, r) {
    const n = mpe(e.key, r);
    if (!(t === "vertical" && ["ArrowLeft", "ArrowRight"].includes(n)) && !(t === "horizontal" && ["ArrowUp", "ArrowDown"].includes(n)))
        return fpe[n]
}
function wH(e, t=!1) {
    const r = document.activeElement;
    for (const n of e)
        if (n === r || (n.focus({
            preventScroll: t
        }),
        document.activeElement !== r))
            return
}
function xpe(e, t) {
    return e.map( (r, n) => e[(t + n) % e.length])
}

        mutationFn: async j => {
            const E = await fetch("/api/auth/user").then(M => M.json())
              , U = await (await fetch(`/api/customers/${j}`)).json();
            let O = new Date;
            if (O.setHours(8, 0, 0, 0),
            U.weekdays && U.visitPeriodicity) {
                const M = {
                    domingo: 0,
                    segunda: 1,
                    terca: 2,
                    quarta: 3,
                    quinta: 4,
                    sexta: 5,
                    sabado: 6
                };
                let T = [];
                try {
                    T = typeof U.weekdays == "string" ? JSON.parse(U.weekdays) : U.weekdays
                } catch {
                    T = []
                }
                if (T.length > 0) {
                    const D = T.map(V => M[V])
                      , P = new Date;
                    if (D.includes(P.getDay()))
                        O = new Date(P),
                        O.setHours(8, 0, 0, 0);
                    else
                        for (let V = 1; V <= 7; V++) {
                            const Q = new Date(P);
                            if (Q.setDate(P.getDate() + V),

                            }

                                                className: `w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center font-semibold text-xs ${zS(r.sellerId)}`,
                                                children: $S(`${(x = r.seller) == null ? void 0 : x.firstName} ${(y = r.seller) == null ? void 0 : y.lastName}`)
                                            }), s.jsxs("p", {
                                                className: "font-medium",
                                                children: [(v = r.seller) == null ? void 0 : v.firstName, " ", (N = r.seller) == null ? void 0 : N.lastName]
                                            })]
                                        })]
                                    })]
                                })]
                            })]
                        })]
                    }), s.jsx(pc, {
                        value: "history",
                        className: "space-y-4",
                        children: s.jsxs(Oe, {
                            children: [s.jsx(ut, {
                                children: s.jsxs(ht, {
                                    className: "flex items-center space-x-2",
                                    children: [s.jsx(IJ, {
                                        className: "h-5 w-5 text-orange-600"
                                    }), s.jsx("span", {
                                        children: "Histórico de Atendimentos"
                                    })]
                                })
                            }), s.jsx(Re, {
                                children: i && i.length > 0 ? s.jsx("div", {
                                    className: "space-y-4",
                                    children: i.map(j => s.jsxs("div", {
                                        className: "border rounded-lg p-4 space-y-3",
                                        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                                            className: "flex items-center justify-between",
                                            children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                                                children: [s.jsxs("p", {
                                                    className: "font-medium text-gray-900",
                                                    children: ["Card de Venda #", j.id.slice(-6)]
                                                }), s.jsx("p", {
                                                    className: "text-sm text-gray-600",
                                                    children: _(j.scheduledDate)
                                                })]
                                            }), f(j.status)]
                                        }), j.saleValue && s.jsxs("div", {
                                            className: "flex items-center space-x-2",
                                            children: [s.jsx(Zu, {
                                                className: "h-4 w-4 text-green-600"
                                            }), s.jsx("span", {
                                                className: "font-semibold text-green-600",
                                                children: g(parseFloat(j.saleValue))
                                            })]
                                        }), j.rejectionReason && s.jsx("div", {
                                            className: "bg-red-50 p-3 rounded",
                                            children: s.jsxs("p", {
                                                className: "text-sm text-red-800",
                                                children: [s.jsx("strong", {
                                                    children: "Motivo da recusa:"
                                                }), " ", j.rejectionReason]
                                            })
                                        }), j.notes && s.jsx("div", {
                                            className: "bg-gray-50 p-3 rounded",
                                            children: s.jsxs("p", {
                                                className: "text-sm text-gray-700",
                                                children: [s.jsx("strong", {
                                                    children: "Observações:"
                                                }), " ", j.notes]
                                            })
                                        }), j.products && j.products.length > 0 && s.jsxs("div", {
                                            className: "border-t pt-3 mt-3",
                                            children: [s.jsx("p", {
                                                className: "text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2",
                                                children: "Produtos:"
                                            }), s.jsx("div", {
                                                className: "space-y-1",
                                                children: j.products.map( (E, R) => s.jsxs("div", {
                                                    className: "flex items-center justify-between text-sm",
                                                    children: [s.jsxs("span", {
                                                        children: [E.name, " (x", E.quantity, ")"]
                                                    }), s.jsx("span", {
                                                        className: "font-medium",
                                                        children: g(E.totalPrice)
                                                    })]
                                                }, R))
                                            })]
                                        })]
                                    }, j.id))
                                }) : s.jsxs("div", {
                                    className: "text-center py-8",
                                    children: [s.jsx(mi, {
                                        className: "h-12 w-12 text-gray-300 mx-auto mb-3"
                                    }), s.jsx("p", {
                                        className: "text-gray-500",
                                        children: "Nenhum histórico de vendas encontrado"
                                    })]
                                })
                            })]
                        })
                    })]
                })
            })]
        })
    }) : null
}

                            }), "Importando..."]
                        }) : s.jsxs(s.Fragment, {
                            children: [s.jsx(so, {
                                className: "h-4 w-4 mr-2"
                            }), "Importar ", a.size, " Cliente(s)"]
                        })
                    })]
                })]
            })]
        })
    })
}
function ew({syncType: e, onSync: t, isLoading: r=!1, label: n="Sincronizar", variant: a="outline", size: i="default", className: o="", "data-testid": l}) {
    const {data: c} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/sync-status"],
        refetchInterval: 3e4
    })
      , d = c == null ? void 0 : c.find(g => g.syncType === e)
      , h = d != null && d.lastSyncAt ? new Date(d.lastSyncAt) : null
      , f = () => {
        if (!h)
            return null;
        const p = Math.floor((new Date().getTime() - h.getTime()) / 6e4);
        if (p < 1)
            return "há menos de 1 minuto";
        if (p < 60)
            return `há ${p} minuto${p > 1 ? "s" : ""}`;
        if (p < 1440) {
            const _ = Math.floor(p / 60);
            return `há ${_} hora${_ > 1 ? "s" : ""}`
        } else
            return kn(h, "dd/MM/yyyy 'às' HH:mm", {
                locale: ys
            })
    }
    ;
    return s.jsxs("div", {
        className: "flex flex-col items-start gap-1",
        children: [s.jsxs(je, {
            onClick: t,
            disabled: r,
            variant: a,
            size: i,
            className: o,
            "data-testid": l,
            children: [s.jsx(dn, {
                className: `h-4 w-4 mr-2 ${r ? "animate-spin" : ""}`
            }), n]
        }), h && s.jsxs("span", {
            className: "text-xs text-muted-foreground ml-1",
            children: ["Última sincronização: ", f()]
        })]
    })
}
function Cpe({isOpen: e, onClose: t}) {
    var re, le, ke, Ee, Te, qe;
    const [r,n] = C.useState("")
      , [a,i] = C.useState("clients")
      , [o,l] = C.useState(0)
      , [c,d] = C.useState(!1)
      , [h,f] = C.useState(null)
      , [g,p] = C.useState("")
      , {toast: _} = en()
      , x = os()
      , y = ve => {
        i(ve),
        f(null)
    }
      , {data: v} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/users"],
        retry: !1
    })
      , {data: N} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/customers"],
        enabled: e
    })
      , {data: j} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/products"],
        enabled: e
    })
      , {data: E, isLoading: R, refetch: U} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/omie/overdue-debts/cached"],
        enabled: e,
        retry: !1,
        staleTime: 1e3 * 60 * 30
    })
      , {data: O, isLoading: M} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/visits/all"],
        enabled: e,
        retry: !1
    })
      , {data: T} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/omie/status"],
        enabled: e,
        retry: !1
    })
      , {data: D, isLoading: P, refetch: V} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/omie/verify-invoice-completeness"],
        enabled: !1,
        retry: !1
    })
      , Q = Gt({
        mutationFn: async ve => {
            d(!0),
            l(0);
            const ce = setInterval( () => {
                l(Ae => Math.min(Ae + 1, 90))
            }
            , 2e3);
            try {
                const Ae = await fetch("/api/omie/sync-active-clients", {
                    method: "POST",
                    headers: {
                        "Content-Type": "application/json"
                    },
                    body: JSON.stringify({
                        defaultSellerId: ve
                    })
                });
                if (!Ae.ok) {
                    const Ct = await Ae.text();
                    throw new Error(`HTTP ${Ae.status}: ${Ct}`)
                }
                const fe = await Ae.json();
                return clearInterval(ce),
                l(100),
                console.log("✅ Sincronização concluída:", fe),
                fe
            } catch (Ae) {

            className: "max-w-md",
            children: [s.jsx(Dn, {
                children: s.jsxs(On, {
                    className: "flex items-center space-x-2",
                    children: [s.jsx(Ts, {
                        className: "h-5 w-5 text-yellow-500"
                    }), s.jsx("span", {
                        children: "Integração Omie Não Configurada"
                    })]
                })
            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                className: "text-center py-6",
                children: [s.jsx("p", {
                    className: "text-gray-600 mb-4",
                    children: "A integração com o Omie não está configurada. Entre em contato com o administrador do sistema."
                }), s.jsx(je, {
                    onClick: t,
                    children: "Fechar"
                })]
            })]
        })
    })
}
function Epe({isOpen: e, onClose: t}) {
    const [r,n] = C.useState(null)
      , [a,i] = C.useState(null)
      , o = C.useRef(null)
      , {toast: l} = en()
      , c = os()
      , d = Gt({
        mutationFn: async _ => {
            const x = new FormData;
            x.append("file", _);
            const y = await fetch("/api/customers/import", {
                method: "POST",
                body: x,
                credentials: "same-origin"
            });
            if (!y.ok) {
                const v = await y.json();
                throw new Error(v.message || "Falha ao importar dados")
            }
            return y.json()
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: _ => {
            i(_),
            c.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/customers"]
            }),
            l({
                title: "Importação concluída",
                description: _.message
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: _ => {
            l({
                title: "Erro na importação",
                description: _.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , h = _ => {
        var y;
        const x = (y = _.target.files) == null ? void 0 : y[0];
        if (x) {
            if (!["application/vnd.ms-excel", "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet", "text/csv"].includes(x.type) && !x.name.endsWith(".xlsx") && !x.name.endsWith(".xls") && !x.name.endsWith(".csv")) {
                l({
                    title: "Arquivo inválido",
                    description: "Por favor, selecione um arquivo Excel (.xlsx, .xls) ou CSV (.csv)",
                    variant: "destructive"
                });
                return
            }
            n(x),
            i(null)
        }
    }
      , f = () => {
        if (!r) {
            l({
                title: "Nenhum arquivo selecionado",
                description: "Por favor, selecione um arquivo para importar",
                variant: "destructive"
            });
            return
        }
        d.mutate(r)
    }
      , g = () => {
        n(null),
        i(null),
        o.current && (o.current.value = ""),
        t()
    }
      , p = () => {
        var _;
        (_ = o.current) == null || _.click()
    }
    ;
    return s.jsx(xn, {
        open: e,
        onOpenChange: g,
        children: s.jsxs(gn, {
            className: "max-w-3xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto",
            children: [s.jsx(Dn, {
                children: s.jsxs(On, {
                    className: "flex items-center gap-2",
                    children: [s.jsx(Mw, {
                        className: "h-5 w-5"
                    }), "Importar Dados de Clientes via Excel"]
                })
            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                className: "space-y-4",
                children: [s.jsx(Oe, {
                    className: "bg-blue-50 border-blue-200",
                    children: s.jsxs(Re, {
                        className: "p-4",
                        children: [s.jsx("h3", {
                            className: "font-semibold text-blue-900 mb-2",
                            children: "Instruções de Importação"
                        }), s.jsxs("ul", {
                            className: "text-sm text-blue-800 space-y-1 list-disc list-inside",
                            children: [s.jsxs("li", {
                                children: ["A planilha deve conter as seguintes colunas: ", s.jsx("strong", {
                                    children: "CPF OU CNPJ"
                                }), ", ", s.jsx("strong", {
                                    children: "LATITUDE"
                                }), ", ", s.jsx("strong", {
                                    children: "LONGITUDE"
                                }), ", ", s.jsx("strong", {
                                    children: "ROTA"
                                }), ", ", s.jsx("strong", {
                                    children: "PERIODICIDADE"
                                })]
                            }), s.jsx("li", {
                                children: "O CPF/CNPJ será usado para identificar o cliente existente"
                            }), s.jsx("li", {
                                children: "Os campos latitude, longitude, rota e periodicidade serão atualizados"
                            }), s.jsx("li", {
                                children: "Periodicidade aceita: semanal, quinzenal, mensal ou bimestral"
                            }), s.jsx("li", {
                                children: "Clientes não encontrados serão listados nos erros"
                            })]
                        })]
                    })
                }), s.jsxs("div", {
                    className: "border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 rounded-lg p-8",
                    children: [s.jsx("input", {
                        ref: o,
                        type: "file",
                        accept: ".xlsx,.xls,.csv",
                        onChange: h,
                        className: "hidden",
                        "data-testid": "input-file-excel"
                    }), s.jsx("div", {
                        className: "text-center",
                        children: r ? s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "space-y-2",
                            children: [s.jsx(Mw, {
                                className: "h-12 w-12 mx-auto text-green-600"
                            }), s.jsx("p", {
                                className: "text-sm font-medium text-gray-700",
                                children: r.name
                            }), s.jsxs("p", {
                                className: "text-xs text-gray-500",
                                children: [(r.size / 1024).toFixed(2), " KB"]
                            }), s.jsx(je, {
                                variant: "outline",
                                size: "sm",
                                onClick: p,
                                "data-testid": "button-change-file",
                                children: "Escolher outro arquivo"
                            })]
                        }) : s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "space-y-2",
                            children: [s.jsx(lx, {
                                className: "h-12 w-12 mx-auto text-gray-400"
                            }), s.jsx("p", {
                                className: "text-sm text-gray-600",
                                children: "Arraste um arquivo ou clique para selecionar"
                            }), s.jsx(je, {
                                variant: "outline",
                                onClick: p,
                                "data-testid": "button-select-file",
                                children: "Selecionar Arquivo"
                            })]
                        })
                    })]
                }), a && s.jsx(Oe, {
                    children: s.jsxs(Re, {
                        className: "p-4",
                        children: [s.jsx("h3", {
                            className: "font-semibold mb-3",
                            children: "Resultado da Importação"
                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "space-y-2 mb-4",
                            children: [s.jsxs("div", {

                                children: [s.jsx("span", {
                                    className: "text-gray-600",
                                    children: "Total processado:"
                                }), s.jsx("span", {
                                    className: "font-medium",
                                    children: a.totalProcessed
                                })]
                            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                className: "flex items-center justify-between text-sm",
                                children: [s.jsx("span", {
                                    className: "text-gray-600",
                                    children: "Clientes atualizados:"
                                }), s.jsxs("span", {
                                    className: "font-medium text-green-600 flex items-center gap-1",
                                    children: [s.jsx(fi, {
                                        className: "h-4 w-4"
                                    }), a.updated]
                                })]
                            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                className: "flex items-center justify-between text-sm",
                                children: [s.jsx("span", {
                                    className: "text-gray-600",
                                    children: "Clientes não encontrados:"
                                }), s.jsxs("span", {
                                    className: "font-medium text-orange-600 flex items-center gap-1",
                                    children: [s.jsx(Tm, {
                                        className: "h-4 w-4"
                                    }), a.notFound]
                                })]
                            })]
                        }), a.errors.length > 0 && s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "mt-4",
                            children: [s.jsxs("h4", {
                                className: "font-medium text-sm text-red-700 mb-2 flex items-center gap-1",
                                children: [s.jsx(Bl, {
                                    className: "h-4 w-4"
                                }), "Erros e avisos:"]
                            }), s.jsx("div", {
                                className: "bg-red-50 rounded p-3 max-h-48 overflow-y-auto",
                                children: s.jsx("ul", {
                                    className: "text-xs text-red-800 space-y-1",
                                    children: a.errors.map( (_, x) => s.jsxs("li", {
                                        children: ["• ", _]
                                    }, x))
                                })
                            })]
                        }), a.debugInfo && a.debugInfo.length > 0 && s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "mt-4",
                            children: [s.jsx("h4", {
                                className: "font-medium text-sm text-blue-700 mb-2",
                                children: "🔍 Informações de Debug (primeiras 5 linhas):"
                            }), s.jsx("div", {
                                className: "bg-blue-50 rounded p-3 max-h-96 overflow-y-auto",
                                children: a.debugInfo.slice(0, 5).map( (_, x) => s.jsxs("div", {
                                    className: "mb-4 pb-4 border-b border-blue-200 last:border-0",
                                    children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                                        className: "text-xs text-blue-900 font-medium mb-2",
                                        children: ["Linha ", _.row, ": ", _.customer]
                                    }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                        className: "text-xs text-blue-800 space-y-1 pl-3",
                                        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                                            children: [s.jsx("strong", {
                                                children: "Colunas disponíveis:"
                                            }), " ", _.availableColumns.join(", ")]
                                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                            children: [s.jsx("strong", {
                                                children: "LATITUDE lida:"
                                            }), " ", _.latitudeCol !== void 0 ? `"${_.latitudeCol}" (${_.latitudeType})` : "NÃO ENCONTRADA"]
                                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                            children: [s.jsx("strong", {
                                                children: "LONGITUDE lida:"
                                            }), " ", _.longitudeCol !== void 0 ? `"${_.longitudeCol}" (${_.longitudeType})` : "NÃO ENCONTRADA"]
                                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                            children: [s.jsx("strong", {
                                                children: "Dados para atualizar:"
                                            }), " ", JSON.stringify(_.updateData)]
                                        }), _.updateSuccess !== void 0 && s.jsxs("div", {
                                            className: _.updateSuccess ? "text-green-700" : "text-red-700",
                                            children: [s.jsx("strong", {
                                                children: "Atualização:"
                                            }), " ", _.updateSuccess ? "✅ Sucesso" : `❌ Falhou - ${_.reason || _.updateError}`]
                                        })]
                                    })]
                                }, x))
                            })]
                        })]
                    })
                }), s.jsxs("div", {
                    className: "flex justify-end gap-2",
                    children: [s.jsx(je, {
                        variant: "outline",
                        onClick: g,
                        "data-testid": "button-close-import",
                        children: "Fechar"
                    }), s.jsx(je, {
                        onClick: f,
                        disabled: !r || d.isPending,
                        className: "bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700",
                        "data-testid": "button-execute-import",
                        children: d.isPending ? s.jsxs(s.Fragment, {
                            children: [s.jsx(ba, {
                                className: "h-4 w-4 mr-2 animate-spin"
                            }), "Importando..."]
                        }) : s.jsxs(s.Fragment, {
                            children: [s.jsx(lx, {
                                className: "h-4 w-4 mr-2"
                            }), "Importar"]
                        })
                    })]
                })]
            })]
        })
    })
}
function bP(e) {
    const t = {
        seg: "Seg",
        ter: "Ter",
        qua: "Qua",
        qui: "Qui",
        sex: "Sex",
        sab: "Sab",
        dom: "Dom",
        SEG: "Seg",
        TER: "Ter",
        QUA: "Qua",
        QUI: "Qui",
        SEX: "Sex",
        SAB: "Sab",
        DOM: "Dom",
        sáb: "Sab",
        SÁB: "Sab",
        "sáb.": "Sab",
        "SÁB.": "Sab",
        segunda: "Seg",
        terca: "Ter",
        quarta: "Qua",
        quinta: "Qui",
        sexta: "Sex",
        sabado: "Sab",
        domingo: "Dom",
        terça: "Ter",
        sábado: "Sab",
        SEGUNDA: "Seg",
        TERCA: "Ter",
        TERÇA: "Ter",
        QUARTA: "Qua",
        QUINTA: "Qui",
        SEXTA: "Sex",
        SABADO: "Sab",
        SÁBADO: "Sab",
        DOMINGO: "Dom",
        "segunda-feira": "Seg",
        "terca-feira": "Ter",
        "terça-feira": "Ter",
        "quarta-feira": "Qua",
        "quinta-feira": "Qui",
        "sexta-feira": "Sex",
        "sabado-feira": "Sab",
        "sábado-feira": "Sab",
        "domingo-feira": "Dom",
        monday: "Seg",
        tuesday: "Ter",
        wednesday: "Qua",
        thursday: "Qui",
        friday: "Sex",
        saturday: "Sab",
        sunday: "Dom",
        MONDAY: "Seg",
        TUESDAY: "Ter",
        WEDNESDAY: "Qua",
        THURSDAY: "Qui",
        FRIDAY: "Sex",
        SATURDAY: "Sab",
        SUNDAY: "Dom"
    };
    let r = [];
    if (typeof e == "string")
        try {
            r = JSON.parse(e)
        } catch {
            r = [e]
        }
    else
        r = e || [];
    return r.map(n => t[n.toLowerCase().trim()] || n).filter(n => n)
}
function kpe() {
    const [e,t] = C.useState(!1)
      , [r,n] = C.useState(!1)
      , [a,i] = C.useState(!1)
      , [o,l] = C.useState(!1)
      , [c,d] = C.useState(null)
      , [h,f] = C.useState(!1)
      , [g,p] = C.useState(null)
      , [_,x] = C.useState("")
      , [y,v] = C.useState("all")
      , [N,j] = C.useState("active")
      , [E,R] = C.useState("all")
      , [U,O] = C.useState("")
      , [M,T] = C.useState("all")
      , {toast: D} = en()
      , P = os()
      , {data: V=[], isLoading: Q} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/customers"],
        retry: !1
    })
      , {data: Y=[]} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/users"],
        retry: !1
    })
      , H = Gt({
        mutationFn: async se => {
            await dr("DELETE", `/api/customers/${se}`)
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            P.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/customers"]
            }),
            D({
                title: "Sucesso",
                description: "Cliente excluído com sucesso!"
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: se => {
            D({
                title: "Erro",
                description: se.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , te = (se, k) => {
        const B = encodeURIComponent(`Olá ${k}! Somos da Honest Sucos. Como está tudo? Gostaria de saber se precisa de algum produto hoje.`)
          , q = `https://wa.me/55${se.replace(/\D/g, "")}?text=${B}`;
        Ex(q)
    }
      , G = se => {
        if (!se.latitude || !se.longitude) {
            D({
                title: "Localização não disponível",
                description: "É necessário cadastrar a latitude e longitude do cliente primeiro.",
                variant: "destructive"
            });
            return
        }
        const k = `https://waze.com/ul?ll=${se.latitude},${se.longitude}&navigate=yes&zoom=17`;
        window.open(k, "_blank")
    }
      , z = (V == null ? void 0 : V.filter(se => {
        const k = se.cpf || se.cnpj || se.document || ""
          , B = se.fantasyName || ""
          , q = _.replace(/[.\-\/\s]/g, "")
          , K = k.replace(/[.\-\/\s]/g, "")
          , re = se.phone.replace(/[.\-\/\s()\s]/g, "")
          , le = se.name.toLowerCase().includes(_.toLowerCase()) || B.toLowerCase().includes(_.toLowerCase()) || K.includes(q) || re.includes(q);
        let ke = !0;
        if (y !== "all")
            try {
                ke = bP(se.weekdays || "[]").includes(y)
            } catch {
                ke = !1
            }
        const Ee = N === "all" || N === "active" && se.omieStatus === "ativo" || N === "inactive" && se.omieStatus === "inativo"
          , Te = E === "all" || se.sellerId === E;
        let qe = !0;
        if (U) {
            const Ae = new Date(U).getDay()
              , Ct = {
                0: "Dom",
                1: "Seg",
                2: "Ter",
                3: "Qua",
                4: "Qui",
                5: "Sex",
                6: "Sab"
            }[Ae];
            qe = bP(se.weekdays || "[]").includes(Ct)
        }
        const ve = M === "all" || M === "yes" && se.isPositivatedThisMonth || M === "no" && !se.isPositivatedThisMonth;
        return le && ke && Ee && Te && qe && ve
    }
    )) || []
      , de = se => se ? new Date(se).toLocaleDateString("pt-BR") : "Nunca"
      , Ce = se => {
        try {
            let k = JSON.parse(se);
            const B = {
                seg: "Seg",
                ter: "Ter",
                qua: "Qua",
                qui: "Qui",
                sex: "Sex",
                sab: "Sáb",
                dom: "Dom",
                segunda: "Seg",
                terca: "Ter",
                quarta: "Qua",
                quinta: "Qui",
                sexta: "Sex",
                sabado: "Sáb",
                domingo: "Dom",
                terça: "Ter",
                sábado: "Sáb",
                "segunda-feira": "Seg",
                "terca-feira": "Ter",
                "terça-feira": "Ter",
                "quarta-feira": "Qua",
                "quinta-feira": "Qui",
                "sexta-feira": "Sex",
                "sabado-feira": "Sáb",
                "sábado-feira": "Sáb",
                "domingo-feira": "Dom",
                monday: "Seg",
                tuesday: "Ter",
                wednesday: "Qua",
                thursday: "Qui",
                friday: "Sex",
                saturday: "Sáb",
                sunday: "Dom"
            };
            return k.map(K => B[K.toLowerCase().trim()] || K).filter(K => K).join(", ")
        } catch {
            return "-"
        }
    }
    ;
    return Q ? s.jsxs("div", {
        className: "space-y-6",
        children: [s.jsx("div", {
            className: "flex items-center justify-between",
            children: s.jsx("h2", {
                className: "text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800",
                children: "Gestão de Clientes"
            })
        }), s.jsx(Oe, {
            children: s.jsx(Re, {
                className: "p-6",
                children: s.jsx("div", {
                    className: "animate-pulse space-y-4",
                    children: [...Array(5)].map( (se, k) => s.jsx("div", {
                        className: "h-16 bg-gray-200 rounded"
                    }, k))
                })
            })
        })]
    }) : s.jsxs("div", {
        className: "space-y-6",
        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
            className: "flex items-center justify-between",
            children: [s.jsx("h2", {
                className: "text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800",
                children: "Gestão de Clientes"
            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                className: "flex space-x-2",
                children: [s.jsxs(je, {
                    variant: "outline",
                    className: "border-orange-500 text-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-500 hover:text-white",
                    onClick: () => i(!0),
                    "data-testid": "button-sync-omie",
                    children: [s.jsx(dn, {
                        className: "h-4 w-4 mr-2"
                    }), "Sincronizar Omie"]
                }), s.jsxs(je, {
                    variant: "outline",
                    className: "border-honest-blue text-honest-blue hover:bg-honest-blue hover:text-white",
                    onClick: () => n(!0),
                    "data-testid": "button-import-omie",
                    children: [s.jsx(so, {
                        className: "h-4 w-4 mr-2"
                    }), "Importar do Omie"]
                }), s.jsxs(je, {
                    variant: "outline",
                    className: "border-green-500 text-green-600 hover:bg-green-500 hover:text-white",
                    onClick: () => l(!0),
                    "data-testid": "button-import-excel",
                    children: [s.jsx(lx, {
                        className: "h-4 w-4 mr-2"
                    }), "Importar Excel"]
                }), s.jsxs(je, {
                    className: "bg-honest-blue hover:bg-blue-700",
                    onClick: () => t(!0),
                    "data-testid": "button-new-customer",
                    children: [s.jsx(uf, {
                        className: "h-4 w-4 mr-2"
                    }), "Novo Cliente"]
                })]
            })]
        }), s.jsx(Oe, {
            children: s.jsx(Re, {
                className: "p-6",
                children: s.jsxs("div", {
                    className: "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-7 gap-4",
                    children: [s.jsx(xt, {
                        placeholder: "Buscar por nome, CPF/CNPJ ou telefone...",
                        value: _,
                        onChange: se => x(se.target.value),
                        "data-testid": "input-search-customer"
                    }), s.jsxs(yr, {
                        value: y,
                        onValueChange: v,

                        })]
                    }), s.jsxs(yr, {

                            }), Y == null ? void 0 : Y.map(se => s.jsxs(Ue, {
                                value: se.id,
                                children: [se.firstName, " ", se.lastName]
                            }, se.id))]
                        })]
                    }), s.jsx(xt, {
                        type: "date",
                        placeholder: "Data da rota",
                        value: U,
                        onChange: se => O(se.target.value),
                        "data-testid": "input-route-date-filter"
                    }), s.jsxs("div", {

                    })]

                                })]

                                className: "hover:bg-gray-50",

                                    })
                                }), s.jsx("td", {

                                        children: se.visitPeriodicity || "Semanal"
                                    })
                                }), s.jsx("td", {

                                        className: "font-semibold text-green-600",
                                        children: "SIM"
                                    }) : s.jsx("span", {
                                        className: "font-semibold text-red-600",
                                        children: "NÃO"
                                    })
                                }), s.jsx("td", {
                                    className: "px-6 py-4 text-center",
                                    children: s.jsx("div", {
                                        className: "text-sm text-gray-700",
                                        children: se.lastActivityDate ? de(se.lastActivityDate) : s.jsx("span", {
                                            className: "text-gray-400",
                                            children: "Nunca"
                                        })
                                    })
                                }), s.jsx("td", {
                                    className: "px-6 py-4 text-center",
                                    children: se.situacao ? s.jsx($t, {
                                        className: se.situacao === "ativo" ? "bg-green-100 text-green-800" : "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
                                        children: se.situacao
                                    }) : s.jsx("span", {
                                        className: "text-gray-400 text-xs",
                                        children: "N/A"
                                    })
                                }), s.jsx("td", {
                                    className: "px-6 py-4",
                                    children: s.jsxs("div", {
                                        className: "flex items-center space-x-2",
                                        children: [s.jsx(je, {
                                            variant: "ghost",
                                            size: "sm",
                                            onClick: () => {
                                                d(se),
                                                t(!0)
                                            }
                                            ,
                                            "data-testid": `button-edit-customer-${se.id}`,
                                            children: s.jsx(UC, {
                                                className: "h-4 w-4 text-gray-600"
                                            })
                                        }), s.jsx(je, {
                                            variant: "ghost",
                                            size: "sm",
                                            onClick: () => te(se.phone, se.fantasyName || se.name),
                                            "data-testid": `button-whatsapp-customer-${se.id}`,
                                            children: s.jsx(Tl, {
                                                className: "h-4 w-4 text-green-600"
                                            })
                                        }), se.latitude && se.longitude && s.jsx(je, {
                                            variant: "ghost",
                                            size: "sm",
                                            onClick: () => G(se),
                                            "data-testid": `button-waze-customer-${se.id}`,
                                            className: "text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700",
                                            children: s.jsx(Sr, {
                                                className: "h-4 w-4"
                                            })
                                        }), s.jsx(je, {
                                            variant: "ghost",
                                            size: "sm",
                                            onClick: () => H.mutate(se.id),
                                            "data-testid": `button-delete-customer-${se.id}`,
                                            children: s.jsx(lp, {
                                                className: "h-4 w-4 text-red-600"
                                            })
                                        })]
                                    })
                                })]
                            }, se.id)) : s.jsx("tr", {
                                children: s.jsx("td", {
                                    colSpan: 8,
                                    className: "px-6 py-12 text-center text-gray-500",
                                    children: "Nenhum cliente encontrado"
                                })
                            })
                        })]
                    })
                })
            })
        }), e && s.jsx(ipe, {
            isOpen: e,
            onClose: () => {
                t(!1),
                d(null)
            }
            ,
            customer: c
        }), s.jsx(Spe, {
            isOpen: r,
            onClose: () => n(!1)
        }), s.jsx(Cpe, {
            isOpen: a,
            onClose: () => i(!1)
        }), s.jsx(Epe, {
            isOpen: o,
            onClose: () => l(!1)
        }), h && g && s.jsx(bpe, {
            customer: g,
            isOpen: h,
            onClose: () => {
                f(!1),
                p(null)
            }
        })]
    })
}
function Tpe() {
    const [e,t] = C.useState(null)
      , [r,n] = C.useState(!1)
      , {data: a, isLoading: i} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/products"],
        retry: !1
    })
      , {toast: o} = en()
      , l = os()
      , c = Gt({
        mutationFn: async () => {
            const g = await fetch("/api/omie/sync-products", {
                method: "POST",
                headers: {
                    "Content-Type": "application/json"
                }
            });
            if (!g.ok) {
                const p = await g.text();
                throw new Error(p || "Erro ao sincronizar produtos")
            }
            return await g.json()
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: g => {
            l.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/products"]
            }),
            o({
                title: "Sincronização concluída",
                description: `${g.imported} novos produtos, ${g.updated} atualizados${g.skipped ? `, ${g.skipped} inativos pulados` : ""}.`
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: g => {
            o({
                title: "Erro na sincronização",
                description: g.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , d = Gt({
        mutationFn: async ({productId: g, imageIndex: p}) => {
            const _ = await fetch(`/api/products/${g}/images/${p}`, {
                method: "DELETE"
            });
            if (!_.ok)
                throw new Error("Erro ao remover imagem");
            return _.json()
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            l.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/products"]
            }),
            o({
                title: "Sucesso!",
                description: "Imagem removida com sucesso."
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: g => {
            o({
                title: "Erro ao remover",
                description: g.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , h = async (g, p) => {
        if (p.length === 0)
            return;
        n(!0);
        const _ = new FormData;
        Array.from(p).forEach(x => {
            _.append("images", x)
        }
        );
        try {
            const x = await fetch(`/api/products/${g}/upload-images`, {
                method: "POST",
                body: _
            });
            if (!x.ok)
                throw new Error("Erro ao fazer upload das imagens");
            await x.json(),
            l.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/products"]
            }),
            o({
                title: "Sucesso!",
                description: "Imagens enviadas com sucesso."
            })
        } catch (x) {
            o({
                title: "Erro no upload",
                description: x.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        } finally {
            n(!1)
        }
    }
      , f = g => new Intl.NumberFormat("pt-BR",{
        style: "currency",
        currency: "BRL"
    }).format(g);
    return i ? s.jsxs("div", {
        className: "space-y-6",
        children: [s.jsx("div", {
            className: "flex items-center justify-between",
            children: s.jsx("h2", {
                className: "text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800",
                children: "Catálogo de Produtos"
            })
        }), s.jsx("div", {
            className: "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6",
            children: [...Array(8)].map( (g, p) => s.jsx(Oe, {
                className: "animate-pulse",
                children: s.jsxs(Re, {
                    className: "p-6",
                    children: [s.jsx("div", {
                        className: "h-48 bg-gray-200 rounded mb-4"
                    }), s.jsx("div", {
                        className: "h-4 bg-gray-200 rounded mb-2"
                    }), s.jsx("div", {
                        className: "h-4 bg-gray-200 rounded"
                    })]
                })
            }, p))
        })]
    }) : s.jsxs("div", {
        className: "space-y-6",
        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
            className: "flex items-center justify-between",
            children: [s.jsx("h2", {
                className: "text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800",
                children: "Catálogo de Produtos"
            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                className: "flex gap-2",
                children: [s.jsxs(je, {
                    variant: "outline",
                    onClick: () => {
                        window.location.hash = "#omie-integration"
                    }
                    ,
                    "data-testid": "button-omie-integration",
                    children: [s.jsx("i", {
                        className: "fas fa-cog mr-2"
                    }), "Configurações Omie"]
                }), s.jsx(je, {
                    className: "bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white",
                    onClick: () => c.mutate(),
                    disabled: c.isPending,
                    "data-testid": "button-sync-products",
                    children: c.isPending ? s.jsxs(s.Fragment, {
                        children: [s.jsx(dn, {
                            className: "mr-2 h-4 w-4 animate-spin"
                        }), "Sincronizando..."]
                    }) : s.jsxs(s.Fragment, {
                        children: [s.jsx(dn, {
                            className: "mr-2 h-4 w-4"
                        }), "Sincronizar Produtos"]
                    })
                })]
            })]
        }), s.jsx("div", {
            className: "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6",
            children: a && a.length > 0 ? a.map(g => {
                var p, _;
                return s.jsxs(Oe, {
                    className: "overflow-hidden",
                    children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "h-48 bg-gradient-to-br from-honest-orange to-honest-blue flex items-center justify-center relative",
                        children: [g.imageUrl || g.images && g.images.length > 0 ? s.jsx("img", {
                            src: g.imageUrl || ((p = g.images) == null ? void 0 : p[0]),
                            alt: g.name,
                            className: "w-full h-full object-cover"
                        }) : s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "text-white text-center",
                            children: [s.jsx("i", {
                                className: "fas fa-glass-whiskey text-4xl mb-2"
                            }), s.jsx("p", {
                                className: "text-sm",
                                children: "Honest Sucos"
                            })]
                        }), g.images && g.images.length > 1 && s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "absolute top-2 right-2 bg-black/70 text-white px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs",
                            children: [g.images.length, " fotos"]
                        })]
                    }), s.jsx(Re, {
                        className: "p-6",
                        children: s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "space-y-3",
                            children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                                children: [s.jsx("h3", {
                                    className: "font-semibold text-gray-800",
                                    children: g.name
                                }), g.description && s.jsx("p", {
                                    className: "text-sm text-gray-600 line-clamp-2",
                                    children: g.description
                                })]
                            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                className: "flex items-center justify-between",
                                children: [s.jsxs("div", {

                                    }), s.jsx("p", {

                                        children: "por unidade"
                                    })]
                                }), s.jsxs("div", {

                                    }), s.jsxs("p", {
                                        className: "text-sm font-medium text-gray-800",
                                        children: [g.stock, " un"]
                                    })]
                                })]
                            }), (g.omieCodigoProduto || g.omieCodigo) && s.jsx("div", {
                                className: "flex items-center justify-between",
                                children: s.jsxs("div", {
                                    className: "text-xs text-gray-500 flex items-center",
                                    children: [s.jsx("i", {
                                        className: "fas fa-check-circle text-green-500 mr-1"
                                    }), s.jsxs("span", {
                                        className: "truncate",
                                        children: [g.omieCodigo && `Código: ${g.omieCodigo}`, g.omieCodigo && g.omieCodigoProduto && " | ", g.omieCodigoProduto && `ID: ${g.omieCodigoProduto}`]
                                    })]
                                })
                            }), s.jsxs(xn, {
                                children: [s.jsx(Fx, {
                                    asChild: !0,
                                    children: s.jsxs(je, {
                                        variant: "outline",
                                        className: "w-full",
                                        onClick: () => t(g),
                                        "data-testid": `button-manage-images-${g.id}`,
                                        children: [s.jsx(OT, {
                                            className: "mr-2 h-4 w-4"
                                        }), "Gerenciar Imagens"]
                                    })
                                }), s.jsxs(gn, {
                                    className: "max-w-3xl",
                                    children: [s.jsx(Dn, {
                                        children: s.jsxs(On, {
                                            children: ["Gerenciar Imagens - ", g.name]
                                        })
                                    }), s.jsxs("div", {

                                                    })]
                                                }) : s.jsxs("div", {

                                                    children: [s.jsx(lx, {
                                                        className: "h-12 w-12 text-gray-400 mb-2"
                                                    }), s.jsx("p", {

                                                        children: "Clique para adicionar imagens (máx. 10)"
                                                    }), s.jsx("p", {
                                                        className: "text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1",
                                                        children: "PNG, JPG, JPEG até 10MB cada"
                                                    })]
                                                })
                                            })]
                                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                            children: [s.jsxs("h4", {
                                                className: "font-medium mb-3",

                                            }), g.images && g.images.length > 0 ? s.jsx("div", {
                                                className: "grid grid-cols-3 gap-4",
                                                children: g.images.map( (x, y) => s.jsxs("div", {
                                                    className: "relative group",
                                                    children: [s.jsx("img", {
                                                        src: x,
                                                        alt: `${g.name} - ${y + 1}`,
                                                        className: "w-full h-32 object-cover rounded-lg"
                                                    }), s.jsx("button", {
                                                        onClick: () => d.mutate({
                                                            productId: g.id,
                                                            imageIndex: y
                                                        }),
                                                        className: "absolute top-2 right-2 bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white p-1 rounded-full opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity",

                                                            className: "h-4 w-4"
                                                        })
                                                    }), y === 0 && s.jsx("div", {
                                                        className: "absolute bottom-2 left-2 bg-blue-500 text-white px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs",
                                                        children: "Principal"
                                                    })]
                                                }, y))
                                            }) : s.jsxs("div", {
                                                className: "text-center py-8 text-gray-500",
                                                children: [s.jsx(OT, {
                                                    className: "h-12 w-12 mx-auto mb-2 opacity-50"
                                                }), s.jsx("p", {
                                                    className: "text-sm",
                                                    children: "Nenhuma imagem adicionada"
                                                })]
                                            })]
                                        }), s.jsx("div", {
                                            className: "bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-lg p-3",
                                            children: s.jsxs("p", {
                                                className: "text-xs text-blue-700",
                                                children: [s.jsx("strong", {
                                                    children: "Dica:"
                                                }), " A primeira imagem será usada como imagem principal do produto no hotsite. As demais aparecerão na galeria de fotos."]
                                            })
                                        })]
                                    })]
                                })]
                            })]
                        })
                    })]
                }, g.id)
            }
            ) : s.jsx("div", {
                className: "col-span-full text-center py-12",
                children: s.jsx("p", {
                    className: "text-gray-500",
                    children: "Nenhum produto cadastrado"
                })
            })
        }), s.jsx("div", {
            className: "bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-lg p-4",
            children: s.jsxs("div", {
                className: "flex items-center",
                children: [s.jsx("i", {
                    className: "fas fa-info-circle text-blue-500 mr-2"
                }), s.jsxs("p", {
                    className: "text-sm text-blue-700",
                    children: [s.jsx("strong", {
                        children: "Importante:"
                    }), " Todos os produtos são importados automaticamente do Omie ERP. Para adicionar novos produtos, cadastre-os primeiro no sistema Omie e depois use a função de importação. As imagens devem ser adicionadas aqui no Sistema Integra para aparecerem no hotsite."]
                })]
            })
        })]
    })
}
function NP(e) {
    return {
        "5.102": "VENDA",
        5102: "VENDA",
        "5.101": "VENDA",
        5101: "VENDA",
        "6.102": "VENDA",
        6102: "VENDA",
        "6.101": "VENDA",
        6101: "VENDA",
        "5.949": "TROCA",
        5949: "TROCA",
        "6.949": "TROCA",
        6949: "TROCA",
        "5.911": "AMOSTRA",
        5911: "AMOSTRA",
        "6.911": "AMOSTRA",
        6911: "AMOSTRA",
        "5.910": "BONIFICAÇÃO",
        5910: "BONIFICAÇÃO",
        "6.910": "BONIFICAÇÃO",
        6910: "BONIFICAÇÃO",
        "5.915": "BONIFICAÇÃO",
        5915: "BONIFICAÇÃO",
        "1.102": "ENTRADA",
        1102: "ENTRADA",
        "1.202": "ENTRADA",
        1202: "ENTRADA",
        "2.556": "DEVOLUÇÃO",
        2556: "DEVOLUÇÃO",
        "1.556": "DEVOLUÇÃO",
        1556: "DEVOLUÇÃO",
        "1.201": "DEVOLUÇÃO",
        1201: "DEVOLUÇÃO"
    }[e] || e
}
function DH() {
    var T;
    const e = os()
      , [t,r] = C.useState({
        page: 1,
        pageSize: 50
    })
      , [n,a] = C.useState("invoiceDate")
      , [i,o] = C.useState("desc")
      , {data: l, isLoading: c, refetch: d} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/billings"],
        queryFn: () => fetch("/api/billings").then(D => D.json())
    })
      , {billingsData: h, filteredBillings: f} = l ? ( () => {
        let D = l.filter(Y => {
            var H;
            if (t.invoiceNumber && !Y.invoiceNumber.toLowerCase().includes(t.invoiceNumber.toLowerCase()) || t.customerDocument && !((H = Y.customerDocument) != null && H.includes(t.customerDocument)))
                return !1;
            if (t.startDate) {
                const te = new Date(Y.invoiceDate)
                  , G = new Date(t.startDate);
                if (te < G)
                    return !1
            }
            if (t.endDate) {
                const te = new Date(Y.invoiceDate)
                  , G = new Date(t.endDate);
                if (te > G)
                    return !1
            }
            return !(t.cfop && NP(Y.cfop) !== t.cfop || t.invoiceStage && Y.invoiceStage !== t.invoiceStage || t.sellerId && Y.sellerId !== t.sellerId)
        }
        );
        n && D.sort( (Y, H) => {
            const te = Y[n]
              , G = H[n];
            return te === void 0 && G === void 0 ? 0 : te === void 0 ? i === "asc" ? 1 : -1 : G === void 0 || te < G ? i === "asc" ? -1 : 1 : te > G ? i === "asc" ? 1 : -1 : 0
        }
        );
        const P = (t.page - 1) * t.pageSize
          , V = P + t.pageSize;
        return {
            billingsData: {
                billings: D.slice(P, V),
                total: D.length,
                page: t.page,
                pageSize: t.pageSize
            },
            filteredBillings: D
        }
    }
    )() : {
        billingsData: null,
        filteredBillings: []
    }
      , g = h ? {
        totalInvoices: h.total,
        totalValue: f.reduce( (D, P) => {
            const V = Number(P.totalValue);
            return D + (isNaN(V) ? 0 : V)
        }
        , 0),
        averageValue: h.total > 0 ? f.reduce( (D, P) => {
            const V = Number(P.totalValue);
            return D + (isNaN(V) ? 0 : V)
        }
        , 0) / h.total : 0,
        period: t.startDate && t.endDate ? `${new Date(t.startDate).toLocaleDateString("pt-BR")} - ${new Date(t.endDate).toLocaleDateString("pt-BR")}` : "Todos os períodos"
    } : null
      , {data: p} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/billings/sellers"],
        queryFn: () => fetch("/api/billings/sellers").then(D => D.json())
    })
      , _ = Gt({
        mutationFn: async () => {
            const D = await fetch("/api/omie/sync-billings", {
                method: "POST",
                headers: {
                    "Content-Type": "application/json"
                },
                credentials: "include"
            });
            if (!D.ok)
                throw new Error(`Erro ${D.status}: ${D.statusText}`);
            return D.json()
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: D => {
            Cu({
                title: "Faturamentos sincronizados com sucesso",
                description: `${D.total} faturamentos encontrados. ${D.inserted} inseridos, ${D.updated} atualizados.`
            }),
            e.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/billings"]
            }),
            e.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/billings/stats"]
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: D => {
            Cu({
                title: "Erro ao sincronizar faturamentos",
                description: D.message || "Erro desconhecido",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , x = () => {
        _.mutate()
    }
      , y = Gt({
        mutationFn: async () => await dr("POST", "/api/billings/update-seller-names"),
        onSuccess: D => {
            Cu({
                title: "Nomes de vendedores atualizados",
                description: `${D.updated} faturamentos atualizados com sucesso. ${D.notFound} vendedores não encontrados.`
            }),
            e.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/billings"]
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: D => {
            Cu({
                title: "Erro ao atualizar nomes",
                description: D.message || "Erro desconhecido",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , v = Gt({
        mutationFn: async () => await dr("POST", "/api/billings/cleanup-cancelled"),
        onSuccess: D => {
            Cu({
                title: "Limpeza de notas canceladas concluída",
                description: `${D.totalChecked} notas verificadas. ${D.cancelledFound} notas canceladas removidas.`
            }),
            e.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/billings"]
            }),
            e.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/billings/stats"]
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: D => {
            Cu({
                title: "Erro ao limpar notas canceladas",
                description: D.message || "Erro desconhecido",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , N = (D, P) => {
        r(V => ({
            ...V,
            [D]: P,
            ...D !== "page" && D !== "pageSize" ? {
                page: 1
            } : {}
        }))
    }
      , j = () => {
        r({
            page: 1,
            pageSize: 50
        })
    }
      , E = D => {
        n === D ? o(P => P === "asc" ? "desc" : "asc") : (a(D),
        o("asc"))
    }
      , R = D => new Intl.NumberFormat("pt-BR",{
        style: "currency",
        currency: "BRL"
    }).format(D)
      , U = D => new Date(D).toLocaleDateString("pt-BR", {
        timeZone: "UTC"
    })
      , O = async () => {
        try {
            const D = await fetch("/api/billings/export", {
                credentials: "include"
            });
            if (!D.ok)
                throw new Error("Erro ao exportar dados");
            const P = await D.blob()
              , V = window.URL.createObjectURL(P)
              , Q = document.createElement("a");
            Q.href = V,
            Q.download = `dados-omie-${new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0]}.xlsx`,
            document.body.appendChild(Q),
            Q.click(),
            window.URL.revokeObjectURL(V),
            document.body.removeChild(Q),
            Cu({
                title: "Exportação concluída",
                description: "Os dados foram exportados com sucesso!"
            })
        } catch {
            Cu({
                title: "Erro na exportação",
                description: "Não foi possível exportar os dados",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    }
      , M = ({field: D, children: P}) => s.jsx(Yt, {
