                                    "data-testid": `cell-seller-${D.id}`,
                                    children: D.sellerName || "-"
                                }), s.jsx(Rt, {
                                    "data-testid": `cell-stage-${D.id}`,
                                    children: s.jsx($t, {
                                        variant: "outline",
                                        children: D.invoiceStage || "-"
                                    })
                                })]
                            }, D.id))
                        })]
                    })
                }), h && h.total > 0 && s.jsxs("div", {
                    className: "flex items-center justify-between mt-4",
                    children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "text-sm text-muted-foreground",
                        children: ["Página ", t.page, " de ", Math.ceil(h.total / t.pageSize), "(", h.total, " registros)"]
                    }), s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "flex gap-2",
                        children: [s.jsx(je, {
                            variant: "outline",
                            size: "sm",
                            onClick: () => N("page", t.page - 1),
                            disabled: t.page === 1,
                            "data-testid": "button-prev-page",
                            children: "Anterior"
                        }), s.jsx(je, {
                            variant: "outline",
                            size: "sm",
                            onClick: () => N("page", t.page + 1),
                            disabled: t.page >= Math.ceil(h.total / t.pageSize),
                            "data-testid": "button-next-page",
                            children: "Próxima"
                        })]
                    })]
                })]
            })]
        })]
    })
}
function Ape() {
    const [e,t] = C.useState(!1)
      , [r,n] = C.useState(null)
      , [a,i] = C.useState("")
      , [o,l] = C.useState("")
      , [c,d] = C.useState("")
      , {toast: h} = en()
      , f = os()
      , {data: g, isLoading: p} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/message-templates"],
        retry: !1
    })
      , {data: _, isLoading: x} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/customers"],
        retry: !1
    })
      , {data: y, isLoading: v} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/whatsapp/history"],
        retry: !1
    })
      , N = Gt({
        mutationFn: async U => {
            await dr("POST", "/api/whatsapp/send", U)
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            f.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/whatsapp/history"]
            }),
            i(""),
            l(""),
            d(""),
            h({
                title: "Sucesso",
                description: "Mensagem enviada com sucesso!"
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: U => {
            h({
                title: "Erro",
                description: U.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , j = Gt({
        mutationFn: async U => {
            await dr("POST", "/api/message-templates", U)
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            f.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/message-templates"]
            }),
            t(!1),
            n(null),
            h({
                title: "Sucesso",
                description: "Template criado com sucesso!"
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: U => {
            h({
                title: "Erro",
                description: U.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , E = () => {
        if (!a || !c) {
            h({
                title: "Erro",
                description: "Selecione um cliente e digite uma mensagem",
                variant: "destructive"
            });
            return
        }
        N.mutate({
            customerId: a,
            message: c,
            templateId: o || void 0
        })
    }
      , R = U => {
        l(U.id),
        d(U.message)
    }
    ;
    return p || x ? s.jsxs("div", {
        className: "space-y-6",
        children: [s.jsx("div", {
            className: "flex items-center justify-between",
            children: s.jsx("h2", {
                className: "text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800",
                children: "WhatsApp Business"
            })
        }), s.jsxs("div", {
            className: "grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6",
            children: [s.jsx(Oe, {
                className: "animate-pulse",
                children: s.jsx(Re, {
                    className: "p-6",
                    children: s.jsx("div", {
                        className: "h-64 bg-gray-200 rounded"
                    })
                })
            }), s.jsx(Oe, {
                className: "animate-pulse",
                children: s.jsx(Re, {
                    className: "p-6",
                    children: s.jsx("div", {
                        className: "h-64 bg-gray-200 rounded"
                    })
                })
            })]
        })]
    }) : s.jsxs("div", {
        className: "space-y-6",
        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
            className: "flex items-center justify-between",
            children: [s.jsx("h2", {
                className: "text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800",
                children: "WhatsApp Business"
            }), s.jsxs(je, {
                className: "bg-green-500 hover:bg-green-600 text-white",
                onClick: () => t(!0),
                children: [s.jsx("i", {
                    className: "fas fa-plus mr-2"
                }), "Nova Mensagem"]
            })]
        }), s.jsxs("div", {
            className: "grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6",
            children: [s.jsxs(Oe, {
                children: [s.jsx(ut, {
                    className: "border-b border-gray-200",
                    children: s.jsx(ht, {
                        className: "text-lg font-semibold text-gray-800",
                        children: "Templates de Mensagens"
                    })
                }), s.jsx(Re, {
                    className: "p-6 space-y-4",
                    children: g && g.length > 0 ? g.map(U => s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "border border-gray-200 rounded-lg p-4",
                        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "flex items-center justify-between mb-3",
                            children: [s.jsx("h4", {
                                className: "font-medium text-gray-800",
                                children: U.name
                            }), s.jsx("div", {
                                className: "flex items-center space-x-2",
                                children: s.jsx(je, {
                                    variant: "ghost",
                                    size: "sm",
                                    onClick: () => {
                                        n(U),
                                        t(!0)
                                    }
                                    ,
                                    children: s.jsx("i", {
                                        className: "fas fa-edit text-sm"
                                    })
                                })
                            })]
                        }), s.jsx("div", {
                            className: "bg-gray-50 p-3 rounded-lg",
                            children: s.jsx("p", {
                                className: "text-sm text-gray-700",
                                children: U.message
                            })
                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "mt-3 flex items-center justify-between text-sm text-gray-600",
                            children: [s.jsxs("span", {
                                children: ["Categoria: ", U.category]
                            }), s.jsxs(je, {
                                variant: "ghost",
                                size: "sm",
                                className: "text-green-600 hover:text-green-700",
                                onClick: () => R(U),
                                children: [s.jsx("i", {
                                    className: "fab fa-whatsapp mr-1"
                                }), "Usar"]
                            })]
                        })]
                    }, U.id)) : s.jsx("p", {
                        className: "text-gray-500 text-center py-8",
                        children: "Nenhum template encontrado"
                    })
                })]
            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                className: "space-y-6",
                children: [s.jsxs(Oe, {
                    children: [s.jsx(ut, {
                        className: "border-b border-gray-200",
                        children: s.jsx(ht, {
                            className: "text-lg font-semibold text-gray-800",
                            children: "Enviar Mensagem"
                        })
                    }), s.jsxs(Re, {
                        className: "p-6 space-y-4",
                        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                            children: [s.jsx(We, {
                                htmlFor: "customer",
                                children: "Cliente"
                            }), s.jsxs(yr, {
                                value: a,
                                onValueChange: i,
                                children: [s.jsx(pr, {
                                    children: s.jsx(wr, {
                                        placeholder: "Selecione um cliente"
                                    })
                                }), s.jsx(xr, {
                                    children: _ == null ? void 0 : _.map(U => s.jsx(Ue, {
                                        value: U.id,
                                        children: U.fantasyName || U.name
                                    }, U.id))
                                })]
                            })]
                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                            children: [s.jsx(We, {
                                htmlFor: "template",
                                children: "Template"
                            }), s.jsxs(yr, {
                                value: o,
                                onValueChange: U => {
                                    l(U);
                                    const O = g == null ? void 0 : g.find(M => M.id === U);
                                    O && d(O.message)
                                }
                                ,
                                children: [s.jsx(pr, {
                                    children: s.jsx(wr, {
                                        placeholder: "Mensagem personalizada"
                                    })
                                }), s.jsxs(xr, {
                                    children: [s.jsx(Ue, {
                                        value: "",
                                        children: "Mensagem personalizada"
                                    }), g == null ? void 0 : g.map(U => s.jsx(Ue, {
                                        value: U.id,
                                        children: U.name
                                    }, U.id))]
                                })]
                            })]
                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                            children: [s.jsx(We, {
                                htmlFor: "message",
                                children: "Mensagem"
                            }), s.jsx(au, {
                                rows: 4,
                                value: c,
                                onChange: U => d(U.target.value),
                                placeholder: "Digite sua mensagem..."
                            })]
                        }), s.jsxs(je, {
                            className: "w-full bg-green-500 hover:bg-green-600 text-white",
                            onClick: E,
                            disabled: N.isPending,
                            children: [s.jsx("i", {
                                className: "fab fa-whatsapp mr-2"
                            }), N.isPending ? "Enviando..." : "Enviar via WhatsApp"]
                        })]
                    })]
                }), s.jsxs(Oe, {
                    children: [s.jsx(ut, {
                        className: "border-b border-gray-200",
                        children: s.jsx(ht, {
                            className: "text-lg font-semibold text-gray-800",
                            children: "Mensagens Recentes"
                        })
                    }), s.jsx(Re, {
                        className: "p-6 space-y-3",
                        children: y && y.length > 0 ? y.slice(0, 5).map(U => s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "flex items-start space-x-3",
                            children: [s.jsx("div", {
                                className: "w-8 h-8 bg-green-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0",
                                children: s.jsx("i", {
                                    className: "fab fa-whatsapp text-green-600 text-sm"
                                })
                            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                className: "flex-1",
                                children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                                    className: "flex items-center space-x-2",
                                    children: [s.jsx("span", {
                                        className: "font-medium text-gray-800",
                                        children: "Cliente"
                                    }), s.jsx("span", {
                                        className: "text-xs text-gray-500",
                                        children: new Date(U.sentAt).toLocaleTimeString("pt-BR", {
                                            hour: "2-digit",
                                            minute: "2-digit"
                                        })
                                    })]
                                }), s.jsxs("p", {
                                    className: "text-sm text-gray-600 truncate",
                                    children: [U.message.substring(0, 50), "..."]
                                })]
                            }), s.jsx("span", {
                                className: "px-2 py-1 bg-green-100 text-green-800 text-xs rounded-full",
                                children: "Enviado"
                            })]
                        }, U.id)) : s.jsx("p", {
                            className: "text-gray-500 text-center py-8",
                            children: "Nenhuma mensagem enviada"
                        })
                    })]
                })]
            })]
        }), s.jsx(xn, {
            open: e,
            onOpenChange: t,
            children: s.jsxs(gn, {
                className: "max-w-md",
                children: [s.jsx(Dn, {
                    children: s.jsx(On, {
                        children: r ? "Editar Template" : "Novo Template"
                    })
                }), s.jsx("form", {
                    onSubmit: U => {
                        U.preventDefault();
                        const O = new FormData(U.currentTarget);
                        j.mutate({
                            name: O.get("name"),
                            category: O.get("category"),
                            message: O.get("message")
                        })
                    }
                    ,
                    children: s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "space-y-4",
                        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                            children: [s.jsx(We, {
                                htmlFor: "name",
                                children: "Nome do Template"
                            }), s.jsx(xt, {
                                id: "name",
                                name: "name",
                                defaultValue: r == null ? void 0 : r.name,
                                required: !0
                            })]
                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                            children: [s.jsx(We, {
                                htmlFor: "category",
                                children: "Categoria"
                            }), s.jsxs(yr, {
                                name: "category",
                                defaultValue: r == null ? void 0 : r.category,
                                required: !0,
                                children: [s.jsx(pr, {
                                    children: s.jsx(wr, {
                                        placeholder: "Selecione uma categoria"
                                    })
                                }), s.jsxs(xr, {
                                    children: [s.jsx(Ue, {
                                        value: "agendamento",
                                        children: "Agendamento"
                                    }), s.jsx(Ue, {
                                        value: "pos-venda",
                                        children: "Pós-venda"
                                    }), s.jsx(Ue, {
                                        value: "promocao",
                                        children: "Promoção"
                                    }), s.jsx(Ue, {
                                        value: "cobranca",
                                        children: "Cobrança"
                                    }), s.jsx(Ue, {
                                        value: "geral",
                                        children: "Geral"
                                    })]
                                })]
                            })]
                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                            children: [s.jsx(We, {
                                htmlFor: "message",
                                children: "Mensagem"
                            }), s.jsx(au, {
                                id: "message",
                                name: "message",
                                rows: 4,
                                defaultValue: r == null ? void 0 : r.message,
                                placeholder: "Digite a mensagem do template...",
                                required: !0
                            })]
                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "flex justify-end space-x-2",
                            children: [s.jsx(je, {
                                type: "button",
                                variant: "outline",
                                onClick: () => {
                                    t(!1),
                                    n(null)
                                }
                                ,
                                children: "Cancelar"
                            }), s.jsx(je, {
                                type: "submit",
                                className: "bg-green-500 hover:bg-green-600",
                                disabled: j.isPending,
                                children: j.isPending ? "Salvando..." : "Salvar"
                            })]
                        })]
                    })
                })]
            })
        })]
    })
}
const Ppe = Sx("relative w-full rounded-lg border p-4 [&>svg~*]:pl-7 [&>svg+div]:translate-y-[-3px] [&>svg]:absolute [&>svg]:left-4 [&>svg]:top-4 [&>svg]:text-foreground", {
    variants: {
        variant: {
            default: "bg-background text-foreground",
            destructive: "border-destructive/50 text-destructive dark:border-destructive [&>svg]:text-destructive"
        }
    },
    defaultVariants: {
        variant: "default"
    }
})
  , Lm = C.forwardRef( ({className: e, variant: t, ...r}, n) => s.jsx("div", {
    ref: n,
    role: "alert",
    className: Wt(Ppe({
        variant: t
    }), e),
    ...r
}));
Lm.displayName = "Alert";
const Lpe = C.forwardRef( ({className: e, ...t}, r) => s.jsx("h5", {
    ref: r,
    className: Wt("mb-1 font-medium leading-none tracking-tight", e),
    ...t
}));
Lpe.displayName = "AlertTitle";
const Fm = C.forwardRef( ({className: e, ...t}, r) => s.jsx("div", {
    ref: r,
    className: Wt("text-sm [&_p]:leading-relaxed", e),
    ...t
}));
Fm.displayName = "AlertDescription";
function Fpe() {
    const [e,t] = C.useState("")
      , [r,n] = C.useState("")
      , [a,i] = C.useState(null)
      , {toast: o} = en();
    os();
    const {data: l, isLoading: c} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/omie/status"]
    })
      , d = Gt({
        mutationFn: async v => {
            const N = await fetch(`/api/omie/client/${v}`, {
                credentials: "same-origin"
            });
            if (!N.ok)
                throw new Error("Cliente não encontrado");
            return N.json()
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: v => {
            i(v),
            o({
                title: "Cliente encontrado",
                description: `Cliente ${v.razao_social} localizado no Omie`
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: v => {
            console.error("Erro ao buscar cliente:", v),
            i(null),
            o({
                title: "Cliente não encontrado",
                description: "Cliente não foi encontrado no sistema Omie",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , h = Gt({
        mutationFn: async ({cnpjCpf: v, valorVenda: N}) => {
            const j = await fetch("/api/omie/check-credit", {
                method: "POST",
                body: JSON.stringify({
                    cnpjCpf: v,
                    valorVenda: N
                }),
                headers: {
                    "Content-Type": "application/json"
                },
                credentials: "same-origin"
            });
            if (!j.ok)
                throw new Error("Erro na verificação de crédito");
            return j.json()
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: v => {
            o({
                title: v.aprovado ? "Crédito aprovado" : "Crédito negado",
                description: v.motivo || (v.aprovado ? "Cliente apto para a venda" : "Verificação concluída"),
                variant: v.aprovado ? "default" : "destructive"
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: v => {
            console.error("Erro ao verificar crédito:", v),
            o({
                title: "Erro na consulta",
                description: "Não foi possível verificar o crédito do cliente",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , {data: f, isLoading: g} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/omie/client", e, "credit"],
        enabled: !!e && e.replace(/\D/g, "").length >= 11,
        queryFn: async () => {
            const v = await fetch(`/api/omie/client/${e.replace(/\D/g, "")}/credit`, {
                credentials: "same-origin"
            });
            if (!v.ok)
                throw new Error("Informações de crédito não encontradas");
            return v.json()
        }
    })
      , p = v => {
        if (v.preventDefault(),
        !e.trim()) {
            o({
                title: "CNPJ/CPF obrigatório",
                description: "Digite o CNPJ ou CPF do cliente",
                variant: "destructive"
            });
            return
        }
        d.mutate(e.replace(/\D/g, ""))
    }
      , _ = v => {
        if (v.preventDefault(),
        !e.trim() || !r.trim()) {
            o({
                title: "Dados obrigatórios",
                description: "Digite o CNPJ/CPF e o valor da venda",
                variant: "destructive"
            });
            return
        }
        const N = parseFloat(r.replace(/[^\d,]/g, "").replace(",", "."));
        if (isNaN(N) || N <= 0) {
            o({
                title: "Valor inválido",
                description: "Digite um valor válido para a venda",
                variant: "destructive"
            });
            return
        }
        h.mutate({
            cnpjCpf: e.replace(/\D/g, ""),
            valorVenda: N
        })
    }
      , x = v => new Intl.NumberFormat("pt-BR",{
        style: "currency",
        currency: "BRL"
    }).format(v)
      , y = v => {
        const N = v.replace(/\D/g, "");
        return N.length <= 11 ? N.replace(/(\d{3})(\d{3})(\d{3})(\d{2})/, "$1.$2.$3-$4") : N.replace(/(\d{2})(\d{3})(\d{3})(\d{4})(\d{2})/, "$1.$2.$3/$4-$5")
    }
    ;
    return c ? s.jsx("div", {
        className: "flex items-center justify-center p-8",
        children: s.jsx("div", {
            className: "animate-spin rounded-full h-8 w-8 border-b-2 border-green-600"
        })
    }) : s.jsxs("div", {
        className: "space-y-6",
        children: [s.jsx("div", {
            className: "flex items-center justify-between",
            children: s.jsxs("div", {
                children: [s.jsx("h1", {
                    className: "text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100",
                    children: "Integração Omie ERP"
                }), s.jsx("p", {
                    className: "text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400",
                    children: "Consulta de crédito e informações de clientes"
                })]
            })
        }), s.jsxs(Oe, {
            children: [s.jsx(ut, {
                children: s.jsxs(ht, {
                    className: "flex items-center gap-2",
                    children: [s.jsx(qm, {
                        className: "h-5 w-5"
                    }), "Status da Integração"]
                })
            }), s.jsx(Re, {
                children: s.jsxs("div", {
                    className: "flex items-center gap-2",
                    children: [l != null && l.configured ? s.jsxs($t, {
                        variant: "default",
                        className: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
                        children: [s.jsx(fi, {
                            className: "h-4 w-4 mr-1"
                        }), "Configurado"]
                    }) : s.jsxs($t, {
                        variant: "destructive",
                        children: [s.jsx(Bl, {
                            className: "h-4 w-4 mr-1"
                        }), "Não Configurado"]
                    }), s.jsx("span", {
                        className: "text-sm text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400",
                        children: l == null ? void 0 : l.message
                    })]
                })
            })]
        }), !(l != null && l.configured) && s.jsxs(Lm, {
            children: [s.jsx(Ts, {
                className: "h-4 w-4"
            }), s.jsx(Fm, {
                children: "Para usar a integração Omie, configure as chaves OMIE_APP_KEY e OMIE_APP_SECRET nas variáveis de ambiente."
            })]
        }), (l == null ? void 0 : l.configured) && s.jsxs(s.Fragment, {
            children: [s.jsxs(Oe, {
                children: [s.jsxs(ut, {
                    children: [s.jsxs(ht, {
                        className: "flex items-center gap-2",
                        children: [s.jsx(ou, {
                            className: "h-5 w-5"
                        }), "Buscar Cliente"]
                    }), s.jsx(Oi, {
                        children: "Digite o CNPJ ou CPF do cliente para buscar no Omie"
                    })]
                }), s.jsx(Re, {
                    children: s.jsxs("form", {
                        onSubmit: p,
                        className: "space-y-4",
                        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                            children: [s.jsx(We, {
                                htmlFor: "cnpjCpf",
                                children: "CNPJ/CPF"
                            }), s.jsx(xt, {
                                id: "cnpjCpf",
                                type: "text",
                                placeholder: "00.000.000/0000-00 ou 000.000.000-00",
                                value: e,
                                onChange: v => t(y(v.target.value)),
                                maxLength: 18
                            })]
                        }), s.jsx(je, {
                            type: "submit",
                            disabled: d.isPending,
                            className: "bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700",
                            children: d.isPending ? "Buscando..." : "Buscar Cliente"
                        })]
                    })
                })]
            }), a && s.jsxs(Oe, {
                children: [s.jsx(ut, {

                    })]

            })]
        })]
    })

function y4({user: e}) {
    const [t,r] = C.useState(new Date().getMonth() + 1)
      , [n,a] = C.useState(new Date().getFullYear())
      , [i,o] = C.useState(e.role === "vendedor" ? e.id : "all")
      , {data: l=[]} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/users"],
        enabled: ["admin", "coordinator", "administrative"].includes(e.role)
    })
      , {data: c=[]} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/sales-goals", t, n, i],
        queryFn: () => {
            const U = new URLSearchParams({
                month: t.toString(),
                year: n.toString(),
                ...i !== "all" && {
                    sellerId: i
                }
            });
            return fetch(`/api/sales-goals?${U}`).then(O => O.json())
        }
    })
      , {data: d=null, isLoading: h, error: f} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/sales-metrics", t, n, i, c],
        queryFn: async () => {
            if (i === "all") {
                const U = c.map(D => D.sellerId).filter(Boolean);
                if (U.length === 0)
                    return {};
                const O = new URLSearchParams({
                    month: t.toString(),
                    year: n.toString(),
                    sellerIds: U.join(",")
                });
                console.log("🔍 Buscando métricas múltiplas:", {
                    month: t,
                    year: n,
                    sellerIds: U
                });
                const M = await fetch(`/api/sales-metrics/multiple?${O}`, {
                    credentials: "include"
                });
                if (!M.ok)
                    throw new Error(`Erro ${M.status}: ${M.statusText}`);
                const T = await M.json();
                return console.log("📊 Métricas múltiplas recebidas:", JSON.stringify(T, null, 2)),
                T
            } else {
                const U = new URLSearchParams({
                    month: t.toString(),
                    year: n.toString(),
                    sellerId: i
                });
                console.log("🔍 Buscando métrica individual:", {
                    month: t,
                    year: n,
                    sellerId: i
                });
                const O = await fetch(`/api/sales-metrics?${U}`, {
                    credentials: "include"
                });
                if (!O.ok)
                    throw new Error(`Erro ${O.status}: ${O.statusText}`);
                const M = await O.json();
                return console.log("📊 Métrica individual recebida:", JSON.stringify(M, null, 2)),
                M
            }
        }
        ,
        enabled: c.length > 0,
        staleTime: 0,
        gcTime: 0,
        retry: !1
    })
      , g = [{
        value: 1,
        label: "Janeiro"
    }, {
        value: 2,
        label: "Fevereiro"
    }, {
        value: 3,
        label: "Março"
    }, {
        value: 4,
        label: "Abril"
    }, {
        value: 5,
        label: "Maio"
    }, {
        value: 6,
        label: "Junho"
    }, {
        value: 7,
        label: "Julho"
    }, {
        value: 8,
        label: "Agosto"
    }, {
        value: 9,
        label: "Setembro"
    }, {
        value: 10,
        label: "Outubro"
    }, {
        value: 11,
        label: "Novembro"
    }, {
        value: 12,
        label: "Dezembro"
    }]
      , p = Array.from({
        length: 5
    }, (U, O) => new Date().getFullYear() - 2 + O)
      , _ = (U, O) => {
        const M = U / O * 100;
        return M >= 100 ? {
            status: "excellent",
            label: "Excelente",
            color: "bg-green-100 text-green-800"
        } : M >= 90 ? {
            status: "good",
            label: "Bom",
            color: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800"
        } : M >= 70 ? {
            status: "average",
            label: "Regular",
            color: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800"
        } : {
            status: "poor",
            label: "Abaixo",
            color: "bg-red-100 text-red-800"
        }
    }
      , x = U => new Intl.NumberFormat("pt-BR",{
        style: "currency",
        currency: "BRL"
    }).format(U)
      , y = ["admin", "coordinator", "administrative"].includes(e.role)
      , {toast: v} = en()
      , [N,j] = C.useState(!1)
      , E = async () => {
        j(!0);
        try {
            await En.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/sales-metrics"]
            }),
            await En.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/sales-goals"]
            }),
            v({
                title: "Dados atualizados",
                description: "Os resultados de cumprimento de metas foram atualizados com os dados mais recentes do sistema."
            })
        } catch {
            v({
                variant: "destructive",
                title: "Erro ao atualizar",
                description: "Não foi possível atualizar os dados. Tente novamente."
            })
        } finally {
            j(!1)
        }
    }
      , R = ({goal: U, metrics: O}) => {
        var T, D, P, V;
        const M = l.find(Q => Q.id === U.sellerId);
        return s.jsxs(Oe, {
            className: "mb-6",

                children: s.jsxs(ht, {
                    className: "flex justify-between items-center",
                    children: [s.jsx("span", {
                        children: M ? `${M.firstName} ${M.lastName}` : "Vendedor não encontrado"
                    }), s.jsxs($t, {
                        variant: "outline",
                        children: [(T = g.find(Q => Q.value === U.month)) == null ? void 0 : T.label, "/", U.year]
                    })]
                })
            }), s.jsx(Re, {
                children: s.jsxs("div", {
                    className: "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4",
                    children: [U.positivationGoal && s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "space-y-2",
                        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "flex justify-between items-center",

                                className: "text-sm font-medium text-gray-600",
                                children: "Positivação"
                            }), s.jsx($t, {
                                className: _((O == null ? void 0 : O.positivationRate) || 0, parseFloat(U.positivationGoal.toString())).color,
                                children: _((O == null ? void 0 : O.positivationRate) || 0, parseFloat(U.positivationGoal.toString())).label
                            })]
                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "text-2xl font-bold",
                            children: [((D = O == null ? void 0 : O.positivationRate) == null ? void 0 : D.toFixed(1)) || "0.0", "%"]
                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "text-sm text-gray-500",
                            children: ["Meta: ", U.positivationGoal, "%"]
                        }), s.jsx(hc, {
                            value: Math.min(100, ((O == null ? void 0 : O.positivationRate) || 0) / parseFloat(U.positivationGoal.toString()) * 100),
                            className: "h-2"
                        })]
                    }), U.revenueGoal && s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "space-y-2",

                            }), s.jsx($t, {
                                className: _((O == null ? void 0 : O.revenueProjection) || 0, parseFloat(U.revenueGoal.toString())).color,
                                children: _((O == null ? void 0 : O.revenueProjection) || 0, parseFloat(U.revenueGoal.toString())).label
                            })]
                        }), s.jsx("div", {
                            className: "text-2xl font-bold",
                            children: x((O == null ? void 0 : O.revenueProjection) || 0)
                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "text-sm text-gray-500",
                            children: ["Meta: ", x(parseFloat(U.revenueGoal.toString()))]
                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "text-xs text-gray-400",
                            children: ["Atual: ", x((O == null ? void 0 : O.totalRevenue) || 0)]
                        }), s.jsx(hc, {
                            value: Math.min(100, ((O == null ? void 0 : O.revenueProjection) || 0) / parseFloat(U.revenueGoal.toString()) * 100),
                            className: "h-2"
                        })]
                    }), U.overdueDebtGoal && s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "space-y-2",
                        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "flex justify-between items-center",
                            children: [s.jsx("h4", {
                                className: "text-sm font-medium text-gray-600",
                                children: "Débito Vencido"
                            }), s.jsx($t, {
                                className: _(parseFloat(U.overdueDebtGoal.toString()) - ((O == null ? void 0 : O.overdueDebtRatio) || 0), parseFloat(U.overdueDebtGoal.toString())).color,
                                children: ((O == null ? void 0 : O.overdueDebtRatio) || 0) <= parseFloat(U.overdueDebtGoal.toString()) ? "Dentro" : "Acima"
                            })]
                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "text-2xl font-bold",
                            children: [((P = O == null ? void 0 : O.overdueDebtRatio) == null ? void 0 : P.toFixed(1)) || "0.0", "%"]
                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "text-sm text-gray-500",
                            children: ["Meta: máx ", U.overdueDebtGoal, "%"]
                        }), s.jsx(hc, {
                            value: Math.min(100, ((O == null ? void 0 : O.overdueDebtRatio) || 0) / parseFloat(U.overdueDebtGoal.toString()) * 100),
                            className: `h-2 ${((O == null ? void 0 : O.overdueDebtRatio) || 0) > parseFloat(U.overdueDebtGoal.toString()) ? "[&>div]:bg-red-500" : "[&>div]:bg-green-500"}`
                        })]
                    }), U.serviceGoal && s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "space-y-2",
                        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "flex justify-between items-center",
                            children: [s.jsx("h4", {
                                className: "text-sm font-medium text-gray-600",
                                children: "Atendimento"
                            }), s.jsx($t, {
                                className: _((O == null ? void 0 : O.serviceRate) || 0, parseFloat(U.serviceGoal.toString())).color,
                                children: _((O == null ? void 0 : O.serviceRate) || 0, parseFloat(U.serviceGoal.toString())).label
                            })]
                        }), s.jsxs("div", {

                            className: "text-sm text-gray-500",
                            children: ["Meta: ", U.serviceGoal, "%"]
                        }), s.jsx(hc, {
                            value: Math.min(100, ((O == null ? void 0 : O.serviceRate) || 0) / parseFloat(U.serviceGoal.toString()) * 100),

                        })]
                    })]
                })
            })]
        })
    }
    ;
    return s.jsxs("div", {
        className: "space-y-6",
        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
            className: "flex justify-between items-center",
            children: [s.jsx("h2", {
                className: "text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800",
                children: e.role === "vendedor" ? "Meu Desempenho" : "Dashboard de Metas"
            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                className: "flex space-x-2",
                children: [s.jsxs(je, {
                    onClick: E,
                    disabled: N,
                    variant: "outline",
                    size: "sm",
                    className: "gap-2",

                    }), "Atualizar Dados"]

                const O = (d == null ? void 0 : d[U.sellerId]) || null;

                    goal: U,

                }, U.id)
            }
            ) : c.map(U => s.jsx(R, {

            }, U.id))
