                }), s.jsx("p", {
                    className: "text-sm",
                    children: e.role === "vendedor" ? "Suas metas para este período ainda não foram definidas." : "Nenhuma meta foi definida para este período."
                })]
            })
        })]
    })
}
function OH({user: e}) {
    var O, M, T, D;
    const [t,r] = C.useState(new Date().getMonth() + 1)
      , [n,a] = C.useState(new Date().getFullYear())
      , [i,o] = C.useState(!1)
      , [l,c] = C.useState(null)
      , {toast: d} = en()
      , h = os()
      , {data: f=[]} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/users"],
        enabled: ["admin", "coordinator", "administrative"].includes(e.role)
    })
      , {data: g=[], isLoading: p} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/sales-goals", t, n],
        queryFn: () => fetch(`/api/sales-goals?month=${t}&year=${n}`).then(P => P.json())
    })
      , _ = Gt({
        mutationFn: P => l ? dr("PUT", `/api/sales-goals/${l.id}`, P) : dr("POST", "/api/sales-goals", P),
        onSuccess: () => {
            d({
                title: l ? "Meta atualizada" : "Meta criada",
                description: l ? "A meta foi atualizada com sucesso." : "A meta foi criada com sucesso."
            }),
            h.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/sales-goals"]
            }),
            o(!1),
            c(null)
        }
        ,
        onError: P => {
            d({
                title: "Erro",
                description: "Ocorreu um erro ao salvar a meta.",
                variant: "destructive"
            }),
            console.error("Error saving goal:", P)
        }
    })
      , x = Gt({
        mutationFn: P => dr("DELETE", `/api/sales-goals/${P}`),
        onSuccess: () => {
            d({
                title: "Meta deletada",
                description: "A meta foi deletada com sucesso."
            }),
            h.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/sales-goals"]
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: P => {
            d({
                title: "Erro",
                description: "Ocorreu um erro ao deletar a meta.",
                variant: "destructive"
            }),
            console.error("Error deleting goal:", P)
        }
    })
      , y = [{
        value: 1,
        label: "Janeiro"
    }, {
        value: 2,
        label: "Fevereiro"
    }, {
        value: 3,
        label: "Março"
    }, {
        value: 4,
        label: "Abril"
    }, {
        value: 5,
        label: "Maio"
    }, {
        value: 6,
        label: "Junho"
    }, {
        value: 7,
        label: "Julho"
    }, {
        value: 8,
        label: "Agosto"
    }, {
        value: 9,
        label: "Setembro"
    }, {
        value: 10,
        label: "Outubro"
    }, {
        value: 11,
        label: "Novembro"
    }, {
        value: 12,
        label: "Dezembro"
    }]
      , v = Array.from({
        length: 5
    }, (P, V) => new Date().getFullYear() - 2 + V)
      , N = ["admin", "coordinator", "administrative"].includes(e.role)
      , j = P => {
        P.preventDefault();
        const V = new FormData(P.currentTarget)
          , Q = {
            sellerId: V.get("sellerId"),
            month: t,
            year: n,
            positivationGoal: V.get("positivationGoal") ? parseFloat(V.get("positivationGoal")) : null,
            revenueGoal: V.get("revenueGoal") ? parseFloat(V.get("revenueGoal")) : null,
            overdueDebtGoal: V.get("overdueDebtGoal") ? parseFloat(V.get("overdueDebtGoal")) : null,
            serviceGoal: V.get("serviceGoal") ? parseFloat(V.get("serviceGoal")) : null
        };
        _.mutate(Q)
    }
      , E = () => {
        c(null),
        o(!0)
    }
      , R = P => {
        c(P),
        o(!0)
    }
      , U = P => {
        confirm("Tem certeza que deseja deletar esta meta?") && x.mutate(P)
    }
    ;
    return s.jsxs("div", {
        className: "space-y-6",
        children: [s.jsx("div", {
            className: "flex justify-between items-center",
            children: s.jsx("h2", {
                className: "text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800",
                children: e.role === "vendedor" ? "Minhas Metas" : "Metas de Vendas"
            })
        }), s.jsxs(X1, {
            defaultValue: "dashboard",
            className: "w-full",
            children: [s.jsxs(Wx, {
                className: "grid w-full grid-cols-2",
                children: [s.jsxs(mc, {
                    value: "dashboard",
                    children: [s.jsx("i", {
                        className: "fas fa-chart-line mr-2"
                    }), "Dashboard"]
                }), s.jsxs(mc, {
                    value: "management",
                    disabled: !N,
                    children: [s.jsx("i", {
                        className: "fas fa-cogs mr-2"
                    }), "Gerenciamento"]
                })]
            }), s.jsx(pc, {
                value: "dashboard",
                className: "mt-6",
                children: s.jsx(y4, {
                    user: e
                })
            }), s.jsx(pc, {
                value: "management",
                className: "mt-6",
                children: s.jsxs("div", {
                    className: "space-y-6",
                    children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "flex justify-between items-center",
                        children: [s.jsx("h3", {
                            className: "text-xl font-semibold text-gray-700",
                            children: "Gerenciar Metas"
                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "flex space-x-2",
                            children: [s.jsxs(yr, {
                                value: t.toString(),
                                onValueChange: P => r(parseInt(P)),
                                children: [s.jsx(pr, {
                                    className: "w-32",
                                    children: s.jsx(wr, {})
                                }), s.jsx(xr, {
                                    children: y.map(P => s.jsx(Ue, {
                                        value: P.value.toString(),
                                        children: P.label
                                    }, P.value))
                                })]
                            }), s.jsxs(yr, {
                                value: n.toString(),
                                onValueChange: P => a(parseInt(P)),
                                children: [s.jsx(pr, {
                                    className: "w-24",
                                    children: s.jsx(wr, {})
                                }), s.jsx(xr, {
                                    children: v.map(P => s.jsx(Ue, {
                                        value: P.toString(),
                                        children: P
                                    }, P))
                                })]
                            }), N && s.jsxs(xn, {
                                open: i,
                                onOpenChange: o,
                                children: [s.jsx(Fx, {
                                    asChild: !0,
                                    children: s.jsxs(je, {
                                        onClick: E,
                                        "data-testid": "button-new-goal",
                                        children: [s.jsx("i", {
                                            className: "fas fa-plus mr-2"
                                        }), "Nova Meta"]
                                    })
                                }), s.jsxs(gn, {
                                    className: "max-w-md",
                                    children: [s.jsx(Dn, {
                                        children: s.jsx(On, {
                                            children: l ? "Editar Meta" : "Nova Meta"
                                        })
                                    }), s.jsxs("form", {
                                        onSubmit: j,
                                        className: "space-y-4",
                                        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                                            children: [s.jsx(We, {
                                                htmlFor: "sellerId",
                                                children: "Vendedor"
                                            }), s.jsxs(yr, {
                                                name: "sellerId",
                                                defaultValue: l == null ? void 0 : l.sellerId,
                                                required: !0,
                                                children: [s.jsx(pr, {
                                                    children: s.jsx(wr, {
                                                        placeholder: "Selecione o vendedor"
                                                    })
                                                }), s.jsx(xr, {
                                                    children: f.filter(P => P.role === "vendedor").map(P => s.jsxs(Ue, {
                                                        value: P.id,
                                                        children: [P.firstName, " ", P.lastName]
                                                    }, P.id))
                                                })]
                                            })]
                                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                            className: "grid grid-cols-2 gap-4",
                                            children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                                                children: [s.jsx(We, {
                                                    htmlFor: "positivationGoal",
                                                    children: "Positivação (%)"
                                                }), s.jsx(xt, {
                                                    id: "positivationGoal",
                                                    name: "positivationGoal",
                                                    type: "number",
                                                    step: "0.01",
                                                    max: "100",
                                                    min: "0",
                                                    defaultValue: (O = l == null ? void 0 : l.positivationGoal) == null ? void 0 : O.toString(),
                                                    placeholder: "85.50",
                                                    "data-testid": "input-positivation-goal"
                                                })]
                                            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                                children: [s.jsx(We, {
                                                    htmlFor: "serviceGoal",
                                                    children: "Atendimento (%)"
                                                }), s.jsx(xt, {
                                                    id: "serviceGoal",
                                                    name: "serviceGoal",
                                                    type: "number",
                                                    step: "0.01",
                                                    max: "100",
                                                    min: "0",
                                                    defaultValue: (M = l == null ? void 0 : l.serviceGoal) == null ? void 0 : M.toString(),
                                                    placeholder: "90.00",
                                                    "data-testid": "input-service-goal"
                                                })]
                                            })]
                                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                            children: [s.jsx(We, {
                                                htmlFor: "revenueGoal",
                                                children: "Faturamento (R$)"
                                            }), s.jsx(xt, {
                                                id: "revenueGoal",
                                                name: "revenueGoal",
                                                type: "number",
                                                step: "0.01",
                                                min: "0",
                                                defaultValue: (T = l == null ? void 0 : l.revenueGoal) == null ? void 0 : T.toString(),
                                                placeholder: "50000.00",
                                                "data-testid": "input-revenue-goal"
                                            })]
                                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                            children: [s.jsx(We, {
                                                htmlFor: "overdueDebtGoal",
                                                children: "Débito Vencido (%)"
                                            }), s.jsx(xt, {
                                                id: "overdueDebtGoal",
                                                name: "overdueDebtGoal",
                                                type: "number",
                                                step: "0.01",
                                                max: "100",
                                                min: "0",
                                                defaultValue: (D = l == null ? void 0 : l.overdueDebtGoal) == null ? void 0 : D.toString(),
                                                placeholder: "5.00",
                                                "data-testid": "input-overdue-debt-goal"
                                            })]
                                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                            className: "flex justify-end space-x-2 pt-4",
                                            children: [s.jsx(je, {
                                                type: "button",
                                                variant: "outline",
                                                onClick: () => o(!1),
                                                children: "Cancelar"
                                            }), s.jsx(je, {
                                                type: "submit",
                                                disabled: _.isPending,
                                                "data-testid": "button-save-goal",
                                                children: _.isPending ? "Salvando..." : "Salvar"
                                            })]
                                        })]
                                    })]
                                })]
                            })]
                        })]
                    }), p ? s.jsx("div", {
                        className: "flex justify-center p-8",
                        children: s.jsx("div", {
                            className: "animate-spin rounded-full h-8 w-8 border-b-2 border-honest-blue"
                        })
                    }) : s.jsx("div", {
                        className: "grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3 gap-6",
                        children: g.length > 0 ? g.map(P => {
                            var Q;
                            const V = f.find(Y => Y.id === P.sellerId);
                            return s.jsxs(Oe, {
                                className: "hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow",
                                children: [s.jsx(ut, {
                                    children: s.jsxs("div", {
                                        className: "flex justify-between items-start",
                                        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                                            children: [s.jsx(ht, {
                                                className: "text-lg",
                                                children: V ? `${V.firstName} ${V.lastName}` : "Vendedor não encontrado"
                                            }), s.jsxs("p", {
                                                className: "text-sm text-gray-500",
                                                children: [(Q = y.find(Y => Y.value === P.month)) == null ? void 0 : Q.label, "/", P.year]
                                            })]
                                        }), N && s.jsxs("div", {
                                            className: "flex space-x-1",
                                            children: [s.jsx(je, {
                                                size: "sm",
                                                variant: "ghost",
                                                onClick: () => R(P),
                                                "data-testid": `button-edit-goal-${P.id}`,
                                                children: s.jsx("i", {
                                                    className: "fas fa-edit text-sm"
                                                })
                                            }), e.role === "admin" && s.jsx(je, {
                                                size: "sm",
                                                variant: "ghost",
                                                onClick: () => U(P.id),
                                                "data-testid": `button-delete-goal-${P.id}`,
                                                children: s.jsx("i", {
                                                    className: "fas fa-trash text-sm text-red-500"
                                                })
                                            })]
                                        })]
                                    })
                                }), s.jsxs(Re, {
                                    className: "space-y-3",
                                    children: [P.positivationGoal && s.jsxs("div", {
                                        className: "flex justify-between",
                                        children: [s.jsx(We, {
                                            className: "text-sm text-gray-600",
                                            children: "Positivação:"
                                        }), s.jsxs($t, {
                                            variant: "outline",
                                            children: [P.positivationGoal, "%"]
                                        })]
                                    }), P.revenueGoal && s.jsxs("div", {
                                        className: "flex justify-between",
                                        children: [s.jsx(We, {
                                            className: "text-sm text-gray-600",
                                            children: "Faturamento:"
                                        }), s.jsxs($t, {
                                            variant: "outline",
                                            children: ["R$ ", parseFloat(P.revenueGoal.toString()).toLocaleString("pt-BR", {
                                                minimumFractionDigits: 2
                                            })]
                                        })]
                                    }), P.overdueDebtGoal && s.jsxs("div", {
                                        className: "flex justify-between",
                                        children: [s.jsx(We, {
                                            className: "text-sm text-gray-600",
                                            children: "Débito Vencido:"
                                        }), s.jsxs($t, {
                                            variant: "outline",
                                            children: [P.overdueDebtGoal, "%"]
                                        })]
                                    }), P.serviceGoal && s.jsxs("div", {
                                        className: "flex justify-between",
                                        children: [s.jsx(We, {
                                            className: "text-sm text-gray-600",
                                            children: "Atendimento:"
                                        }), s.jsxs($t, {
                                            variant: "outline",
                                            children: [P.serviceGoal, "%"]
                                        })]
                                    }), !P.positivationGoal && !P.revenueGoal && !P.overdueDebtGoal && !P.serviceGoal && s.jsx("p", {
                                        className: "text-gray-500 text-sm",
                                        children: "Nenhuma meta definida"
                                    })]
                                })]
                            }, P.id)
                        }
                        ) : s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "col-span-full text-center p-8",
                            children: [s.jsx("p", {
                                className: "text-gray-500",
                                children: "Nenhuma meta definida para este período"
                            }), N && s.jsxs(je, {
                                onClick: E,
                                className: "mt-4",
                                children: [s.jsx("i", {
                                    className: "fas fa-plus mr-2"
                                }), "Criar primeira meta"]
                            })]
                        })
                    })]
                })
            })]
        })]
    })
}
function IH() {
    const [e,t] = C.useState(null)
      , [r,n] = C.useState("")
      , [a,i] = C.useState("")
      , {toast: o} = en()
      , l = os()
      , {data: c=[], isLoading: d} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/users"]
    })
      , h = Gt({
        mutationFn: async ({id: x, data: y}) => {
            await dr("PUT", `/api/users/${x}`, y)
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            l.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/users"]
            }),
            t(null),
            n(""),
            i(""),
            o({
                title: "Sucesso",
                description: "Coordenadas da casa atualizadas com sucesso!"
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: x => {
            o({
                title: "Erro",
                description: x.message || "Erro ao atualizar coordenadas",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , f = Gt({
        mutationFn: async () => await dr("POST", "/api/omie/sync-vendors"),
        onSuccess: x => {
            l.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/users"]
            }),
            o({
                title: "Sincronização concluída",
                description: `${x.imported} vendedores importados, ${x.updated} atualizados`
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: x => {
            o({
                title: "Erro na sincronização",
                description: x.message || "Erro ao sincronizar vendedores do Omie",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , g = x => {
        t(x),
        n(x.homeLatitude || ""),
        i(x.homeLongitude || "")
    }
      , p = () => {
        if (!e)
            return;
        const x = parseFloat(r)
          , y = parseFloat(a);
        if (isNaN(x) || isNaN(y)) {
            o({
                title: "Erro",
                description: "Por favor, insira coordenadas válidas",
                variant: "destructive"
            });
            return
        }
        h.mutate({
            id: e.id,
            data: {
                homeLatitude: r,
                homeLongitude: a
            }
        })
    }
      , _ = c.filter(x => x.role === "vendedor" && x.isActive);
    return d ? s.jsx("div", {
        className: "container mx-auto p-6",
        children: s.jsx("div", {
            className: "flex items-center justify-center h-64",
            children: s.jsx("div", {
                className: "animate-spin rounded-full h-8 w-8 border-b-2 border-honest-blue"
            })
        })
    }) : s.jsxs("div", {
        className: "container mx-auto p-6 space-y-6",
        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
            className: "flex items-center justify-between",
            children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                className: "space-y-1",
                children: [s.jsx("h1", {
                    className: "text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight",
                    children: "Vendedores Ativos"
                }), s.jsx("p", {
                    className: "text-muted-foreground",
                    children: "Lista completa de vendedores ativos no sistema"
                })]
            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                className: "flex items-center space-x-2",
                children: [s.jsxs(je, {
                    onClick: () => f.mutate(),
                    disabled: f.isPending,
                    variant: "outline",
                    size: "sm",
                    "data-testid": "button-sync-vendors",
                    children: [s.jsx(dn, {
                        className: `h-4 w-4 mr-2 ${f.isPending ? "animate-spin" : ""}`
                    }), f.isPending ? "Sincronizando..." : "Sincronizar Omie"]
                }), s.jsxs($t, {
                    variant: "secondary",
                    className: "px-3 py-1",
                    children: [s.jsx(qa, {
                        className: "h-4 w-4 mr-1"
                    }), _.length, " vendedores"]
                })]
            })]
        }), s.jsxs("div", {
            className: "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6",
            children: [s.jsxs(Oe, {
                children: [s.jsxs(ut, {
                    className: "flex flex-row items-center justify-between space-y-0 pb-2",
                    children: [s.jsx(ht, {
                        className: "text-sm font-medium",
                        children: "Total de Vendedores"
                    }), s.jsx(wS, {
                        className: "h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground"
                    })]
                }), s.jsxs(Re, {
                    children: [s.jsx("div", {
                        className: "text-2xl font-bold text-honest-blue",
                        children: _.length
                    }), s.jsx("p", {
                        className: "text-xs text-muted-foreground",
                        children: "Vendedores ativos"
                    })]
                })]
            }), s.jsxs(Oe, {
                children: [s.jsxs(ut, {
                    className: "flex flex-row items-center justify-between space-y-0 pb-2",
                    children: [s.jsx(ht, {
                        className: "text-sm font-medium",
                        children: "Rotas Cobertas"
                    }), s.jsx(Sr, {
                        className: "h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground"
                    })]
                }), s.jsxs(Re, {
                    children: [s.jsx("div", {
                        className: "text-2xl font-bold text-honest-blue",
                        children: new Set(_.map(x => x.route)).size
                    }), s.jsx("p", {
                        className: "text-xs text-muted-foreground",
                        children: "Rotas diferentes"
                    })]
                })]
            }), s.jsxs(Oe, {
                children: [s.jsxs(ut, {
                    className: "flex flex-row items-center justify-between space-y-0 pb-2",
                    children: [s.jsx(ht, {
                        className: "text-sm font-medium",
                        children: "Com Email"
                    }), s.jsx(y0, {
                        className: "h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground"
                    })]
                }), s.jsxs(Re, {
                    children: [s.jsx("div", {
                        className: "text-2xl font-bold text-honest-blue",
                        children: _.filter(x => x.email && x.email.trim() !== "").length
                    }), s.jsx("p", {
                        className: "text-xs text-muted-foreground",
                        children: "Vendedores com email"
                    })]
                })]
            })]
        }), s.jsxs("div", {
            className: "space-y-4",
            children: [s.jsx("h2", {
                className: "text-xl font-semibold",
                children: "Lista de Vendedores"
            }), _.length === 0 ? s.jsx(Oe, {
                children: s.jsxs(Re, {
                    className: "flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-12",
                    children: [s.jsx(qa, {
                        className: "h-12 w-12 text-muted-foreground mb-4"
                    }), s.jsx("h3", {
                        className: "text-lg font-semibold mb-2",
                        children: "Nenhum vendedor encontrado"
                    }), s.jsx("p", {
                        className: "text-muted-foreground text-center mb-4",
                        children: "Não há vendedores ativos cadastrados no sistema."
                    })]
                })
            }) : s.jsx("div", {
                className: "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4",
                children: _.map(x => s.jsxs(Oe, {
                    className: "hover:shadow-md transition-shadow",
                    children: [s.jsx(ut, {
                        className: "pb-3",
                        children: s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "flex items-center justify-between",
                            children: [s.jsxs(ht, {
                                className: "text-lg",
                                children: [x.firstName, " ", x.lastName]
                            }), s.jsx($t, {
                                variant: "outline",
                                className: "text-xs",
                                children: "Ativo"
                            })]
                        })
                    }), s.jsxs(Re, {
                        className: "space-y-3",
                        children: [x.email && x.email.trim() !== "" ? s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "flex items-center space-x-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground",
                            children: [s.jsx(y0, {
                                className: "h-4 w-4"
                            }), s.jsx("span", {
                                className: "truncate",
                                children: x.email
                            })]
                        }) : s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "flex items-center space-x-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground",
                            children: [s.jsx(y0, {
                                className: "h-4 w-4"
                            }), s.jsx("span", {
                                className: "text-orange-600",
                                children: "Email não informado"
                            })]
                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "flex items-center space-x-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground",
                            children: [s.jsx(Sr, {
                                className: "h-4 w-4"
                            }), s.jsxs("span", {
                                children: ["Rota: ", x.route || "Não definida"]
                            })]
                        }), x.homeLatitude && x.homeLongitude ? s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "flex items-center space-x-2 text-sm text-green-600",
                            children: [s.jsx(vc, {
                                className: "h-4 w-4"
                            }), s.jsx("span", {
                                children: "Coordenadas cadastradas"
                            })]
                        }) : s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "flex items-center space-x-2 text-sm text-orange-600",
                            children: [s.jsx(vc, {
                                className: "h-4 w-4"
                            }), s.jsx("span", {
                                children: "Sem coordenadas da casa"
                            })]
                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "text-xs text-muted-foreground",
                            children: ["Cadastrado em: ", kn(new Date(x.createdAt), "dd/MM/yyyy")]
                        }), s.jsxs(je, {
                            variant: "outline",
                            size: "sm",
                            className: "w-full mt-2",
                            onClick: () => g(x),
                            "data-testid": `button-edit-seller-${x.id}`,
                            children: [s.jsx(UC, {
                                className: "h-4 w-4 mr-2"
                            }), "Editar Coordenadas"]
                        })]
                    })]
                }, x.id))
            })]
        }), s.jsx(xn, {
            open: !!e,
            onOpenChange: () => t(null),
            children: s.jsxs(gn, {
                children: [s.jsx(Dn, {
                    children: s.jsxs(On, {
                        children: ["Editar Coordenadas da Casa - ", e == null ? void 0 : e.firstName, " ", e == null ? void 0 : e.lastName]
                    })
                }), s.jsxs("div", {
                    className: "space-y-4 py-4",
                    children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "space-y-2",
                        children: [s.jsx(We, {
                            htmlFor: "homeLatitude",
                            children: "Latitude"
                        }), s.jsx(xt, {
                            id: "homeLatitude",
                            type: "number",
                            step: "any",
                            placeholder: "-23.5505",
                            value: r,
                            onChange: x => n(x.target.value),
                            "data-testid": "input-home-latitude"
                        }), s.jsx("p", {
                            className: "text-xs text-muted-foreground",
                            children: "Exemplo: -23.5505 (use ponto como separador decimal)"
                        })]
                    }), s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "space-y-2",
                        children: [s.jsx(We, {
                            htmlFor: "homeLongitude",
                            children: "Longitude"
                        }), s.jsx(xt, {
                            id: "homeLongitude",
                            type: "number",
                            step: "any",
                            placeholder: "-46.6333",
                            value: a,
                            onChange: x => i(x.target.value),
                            "data-testid": "input-home-longitude"
                        }), s.jsx("p", {
                            className: "text-xs text-muted-foreground",
                            children: "Exemplo: -46.6333 (use ponto como separador decimal)"
                        })]
                    }), s.jsx("div", {
                        className: "bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-md p-3",
                        children: s.jsxs("p", {
                            className: "text-sm text-blue-800",
                            children: ["💡 ", s.jsx("strong", {
                                children: "Dica:"
                            }), " Você pode obter as coordenadas abrindo o Google Maps, clicando no local da casa do vendedor, e copiando os valores de latitude e longitude que aparecem."]
                        })
                    })]
                }), s.jsxs("div", {
                    className: "flex justify-end space-x-2",
                    children: [s.jsx(je, {
                        variant: "outline",
                        onClick: () => t(null),
                        "data-testid": "button-cancel-edit",
                        children: "Cancelar"
                    }), s.jsx(je, {
                        onClick: p,
                        disabled: h.isPending,
                        "data-testid": "button-save-coordinates",
                        children: h.isPending ? "Salvando..." : "Salvar Coordenadas"
                    })]
                })]
            })
        }), s.jsx("div", {
            className: "flex justify-center pt-6",
            children: s.jsx("p", {
                className: "text-sm text-muted-foreground",
                children: "Para sincronizar mais vendedores, use a funcionalidade de sincronização do Omie"
            })
        })]
    })
}
function RH() {
    const {toast: e} = en()
      , t = os()
      , [r,n] = C.useState(null)
      , [a,i] = C.useState("")
      , [o,l] = C.useState("")
      , [c,d] = C.useState("")
      , {data: h=[], isLoading: f} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/telemarketing/my-cards"],
        refetchInterval: 3e4
    })
      , g = Gt({
        mutationFn: async () => {
            const v = await fetch("/api/sales-cards/process-overdue", {
                method: "POST",
                credentials: "include"
            });
            if (!v.ok)
                throw new Error("Failed to process overdue cards");
            return v.json()
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: v => {
            e({
                title: "Cards em atraso processados",
                description: `${v.sentToTelemarketing} enviados para telemarketing, ${v.transferred} transferidos definitivamente`
            }),
            t.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/telemarketing/my-cards"]
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: v => {
            e({
                title: "Erro",
                description: v.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , p = Gt({
        mutationFn: async v => {
            const N = await fetch(`/api/telemarketing/cards/${v.id}`, {
                method: "PUT",
                headers: {
                    "Content-Type": "application/json"
                },
                body: JSON.stringify(v),
                credentials: "include"
            });
            if (!N.ok)
                throw new Error("Failed to update card");
            return N.json()
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            e({
                title: "Card atualizado com sucesso",
                description: "O card de telemarketing foi processado"
            }),
            n(null),
            i(""),
            l(""),
            d(""),
            t.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/telemarketing/my-cards"]
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: v => {
            e({
                title: "Erro",
                description: v.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , _ = () => {
        !r || !a || p.mutate({
            id: r.id,
            outcome: a,
            notes: o,
            rescheduleDate: a === "reschedule" ? c : void 0
        })
    }
      , x = (v, N) => N != null && N.includes("TRANSFERIDO") ? s.jsx($t, {
        variant: "secondary",
        className: "bg-orange-100 text-orange-800",
        children: "TRANSFERIDO"
    }) : N != null && N.includes("RESGATE") ? s.jsx($t, {
        variant: "destructive",
        children: "RESGATE"
    }) : s.jsx($t, {
        variant: "outline",
        children: v
    })
      , y = v => v ? v.reduce( (N, j) => N + j.totalPrice, 0) : 0;
    return f ? s.jsx("div", {
        className: "p-6",
        children: s.jsxs("div", {
            className: "animate-pulse space-y-4",
            children: [s.jsx("div", {
                className: "h-8 bg-gray-200 rounded w-1/4"
            }), s.jsx("div", {
                className: "h-32 bg-gray-200 rounded"
            }), s.jsx("div", {
                className: "h-32 bg-gray-200 rounded"
            })]
        })
    }) : s.jsxs("div", {
        className: "p-6 space-y-6",
        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
            className: "flex justify-between items-center",
            children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                children: [s.jsx("h1", {
                    className: "text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900",
                    children: "Telemarketing"
                }), s.jsx("p", {
                    className: "text-gray-600",
                    children: "Gerencie cards de resgate e transferências de clientes"
                })]
            }), s.jsxs(je, {
                onClick: () => g.mutate(),
                disabled: g.isPending,
                variant: "outline",
                className: "flex items-center gap-2",
                children: [s.jsx(Ts, {
                    className: "h-4 w-4"
                }), "Processar Cards em Atraso"]
            })]
        }), s.jsxs("div", {
            className: "grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6",
            children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                className: "space-y-4",
                children: [s.jsxs("h2", {
                    className: "text-lg font-semibold flex items-center gap-2",
                    children: [s.jsx(Tl, {
                        className: "h-5 w-5"
                    }), "Meus Cards (", h.length, ")"]
                }), h.length === 0 ? s.jsx(Oe, {
                    children: s.jsxs(Re, {
                        className: "flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-8 text-gray-500",
                        children: [s.jsx(Tl, {
                            className: "h-12 w-12 mb-4 opacity-50"
                        }), s.jsx("p", {
                            children: "Nenhum card de telemarketing no momento"
                        })]
                    })
                }) : s.jsx("div", {
                    className: "space-y-3",
                    children: h.map(v => s.jsx(Oe, {
                        className: `cursor-pointer transition-all hover:shadow-md ${(r == null ? void 0 : r.id) === v.id ? "ring-2 ring-blue-500 border-blue-500" : ""}`,
                        onClick: () => n(v),
                        children: s.jsxs(Re, {
                            className: "p-4",
                            children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                                className: "flex justify-between items-start mb-2",
                                children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                                    className: "flex items-center gap-2",
                                    children: [s.jsx("h3", {
                                        className: "font-medium text-gray-900",
                                        children: v.customer_name
                                    }), x(v.status, v.notes || "")]
                                }), s.jsx("div", {
                                    className: "text-right text-sm text-gray-500",
                                    children: s.jsxs("div", {
                                        className: "flex items-center gap-1",
                                        children: [s.jsx(Kn, {
                                            className: "h-3 w-3"
                                        }), kn(new Date(v.scheduled_date), "dd/MM/yyyy", {
                                            locale: ys
                                        })]
                                    })
                                })]
                            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                className: "space-y-1 text-sm text-gray-600",
                                children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                                    className: "flex items-center gap-2",
                                    children: [s.jsx(Tl, {
                                        className: "h-3 w-3"
                                    }), v.customer_phone]
                                }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                    className: "flex items-center gap-2",
                                    children: [s.jsx(Sr, {
                                        className: "h-3 w-3"
                                    }), v.customer_address]
                                }), v.products && v.products.length > 0 && s.jsxs("div", {
                                    className: "flex items-center gap-2",
                                    children: [s.jsx("span", {
                                        className: "font-medium",
                                        children: "Valor:"
                                    }), "R$ ", y(v.products).toFixed(2)]
                                })]
                            }), v.notes && s.jsx("div", {
                                className: "mt-2 p-2 bg-gray-50 rounded text-xs text-gray-700",
                                children: v.notes
                            })]
                        })
                    }, v.id))
                })]
            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                className: "space-y-4",
                children: [s.jsxs("h2", {
                    className: "text-lg font-semibold flex items-center gap-2",
                    children: [s.jsx(co, {
                        className: "h-5 w-5"
                    }), "Atendimento"]
                }), r ? s.jsxs(Oe, {
                    children: [s.jsxs(ut, {
                        children: [s.jsxs(ht, {
                            className: "flex items-center gap-2",
                            children: [s.jsx(co, {
                                className: "h-5 w-5"
                            }), r.customer_name, x(r.status, r.notes || "")]
                        }), s.jsxs(Oi, {
                            children: ["Card de telemarketing - ", kn(new Date(r.scheduled_date), "dd/MM/yyyy", {
                                locale: ys
                            })]
                        })]
                    }), s.jsxs(Re, {
                        className: "space-y-4",
                        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "space-y-2 text-sm",
                            children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                                className: "flex items-center gap-2",
                                children: [s.jsx(Tl, {
                                    className: "h-4 w-4 text-gray-500"
                                }), s.jsx("span", {
                                    children: r.customer_phone
                                })]
                            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                className: "flex items-center gap-2",
                                children: [s.jsx(Sr, {
                                    className: "h-4 w-4 text-gray-500"
                                }), s.jsx("span", {
                                    children: r.customer_address
                                })]
                            })]
                        }), r.products && r.products.length > 0 && s.jsxs("div", {
                            children: [s.jsx("h4", {
                                className: "font-medium mb-2",
                                children: "Produtos:"
                            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                className: "space-y-1 text-sm",
                                children: [r.products.map( (v, N) => s.jsxs("div", {
                                    className: "flex justify-between",
                                    children: [s.jsxs("span", {
                                        children: [v.name, " (x", v.quantity, ")"]
                                    }), s.jsxs("span", {
                                        children: ["R$ ", v.totalPrice.toFixed(2)]
                                    })]
                                }, N)), s.jsx("div", {
                                    className: "border-t pt-1 font-medium",
                                    children: s.jsxs("div", {
                                        className: "flex justify-between",
                                        children: [s.jsx("span", {
                                            children: "Total:"
                                        }), s.jsxs("span", {
                                            children: ["R$ ", y(r.products).toFixed(2)]
                                        })]
                                    })
                                })]
                            })]
                        }), r.notes && s.jsxs("div", {
                            children: [s.jsx("h4", {
                                className: "font-medium mb-2",
                                children: "Observações:"
                            }), s.jsx("div", {
                                className: "p-2 bg-gray-50 rounded text-sm text-gray-700",
                                children: r.notes
                            })]
                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "space-y-4 border-t pt-4",
                            children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                                children: [s.jsx(We, {
                                    htmlFor: "outcome",
                                    children: "Resultado do Contato"
                                }), s.jsxs(yr, {
                                    value: a,
                                    onValueChange: v => i(v),
                                    children: [s.jsx(pr, {
                                        children: s.jsx(wr, {
                                            placeholder: "Selecione o resultado"
                                        })
                                    }), s.jsxs(xr, {
                                        children: [s.jsx(Ue, {
                                            value: "completed",
                                            children: "✓ Venda Realizada"
                                        }), s.jsx(Ue, {
                                            value: "reschedule",
                                            children: "📅 Reagendar"
                                        })]
                                    })]
                                })]
                            }), a === "reschedule" && s.jsxs("div", {
                                children: [s.jsx(We, {
                                    htmlFor: "reschedule-date",
                                    children: "Nova Data"
                                }), s.jsx(xt, {
                                    id: "reschedule-date",
                                    type: "date",
                                    value: c,
                                    onChange: v => d(v.target.value)
                                })]
                            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                children: [s.jsx(We, {
                                    htmlFor: "notes",
                                    children: "Observações do Atendimento"
                                }), s.jsx(au, {
                                    id: "notes",
                                    placeholder: "Descreva o resultado do contato...",
                                    value: o,
                                    onChange: v => l(v.target.value),
                                    rows: 3
                                })]
                            }), s.jsx(je, {
                                onClick: _,
                                disabled: !a || p.isPending,
                                className: "w-full",
                                children: p.isPending ? "Salvando..." : "Finalizar Atendimento"
                            })]
                        })]
                    })]
                }) : s.jsx(Oe, {
                    children: s.jsxs(Re, {
                        className: "flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-8 text-gray-500",
                        children: [s.jsx(AJ, {

                        }), s.jsx("p", {
                            children: "Selecione um card para iniciar o atendimento"
                        })]
                    })
                })]
            })]
        })]
    })
}
function Dpe({isOpen: e, onClose: t, customer: r}) {
    const {toast: n} = en()
      , [a,i] = C.useState({
        name: "",
        fantasyName: "",
        companyName: "",
        cpf: "",
        cnpj: "",
        email: "",
        phone: "",
        address: "",
        city: "",
        state: "",
        zipCode: "",
        latitude: "",
        longitude: "",
        weekdays: [],
        visitPeriodicity: "semanal"
    })
      , o = Gt({
        mutationFn: async f => {
            if (!(r != null && r.id))
                throw new Error("Customer ID is required");
            const g = {
                ...f,
                weekdays: JSON.stringify(f.weekdays)
            };
            return await dr("PATCH", `/api/customers/${r.id}`, g)
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            n({
                title: "Cliente atualizado com sucesso!",
                description: "As informações do cliente foram atualizadas."
            }),
            En.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/sales-cards"],
                refetchType: "all"
            }),
            En.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/customers"]
            }),
            t()
        }
        ,
        onError: f => {
            n({
                title: "Erro ao atualizar cliente",
                description: f.message || "Ocorreu um erro ao atualizar o cliente",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , l = f => {
        f.preventDefault(),
        o.mutate(a)
    }
      , c = f => {
        const {name: g, value: p} = f.target;
        i(_ => ({
            ..._,
            [g]: p
        }))
    }
      , d = f => {
        i(g => ({
            ...g,
            weekdays: g.weekdays.includes(f) ? g.weekdays.filter(p => p !== f) : [...g.weekdays, f]
        }))
    }
      , h = f => {
        i(g => ({
            ...g,
            visitPeriodicity: f
        }))
    }
    ;
    return C.useEffect( () => {
        if (r) {
            let f = [];
            try {
                f = typeof r.weekdays == "string" ? JSON.parse(r.weekdays) : r.weekdays || []
            } catch (g) {
                console.error("Error parsing weekdays:", g),
                f = []
            }
            i({
                name: r.name || "",
                fantasyName: r.fantasyName || "",
                companyName: r.companyName || "",
                cpf: r.cpf || "",
                cnpj: r.cnpj || "",
                email: r.email || "",
                phone: r.phone || "",
                address: r.address || "",
                city: r.city || "",
                state: r.state || "",
                zipCode: r.zipCode || "",
                latitude: r.latitude || "",
                longitude: r.longitude || "",
                weekdays: f,
                visitPeriodicity: r.visitPeriodicity || "semanal"
            })
        }
    }
    , [r]),
    s.jsx(xn, {
        open: e,
        onOpenChange: t,
        children: s.jsxs(gn, {
            className: "max-w-2xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto",
            children: [s.jsxs(Dn, {
                children: [s.jsx(On, {
                    children: "Editar Dados do Cliente"
                }), s.jsx(Uv, {
                    children: "Atualize as informações cadastrais do cliente"
                })]
            }), s.jsxs("form", {
                onSubmit: l,
                className: "space-y-4",
                children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                    className: "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4",
                    children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                        children: [s.jsx(We, {
                            htmlFor: "name",
                            children: "Nome / Razão Social *"
                        }), s.jsx(xt, {
                            id: "name",
                            name: "name",
                            value: a.name,
                            onChange: c,
                            required: !0,
                            "data-testid": "input-customer-name"
                        })]
                    }), s.jsxs("div", {
                        children: [s.jsx(We, {
                            htmlFor: "fantasyName",
                            children: "Nome Fantasia"
                        }), s.jsx(xt, {
                            id: "fantasyName",
                            name: "fantasyName",
                            value: a.fantasyName,
                            onChange: c,
                            "data-testid": "input-customer-fantasy-name"
                        })]
                    })]
                }), s.jsxs("div", {
                    className: "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4",
                    children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                        children: [s.jsx(We, {
                            htmlFor: "cpf",
                            children: "CPF"
                        }), s.jsx(xt, {
                            id: "cpf",
                            name: "cpf",
                            value: a.cpf,
                            onChange: c,
                            "data-testid": "input-customer-cpf"
                        })]
                    }), s.jsxs("div", {
                        children: [s.jsx(We, {
                            htmlFor: "cnpj",
                            children: "CNPJ"
                        }), s.jsx(xt, {
                            id: "cnpj",
                            name: "cnpj",
                            value: a.cnpj,
                            onChange: c,
                            "data-testid": "input-customer-cnpj"
                        })]
                    })]
                }), s.jsxs("div", {
                    className: "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4",
                    children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                        children: [s.jsx(We, {
                            htmlFor: "email",
                            children: "Email"
                        }), s.jsx(xt, {
                            id: "email",
                            name: "email",
                            type: "email",
                            value: a.email,
                            onChange: c,
                            "data-testid": "input-customer-email"
                        })]
                    }), s.jsxs("div", {
                        children: [s.jsx(We, {
                            htmlFor: "phone",
                            children: "Telefone *"
                        }), s.jsx(xt, {
                            id: "phone",
                            name: "phone",
                            value: a.phone,
                            onChange: c,
                            required: !0,
                            "data-testid": "input-customer-phone"
                        })]
                    })]
                }), s.jsxs("div", {
                    children: [s.jsx(We, {
                        htmlFor: "address",
                        children: "Endereço"
                    }), s.jsx(xt, {
                        id: "address",
                        name: "address",
                        value: a.address,
                        onChange: c,
                        "data-testid": "input-customer-address"
                    })]
                }), s.jsxs("div", {
                    className: "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4",
                    children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                        children: [s.jsx(We, {
                            htmlFor: "city",
                            children: "Cidade"
                        }), s.jsx(xt, {
                            id: "city",
                            name: "city",
                            value: a.city,
                            onChange: c,
                            "data-testid": "input-customer-city"
                        })]
                    }), s.jsxs("div", {
                        children: [s.jsx(We, {
                            htmlFor: "state",
                            children: "Estado"
                        }), s.jsx(xt, {
                            id: "state",
                            name: "state",
                            value: a.state,
                            onChange: c,
                            maxLength: 2,
                            "data-testid": "input-customer-state"
                        })]
                    }), s.jsxs("div", {
                        children: [s.jsx(We, {
                            htmlFor: "zipCode",
                            children: "CEP"
                        }), s.jsx(xt, {
                            id: "zipCode",
                            name: "zipCode",
                            value: a.zipCode,
                            onChange: c,
                            "data-testid": "input-customer-zip-code"
                        })]
                    })]
                }), s.jsxs("div", {
                    className: "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4",
                    children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                        children: [s.jsx(We, {
                            htmlFor: "latitude",
                            children: "Latitude"
                        }), s.jsx(xt, {

function Qpe(e) {
    var t = Math.floor(Math.log(Math.abs(e)) * Math.LOG10E), r;
    return t >= -4 && t <= -1 ? r = e.toPrecision(10 + t) : Math.abs(t) <= 9 ? r = Zpe(e) : t === 10 ? r = e.toFixed(10).substr(0, 12) : r = Kpe(e),
    nE(Gpe(r.toUpperCase()))
}
function w4(e, t) {
    switch (typeof e) {
    case "string":
        return e;
    case "boolean":
        return e ? "TRUE" : "FALSE";
    case "number":
        return (e | 0) === e ? e.toString(10) : Qpe(e);
    case "undefined":
        return "";
    case "object":
        if (e == null)
            return "";
        if (e instanceof Date)
            return Ef(14, $H(e, t && t.date1904), t)
    }
    throw new Error("unsupported value in General format: " + e)
}
function Ype(e, t) {
    t[0] -= 581;
    var r = e.getDay();
    return e < 60 && (r = (r + 6) % 7),
    r
}
function Xpe(e, t, r, n) {
    var a = "", i = 0, o = 0, l = r.y, c, d = 0;
    switch (e) {
    case 98:
        l = r.y + 543;
    case 121:
        switch (t.length) {
        case 1:
        case 2:
            c = l % 100,
            d = 2;
            break;
        default:
            c = l % 1e4,
            d = 4;
            break
        }
        break;
    case 109:
        switch (t.length) {
        case 1:
        case 2:
            c = r.m,
            d = t.length;
            break;
        case 3:
            return Uj[r.m - 1][1];
        case 5:
            return Uj[r.m - 1][0];
        default:
            return Uj[r.m - 1][2]
        }
        break;
    case 100:
        switch (t.length) {
        case 1:
        case 2:
            c = r.d,
            d = t.length;
            break;
        case 3:
            return EP[r.q][0];
        default:
            return EP[r.q][1]
        }
        break;
    case 104:
        switch (t.length) {
        case 1:
        case 2:
            c = 1 + (r.H + 11) % 12,
            d = t.length;
            break;
        default:
            throw "bad hour format: " + t
        }
        break;
    case 72:
        switch (t.length) {
        case 1:
        case 2:
            c = r.H,
            d = t.length;
            break;
        default:
            throw "bad hour format: " + t
        }
        break;
    case 77:
        switch (t.length) {
        case 1:
        case 2:
            c = r.M,
            d = t.length;
            break;
        default:
            throw "bad minute format: " + t
        }
        break;
    case 115:
        if (t != "s" && t != "ss" && t != ".0" && t != ".00" && t != ".000")
            throw "bad second format: " + t;
        return r.u === 0 && (t == "s" || t == "ss") ? Yc(r.S, t.length) : (n >= 2 ? o = n === 3 ? 1e3 : 100 : o = n === 1 ? 10 : 1,
        i = Math.round(o * (r.S + r.u)),
        i >= 60 * o && (i = 0),
        t === "s" ? i === 0 ? "0" : "" + i / o : (a = Yc(i, 2 + n),
        t === "ss" ? a.substr(0, 2) : "." + a.substr(2, t.length - 1)));
    case 90:
        switch (t) {
        case "[h]":
        case "[hh]":
            c = r.D * 24 + r.H;
            break;
        case "[m]":
        case "[mm]":
            c = (r.D * 24 + r.H) * 60 + r.M;
            break;
        case "[s]":
        case "[ss]":
            c = ((r.D * 24 + r.H) * 60 + r.M) * 60 + Math.round(r.S + r.u);
            break;
        default:
            throw "bad abstime format: " + t
        }
        d = t.length === 3 ? 1 : 2;
        break;
    case 101:
        c = l,
        d = 1;
        break
    }
    var h = d > 0 ? Yc(c, d) : "";
    return h
}
function Jh(e) {
    var t = 3;
    if (e.length <= t)
        return e;
    for (var r = e.length % t, n = e.substr(0, r); r != e.length; r += t)
        n += (n.length > 0 ? "," : "") + e.substr(r, t);
    return n
}
var VH = /%/g;
function Jpe(e, t, r) {
    var n = t.replace(VH, "")
      , a = t.length - n.length;
    return zu(e, n, r * Math.pow(10, 2 * a)) + Xs("%", a)
}
function e0e(e, t, r) {
    for (var n = t.length - 1; t.charCodeAt(n - 1) === 44; )
        --n;
    return zu(e, t.substr(0, n), r / Math.pow(10, 3 * (t.length - n)))
}
function UH(e, t) {
    var r, n = e.indexOf("E") - e.indexOf(".") - 1;
    if (e.match(/^#+0.0E\+0$/)) {
        if (t == 0)
            return "0.0E+0";
        if (t < 0)
            return "-" + UH(e, -t);
        var a = e.indexOf(".");
        a === -1 && (a = e.indexOf("E"));
        var i = Math.floor(Math.log(t) * Math.LOG10E) % a;
        if (i < 0 && (i += a),
        r = (t / Math.pow(10, i)).toPrecision(n + 1 + (a + i) % a),
        r.indexOf("e") === -1) {
            var o = Math.floor(Math.log(t) * Math.LOG10E);
            for (r.indexOf(".") === -1 ? r = r.charAt(0) + "." + r.substr(1) + "E+" + (o - r.length + i) : r += "E+" + (o - i); r.substr(0, 2) === "0."; )
                r = r.charAt(0) + r.substr(2, a) + "." + r.substr(2 + a),
                r = r.replace(/^0+([1-9])/, "$1").replace(/^0+\./, "0.");
            r = r.replace(/\+-/, "-")
        }
        r = r.replace(/^([+-]?)(\d*)\.(\d*)[Ee]/, function(l, c, d, h) {
            return c + d + h.substr(0, (a + i) % a) + "." + h.substr(i) + "E"
        })
    } else
        r = t.toExponential(n);
    return e.match(/E\+00$/) && r.match(/e[+-]\d$/) && (r = r.substr(0, r.length - 1) + "0" + r.charAt(r.length - 1)),
    e.match(/E\-/) && r.match(/e\+/) && (r = r.replace(/e\+/, "e")),
    r.replace("e", "E")
}
var qH = /# (\?+)( ?)\/( ?)(\d+)/;
function t0e(e, t, r) {
    var n = parseInt(e[4], 10)
      , a = Math.round(t * n)
      , i = Math.floor(a / n)
      , o = a - i * n
      , l = n;
    return r + (i === 0 ? "" : "" + i) + " " + (o === 0 ? Xs(" ", e[1].length + 1 + e[4].length) : rE(o, e[1].length) + e[2] + "/" + e[3] + Yc(l, e[4].length))
}
function r0e(e, t, r) {
    return r + (t === 0 ? "" : "" + t) + Xs(" ", e[1].length + 2 + e[4].length)
}
var HH = /^#*0*\.([0#]+)/
  , WH = /\).*[0#]/
  , GH = /\(###\) ###\\?-####/;
function to(e) {
    for (var t = "", r, n = 0; n != e.length; ++n)
        switch (r = e.charCodeAt(n)) {
        case 35:
            break;
        case 63:
            t += " ";
            break;
        case 48:
            t += "0";
            break;
        default:
            t += String.fromCharCode(r)
        }
    return t
}
function TP(e, t) {
    var r = Math.pow(10, t);
    return "" + Math.round(e * r) / r
}
function AP(e, t) {
    var r = e - Math.floor(e)
      , n = Math.pow(10, t);
    return t < ("" + Math.round(r * n)).length ? 0 : Math.round(r * n)
}
function n0e(e, t) {
    return t < ("" + Math.round((e - Math.floor(e)) * Math.pow(10, t))).length ? 1 : 0
}
function s0e(e) {
    return e < 2147483647 && e > -2147483648 ? "" + (e >= 0 ? e | 0 : e - 1 | 0) : "" + Math.floor(e)
}
function rc(e, t, r) {
    if (e.charCodeAt(0) === 40 && !t.match(WH)) {
        var n = t.replace(/\( */, "").replace(/ \)/, "").replace(/\)/, "");
        return r >= 0 ? rc("n", n, r) : "(" + rc("n", n, -r) + ")"
    }
    if (t.charCodeAt(t.length - 1) === 44)
        return e0e(e, t, r);
    if (t.indexOf("%") !== -1)
        return Jpe(e, t, r);
    if (t.indexOf("E") !== -1)
        return UH(t, r);
    if (t.charCodeAt(0) === 36)
        return "$" + rc(e, t.substr(t.charAt(1) == " " ? 2 : 1), r);
    var a, i, o, l, c = Math.abs(r), d = r < 0 ? "-" : "";
    if (t.match(/^00+$/))
        return d + Mp(c, t.length);
    if (t.match(/^[#?]+$/))
        return a = Mp(r, 0),
        a === "0" && (a = ""),
        a.length > t.length ? a : to(t.substr(0, t.length - a.length)) + a;
    if (i = t.match(qH))
        return t0e(i, c, d);
    if (t.match(/^#+0+$/))
        return d + Mp(c, t.length - t.indexOf("0"));
    if (i = t.match(HH))
        return a = TP(r, i[1].length).replace(/^([^\.]+)$/, "$1." + to(i[1])).replace(/\.$/, "." + to(i[1])).replace(/\.(\d*)$/, function(_, x) {
            return "." + x + Xs("0", to(i[1]).length - x.length)
        }),
        t.indexOf("0.") !== -1 ? a : a.replace(/^0\./, ".");
    if (t = t.replace(/^#+([0.])/, "$1"),
    i = t.match(/^(0*)\.(#*)$/))
        return d + TP(c, i[2].length).replace(/\.(\d*[1-9])0*$/, ".$1").replace(/^(-?\d*)$/, "$1.").replace(/^0\./, i[1].length ? "0." : ".");
    if (i = t.match(/^#{1,3},##0(\.?)$/))
        return d + Jh(Mp(c, 0));
    if (i = t.match(/^#,##0\.([#0]*0)$/))
        return r < 0 ? "-" + rc(e, t, -r) : Jh("" + (Math.floor(r) + n0e(r, i[1].length))) + "." + Yc(AP(r, i[1].length), i[1].length);
    if (i = t.match(/^#,#*,#0/))
        return rc(e, t.replace(/^#,#*,/, ""), r);
    if (i = t.match(/^([0#]+)(\\?-([0#]+))+$/))
        return a = I0(rc(e, t.replace(/[\\-]/g, ""), r)),
        o = 0,
        I0(I0(t.replace(/\\/g, "")).replace(/[0#]/g, function(_) {
            return o < a.length ? a.charAt(o++) : _ === "0" ? "0" : ""
        }));
    if (t.match(GH))
        return a = rc(e, "##########", r),
        "(" + a.substr(0, 3) + ") " + a.substr(3, 3) + "-" + a.substr(6);
    var h = "";
    if (i = t.match(/^([#0?]+)( ?)\/( ?)([#0?]+)/))
        return o = Math.min(i[4].length, 7),
        l = w_(c, Math.pow(10, o) - 1, !1),
        a = "" + d,
        h = zu("n", i[1], l[1]),
        h.charAt(h.length - 1) == " " && (h = h.substr(0, h.length - 1) + "0"),
        a += h + i[2] + "/" + i[3],
        h = v_(l[2], o),
        h.length < i[4].length && (h = to(i[4].substr(i[4].length - h.length)) + h),
        a += h,
        a;
    if (i = t.match(/^# ([#0?]+)( ?)\/( ?)([#0?]+)/))
        return o = Math.min(Math.max(i[1].length, i[4].length), 7),
        l = w_(c, Math.pow(10, o) - 1, !0),
        d + (l[0] || (l[1] ? "" : "0")) + " " + (l[1] ? rE(l[1], o) + i[2] + "/" + i[3] + v_(l[2], o) : Xs(" ", 2 * o + 1 + i[2].length + i[3].length));
    if (i = t.match(/^[#0?]+$/))
        return a = Mp(r, 0),
        t.length <= a.length ? a : to(t.substr(0, t.length - a.length)) + a;
    if (i = t.match(/^([#0?]+)\.([#0]+)$/)) {
        a = "" + r.toFixed(Math.min(i[2].length, 10)).replace(/([^0])0+$/, "$1"),
        o = a.indexOf(".");
        var f = t.indexOf(".") - o
          , g = t.length - a.length - f;
        return to(t.substr(0, f) + a + t.substr(t.length - g))
    }
    if (i = t.match(/^00,000\.([#0]*0)$/))
        return o = AP(r, i[1].length),
        r < 0 ? "-" + rc(e, t, -r) : Jh(s0e(r)).replace(/^\d,\d{3}$/, "0$&").replace(/^\d*$/, function(_) {
            return "00," + (_.length < 3 ? Yc(0, 3 - _.length) : "") + _
        }) + "." + Yc(o, i[1].length);
    switch (t) {
    case "###,##0.00":
        return rc(e, "#,##0.00", r);
    case "###,###":
    case "##,###":
    case "#,###":
        var p = Jh(Mp(c, 0));
        return p !== "0" ? d + p : "";
    case "###,###.00":
        return rc(e, "###,##0.00", r).replace(/^0\./, ".");
    case "#,###.00":
        return rc(e, "#,##0.00", r).replace(/^0\./, ".")
    }
    throw new Error("unsupported format |" + t + "|")
}
function a0e(e, t, r) {
    for (var n = t.length - 1; t.charCodeAt(n - 1) === 44; )
        --n;
    return zu(e, t.substr(0, n), r / Math.pow(10, 3 * (t.length - n)))
}
function i0e(e, t, r) {
    var n = t.replace(VH, "")
      , a = t.length - n.length;
    return zu(e, n, r * Math.pow(10, 2 * a)) + Xs("%", a)
}
function ZH(e, t) {
    var r, n = e.indexOf("E") - e.indexOf(".") - 1;
    if (e.match(/^#+0.0E\+0$/)) {
        if (t == 0)
            return "0.0E+0";
        if (t < 0)
            return "-" + ZH(e, -t);
        var a = e.indexOf(".");
        a === -1 && (a = e.indexOf("E"));
        var i = Math.floor(Math.log(t) * Math.LOG10E) % a;
        if (i < 0 && (i += a),
        r = (t / Math.pow(10, i)).toPrecision(n + 1 + (a + i) % a),
        !r.match(/[Ee]/)) {
            var o = Math.floor(Math.log(t) * Math.LOG10E);
            r.indexOf(".") === -1 ? r = r.charAt(0) + "." + r.substr(1) + "E+" + (o - r.length + i) : r += "E+" + (o - i),
            r = r.replace(/\+-/, "-")
        }
        r = r.replace(/^([+-]?)(\d*)\.(\d*)[Ee]/, function(l, c, d, h) {
            return c + d + h.substr(0, (a + i) % a) + "." + h.substr(i) + "E"
        })
    } else
        r = t.toExponential(n);
    return e.match(/E\+00$/) && r.match(/e[+-]\d$/) && (r = r.substr(0, r.length - 1) + "0" + r.charAt(r.length - 1)),
    e.match(/E\-/) && r.match(/e\+/) && (r = r.replace(/e\+/, "e")),
    r.replace("e", "E")
}
function Ad(e, t, r) {
    if (e.charCodeAt(0) === 40 && !t.match(WH)) {
        var n = t.replace(/\( */, "").replace(/ \)/, "").replace(/\)/, "");
        return r >= 0 ? Ad("n", n, r) : "(" + Ad("n", n, -r) + ")"
    }
    if (t.charCodeAt(t.length - 1) === 44)
        return a0e(e, t, r);
    if (t.indexOf("%") !== -1)
        return i0e(e, t, r);
    if (t.indexOf("E") !== -1)
        return ZH(t, r);
    if (t.charCodeAt(0) === 36)
        return "$" + Ad(e, t.substr(t.charAt(1) == " " ? 2 : 1), r);
    var a, i, o, l, c = Math.abs(r), d = r < 0 ? "-" : "";
    if (t.match(/^00+$/))
        return d + Yc(c, t.length);
    if (t.match(/^[#?]+$/))
        return a = "" + r,
        r === 0 && (a = ""),

    if (i = t.match(qH))
        return r0e(i, c, d);
    if (t.match(/^#+0+$/))
        return d + Yc(c, t.length - t.indexOf("0"));
    if (i = t.match(HH))
        return a = ("" + r).replace(/^([^\.]+)$/, "$1." + to(i[1])).replace(/\.$/, "." + to(i[1])),
        a = a.replace(/\.(\d*)$/, function(_, x) {
            return "." + x + Xs("0", to(i[1]).length - x.length)
        }),
        t.indexOf("0.") !== -1 ? a : a.replace(/^0\./, ".");
    if (t = t.replace(/^#+([0.])/, "$1"),
    i = t.match(/^(0*)\.(#*)$/))
        return d + ("" + c).replace(/\.(\d*[1-9])0*$/, ".$1").replace(/^(-?\d*)$/, "$1.").replace(/^0\./, i[1].length ? "0." : ".");
    if (i = t.match(/^#{1,3},##0(\.?)$/))
        return d + Jh("" + c);
    if (i = t.match(/^#,##0\.([#0]*0)$/))
        return r < 0 ? "-" + Ad(e, t, -r) : Jh("" + r) + "." + Xs("0", i[1].length);
    if (i = t.match(/^#,#*,#0/))
        return Ad(e, t.replace(/^#,#*,/, ""), r);
    if (i = t.match(/^([0#]+)(\\?-([0#]+))+$/))
        return a = I0(Ad(e, t.replace(/[\\-]/g, ""), r)),
        o = 0,
        I0(I0(t.replace(/\\/g, "")).replace(/[0#]/g, function(_) {
            return o < a.length ? a.charAt(o++) : _ === "0" ? "0" : ""
        }));
    if (t.match(GH))
        return a = Ad(e, "##########", r),
        "(" + a.substr(0, 3) + ") " + a.substr(3, 3) + "-" + a.substr(6);
    var h = "";
    if (i = t.match(/^([#0?]+)( ?)\/( ?)([#0?]+)/))
        return o = Math.min(i[4].length, 7),
        l = w_(c, Math.pow(10, o) - 1, !1),
        a = "" + d,
        h = zu("n", i[1], l[1]),
        h.charAt(h.length - 1) == " " && (h = h.substr(0, h.length - 1) + "0"),

        h = v_(l[2], o),
        h.length < i[4].length && (h = to(i[4].substr(i[4].length - h.length)) + h),
        a += h,
        a;
    if (i = t.match(/^# ([#0?]+)( ?)\/( ?)([#0?]+)/))

        l = w_(c, Math.pow(10, o) - 1, !0),

    if (i = t.match(/^[#0?]+$/))
        return a = "" + r,
        t.length <= a.length ? a : to(t.substr(0, t.length - a.length)) + a;
    if (i = t.match(/^([#0]+)\.([#0]+)$/)) {

        o = a.indexOf(".");
        var f = t.indexOf(".") - o
          , g = t.length - a.length - f;

    if (i = t.match(/^00,000\.([#0]*0)$/))
        return r < 0 ? "-" + Ad(e, t, -r) : Jh("" + r).replace(/^\d,\d{3}$/, "0$&").replace(/^\d*$/, function(_) {

        }) + "." + Yc(0, i[1].length);

    case "###,###":
    case "##,###":
    case "#,###":
        var p = Jh("" + c);
        return p !== "0" ? d + p : "";
