            return Ad(e, t.slice(0, t.lastIndexOf(".")), r) + to(t.slice(t.lastIndexOf(".")))
    }
    throw new Error("unsupported format |" + t + "|")
}
function zu(e, t, r) {
    return (r | 0) === r ? Ad(e, t, r) : rc(e, t, r)
}
function o0e(e) {
    for (var t = [], r = !1, n = 0, a = 0; n < e.length; ++n)
        switch (e.charCodeAt(n)) {
        case 34:
            r = !r;
            break;
        case 95:
        case 42:
        case 92:
            ++n;
            break;
        case 59:
            t[t.length] = e.substr(a, n - a),
            a = n + 1
        }
    if (t[t.length] = e.substr(a),
    r === !0)
        throw new Error("Format |" + e + "| unterminated string ");
    return t
}
var KH = /\[[HhMmSs\u0E0A\u0E19\u0E17]*\]/;
function QH(e) {
    for (var t = 0, r = "", n = ""; t < e.length; )
        switch (r = e.charAt(t)) {
        case "G":
            y_(e, t) && (t += 6),
            t++;
            break;
        case '"':
            for (; e.charCodeAt(++t) !== 34 && t < e.length; )
                ;
            ++t;
            break;
        case "\\":
            t += 2;
            break;
        case "_":
            t += 2;
            break;
        case "@":
            ++t;
            break;
        case "B":
        case "b":
            if (e.charAt(t + 1) === "1" || e.charAt(t + 1) === "2")
                return !0;
        case "M":
        case "D":
        case "Y":
        case "H":
        case "S":
        case "E":
        case "m":
        case "d":
        case "y":
        case "h":
        case "s":
        case "e":
        case "g":
            return !0;
        case "A":
        case "a":
        case "上":
            if (e.substr(t, 3).toUpperCase() === "A/P" || e.substr(t, 5).toUpperCase() === "AM/PM" || e.substr(t, 5).toUpperCase() === "上午/下午")
                return !0;
            ++t;
            break;
        case "[":
            for (n = r; e.charAt(t++) !== "]" && t < e.length; )
                n += e.charAt(t);
            if (n.match(KH))

        return we === -1 ? ne : ne.slice(0, we + 1)
    }
    function a(ne) {
        if (ne.charAt(ne.length - 1) == "/")
            return a(ne.slice(0, -1));
        var we = ne.lastIndexOf("/");
        return we === -1 ? ne : ne.slice(we + 1)
    }
    function i(ne, we) {
        typeof we == "string" && (we = new Date(we));
        var me = we.getHours();
        me = me << 6 | we.getMinutes(),
        me = me << 5 | we.getSeconds() >>> 1,
        ne.write_shift(2, me);
        var xe = we.getFullYear() - 1980;
        xe = xe << 4 | we.getMonth() + 1,
        xe = xe << 5 | we.getDate(),
        ne.write_shift(2, xe)
    }
    function o(ne) {

          , me = ne.read_shift(2) & 65535

        xe.setSeconds(Ze << 1),

    }
    function l(ne) {

        }

    }

    function h(ne, we) {
        if (ne[0] == 80 && ne[1] == 75)
            return qr(ne, we);
        if ((ne[0] | 32) == 109 && (ne[1] | 32) == 105)
            return kr(ne, we);
        if (ne.length < 512)
            throw new Error("CFB file size " + ne.length + " < 512");
        var me = 3
          , xe = 512
          , ye = 0
          , Se = 0
          , Ze = 0
          , lt = 0
          , Xe = 0
          , et = []
          , st = ne.slice(0, 512);
        bl(st, 0);
        var At = f(st);
        switch (me = At[0],
        me) {
        case 3:
            xe = 512;
            break;
        case 4:
            xe = 4096;
            break;
        case 0:
            if (At[1] == 0)
                return qr(ne, we);
        default:
            throw new Error("Major Version: Expected 3 or 4 saw " + me)
        }
        xe !== 512 && (st = ne.slice(0, xe),
        bl(st, 28));

            throw new Error("# Directory Sectors: Expected 0 saw " + Jt);

        Xe = st.read_shift(4, "i"),
        Se = st.read_shift(4, "i");

        !(Ot < 0)); ++Zt)
            et[Zt] = Ot;

        y(Xe, Se, Fr, xe, et);
        var qn = N(Fr, Ze, et, xe);
        qn[Ze].name = "!Directory",
        ye > 0 && lt !== Q && (qn[lt].name = "!MiniFAT"),
        qn[et[0]].name = "!FAT",
        qn.fat_addrs = et,
        qn.ssz = xe;

          , Fs = []
          , yo = []
          , Qa = [];

            FileIndex: yo,
            FullPaths: Qa
        };
        return we && we.raw && (Zo.raw = {
            header: Vt,
            sectors: Fr
        }),
        Zo
    }
    function f(ne) {
        if (ne[ne.l] == 80 && ne[ne.l + 1] == 75)
            return [0, 0];
        ne.chk(Y, "Header Signature: "),
        ne.l += 16;
        var we = ne.read_shift(2, "u");
        return [ne.read_shift(2, "u"), we]
    }
    function g(ne, we) {
        var me = 9;
        switch (ne.l += 2,
        me = ne.read_shift(2)) {
        case 9:
            if (we != 3)
                throw new Error("Sector Shift: Expected 9 saw " + me);
            break;
        case 12:
            if (we != 4)
                throw new Error("Sector Shift: Expected 12 saw " + me);
            break;
        default:
            throw new Error("Sector Shift: Expected 9 or 12 saw " + me)
        }
        ne.chk("0600", "Mini Sector Shift: "),
        ne.chk("000000000000", "Reserved: ")
    }
    function p(ne, we) {
        for (var me = Math.ceil(ne.length / we) - 1, xe = [], ye = 1; ye < me; ++ye)
            xe[ye - 1] = ne.slice(ye * we, (ye + 1) * we);
        return xe[me - 1] = ne.slice(me * we),
        xe
    }
    function _(ne, we, me) {
        for (var xe = 0, ye = 0, Se = 0, Ze = 0, lt = 0, Xe = me.length, et = [], st = []; xe < Xe; ++xe)
            et[xe] = st[xe] = xe,

            ye = ne[xe].L,

            Ze !== -1 && (et[Ze] = xe),

            st.lastIndexOf(Se) < lt && st.push(Se));

            et[xe] === xe && (Se !== -1 && et[Se] !== Se ? et[xe] = et[Se] : ye !== -1 && et[ye] !== ye && (et[xe] = et[ye]));

                lt != et[lt])

                        lt = et[lt],
                        we[xe] = we[lt] + "/" + we[xe];
                    while (lt !== 0 && et[lt] !== -1 && lt != et[lt]);
                et[xe] = -1
            }
        for (we[0] += "/",
        xe = 1; xe < Xe; ++xe)
            ne[xe].type !== 2 && (we[xe] += "/")
    }
    function x(ne, we, me) {
        for (var xe = ne.start, ye = ne.size, Se = [], Ze = xe; me && ye > 0 && Ze >= 0; )
            Se.push(we.slice(Ze * V, Ze * V + V)),

    }
    function y(ne, we, me, xe, ye) {
        var Se = Q;
        if (ne === Q) {
            if (we !== 0)
                throw new Error("DIFAT chain shorter than expected")
        } else if (ne !== -1) {
            var Ze = me[ne]
              , lt = (xe >>> 2) - 1;
            if (!Ze)
                return;
            for (var Xe = 0; Xe < lt && (Se = am(Ze, Xe * 4)) !== Q; ++Xe)
                ye.push(Se);
            y(am(Ze, xe - 4), we - 1, me, xe, ye)
        }
    }
    function v(ne, we, me, xe, ye) {
        var Se = []
          , Ze = [];
        ye || (ye = []);
        var lt = xe - 1
          , Xe = 0
          , et = 0;

            Se[Se.length] = Xe,
            Ze.push(ne[Xe]);

            if (et = Xe * 4 & lt,
            xe < 4 + et)
                throw new Error("FAT boundary crossed: " + Xe + " 4 " + xe);
            if (!ne[st])
                break;
            Xe = am(ne[st], et)
        }
        return {
            nodes: Se,
            data: zP([Ze])
        }
    }
    function N(ne, we, me, xe) {
        var ye = ne.length
          , Se = []
          , Ze = []
          , lt = []
          , Xe = []

            Vt = st + we,

            }

    }
    function j(ne, we, me, xe, ye, Se, Ze, lt) {
        for (var Xe = 0, et = xe.length ? 2 : 0, st = we[ne].data, At = 0, Vt = 0, Jt; At < st.length; At += 128) {

        }
    }
    function E(ne, we) {

    }
    function R(ne, we) {

    function U(ne, we) {

        me || "base64") {

        case "binary":

    }
    function O(ne, we) {

          , xe = me.root || "Root Entry";

    function M(ne) {

    function T(ne, we) {
        O(ne);
        for (var me = !1, xe = !1, ye = ne.FullPaths.length - 1; ye >= 0; --ye) {
            var Se = ne.FileIndex[ye];
            switch (Se.type) {

                xe ? me = !0 : (ne.FileIndex.pop(),
                ne.FullPaths.pop());

            case 1:
            case 2:
            case 5:
                xe = !0,
                isNaN(Se.R * Se.L * Se.C) && (me = !0),

            }

                }]),

                return r(Jt[0], Ot[0])
            }),

            ne.FileIndex = [],
            ye = 0; ye < et.length; ++ye)
                ne.FullPaths[ye] = et[ye][0],
                ne.FileIndex[ye] = et[ye][1];

                  , Vt = ne.FullPaths[ye];

                At.L = At.R = At.C = -(At.color = 1),

            }
        }
    }
    function D(ne, we) {

        if (me.fileType == "mad")
            return Wo(ne, me);

        me.fileType) {
        case "zip":
            return Pr(ne, me)
        }
        var xe = function(Jt) {

                if (qn.content) {

                    ln > 0 && (ln < 4096 ? Ot += ln + 63 >> 6 : Zt += ln + 511 >> 9)
                }
            }
            for (var Fs = Jt.FullPaths.length + 3 >> 2, yo = Ot + 7 >> 3, Qa = Ot + 127 >> 7, Zo = yo + Zt + Fs + Qa, $i = Zo + 127 >> 7, wo = $i <= 109 ? 0 : Math.ceil(($i - 109) / 127); Zo + $i + wo + 127 >> 7 > $i; )

            Dr
        }(ne)

          , Se = 0

        {

            for (Se = 0; Se < 8; ++Se)
                ye.write_shift(2, 0);

            ye.write_shift(2, 3),
            ye.write_shift(2, 65534),
            ye.write_shift(2, 9),
            ye.write_shift(2, 6),
            Se = 0; Se < 3; ++Se)

            for (ye.write_shift(4, 0),
            ye.write_shift(4, xe[2]),
            ye.write_shift(4, xe[0] + xe[1] + xe[2] + xe[3] - 1),
            ye.write_shift(4, 0),
            ye.write_shift(4, 4096),
            ye.write_shift(4, xe[3] ? xe[0] + xe[1] + xe[2] - 1 : Q),
            ye.write_shift(4, xe[3]),
            ye.write_shift(-4, xe[1] ? xe[0] - 1 : Q),
            ye.write_shift(4, xe[1]),
            Se = 0; Se < 109; ++Se)
                ye.write_shift(-4, Se < xe[2] ? xe[1] + Se : -1)
        }
        if (xe[1])
            for (Ze = 0; Ze < xe[1]; ++Ze) {

                ye.write_shift(-4, Ze === xe[1] - 1 ? Q : Ze + 1)
            }
        var lt = function(Jt) {
            for (Ze += Jt; Se < Ze - 1; ++Se)
                ye.write_shift(-4, Se + 1);
            Jt && (++Se,
            ye.write_shift(-4, Q))
        };
        for (Ze = Se = 0,
        Ze += xe[1]; Se < Ze; ++Se)
            ye.write_shift(-4, G.DIFSECT);
        for (Ze += xe[2]; Se < Ze; ++Se)
            ye.write_shift(-4, G.FATSECT);

        lt(xe[4]);

            lt(et + 511 >> 9)));

        Xe = 0; Xe < ne.FileIndex.length; ++Xe)

            st.content && (et = st.content.length,
            !(!et || et >= 4096) && (st.start = Ze,
            lt(et + 63 >> 6)));
        for (; ye.l & 511; )
            ye.write_shift(-4, G.ENDOFCHAIN);
        for (Se = 0; Se < xe[4] << 2; ++Se) {

            if (!At || At.length === 0) {
                for (Xe = 0; Xe < 17; ++Xe)

            Se === 0 && (st.start = st.size ? st.start - 1 : Q);

            ye.write_shift(2, et),
            ye.write_shift(1, st.type),
            ye.write_shift(1, st.color),
            ye.write_shift(-4, st.L),
            ye.write_shift(-4, st.R),

            st.clsid)
                ye.write_shift(16, st.clsid, "hex");
            else
                for (Xe = 0; Xe < 4; ++Xe)
                    ye.write_shift(4, 0);
            ye.write_shift(4, st.state || 0),
            ye.write_shift(4, 0),
            ye.write_shift(4, 0),
            ye.write_shift(4, 0),
            ye.write_shift(4, 0),
            ye.write_shift(4, st.start),
            ye.write_shift(4, st.size),
            ye.write_shift(4, 0)
        }
        for (Se = 1; Se < ne.FileIndex.length; ++Se)
            if (st = ne.FileIndex[Se],
            st.size >= 4096)
                if (ye.l = st.start + 1 << 9,
                Un && Buffer.isBuffer(st.content))
                    st.content.copy(ye, ye.l, 0, st.size),
                    ye.l += st.size + 511 & -512;
                else {

                        ye.write_shift(1, st.content[Xe]);
                    for (; Xe & 511; ++Xe)
                        ye.write_shift(1, 0)
                }
        for (Se = 1; Se < ne.FileIndex.length; ++Se)
            if (st = ne.FileIndex[Se],
            st.size > 0 && st.size < 4096)
                if (Un && Buffer.isBuffer(st.content))
                    st.content.copy(ye, ye.l, 0, st.size),

                else {

                        ye.write_shift(1, st.content[Xe]);
                    for (; Xe & 63; ++Xe)
                        ye.write_shift(1, 0)
                }
        if (Un)
            ye.l = ye.length;
        else
            for (; ye.l < ye.length; )
                ye.write_shift(1, 0);
        return ye

    function P(ne, we) {

        if (!(t && !t[e[l][0]]) && !(PW.indexOf(e[l][0]) > -1 || kW.indexOf(e[l][0]) > -1) && e[l][1] != null) {

              , p = 0;
            if (t) {
                p = +t[e[l][0]];
                var _ = r[p];
                if (_.p == "version" && typeof g == "string") {
                    var x = g.split(".");
                    g = (+x[0] << 16) + (+x[1] || 0)
                }
                c = QP(_.t, g)
            } else {
                var y = uxe(g);
                y == -1 && (y = 31,
                g = String(g)),
                c = QP(y, g)
            }
            i.push(c),
            d = ft(8),
            d.write_shift(4, t ? p : 2 + l),
            a.push(d),
            o += 8 + c.length
        }
    var v = 8 * (i.length + 1);
    for (l = 0; l < i.length; ++l)
        a[l].write_shift(4, v),
        v += i[l].length;
    return n.write_shift(4, o),
    n.write_shift(4, i.length),
    ci([n].concat(a).concat(i))
}
function XP(e, t, r, n, a, i) {

function vxe(e) {
    var t = ft(512)
      , r = 0
      , n = e.Target;
    n.slice(0, 7) == "file://" && (n = n.slice(7));

      , i = a > -1 ? 31 : 23;
    switch (n.charAt(0)) {
    case "#":
        i = 28;
        break;
    case ".":
        i &= -3;
        break
    }
    t.write_shift(4, 2),
    t.write_shift(4, i);
    var o = [8, 6815827, 6619237, 4849780, 83];

        t.write_shift(4, o[r]);

        for (o = "03 03 00 00 00 00 00 00 c0 00 00 00 00 00 00 46".split(" "),
        r = 0; r < o.length; ++r)
            t.write_shift(1, parseInt(o[r], 16));

        t.write_shift(2, 65535),

        r = 0; r < 6; ++r)

    }

  , Gxe = function() {
    function e(i, o) {

        case "binary":

        case "buffer":

        case "array":

        }

    }
    function t(i, o) {
        for (var l = i.split(`

        B.write_shift(2, 4),
        B.write_shift(4, 0);
        for (var q = 0, K = 0, re = 0, le = 0; le < k.SheetNames.length; ++le) {
            var ke = k.SheetNames[le]
              , Ee = k.Sheets[ke];
            if (!(!Ee || !Ee["!ref"])) {
                ++re;
                var Te = zl(Ee["!ref"]);
                q < Te.e.r && (q = Te.e.r),
                K < Te.e.c && (K = Te.e.c)
            }
        }
        return q > 8191 && (q = 8191),
        B.write_shift(2, q),
        B.write_shift(1, re),
        B.write_shift(1, K),
        B.write_shift(2, 0),
        B.write_shift(2, 0),
        B.write_shift(1, 1),
        B.write_shift(1, 2),
        B.write_shift(4, 0),
        B.write_shift(4, 0),
        B
    }
    function l(k, B, q) {
        var K = {
            s: {
                c: 0,
                r: 0
            },
            e: {
                c: 0,
                r: 0
            }
        };
        return B == 8 && q.qpro ? (K.s.c = k.read_shift(1),
        k.l++,
        K.s.r = k.read_shift(2),
        K.e.c = k.read_shift(1),
        k.l++,
        K.e.r = k.read_shift(2),
        K) : (K.s.c = k.read_shift(2),
        K.s.r = k.read_shift(2),
        B == 12 && q.qpro && (k.l += 2),
        K.e.c = k.read_shift(2),
        K.e.r = k.read_shift(2),
        B == 12 && q.qpro && (k.l += 2),
        K.s.c == 65535 && (K.s.c = K.e.c = K.s.r = K.e.r = 0),
        K)
    }
    function c(k) {
        var B = ft(8);
        return B.write_shift(2, k.s.c),
        B.write_shift(2, k.s.r),
        B.write_shift(2, k.e.c),
        B.write_shift(2, k.e.r),
        B
    }
    function d(k, B, q) {
        var K = [{
            c: 0,
            r: 0
        }, {
            t: "n",
            v: 0
        }, 0, 0];
        return q.qpro && q.vers != 20768 ? (K[0].c = k.read_shift(1),
        K[3] = k.read_shift(1),
        K[0].r = k.read_shift(2),
        k.l += 2) : (K[2] = k.read_shift(1),
        K[0].c = k.read_shift(2),
        K[0].r = k.read_shift(2)),
        K
    }
    function h(k, B, q) {
        var K = k.l + B
          , re = d(k, B, q);
        if (re[1].t = "s",
        q.vers == 20768) {
            k.l++;
            var le = k.read_shift(1);
            return re[1].v = k.read_shift(le, "utf8"),
            re
        }
        return q.qpro && k.l++,
        re[1].v = k.read_shift(K - k.l, "cstr"),
        re
    }
    function f(k, B, q) {
        var K = ft(7 + q.length);
        K.write_shift(1, 255),
        K.write_shift(2, B),
        K.write_shift(2, k),
        K.write_shift(1, 39);
        for (var re = 0; re < K.length; ++re) {
            var le = q.charCodeAt(re);
            K.write_shift(1, le >= 128 ? 95 : le)
        }
        return K.write_shift(1, 0),
        K
    }
    function g(k, B, q) {
        var K = d(k, B, q);
        return K[1].v = k.read_shift(2, "i"),
        K
    }
    function p(k, B, q) {
        var K = ft(7);
        return K.write_shift(1, 255),
        K.write_shift(2, B),
        K.write_shift(2, k),
        K.write_shift(2, q, "i"),
        K
    }
    function _(k, B, q) {
        var K = d(k, B, q);
        return K[1].v = k.read_shift(8, "f"),
        K
    }
    function x(k, B, q) {
        var K = ft(13);
        return K.write_shift(1, 255),
        K.write_shift(2, B),
        K.write_shift(2, k),
        K.write_shift(8, q, "f"),
        K
    }
    function y(k, B, q) {
        var K = k.l + B
          , re = d(k, B, q);
        if (re[1].v = k.read_shift(8, "f"),
        q.qpro)
            k.l = K;
        else {
            var le = k.read_shift(2);
            E(k.slice(k.l, k.l + le), re),
            k.l += le
        }
        return re
    }
    function v(k, B, q) {
        var K = B & 32768;
        return B &= -32769,
        B = (K ? k : 0) + (B >= 8192 ? B - 16384 : B),
        (K ? "" : "$") + (q ? Ii(B) : xi(B))
    }
    var N = {
        51: ["FALSE", 0],
        52: ["TRUE", 0],
        70: ["LEN", 1],
        80: ["SUM", 69],
        81: ["AVERAGEA", 69],
        82: ["COUNTA", 69],
        83: ["MINA", 69],
        84: ["MAXA", 69],
        111: ["T", 1]
    }
      , j = ["", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "+", "-", "*", "/", "^", "=", "<>", "<=", ">=", "<", ">", "", "", "", "", "&", "", "", "", "", "", "", ""];
    function E(k, B) {
        bl(k, 0);
        for (var q = [], K = 0, re = "", le = "", ke = "", Ee = ""; k.l < k.length; ) {
            var Te = k[k.l++];
            switch (Te) {
            case 0:
                q.push(k.read_shift(8, "f"));
                break;
            case 1:
                le = v(B[0].c, k.read_shift(2), !0),
                re = v(B[0].r, k.read_shift(2), !1),
                q.push(le + re);
                break;
            case 2:
                {
                    var qe = v(B[0].c, k.read_shift(2), !0)
                      , ve = v(B[0].r, k.read_shift(2), !1);
                    le = v(B[0].c, k.read_shift(2), !0),
                    re = v(B[0].r, k.read_shift(2), !1),
                    q.push(qe + ve + ":" + le + re)
                }
                break;
            case 3:
                if (k.l < k.length) {
                    console.error("WK1 premature formula end");
                    return
                }
                break;
            case 4:
                q.push("(" + q.pop() + ")");
                break;
            case 5:
                q.push(k.read_shift(2));
                break;
            case 6:
                {
                    for (var ce = ""; Te = k[k.l++]; )
                        ce += String.fromCharCode(Te);
                    q.push('"' + ce.replace(/"/g, '""') + '"')
                }
                break;
            case 8:
                q.push("-" + q.pop());
                break;
            case 23:
                q.push("+" + q.pop());
                break;
            case 22:
                q.push("NOT(" + q.pop() + ")");
                break;
            case 20:
            case 21:
                Ee = q.pop(),
                ke = q.pop(),
                q.push(["AND", "OR"][Te - 20] + "(" + ke + "," + Ee + ")");
                break;
            default:
                if (Te < 32 && j[Te])
                    Ee = q.pop(),
                    ke = q.pop(),
                    q.push(ke + j[Te] + Ee);
                else if (N[Te]) {
                    if (K = N[Te][1],
                    K == 69 && (K = k[k.l++]),
                    K > q.length) {
                        console.error("WK1 bad formula parse 0x" + Te.toString(16) + ":|" + q.join("|") + "|");
                        return
                    }
                    var Ae = q.slice(-K);
                    q.length -= K,
                    q.push(N[Te][0] + "(" + Ae.join(",") + ")")
                } else
                    return Te <= 7 ? console.error("WK1 invalid opcode " + Te.toString(16)) : Te <= 24 ? console.error("WK1 unsupported op " + Te.toString(16)) : Te <= 30 ? console.error("WK1 invalid opcode " + Te.toString(16)) : Te <= 115 ? console.error("WK1 unsupported function opcode " + Te.toString(16)) : console.error("WK1 unrecognized opcode " + Te.toString(16))
            }
        }
        q.length == 1 ? B[1].f = "" + q[0] : console.error("WK1 bad formula parse |" + q.join("|") + "|")
    }
    function R(k) {
        var B = [{
            c: 0,
            r: 0
        }, {
            t: "n",
            v: 0
        }, 0];
        return B[0].r = k.read_shift(2),
        B[3] = k[k.l++],
        B[0].c = k[k.l++],
        B
    }
    function U(k, B) {
        var q = R(k);
        return q[1].t = "s",
        q[1].v = k.read_shift(B - 4, "cstr"),
        q
    }
    function O(k, B, q, K) {
        var re = ft(6 + K.length);
        re.write_shift(2, k),
        re.write_shift(1, q),
        re.write_shift(1, B),
        re.write_shift(1, 39);
        for (var le = 0; le < K.length; ++le) {
            var ke = K.charCodeAt(le);
            re.write_shift(1, ke >= 128 ? 95 : ke)
        }
        return re.write_shift(1, 0),
        re
    }
    function M(k, B) {
        var q = R(k);
        q[1].v = k.read_shift(2);
        var K = q[1].v >> 1;
        if (q[1].v & 1)
            switch (K & 7) {
            case 0:
                K = (K >> 3) * 5e3;
                break;
            case 1:
                K = (K >> 3) * 500;
                break;
            case 2:
                K = (K >> 3) / 20;
                break;
            case 3:
                K = (K >> 3) / 200;
                break;
            case 4:
                K = (K >> 3) / 2e3;
                break;
            case 5:
                K = (K >> 3) / 2e4;
                break;
            case 6:
                K = (K >> 3) / 16;
                break;
            case 7:
                K = (K >> 3) / 64;
                break
            }
        return q[1].v = K,
        q
    }
    function T(k, B) {
        var q = R(k)
          , K = k.read_shift(4)
          , re = k.read_shift(4)
          , le = k.read_shift(2);
        if (le == 65535)
            return K === 0 && re === 3221225472 ? (q[1].t = "e",
            q[1].v = 15) : K === 0 && re === 3489660928 ? (q[1].t = "e",
            q[1].v = 42) : q[1].v = 0,
            q;
        var ke = le & 32768;
        return le = (le & 32767) - 16446,
        q[1].v = (1 - ke * 2) * (re * Math.pow(2, le + 32) + K * Math.pow(2, le)),
        q
    }
    function D(k, B, q, K) {
        var re = ft(14);
        if (re.write_shift(2, k),
        re.write_shift(1, q),
        re.write_shift(1, B),
        K == 0)
            return re.write_shift(4, 0),
            re.write_shift(4, 0),
            re.write_shift(2, 65535),
            re;
        var le = 0
          , ke = 0
          , Ee = 0
          , Te = 0;
        return K < 0 && (le = 1,
        K = -K),
        ke = Math.log2(K) | 0,
        K /= Math.pow(2, ke - 31),
        Te = K >>> 0,
        Te & 2147483648 || (K /= 2,
        ++ke,
        Te = K >>> 0),
        K -= Te,
        Te |= 2147483648,
        Te >>>= 0,
        K *= Math.pow(2, 32),
        Ee = K >>> 0,
        re.write_shift(4, Ee),
        re.write_shift(4, Te),
        ke += 16383 + (le ? 32768 : 0),
        re.write_shift(2, ke),
        re
    }
    function P(k, B) {
        var q = T(k);
        return k.l += B - 14,
        q
    }
    function V(k, B) {
        var q = R(k)
          , K = k.read_shift(4);
        return q[1].v = K >> 6,

    }
    function Q(k, B) {
        var q = R(k)
          , K = k.read_shift(8, "f");
        return q[1].v = K,
        q
    }
    function Y(k, B) {
        var q = Q(k);
        return k.l += B - 10,
        q
    }
    function H(k, B) {
        return k[k.l + B - 1] == 0 ? k.read_shift(B, "cstr") : ""
    }
    function te(k, B) {
        var q = k[k.l++];
        q > B - 1 && (q = B - 1);
        for (var K = ""; K.length < q; )
            K += String.fromCharCode(k[k.l++]);
        return K
    }
    function G(k, B, q) {
        if (!(!q.qpro || B < 21)) {
            var K = k.read_shift(1);
            k.l += 17,
            k.l += 1,
            k.l += 2;
            var re = k.read_shift(B - 21, "cstr");
            return [K, re]
        }
    }
    function z(k, B) {
        for (var q = {}, K = k.l + B; k.l < K; ) {
            var re = k.read_shift(2);
            if (re == 14e3) {
                for (q[re] = [0, ""],
                q[re][0] = k.read_shift(2); k[k.l]; )
                    q[re][1] += String.fromCharCode(k[k.l]),
                    k.l++;
                k.l++
            }
        }
        return q
    }
    function de(k, B) {
        var q = ft(5 + k.length);
        q.write_shift(2, 14e3),
        q.write_shift(2, B);
        for (var K = 0; K < k.length; ++K) {
            var re = k.charCodeAt(K);
            q[q.l++] = re > 127 ? 95 : re
        }
        return q[q.l++] = 0,
        q
    }

function Qge(e, t, r) {
    var n = r && r.biff ? r.biff : 8;
    if (n >= 2 && n <= 5)
        return Yge(e);

      , i = e.read_shift(2)
      , o = (i & 16384) >> 14
      , l = (i & 32768) >> 15;

    l == 1)
        for (; a > 524287; )
            a -= 1048576;

        for (; i > 8191; )
            i = i - 16384;
    return {
        r: a,
        c: i,
        cRel: o,
        rRel: l
    }
}
function Yge(e) {

    a == 1 && r >= 128 && (r = r - 256),

        rRel: n
    }

function jve(e, t) {
    var r = [e.read_shift(1)];
    if (t == 12)
        switch (r[0]) {
        case 2:
            r[0] = 4;
            break;
        case 4:
            r[0] = 16;
            break;
        case 0:
            r[0] = 1;
            break;
        case 1:
            r[0] = 2;
            break
        }
    switch (r[0]) {
    case 4:
        r[1] = fxe(e, 1) ? "TRUE" : "FALSE",
        t != 12 && (e.l += 7);
        break;
    case 37:
    case 16:
        r[1] = ry[e[e.l]],
        e.l += t == 12 ? 4 : 8;
        break;
    case 0:
        e.l += 8;
        break;
    case 1:
        r[1] = Qx(e);
        break;
    case 2:
        r[1] = gxe(e, 0, {
            biff: t > 0 && t < 8 ? 2 : t
        });
        break;
    default:
        throw new Error("Bad SerAr: " + r[0])
    }
    return r
}

function n1e(e, t, r, n) {
    if (n.biff < 8)
        return iu(e, t);
    for (var a = e.l + t, i = [], o = 0; o !== r.length; ++o)
        switch (r[o][0]) {
        case "PtgArray":
            r[o][1] = Cve(e, 0, n),
            i.push(r[o][1]);
            break;
        case "PtgMemArea":
            r[o][2] = Sve(e, r[o][1], n),
            i.push(r[o][2]);
            break;
        case "PtgExp":
            n && n.biff == 12 && (r[o][1][1] = e.read_shift(4),
            i.push(r[o][1]));
            break;
        case "PtgList":
        case "PtgElfRadicalS":
        case "PtgElfColS":
        case "PtgElfColSV":
            throw "Unsupported " + r[o][0]
        }
    return t = a - e.l,
    t !== 0 && i.push(iu(e, t)),
    i
}
function s1e(e, t, r) {
    for (var n = e.l + t, a, i, o = []; n != e.l; )
        t = n - e.l,
        i = e[e.l],
        a = aL[i] || aL[e1e[i]],
        (i === 24 || i === 25) && (a = (i === 24 ? t1e : r1e)[e[e.l + 1]]),
        !a || !a.f ? iu(e, t) : o.push([a.n, a.f(e, t, r)]);
    return o
}
function a1e(e) {
    for (var t = [], r = 0; r < e.length; ++r) {
        for (var n = e[r], a = [], i = 0; i < n.length; ++i) {
            var o = n[i];
            if (o)
                switch (o[0]) {
                case 2:
                    a.push('"' + o[1].replace(/"/g, '""') + '"');
                    break;
                default:
                    a.push(o[1])
                }
            else
                a.push("")
        }
        t.push(a.join(","))
    }
    return t.join(";")
}

    PtgMul: "*",
    PtgNe: "<>",
    PtgPower: "^",
    PtgSub: "-"
};
function o1e(e, t) {
    if (!e && !(t && t.biff <= 5 && t.biff >= 2))
        throw new Error("empty sheet name");
    return /[^\w\u4E00-\u9FFF\u3040-\u30FF]/.test(e) ? "'" + e + "'" : e
}
function eG(e, t, r) {
    if (!e)
        return "SH33TJSERR0";
    if (r.biff > 8 && (!e.XTI || !e.XTI[t]))
        return e.SheetNames[t];
    if (!e.XTI)
        return "SH33TJSERR6";
    var n = e.XTI[t];
    if (r.biff < 8)
        return t > 1e4 && (t -= 65536),
        t < 0 && (t = -t),
        t == 0 ? "" : e.XTI[t - 1];
    if (!n)
        return "SH33TJSERR1";
    var a = "";
    if (r.biff > 8)
        switch (e[n[0]][0]) {
        case 357:
            return a = n[1] == -1 ? "#REF" : e.SheetNames[n[1]],
            n[1] == n[2] ? a : a + ":" + e.SheetNames[n[2]];
        case 358:
            return r.SID != null ? e.SheetNames[r.SID] : "SH33TJSSAME" + e[n[0]][0];
        case 355:
        default:
            return "SH33TJSSRC" + e[n[0]][0]
        }
    switch (e[n[0]][0][0]) {
    case 1025:
        return a = n[1] == -1 ? "#REF" : e.SheetNames[n[1]] || "SH33TJSERR3",
        n[1] == n[2] ? a : a + ":" + e.SheetNames[n[2]];
    case 14849:
        return e[n[0]].slice(1).map(function(i) {
            return i.Name
        }).join(";;");
    default:
        return e[n[0]][0][3] ? (a = n[1] == -1 ? "#REF" : e[n[0]][0][3][n[1]] || "SH33TJSERR4",
        n[1] == n[2] ? a : a + ":" + e[n[0]][0][3][n[2]]) : "SH33TJSERR2"
    }
}
function iL(e, t, r) {
    var n = eG(e, t, r);
    return n == "#REF" ? n : o1e(n, r)
}
function yx(e, t, r, n, a) {
    var i = a && a.biff || 8, o = {
        s: {
            c: 0,
            r: 0
        },
        e: {
            c: 0,
            r: 0
        }
    }, l = [], c, d, h, f = 0, g = 0, p, _ = "";
    if (!e[0] || !e[0][0])
        return "";
    for (var x = -1, y = "", v = 0, N = e[0].length; v < N; ++v) {
        var j = e[0][v];
        switch (j[0]) {
        case "PtgUminus":
            l.push("-" + l.pop());
            break;
        case "PtgUplus":
            l.push("+" + l.pop());
            break;
        case "PtgPercent":
            l.push(l.pop() + "%");
            break;
        case "PtgAdd":
        case "PtgConcat":
        case "PtgDiv":
        case "PtgEq":
        case "PtgGe":
        case "PtgGt":
        case "PtgLe":
        case "PtgLt":
        case "PtgMul":
        case "PtgNe":
        case "PtgPower":
        case "PtgSub":
            if (c = l.pop(),
            d = l.pop(),
            x >= 0) {
                switch (e[0][x][1][0]) {
                case 0:
                    y = Xs(" ", e[0][x][1][1]);
                    break;
                case 1:
                    y = Xs("\r", e[0][x][1][1]);
                    break;
                default:
                    if (y = "",
                    a.WTF)
                        throw new Error("Unexpected PtgAttrSpaceType " + e[0][x][1][0])
                }
                d = d + y,
                x = -1
            }
            l.push(d + i1e[j[0]] + c);
            break;
        case "PtgIsect":
            c = l.pop(),
            d = l.pop(),
            l.push(d + " " + c);
            break;
        case "PtgUnion":
            c = l.pop(),
            d = l.pop(),
            l.push(d + "," + c);
            break;
        case "PtgRange":
            c = l.pop(),
            d = l.pop(),
            l.push(d + ":" + c);
            break;
        case "PtgAttrChoose":
            break;
        case "PtgAttrGoto":
            break;
        case "PtgAttrIf":
            break;
        case "PtgAttrIfError":
            break;
        case "PtgRef":
            h = pv(j[1][1], o, a),
            l.push(xv(h, i));
            break;
        case "PtgRefN":
            h = r ? pv(j[1][1], r, a) : j[1][1],
            l.push(xv(h, i));
            break;
        case "PtgRef3d":
            f = j[1][1],
            h = pv(j[1][2], o, a),
            _ = iL(n, f, a),
            l.push(_ + "!" + xv(h, i));
            break;
        case "PtgFunc":
        case "PtgFuncVar":
            var E = j[1][0]
              , R = j[1][1];
            E || (E = 0),
            E &= 127;
            var U = E == 0 ? [] : l.slice(-E);
            l.length -= E,
            R === "User" && (R = U.shift()),
            l.push(R + "(" + U.join(",") + ")");
            break;
        case "PtgBool":
            l.push(j[1] ? "TRUE" : "FALSE");
            break;
        case "PtgInt":
            l.push(j[1]);
            break;
        case "PtgNum":
            l.push(String(j[1]));
            break;
        case "PtgStr":
            l.push('"' + j[1].replace(/"/g, '""') + '"');
            break;
        case "PtgErr":
            l.push(j[1]);
            break;
        case "PtgAreaN":
            p = qP(j[1][1], r ? {
                s: r
            } : o, a),
            l.push(Hj(p, a));
            break;
        case "PtgArea":
            p = qP(j[1][1], o, a),
            l.push(Hj(p, a));
            break;
        case "PtgArea3d":
            f = j[1][1],
            p = j[1][2],
            _ = iL(n, f, a),
            l.push(_ + "!" + Hj(p, a));
            break;
        case "PtgAttrSum":
            l.push("SUM(" + l.pop() + ")");
            break;
        case "PtgAttrBaxcel":
        case "PtgAttrSemi":
            break;
        case "PtgName":
            g = j[1][2];
            var O = (n.names || [])[g - 1] || (n[0] || [])[g]
              , M = O ? O.Name : "SH33TJSNAME" + String(g);
            M && M.slice(0, 6) == "_xlfn." && !a.xlfn && (M = M.slice(6)),
            l.push(M);
            break;
        case "PtgNameX":
            var T = j[1][1];
            g = j[1][2];
            var D;
            if (a.biff <= 5)
                T < 0 && (T = -T),
                n[T] && (D = n[T][g]);
            else {
                var P = "";
                if (((n[T] || [])[0] || [])[0] == 14849 || (((n[T] || [])[0] || [])[0] == 1025 ? n[T][g] && n[T][g].itab > 0 && (P = n.SheetNames[n[T][g].itab - 1] + "!") : P = n.SheetNames[g - 1] + "!"),
                n[T] && n[T][g])
                    P += n[T][g].Name;
                else if (n[0] && n[0][g])
                    P += n[0][g].Name;
                else {
                    var V = (eG(n, T, a) || "").split(";;");
                    V[g - 1] ? P = V[g - 1] : P += "SH33TJSERRX"
                }
                l.push(P);
                break
            }
            D || (D = {
                Name: "SH33TJSERRY"
            }),
            l.push(D.Name);
            break;
        case "PtgParen":
            var Q = "("
              , Y = ")";
            if (x >= 0) {
                switch (y = "",
                e[0][x][1][0]) {
                case 2:
                    Q = Xs(" ", e[0][x][1][1]) + Q;
                    break;
                case 3:
                    Q = Xs("\r", e[0][x][1][1]) + Q;
                    break;
                case 4:
                    Y = Xs(" ", e[0][x][1][1]) + Y;
                    break;
                case 5:
                    Y = Xs("\r", e[0][x][1][1]) + Y;
                    break;
                default:
                    if (a.WTF)
                        throw new Error("Unexpected PtgAttrSpaceType " + e[0][x][1][0])
                }
                x = -1
            }
            l.push(Q + l.pop() + Y);
            break;
        case "PtgRefErr":
            l.push("#REF!");
            break;
        case "PtgRefErr3d":
            l.push("#REF!");
            break;
        case "PtgExp":
            h = {
                c: j[1][1],
                r: j[1][0]
            };
            var H = {
                c: r.c,
                r: r.r
            };
            if (n.sharedf[is(h)]) {
                var te = n.sharedf[is(h)];
                l.push(yx(te, o, H, n, a))
            } else {
                var G = !1;
                for (c = 0; c != n.arrayf.length; ++c)
                    if (d = n.arrayf[c],
                    !(h.c < d[0].s.c || h.c > d[0].e.c) && !(h.r < d[0].s.r || h.r > d[0].e.r)) {
                        l.push(yx(d[1], o, H, n, a)),
                        G = !0;
                        break
                    }
                G || l.push(j[1])
            }
            break;
        case "PtgArray":
            l.push("{" + a1e(j[1]) + "}");
            break;
        case "PtgMemArea":
            break;
        case "PtgAttrSpace":
        case "PtgAttrSpaceSemi":
            x = v;
            break;
        case "PtgTbl":
            break;
        case "PtgMemErr":
            break;
        case "PtgMissArg":
            l.push("");
            break;
        case "PtgAreaErr":
            l.push("#REF!");
            break;
        case "PtgAreaErr3d":
            l.push("#REF!");
            break;
        case "PtgList":
            l.push("Table" + j[1].idx + "[#" + j[1].rt + "]");
            break;
        case "PtgMemAreaN":
        case "PtgMemNoMemN":
        case "PtgAttrNoop":
        case "PtgSheet":
        case "PtgEndSheet":
            break;
        case "PtgMemFunc":
            break;
        case "PtgMemNoMem":
            break;
        case "PtgElfCol":
        case "PtgElfColS":
        case "PtgElfColSV":
        case "PtgElfColV":
        case "PtgElfLel":
        case "PtgElfRadical":
        case "PtgElfRadicalLel":
        case "PtgElfRadicalS":
        case "PtgElfRw":
        case "PtgElfRwV":
            throw new Error("Unsupported ELFs");
        case "PtgSxName":
            throw new Error("Unrecognized Formula Token: " + String(j));
        default:
            throw new Error("Unrecognized Formula Token: " + String(j))
        }
        var z = ["PtgAttrSpace", "PtgAttrSpaceSemi", "PtgAttrGoto"];
        if (a.biff != 3 && x >= 0 && z.indexOf(e[0][v][0]) == -1) {
            j = e[0][x];
            var de = !0;
            switch (j[1][0]) {
            case 4:
                de = !1;
            case 0:
                y = Xs(" ", j[1][1]);
                break;
            case 5:
                de = !1;
            case 1:
                y = Xs("\r", j[1][1]);
                break;
            default:
                if (y = "",
                a.WTF)
                    throw new Error("Unexpected PtgAttrSpaceType " + j[1][0])
            }
            l.push((de ? y : "") + l.pop() + (de ? "" : y)),
            x = -1
        }
    }
    if (l.length > 1 && a.WTF)
        throw new Error("bad formula stack");
    return l[0]
}
function l1e(e) {
    if (e == null) {
        var t = ft(8);
        return t.write_shift(1, 3),
        t.write_shift(1, 0),
        t.write_shift(2, 0),
        t.write_shift(2, 0),
        t.write_shift(2, 65535),
        t
    } else if (typeof e == "number")
        return np(e);
    return np(0)
}
function c1e(e, t, r, n, a) {
    var i = sp(t, r, a)
      , o = l1e(e.v)
      , l = ft(6)
      , c = 33;
    l.write_shift(2, c),
    l.write_shift(4, 0);
    for (var d = ft(e.bf.length), h = 0; h < e.bf.length; ++h)
        d[h] = e.bf[h];
    var f = ci([i, o, l, d]);
    return f
}
function qb(e, t, r) {
    var n = e.read_shift(4)
      , a = s1e(e, n, r)
      , i = e.read_shift(4)
      , o = i > 0 ? n1e(e, i, a, r) : null;
    return [a, o]
}

function p1e(e) {
    var t = "of:=" + e.replace(gE, "$1[.$2$3$4$5]").replace(/\]:\[/g, ":");
    return t.replace(/;/g, "|").replace(/,/g, ";")
}
function x1e(e) {
    return e.replace(/\./, "!")
}
var gv = typeof Map < "u";
function wE(e, t, r) {
    var n = 0
      , a = e.length;
    if (r) {
        if (gv ? r.has(t) : Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(r, t)) {
            for (var i = gv ? r.get(t) : r[t]; n < i.length; ++n)
                if (e[i[n]].t === t)
                    return e.Count++,
                    i[n]
        }
    } else
        for (; n < a; ++n)
            if (e[n].t === t)
                return e.Count++,
                n;
    return e[a] = {
        t
    },
    e.Count++,
    e.Unique++,
    r && (gv ? (r.has(t) || r.set(t, []),
    r.get(t).push(a)) : (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(r, t) || (r[t] = []),
    r[t].push(a))),
    a
}
function Wb(e, t) {
    var r = {
        min: e + 1,
        max: e + 1
    }

function y2e(e, t, r, n, a, i, o) {

function _2e(e, t, r, n) {

                if (!(i[o].s.c > f) && !(i[o].s.r > d) && !(i[o].e.c < f) && !(i[o].e.r < d)) {
                    (i[o].s.c != f || i[o].s.r != d) && (g = !0);

                    c: f

            }
        }

}

function qt(e, t, r, n) {
    var a = t;
    if (!isNaN(a)) {
        var i = n || (r || []).length || 0
          , o = e.next(4);
        o.write_shift(2, a),
        o.write_shift(2, i),
        i > 0 && cE(r) && e.push(r)
    }
}
function E2e(e, t, r, n) {
    var a = (r || []).length || 0;
    if (a <= 8224)
        return qt(e, t, r, a);
    var i = t;
    if (!isNaN(i)) {
        for (var o = r.parts || [], l = 0, c = 0, d = 0; d + (o[l] || 8224) <= 8224; )
            d += o[l] || 8224,
            l++;
        var h = e.next(4);
        for (h.write_shift(2, i),
        h.write_shift(2, d),
        e.push(r.slice(c, c + d)),
        c += d; c < a; ) {
            for (h = e.next(4),
            h.write_shift(2, 60),
            d = 0; d + (o[l] || 8224) <= 8224; )
                d += o[l] || 8224,
                l++;
            h.write_shift(2, d),
            e.push(r.slice(c, c + d)),
            c += d
        }
    }
}
function sy(e, t, r) {
    return e || (e = ft(7)),
    e.write_shift(2, t),
    e.write_shift(2, r),
    e.write_shift(2, 0),
    e.write_shift(1, 0),
    e
}
function k2e(e, t, r, n) {
    var a = ft(9);
    return sy(a, e, t),
    FW(r, n || "b", a),
    a
}
function T2e(e, t, r) {
    var n = ft(8 + 2 * r.length);
    return sy(n, e, t),
    n.write_shift(1, r.length),
    n.write_shift(r.length, r, "sbcs"),
    n.l < n.length ? n.slice(0, n.l) : n
}

function X2e(e, t, r) {

function v1(e, t) {

function es(e) {

function Oa(e) {

}

function J2e(e, t) {
    if (e != 0)
        throw new Error("Unexpected Snappy chunk type ".concat(e));
    for (var r = [0], n = v1(t, r), a = []; r[0] < t.length; ) {
        var i = t[r[0]] & 3;
        if (i == 0) {
            var o = t[r[0]++] >> 2;
            if (o < 60)
                ++o;
            else {
                var l = o - 59;
                o = t[r[0]],
                l > 1 && (o |= t[r[0] + 1] << 8),
                l > 2 && (o |= t[r[0] + 2] << 16),
                l > 3 && (o |= t[r[0] + 3] << 24),
                o >>>= 0,
                o++,
                r[0] += l
            }
            a.push(t.slice(r[0], r[0] + o)),
            r[0] += o;
            continue
        } else {
            var c = 0
              , d = 0;
            if (i == 1 ? (d = (t[r[0]] >> 2 & 7) + 4,
            c = (t[r[0]++] & 224) << 3,
            c |= t[r[0]++]) : (d = (t[r[0]++] >> 2) + 1,
            i == 2 ? (c = t[r[0]] | t[r[0] + 1] << 8,
            r[0] += 2) : (c = (t[r[0]] | t[r[0] + 1] << 8 | t[r[0] + 2] << 16 | t[r[0] + 3] << 24) >>> 0,
            r[0] += 4)),
            a = [Tf(a)],
            c == 0)
                throw new Error("Invalid offset 0");
            if (c > a[0].length)
                throw new Error("Invalid offset beyond length");
            if (d >= c)
                for (a.push(a[0].slice(-c)),
                d -= c; d >= a[a.length - 1].length; )
                    a.push(a[a.length - 1]),
                    d -= a[a.length - 1].length;
            a.push(a[0].slice(-c, -c + d))
        }
    }
    var h = Tf(a);
    if (h.length != n)
        throw new Error("Unexpected length: ".concat(h.length, " != ").concat(n));
    return h
}
function zc(e) {

}
function zp(e) {

function Kj(e, t) {

}

function ewe(e, t, r) {

        throw "Mutation only works on post-BNC storages!";

    if (l)
        throw "Math only works with normal offsets";
    for (var c = 0, d = T_(e[7][0].data), h = 0, f = [], g = T_(e[4][0].data), p = 0, _ = [], x = 0; x < t.length; ++x) {
        if (t[x] == null) {
            d.setUint16(x * 2, 65535, !0),
            g.setUint16(x * 2, 65535);
            continue
        }
        d.setUint16(x * 2, h, !0),
        g.setUint16(x * 2, p, !0);
        var y, v;
        switch (typeof t[x]) {
        case "string":

                t: "s",
                v: t[x]
            }, r),

                t: "s",
                v: t[x]
            }, r);

                t: "n",
                v: t[x]
            }, r),
            v = Qj({
                t: "n",
                v: t[x]
            }, r);
            break;

                t: "b",
                v: t[x]
            }, r),
            v = Qj({
                t: "b",
                v: t[x]
            }, r);

function iwe(e, t) {
    var r = "";
    switch ((t || {}).type || "base64") {
    case "buffer":
        return [e[0], e[1], e[2], e[3], e[4], e[5], e[6], e[7]];
    case "base64":
        r = Ju(e.slice(0, 12));
        break;
    case "binary":
        r = e;
        break;
    case "array":
        return [e[0], e[1], e[2], e[3], e[4], e[5], e[6], e[7]];
    default:
        throw new Error("Unrecognized type " + (t && t.type || "undefined"))
    }
    return [r.charCodeAt(0), r.charCodeAt(1), r.charCodeAt(2), r.charCodeAt(3), r.charCodeAt(4), r.charCodeAt(5), r.charCodeAt(6), r.charCodeAt(7)]
}
function fG(e, t) {
    switch (t.type) {
    case "base64":
    case "binary":
        break;
    case "buffer":
    case "array":
        t.type = "";
        break;
    case "file":
        return ey(t.file, cs.write(e, {
            type: Un ? "buffer" : ""
        }));
    case "string":
        throw new Error("'string' output type invalid for '" + t.bookType + "' files");
    default:
        throw new Error("Unrecognized type " + t.type)
    }
    return cs.write(e, t)
}
function owe(e, t) {
    var r = Vo(t || {})
      , n = nwe(e, r);
    return lwe(n, r)
}
function lwe(e, t) {
    var r = {}
      , n = Un ? "nodebuffer" : typeof Uint8Array < "u" ? "array" : "string";
    if (t.compression && (r.compression = "DEFLATE"),
    t.password)
        r.type = n;
    else
        switch (t.type) {
        case "base64":
            r.type = "base64";
            break;
        case "binary":
            r.type = "string";
            break;
        case "string":
            throw new Error("'string' output type invalid for '" + t.bookType + "' files");
        case "buffer":
        case "file":
            r.type = n;
            break;
        default:
            throw new Error("Unrecognized type " + t.type)
        }
    var a = e.FullPaths ? cs.write(e, {
        fileType: "zip",
        type: {
            nodebuffer: "buffer",
            string: "binary"
        }[r.type] || r.type,
        compression: !!t.compression

                    }

                const fe = new URLSearchParams({
                    startDate: o,

                    limit: "1000"

        if (!ce)
            return "-";

        return Ae.length === 11 ? ke(Ae) : Ae.length === 14 ? Ee(Ae) : ce
    }

                                    }), ce.saleValue && s.jsxs("div", {

                                        children: [s.jsx(mi, {
                                            className: "h-4 w-4 text-green-600"
                                        }), s.jsx("span", {
                                            className: "font-semibold text-green-600",
                                            children: le(ce.saleValue)
                                        })]
                                    })]
                                }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                    className: "flex flex-col items-end space-y-2",
                                    children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                                        className: "flex items-center space-x-2",
                                        children: [ce.status === "pending" && s.jsxs(s.Fragment, {
                                            children: [s.jsx(je, {
                                                size: "sm",
                                                variant: "outline",
                                                onClick: fe => {
                                                    fe.stopPropagation(),
                                                    se(ce)
                                                }
                                                ,
                                                "data-testid": `button-finalize-${ce.id}`,
                                                children: "Finalizar Venda"
                                            }), s.jsx(je, {
                                                size: "sm",
                                                variant: "outline",
                                                onClick: fe => {
                                                    fe.stopPropagation(),
                                                    k(ce)
                                                }
                                                ,
                                                className: "text-red-600 hover:text-red-700",
                                                "data-testid": `button-no-sale-${ce.id}`,
                                                children: "Não Vendeu"
                                            })]
                                        }), ce.status === "in_progress" && s.jsx(je, {
                                            size: "sm",
                                            className: "bg-blue-500 hover:bg-blue-600",
                                            onClick: fe => {
                                                fe.stopPropagation(),
                                                se(ce)
                                            }
                                            ,
                                            "data-testid": `button-continue-${ce.id}`,
                                            children: "Continuar Venda"
                                        })]
                                    }), e && ["admin", "coordinator", "administrative"].includes(e.role) && ce.customer.isActive && s.jsxs(je, {
                                        size: "sm",
                                        variant: "ghost",
                                        onClick: fe => {
                                            fe.stopPropagation(),
                                            q(ce)
                                        }
                                        ,
                                        className: "text-orange-600 hover:text-orange-700 hover:bg-orange-50",
                                        "data-testid": `button-inactivate-customer-${ce.id}`,
                                        children: [s.jsx(_S, {
                                            className: "h-4 w-4 mr-1"
                                        }), "Inativar Cliente"]
                                    })]
                                })]
                            })
                        }, ce.id)
                    }
                    )
                })
            })]
        }), s.jsx(J3, {
            isOpen: _,
            onClose: K,
            card: g,
            onStartSale: se,
            onStartNoSale: k
        }), s.jsx(fH, {
            isOpen: y,
            onClose: K,
            card: g
        }), s.jsx(mH, {
            isOpen: N,
            onClose: K,
            card: g
        }), s.jsx(Dpe, {
            isOpen: E,
            onClose: K,
            customer: M
        }), s.jsx(Ope, {
            isOpen: U,
            onClose: K,
            card: g
        })]
    })
}
function yG() {
    var Q, Y;

      , [r,n] = C.useState(null)

      , [o,l] = C.useState(null)
      , [c,d] = C.useState(null)
      , {toast: h} = en()
      , f = os()
      , g = async H => {
        try {
            return await navigator.clipboard.writeText(H),
            !0
        } catch {
            try {
                const G = document.createElement("textarea");
                G.value = H,
                G.style.position = "fixed",
                G.style.opacity = "0",
                document.body.appendChild(G),
                G.select();
                const z = document.execCommand("copy");
                return document.body.removeChild(G),
                z
            } catch {
                return !1
            }
        }
    }
      , p = async (H, te) => {
        try {
            l(H);
            const G = await fetch(`/api/omie/boleto/${H}`, {
                credentials: "include"
            });
            if (!G.ok)
                throw new Error("Boleto não encontrado ou não disponível");
            const z = await G.json();
            if (z.error)
                throw new Error(z.error);
            if (z.linkBoleto)
                window.open(z.linkBoleto, "_blank"),
                h({
                    title: "Boleto encontrado",
                    description: "O boleto foi aberto em uma nova aba"
                });
            else if (z.qrCodePix)
                d({
                    ...z,
                    nomeCliente: te
                });
            else
                throw new Error("Nenhum boleto ou QR Code disponível para este débito")
        } catch (G) {
            h({
                title: "Erro ao buscar boleto",
                description: G.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        } finally {
            l(null)
        }
    }
      , {data: _, isLoading: x, refetch: y} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/omie/overdue-debts/cached"],
        staleTime: 1e3 * 60 * 30,
        gcTime: 1e3 * 60 * 60 * 24
    })

        queryKey: ["/api/omie/vendedores"],
        staleTime: 1e3 * 60 * 10
    })

        ))
    }
    , [v, N, j, _]);
    const U = Gt({
        mutationFn: async () => {
            const H = await fetch("/api/omie/overdue-debts", {
                method: "GET",
                credentials: "include"
            });
            if (!H.ok) {
                const te = await H.text();
                throw new Error(te || "Erro ao sincronizar débitos")
            }
            return await H.json()
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: H => {
            f.setQueryData(["/api/omie/overdue-debts/cached"], H),
            f.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/omie/overdue-debts/cached"]
            }),
            R(),
            h({
                title: "Sincronização concluída",
                description: `${H.totalClients} clientes com débitos vencidos encontrados. Planilha salva automaticamente.`

        ,

                title: "Erro na sincronização",
                description: H.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }

      , O = async () => {
        try {
            const H = await fetch("/api/reports/overdue-debts/latest", {
                method: "GET",
                credentials: "include"
            });
            if (!H.ok) {
                const se = await H.json();
                throw new Error(se.message || "Erro ao baixar planilha")
            }
            const te = await H.blob()
              , G = window.URL.createObjectURL(te)
              , z = H.headers.get("Content-Disposition");
            let de = "debitos-vencidos.xlsx";
            if (z) {
                const se = z.match(/filename="?(.+)"?/);
                se && se[1] && (de = se[1])
            }

            Ce.href = G,
            Ce.download = de,

            Ce.click(),
            window.URL.revokeObjectURL(G),
            document.body.removeChild(Ce),
            h({
                title: "Download concluído",

            })
        } catch (H) {
