                    className: "border-b bg-gray-50",
                    children: s.jsxs(ht, {
                        className: "flex items-center justify-between",
                        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                            children: [s.jsx("span", {
                                className: "text-xl",
                                children: "Notas Fiscais Vencidas"
                            }), s.jsx("p", {
                                className: "text-sm font-normal text-gray-600 mt-1",
                                children: r.cliente.nome_fantasia
                            })]
                        }), s.jsx(je, {
                            variant: "outline",
                            size: "sm",
                            onClick: () => n(null),
                            "data-testid": "button-close-modal",
                            children: "×"
                        })]
                    })
                }), s.jsx(Re, {
                    className: "p-6 overflow-y-auto",
                    children: s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "space-y-6",
                        children: [s.jsx("div", {
                            className: "bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-4",
                            children: s.jsxs("div", {
                                className: "grid grid-cols-2 gap-4",
                                children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                                    children: [s.jsx("p", {
                                        className: "text-sm text-gray-600",
                                        children: "CNPJ/CPF"
                                    }), s.jsx("p", {
                                        className: "font-medium",
                                        children: r.cliente.cnpj_cpf
                                    })]
                                }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                    children: [s.jsx("p", {
                                        className: "text-sm text-gray-600",
                                        children: "Código Cliente Omie"
                                    }), s.jsx("p", {
                                        className: "font-medium",
                                        children: r.cliente.codigo_cliente_omie
                                    })]
                                })]
                            })
                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "grid grid-cols-2 gap-4",
                            children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                                className: "bg-red-50 rounded-lg p-4",
                                children: [s.jsx("p", {
                                    className: "text-sm text-gray-600",
                                    children: "Valor Total em Atraso"
                                }), s.jsx("p", {
                                    className: "font-bold text-2xl text-red-600",
                                    children: D(r.valorTotal)
                                })]
                            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                className: "bg-orange-50 rounded-lg p-4",
                                children: [s.jsx("p", {
                                    className: "text-sm text-gray-600",
                                    children: "Maior Atraso"
                                }), s.jsxs("p", {
                                    className: "font-bold text-2xl text-orange-600",
                                    children: [r.diasMaximoAtraso, " dias"]
                                })]
                            })]
                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                            children: [s.jsxs("h4", {
                                className: "font-semibold mb-3 flex items-center",
                                children: [s.jsx(Ts, {
                                    className: "h-5 w-5 text-red-600 mr-2"
                                }), "Notas Fiscais Vencidas (", r.debitos.length, ")"]
                            }), s.jsx("div", {
                                className: "space-y-3",
                                children: r.debitos.map( (H, te) => s.jsx("div", {
                                    className: "border rounded-lg p-4 bg-white hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors",
                                    "data-testid": `invoice-${te}`,
                                    children: s.jsxs("div", {
                                        className: "flex justify-between items-start",
                                        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                                            className: "flex-1",
                                            children: [s.jsxs("p", {
                                                className: "font-semibold text-lg",
                                                children: ["NF: ", H.numero_documento]
                                            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                                className: "mt-2 space-y-1",
                                                children: [s.jsxs("p", {
                                                    className: "text-sm text-gray-600",
                                                    children: [s.jsx("span", {
                                                        className: "font-medium",
                                                        children: "Vencimento:"
                                                    }), " ", P(H.data_vencimento)]
                                                }), s.jsxs("p", {
                                                    className: "text-sm text-red-600 font-medium",
                                                    children: [s.jsx("span", {
                                                        className: "font-medium",
                                                        children: "Atraso:"
                                                    }), " ", H.dias_atraso, " dias"]
                                                }), H.observacao && s.jsx("p", {
                                                    className: "text-sm text-gray-500 mt-2 italic",
                                                    children: H.observacao
                                                })]
                                            })]
                                        }), s.jsx("div", {
                                            className: "ml-4 text-right",
                                            children: s.jsx("p", {
                                                className: "font-bold text-xl text-red-600",
                                                children: D(H.valor)
                                            })
                                        })]
                                    })
                                }, te))
                            })]
                        })]
                    })
                })]
            })
        }), c && s.jsx("div", {
            className: "fixed inset-0 bg-black bg-opacity-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4 z-50",
            onClick: () => d(null),
            "data-testid": "modal-qr-code-pix",
            children: s.jsxs(Oe, {
                className: "w-full max-w-md",
                onClick: H => H.stopPropagation(),
                children: [s.jsx(ut, {
                    className: "border-b bg-gray-50",
                    children: s.jsxs(ht, {
                        className: "flex items-center justify-between",
                        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                            children: [s.jsx("span", {
                                className: "text-xl",
                                children: "QR Code Pix"
                            }), s.jsx("p", {
                                className: "text-sm font-normal text-gray-600 mt-1",
                                children: c.nomeCliente
                            })]
                        }), s.jsx(je, {
                            variant: "outline",
                            size: "sm",
                            onClick: () => d(null),
                            "data-testid": "button-close-qr-modal",
                            children: "×"
                        })]
                    })
                }), s.jsxs(Re, {
                    className: "p-6 space-y-4",
                    children: [c.qrCodePix && s.jsxs(s.Fragment, {
                        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-4",
                            children: [s.jsx("p", {
                                className: "text-sm text-gray-700 mb-2 font-medium",
                                children: "Código PIX Copia e Cola:"
                            }), s.jsx("div", {
                                className: "bg-white border rounded p-3 text-xs font-mono break-all max-h-32 overflow-y-auto",
                                children: c.qrCodePix
                            })]
                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "flex flex-col gap-2",
                            children: [s.jsxs(je, {
                                onClick: async () => {
                                    const H = await g(c.qrCodePix);
                                    h(H ? {
                                        title: "Copiado!",
                                        description: "Código PIX copiado para a área de transferência"
                                    } : {
                                        title: "Erro ao copiar",
                                        description: "Por favor, copie o código manualmente acima",
                                        variant: "destructive"
                                    })
                                }
                                ,
                                className: "bg-honest-orange hover:bg-honest-orange-dark",
                                "data-testid": "button-copy-pix",
                                children: [s.jsx(so, {
                                    className: "h-4 w-4 mr-2"
                                }), "Copiar Código PIX"]
                            }), s.jsx("p", {
                                className: "text-xs text-gray-500 text-center",
                                children: "Copie o código acima e cole no seu aplicativo de banco para pagar via PIX"
                            })]
                        })]
                    }), c.linhaDigitavel && s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "bg-blue-50 rounded-lg p-4 mt-4",
                        children: [s.jsx("p", {
                            className: "text-sm text-gray-700 mb-2 font-medium",
                            children: "Linha Digitável do Boleto:"
                        }), s.jsx("div", {
                            className: "bg-white border rounded p-3 text-xs font-mono break-all",
                            children: c.linhaDigitavel
                        })]
                    })]
                })]
            })
        })]
    })
}
function wG({user: e}) {
    const [t,r] = C.useState("")
      , [n,a] = C.useState(new Set)
      , {toast: i} = en()
      , o = os()
      , l = (e == null ? void 0 : e.role) && ["admin", "coordinator", "administrative"].includes(e.role)
      , {data: c, isLoading: d} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/blocked-orders"]
    })
      , h = Gt({
        mutationFn: async R => await dr("POST", "/api/blocked-orders/release", {
            orderIds: R
        }),
        onSuccess: R => {
            o.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/blocked-orders"]
            }),
            a(new Set),
            i({
                title: "Pedidos liberados",
                description: `${R.released} pedido(s) liberado(s) e enviado(s) para o Omie.`
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: R => {
            i({
                title: "Erro ao liberar pedidos",
                description: R.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , f = Gt({
        mutationFn: async R => await dr("POST", "/api/blocked-orders/reject", {
            orderIds: R
        }),
        onSuccess: R => {
            o.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/blocked-orders"]
            }),
            a(new Set),
            i({
                title: "Pedidos rejeitados",
                description: `${R.rejected} pedido(s) removido(s) do sistema.`
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: R => {
            i({
                title: "Erro ao rejeitar pedidos",
                description: R.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , g = (c == null ? void 0 : c.filter(R => {
        const U = t.toLowerCase();
        return (R.customer.fantasyName || R.customer.name).toLowerCase().includes(U) || R.seller.firstName.toLowerCase().includes(U) || R.seller.lastName.toLowerCase().includes(U) || R.customer.phone.includes(t)
    }
    )) || []
      , p = (R, U) => {
        const O = new Set(n);
        U ? O.add(R) : O.delete(R),
        a(O)
    }
      , _ = R => {
        a(R ? new Set(g.map(U => U.id)) : new Set)
    }
      , x = () => {
        if (n.size === 0) {
            i({
                title: "Nenhum pedido selecionado",
                description: "Selecione pelo menos um pedido para liberar.",
                variant: "destructive"
            });
            return
        }
        const U = g.filter(O => n.has(O.id)).filter(O => O.status === "blocked");
        if (U.length === 0) {
            i({
                title: "Nenhum pedido bloqueado selecionado",
                description: "Selecione pedidos com status 'Bloqueado' para liberar.",
                variant: "destructive"
            });
            return
        }
        h.mutate(U.map(O => O.id))
    }
      , y = () => {
        if (n.size === 0) {
            i({
                title: "Nenhum pedido selecionado",
                description: "Selecione pelo menos um pedido para rejeitar.",
                variant: "destructive"
            });
            return
        }
        const U = g.filter(O => n.has(O.id)).filter(O => O.status === "blocked");
        if (U.length === 0) {
            i({
                title: "Nenhum pedido bloqueado selecionado",
                description: "Selecione pedidos com status 'Bloqueado' para rejeitar.",
                variant: "destructive"
            });
            return
        }
        f.mutate(U.map(O => O.id))
    }
      , v = R => R ? new Intl.NumberFormat("pt-BR",{
        style: "currency",
        currency: "BRL"
    }).format(R) : "N/A"
      , N = (R, U, O) => {
        switch (R) {
        case "operation_type":
            return U === "troca" ? "Pedido de Troca" : "Pedido de Amostra";
        case "overdue_debt":
            return "Cliente com Débito Vencido";
        case "credit_limit":
            return "Limite de Crédito Excedido";
        case "payment_term":
            return `Prazo de Boleto Excedido (${O || 0} dias)`;
        default:
            return R
        }
    }
      , j = R => {
        switch (R) {
        case "blocked":
            return s.jsx($t, {
                variant: "destructive",
                children: "Bloqueado"
            });
        case "released":
            return s.jsx($t, {
                variant: "secondary",
                children: "Liberado"
            });
        case "sent_to_omie":
            return s.jsx($t, {
                variant: "default",
                children: "Enviado ao Omie"
            });
        default:
            return s.jsx($t, {
                variant: "outline",
                children: R
            })
        }
    }
      , E = R => {
        const U = {
            venda: {
                label: "Venda",
                variant: "default"
            },
            troca: {
                label: "Troca",
                variant: "secondary"
            },
            amostra: {
                label: "Amostra",
                variant: "outline"
            }
        }
          , {label: O, variant: M} = U[R] || {
            label: R,
            variant: "outline"
        };
        return s.jsx($t, {
            variant: M,
            children: O
        })
    }
    ;
    return s.jsxs("div", {
        className: "space-y-6",
        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
            className: "flex items-center justify-between",
            children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                children: [s.jsx("h1", {
                    className: "text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900",
                    children: "Pedidos Bloqueados"
                }), s.jsx("p", {
                    className: "text-gray-600 mt-1",
                    children: "Gerencie pedidos que foram automaticamente bloqueados pelo sistema"
                })]
            }), l && s.jsxs("div", {
                className: "flex items-center gap-3",
                children: [s.jsxs(je, {
                    onClick: x,
                    disabled: n.size === 0 || h.isPending,
                    className: "bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700",
                    "data-testid": "button-release-orders",
                    children: [s.jsx(E7, {
                        className: "h-4 w-4 mr-2"
                    }), h.isPending ? "Liberando..." : `Liberar ${n.size} Pedido(s)`]
                }), s.jsxs(je, {
                    onClick: y,
                    disabled: n.size === 0 || f.isPending,
                    variant: "destructive",
                    "data-testid": "button-reject-orders",
                    children: [s.jsx(lp, {
                        className: "h-4 w-4 mr-2"
                    }), f.isPending ? "Rejeitando..." : `Rejeitar ${n.size} Pedido(s)`]
                })]
            })]
        }), !l && s.jsx("div", {
            className: "bg-yellow-50 border border-yellow-200 rounded-lg p-4",
            children: s.jsxs("div", {
                className: "flex items-start",
                children: [s.jsx(Ts, {
                    className: "h-5 w-5 text-yellow-600 mr-3 mt-0.5"
                }), s.jsxs("div", {
                    children: [s.jsx("h3", {
                        className: "font-medium text-yellow-800",
                        children: "Acesso Restrito"
                    }), s.jsx("p", {
                        className: "text-sm text-yellow-700 mt-1",
                        children: "Apenas administradores, coordenadores e equipe administrativa podem liberar pedidos bloqueados."
                    })]
                })]
            })
        }), s.jsx("div", {
            className: "flex items-center space-x-4",
            children: s.jsxs("div", {
                className: "flex-1 relative",
                children: [s.jsx(ou, {
                    className: "absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400 h-4 w-4"
                }), s.jsx(xt, {
                    placeholder: "Buscar por cliente, vendedor ou telefone...",
                    value: t,
                    onChange: R => r(R.target.value),
                    className: "pl-10",
                    "data-testid": "input-search-blocked-orders"
                })]
            })
        }), s.jsxs(Oe, {
            children: [s.jsx(ut, {
                children: s.jsxs(ht, {
                    className: "flex items-center justify-between",
                    children: [s.jsx("span", {
                        children: "Lista de Pedidos Bloqueados"
                    }), s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "flex items-center space-x-2",
                        children: [l && s.jsx(ms, {
                            checked: g.length > 0 && n.size === g.length,
                            onCheckedChange: _,
                            "data-testid": "checkbox-select-all"
                        }), s.jsxs($t, {
                            variant: "secondary",
                            children: [g.length, " pedido(s)"]
                        })]
                    })]
                })
            }), s.jsx(Re, {
                children: d ? s.jsx("div", {
                    className: "text-center py-8 text-gray-500",
                    children: "Carregando pedidos bloqueados..."
                }) : g.length === 0 ? s.jsx("div", {
                    className: "text-center py-8 text-gray-500",
                    children: t ? "Nenhum pedido encontrado para a busca." : "Nenhum pedido bloqueado encontrado."
                }) : s.jsx("div", {
                    className: "space-y-4",
                    children: g.map(R => s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "border rounded-lg p-4 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors",
                        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "flex items-start justify-between",
                            children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                                className: "flex items-start space-x-3",
                                children: [l && s.jsx(ms, {
                                    checked: n.has(R.id),
                                    onCheckedChange: U => p(R.id, U),
                                    disabled: R.status === "sent_to_omie",
                                    "data-testid": `checkbox-order-${R.id}`
                                }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                    className: "flex-1",
                                    children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                                        className: "flex items-center space-x-2 mb-2",
                                        children: [s.jsx("h3", {
                                            className: "font-semibold text-lg text-gray-900",
                                            children: R.customer.fantasyName || R.customer.name
                                        }), j(R.status), E(R.operationType)]
                                    }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                        className: "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600",
                                        children: [s.jsxs("p", {
                                            children: [s.jsx("span", {
                                                className: "font-medium",
                                                children: "Vendedor:"
                                            }), " ", R.seller.firstName, " ", R.seller.lastName]
                                        }), s.jsxs("p", {
                                            children: [s.jsx("span", {
                                                className: "font-medium",
                                                children: "Telefone:"
                                            }), " ", R.customer.phone]
                                        }), s.jsxs("p", {
                                            children: [s.jsx("span", {
                                                className: "font-medium",
                                                children: "Motivo:"
                                            }), " ", N(R.blockReason, R.operationType, R.boletoDays)]
                                        }), s.jsxs("p", {
                                            children: [s.jsx("span", {
                                                className: "font-medium",
                                                children: "Bloqueado em:"
                                            }), " ", new Date(R.blockedAt).toLocaleDateString("pt-BR")]
                                        })]
                                    }), R.blockDetails && s.jsxs("p", {
                                        className: "text-sm text-gray-500 mt-2",
                                        children: [s.jsx("span", {
                                            className: "font-medium",
                                            children: "Detalhes:"
                                        }), " ", R.blockDetails]
                                    })]
                                })]
                            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                className: "text-right",
                                children: [s.jsx("p", {
                                    className: "font-bold text-lg text-gray-900",
                                    children: v(R.totalAmount)
                                }), R.products && R.products.length > 0 && s.jsxs("p", {
                                    className: "text-sm text-gray-600",
                                    children: [R.products.length, " item(s)"]
                                })]
                            })]
                        }), R.products && R.products.length > 0 && s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "mt-3 pt-3 border-t",
                            children: [s.jsx("p", {
                                className: "text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2",
                                children: "Produtos:"
                            }), s.jsx("div", {
                                className: "space-y-1",
                                children: R.products.map( (U, O) => s.jsxs("div", {
                                    className: "flex justify-between text-sm",
                                    children: [s.jsxs("span", {
                                        children: [U.name, " (x", U.quantity, ")"]
                                    }), s.jsx("span", {
                                        children: v(U.totalPrice)
                                    })]
                                }, O))
                            })]
                        })]
                    }, R.id))
                })
            })]
        })]
    })
}
function Swe() {
    const [e,t] = C.useState(!1)
      , [r,n] = C.useState(null)
      , [a,i] = C.useState(null)
      , o = C.useRef(null)
      , {toast: l} = en()
      , c = os()
      , {data: d=[], isLoading: h} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/locations"],
        enabled: !0
    })
      , f = Gt({
        mutationFn: E => dr("/api/locations", "POST", E),
        onSuccess: () => {
            c.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/locations"]
            }),
            t(!1),
            l({
                title: "Sucesso",
                description: "Localização criada com sucesso"
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: E => {
            l({
                title: "Erro",
                description: E.message || "Erro ao criar localização",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , g = Gt({
        mutationFn: ({id: E, data: R}) => dr(`/api/locations/${E}`, "PUT", R),
        onSuccess: () => {
            c.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/locations"]
            }),
            n(null),
            l({
                title: "Sucesso",
                description: "Localização atualizada com sucesso"
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: E => {
            l({
                title: "Erro",
                description: E.message || "Erro ao atualizar localização",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , p = Gt({
        mutationFn: E => dr(`/api/locations/${E}`, "DELETE"),
        onSuccess: () => {
            c.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/locations"]
            }),
            l({
                title: "Sucesso",
                description: "Localização removida com sucesso"
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: E => {
            l({
                title: "Erro",
                description: E.message || "Erro ao remover localização",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , _ = Gt({
        mutationFn: async E => {
            const R = new FormData;
            R.append("file", E);
            const U = await fetch("/api/locations/import", {
                method: "POST",
                body: R
            });
            if (!U.ok)
                throw new Error("Erro ao fazer upload do arquivo");
            return U.json()
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: E => {
            c.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/locations"]
            }),
            c.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/customers"]
            }),
            i(E),
            l({
                title: "Importação concluída",
                description: E.message
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: E => {
            l({
                title: "Erro na importação",
                description: E.message || "Erro ao importar planilha",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , x = Gt({
        mutationFn: () => dr("/api/locations/update-customer-coordinates", "POST"),
        onSuccess: E => {
            c.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/customers"]
            }),
            l({
                title: "Coordenadas atualizadas",
                description: E.message
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: E => {
            l({
                title: "Erro",
                description: E.message || "Erro ao atualizar coordenadas",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , y = E => {
        E.preventDefault();
        const R = new FormData(E.currentTarget)
          , U = {
            cpfCnpj: R.get("cpfCnpj"),
            fantasyName: R.get("fantasyName"),
            latitude: R.get("latitude"),
            longitude: R.get("longitude"),
            isActive: !0
        };
        r ? g.mutate({

function Ag({step: e}) {
    var p;
    const [t,r] = C.useState("")
      , {toast: n} = en()
      , a = os()
      , i = Cwe[e]
      , o = i.icon
      , {data: l, isLoading: c, refetch: d} = Bt({
        queryKey: [`/api/omie/orders/${e}`],
        enabled: !1
    })
      , h = Gt({
        mutationFn: async () => {
            const _ = await fetch(`/api/omie/orders/${e}/sync`, {
                method: "POST",
                headers: {
                    "Content-Type": "application/json"
                }
            });
            if (!_.ok) {
                const x = await _.json();
                throw new Error(x.message || "Erro ao sincronizar pedidos")
            }
            return _.json()
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: _ => {
            a.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: [`/api/omie/orders/${e}`]
            }),
            n({
                title: "Sincronização concluída",
                description: `${_.count || 0} pedidos sincronizados da etapa ${i.title}.`
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: _ => {
            n({
                title: "Erro na sincronização",
                description: _.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , f = ((p = l == null ? void 0 : l.orders) == null ? void 0 : p.filter(_ => {
        const x = t.toLowerCase();
        return _.cliente.nome_fantasia.toLowerCase().includes(x) || _.numero_pedido.includes(t) || _.cliente.cnpj_cpf.includes(t)
    }
    )) || []

        style: "currency",

function _G() {
    const [e,t] = C.useState("today")
      , {data: r, isLoading: n} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/deliveries/stats", e],
        refetchInterval: 3e4

function bG() {
    const {toast: e} = en()
      , [t,r] = C.useState("")
      , [n,a] = C.useState(new Set)
      , [i,o] = C.useState(!1)
      , [l,c] = C.useState(!1)
      , [d,h] = C.useState([])
      , [f,g] = C.useState(new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0])
      , [p,_] = C.useState(!1)
      , [x,y] = C.useState(null)
      , {data: v, isLoading: N} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/deliveries"],
        refetchInterval: 3e4
    })
      , {data: j=[], isLoading: E} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/delivery-drivers"]
    })
      , R = Gt({
        mutationFn: async H => await dr("POST", "/api/delivery-routes/plan", H),
        onSuccess: H => {
            y(H),
            c(!1),
            _(!0),
            e({
                title: "Rotas planejadas com sucesso!",
                description: `${H.stats.assignedOrders} pedidos atribuídos em ${H.routes.length} rotas`
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: H => {
            e({
                title: "Erro ao planejar rotas",
                description: H.message || "Erro desconhecido",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , U = Gt({
        mutationFn: async H => await dr("PUT", `/api/sales-cards/${H.id}`, {
            isUrgent: H.isUrgent
        }),
        onSuccess: () => {
            En.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/deliveries"]
            }),
            e({
                title: "Urgência atualizada",
                description: "A marcação de urgência foi atualizada."
            })
        }
    })
      , O = () => {
        if (i)
            a(new Set),
            o(!1);
        else {
            const H = new Set(D.map(te => te.id));
            a(H),
            o(!0)
        }
    }
      , M = H => {
        const te = new Set(n);
        te.has(H) ? te.delete(H) : te.add(H),
        a(te),
        o(te.size === D.length && D.length > 0)
    }
      , T = (H, te) => {
        U.mutate({
            id: H,
            isUrgent: !te
        })
    }
      , D = C.useMemo( () => v ? v.filter(H => {
        var G, z, de;
        return (((G = H.customerName) == null ? void 0 : G.toLowerCase()) || "").includes(t.toLowerCase()) || (((z = H.customerAddress) == null ? void 0 : z.toLowerCase()) || "").includes(t.toLowerCase()) || (((de = H.id) == null ? void 0 : de.toLowerCase()) || "").includes(t.toLowerCase())
    }
    ) : [], [v, t])
      , P = () => {
        h([...d, {
            type: "moto",
            startLatitude: -23.55052,
            startLongitude: -46.633308,
            startAddress: "São Paulo - Depósito Principal",

            timeWindowEnd: "18:00",
            capacity: void 0
        }])
    }
      , V = H => {
        h(d.filter( (te, G) => G !== H))
    }
      , Q = (H, te, G) => {
        const z = [...d];
        z[H] = {
            ...z[H],
            [te]: G
        },
        h(z)
    }
      , Y = () => {
        if (n.size === 0) {
            e({
                title: "Nenhum pedido selecionado",
                description: "Selecione ao menos um pedido para planejar rotas",
                variant: "destructive"
            });
            return
        }
        if (d.length === 0) {
            e({
                title: "Nenhum veículo configurado",
                description: "Configure ao menos um veículo",
                variant: "destructive"
            });

        }
        R.mutate({
            orderIds: Array.from(n),
            vehicles: d,
            routeDate: f
        })
    }
    ;

var Pwe = e => {
    const {control: t, checked: r, bubbles: n=!0, ...a} = e
      , i = C.useRef(null)
      , o = P3(r)
      , l = JC(t);
    return C.useEffect( () => {
        const c = i.current
          , d = window.HTMLInputElement.prototype
          , f = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(d, "checked").set;
        if (o !== r && f) {
            const g = new Event("click",{
                bubbles: n
            });
            f.call(c, r),
            c.dispatchEvent(g)
        }
    }
    , [o, r, n]),
    s.jsx("input", {
        type: "checkbox",
        "aria-hidden": !0,
        defaultChecked: r,
        ...a,
        tabIndex: -1,
        ref: i,
        style: {
            ...e.style,
            ...l,
            position: "absolute",
            pointerEvents: "none",
            opacity: 0,
            margin: 0
        }
    })
}

    return e ? "checked" : "unchecked"
}

function kG() {
    const {toast: e} = en()
      , [t,r] = C.useState(!1)
      , [n,a] = C.useState(!1)
      , [i,o] = C.useState(null)
      , [l,c] = C.useState("")
      , [d,h] = C.useState({
        name: "",
        phone: "",
        vehicleType: "",
        licensePlate: "",
        isActive: !0
    })
      , {data: f, isLoading: g} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/delivery-drivers"],
        refetchInterval: 6e4
    });
    Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/delivery-drivers/stats"]
    });
    const p = Gt({
        mutationFn: async M => {
            const T = await fetch("/api/delivery-drivers", {
                method: "POST",
                headers: {
                    "Content-Type": "application/json"
                },
                credentials: "include",
                body: JSON.stringify(M)
            });
            if (!T.ok)
                throw new Error("Erro ao criar motorista");
            return T.json()
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            En.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/delivery-drivers"]
            }),
            r(!1),
            y(),
            e({
                title: "Motorista criado",
                description: "Motorista criado com sucesso."
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: M => {
            e({
                title: "Erro",
                description: M.message || "Erro ao criar motorista",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , _ = Gt({
        mutationFn: async M => {
            const T = await fetch(`/api/delivery-drivers/${M.id}`, {
                method: "PUT",
                headers: {
                    "Content-Type": "application/json"
                },
                credentials: "include",
                body: JSON.stringify(M.driverData)
            });
            if (!T.ok)
                throw new Error("Erro ao atualizar motorista");
            return T.json()
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            En.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/delivery-drivers"]
            }),
            a(!1),
            o(null),
            y(),
            e({
                title: "Motorista atualizado",
                description: "Motorista atualizado com sucesso."
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: M => {
            e({
                title: "Erro",
                description: M.message || "Erro ao atualizar motorista",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , x = Gt({
        mutationFn: async M => {
            const T = await fetch(`/api/delivery-drivers/${M.id}/toggle-status`, {
                method: "PUT",
                headers: {
                    "Content-Type": "application/json"
                },
                credentials: "include",
                body: JSON.stringify({
                    isActive: M.isActive
                })
            });
            if (!T.ok)
                throw new Error("Erro ao alterar status do motorista");
            return T.json()
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            En.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/delivery-drivers"]
            }),
            e({
                title: "Status alterado",
                description: "Status do motorista alterado com sucesso."
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: M => {
            e({
                title: "Erro",
                description: M.message || "Erro ao alterar status do motorista",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , y = () => {
        h({
            name: "",
            phone: "",
            vehicleType: "",
            licensePlate: "",
            isActive: !0
        })
    }
      , v = () => {
        p.mutate(d)
    }
      , N = () => {
        i && _.mutate({
            id: i.id,
            driverData: d
        })
    }
      , j = M => {
        o(M),
        h({
            name: M.name,
            phone: M.phone,
            vehicleType: M.vehicleType,
            licensePlate: M.licensePlate,
            isActive: M.isActive
        }),
        a(!0)
    }
      , E = M => {
        x.mutate({
            id: M.id,
            isActive: !M.isActive
        })
    }
      , R = (f == null ? void 0 : f.filter(M => M.name.toLowerCase().includes(l.toLowerCase()) || M.phone.includes(l) || M.licensePlate.toLowerCase().includes(l.toLowerCase()))) || []
      , U = (f == null ? void 0 : f.filter(M => M.isActive).length) || 0
      , O = (f == null ? void 0 : f.filter(M => !M.isActive).length) || 0;
    return s.jsxs("div", {
        className: "space-y-6",
        "data-testid": "driver-management",
        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
            className: "flex justify-between items-center",
            children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                children: [s.jsx("h1", {
                    className: "text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight",

}
const Dwe = [{
    value: "today",
    label: "Hoje"
}, {
    value: "yesterday",
    label: "Ontem"
}, {
    value: "week",
    label: "Esta Semana"
}, {
    value: "last_week",
    label: "Semana Passada"
}, {
    value: "month",
    label: "Este Mês"

    value: "last_month",
    label: "Mês Passado"

    value: "quarter",
    label: "Este Trimestre"

    value: "year",
    label: "Este Ano"
}, {
    value: "custom",
    label: "Período Personalizado"
}]

    },

        icon: oo,
        label: "Em Trânsito",
        color: "text-blue-600"
    },
    returned: {
        icon: Ts,
        label: "Devolvidas",
        color: "text-orange-600"
    }
};
function TG() {
    var p, _;
    const [e,t] = C.useState("month")
      , [r,n] = C.useState("")
      , [a,i] = C.useState("")
      , {data: o, isLoading: l} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/deliveries/reports", e, r, a],
        enabled: e !== "custom" || !!(r && a)
    })
      , {data: c} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/deliveries/reports/comparison", e],
        enabled: e !== "custom"
    })
      , d = x => `${(x * 100).toFixed(1)}%`
      , h = (x, y) => x > y ? s.jsx(tu, {
        className: "h-4 w-4 text-green-600"
    }) : x < y ? s.jsx(GJ, {
        className: "h-4 w-4 text-red-600"
    }) : null
      , f = (x, y) => x > y ? "text-green-600" : x < y ? "text-red-600" : "text-gray-600"
      , g = () => {
        console.log("Exportando relatório...")
    }
    ;
    return s.jsxs("div", {
        className: "space-y-6",
        "data-testid": "delivery-reports",
        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
            className: "flex justify-between items-center",

            })]
        }), s.jsxs(Oe, {

                        className: "h-5 w-5"
                    }), s.jsx("span", {

                    })]
                })
            }), s.jsx(Re, {

                        })]
                    }), e === "custom" && s.jsxs(s.Fragment, {
                        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "space-y-2",

                                htmlFor: "start-date",
                                children: "Data Inicial"
                            }), s.jsx(xt, {

        }), s.jsxs("div", {
            className: "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6",
            children: [s.jsxs(Oe, {

                    children: "Carregando dados..."
                }) : s.jsx("div", {
                    className: "grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-5 gap-4",
                    children: Object.entries(Owe).map( ([x,y]) => {
                        const v = (o == null ? void 0 : o[x]) || 0
                          , N = o != null && o.totalDeliveries ? v / o.totalDeliveries * 100 : 0
                          , j = y.icon;
                        return s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "text-center space-y-2",
                            "data-testid": `status-breakdown-${x}`,
                            children: [s.jsx("div", {
                                className: "flex items-center justify-center",
                                children: s.jsx(j, {
                                    className: `h-8 w-8 ${y.color}`
                                })
                            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                className: "space-y-1",
                                children: [s.jsx("div", {
                                    className: `text-2xl font-bold ${y.color}`,
                                    children: v
                                }), s.jsx("div", {
                                    className: "text-sm text-muted-foreground",
                                    children: y.label
                                }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                    className: "text-xs text-muted-foreground",
                                    children: [N.toFixed(1), "%"]
                                })]
                            })]
                        }, x)
                    }
                    )
                })
            })]
        }), s.jsxs(Oe, {
            "data-testid": "top-drivers-card",
            children: [s.jsx(ut, {
                children: s.jsx(ht, {
                    children: "Top Motoristas"
                })
            }), s.jsx(Re, {
                children: l ? s.jsx("div", {
                    className: "text-center py-8",
                    children: "Carregando dados..."
                }) : ((p = o == null ? void 0 : o.topDrivers) == null ? void 0 : p.length) > 0 ? s.jsx("div", {
                    className: "space-y-4",
                    children: o.topDrivers.map( (x, y) => s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "flex items-center justify-between p-3 border rounded-lg",
                        "data-testid": `top-driver-${x.driverId}`,
                        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "flex items-center space-x-3",
                            children: [s.jsx("div", {
                                className: "w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-blue-100 flex items-center justify-center",
                                children: s.jsxs("span", {
                                    className: "text-sm font-bold text-blue-600",
                                    children: ["#", y + 1]
                                })
                            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                children: [s.jsx("div", {
                                    className: "font-medium",
                                    children: x.driverName
                                }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                    className: "text-sm text-muted-foreground",
                                    children: [x.deliveries, " entregas"]
                                })]
                            })]
                        }), s.jsx("div", {
                            className: "text-right",
                            children: s.jsxs($t, {
                                variant: "default",
                                children: [d(x.successRate), " sucesso"]
                            })
                        })]
                    }, x.driverId))
                }) : s.jsx("div", {
                    className: "text-center py-8 text-muted-foreground",
                    children: "Nenhum dado de motorista disponível"
                })
            })]
        }), s.jsxs(Oe, {
            "data-testid": "daily-stats-card",
            children: [s.jsx(ut, {
                children: s.jsx(ht, {
                    children: "Estatísticas Diárias"
                })
            }), s.jsx(Re, {
                children: l ? s.jsx("div", {
                    className: "text-center py-8",
                    children: "Carregando dados..."
                }) : ((_ = o == null ? void 0 : o.dailyStats) == null ? void 0 : _.length) > 0 ? s.jsxs("div", {
                    className: "space-y-2",
                    children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 pb-2 border-b font-medium text-sm",
                        children: [s.jsx("div", {
                            children: "Data"
                        }), s.jsx("div", {
                            className: "text-center",
                            children: "Total"
                        }), s.jsx("div", {
                            className: "text-center",
                            children: "Sucesso"
                        }), s.jsx("div", {
                            className: "text-center",
                            children: "Falhas"
                        })]
                    }), o.dailyStats.map(x => {
                        const y = x.deliveries > 0 ? x.success / x.deliveries * 100 : 0;
                        return s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 py-2 text-sm",
                            "data-testid": `daily-stat-${x.date}`,
                            children: [s.jsx("div", {
                                children: new Date(x.date).toLocaleDateString("pt-BR", {
                                    timeZone: "UTC"
                                })
                            }), s.jsx("div", {
                                className: "text-center font-medium",
                                children: x.deliveries
                            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                className: "text-center text-green-600",
                                children: [x.success, " (", y.toFixed(1), "%)"]
                            }), s.jsx("div", {
                                className: "text-center text-red-600",
                                children: x.failed
                            })]
                        }, x.date)
                    }
                    )]
                }) : s.jsx("div", {
                    className: "text-center py-8 text-muted-foreground",
                    children: "Nenhum dado diário disponível"
                })
            })]
        })]
    })
}
function AG() {
    var te;
    const {user: e} = po()
      , {toast: t} = en()
      , r = () => {
        const G = new Date
          , z = -3 * 60
          , de = G.getTimezoneOffset();
        return new Date(G.getTime() + (de + z) * 60 * 1e3).toISOString().split("T")[0]
    }
      , [n,a] = C.useState({
        sellerId: "all",
        startDate: r(),
        endDate: r(),
        routeDay: "all",
        visitStatus: "pending",
        page: 1
    })
      , [i,o] = C.useState(null)
      , [l,c] = C.useState(null)
      , [d,h] = C.useState(null)
      , [f,g] = C.useState(null)
      , [p,_] = C.useState(!1)
      , x = () => new Promise( (G, z) => {
        if (!navigator.geolocation) {
            z(new Error("Geolocalização não é suportada pelo navegador"));
            return
        }
        navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(de => {
            const Ce = {
                latitude: de.coords.latitude,
                longitude: de.coords.longitude
            };
            g(Ce),
            G(Ce)
        }
        , de => {
            z(new Error("Erro ao obter localização: " + de.message))
        }
        , {
            enableHighAccuracy: !0,
            timeout: 1e4,
            maximumAge: 6e4
        })
    }
    )
      , y = Gt({
        mutationFn: async ({visitId: G, latitude: z, longitude: de}) => dr("POST", `/api/visit-agenda/${G}/check-in`, {
            latitude: z,
            longitude: de
        }),
        onSuccess: G => {
            t({
                title: "Check-in realizado!",
                description: G.message
            }),
            En.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/visit-agenda"]
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: G => {
            t({
                title: "Erro no check-in",
                description: G.message || "Erro ao realizar check-in",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , v = Gt({
        mutationFn: async ({visitId: G, latitude: z, longitude: de}) => dr("POST", `/api/visit-agenda/${G}/check-out`, {
            latitude: z,
            longitude: de
        }),
        onSuccess: G => {
            t({
                title: "Check-out realizado!",
                description: `${G.message} - Duração: ${G.visitDuration} minutos`
            }),
            En.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/visit-agenda"]
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: G => {
            t({
                title: "Erro no check-out",
                description: G.message || "Erro ao realizar check-out",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , N = async G => {
        try {
            c(G);
            const z = await x();
            y.mutate({
                visitId: G,
                latitude: z.latitude,
                longitude: z.longitude
            })
        } catch (z) {
            t({
                title: "Erro de localização",
                description: z.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        } finally {
            c(null)
        }
    }
      , j = async G => {
        try {
            h(G);
            const z = await x();
            v.mutate({
                visitId: G,
                latitude: z.latitude,
                longitude: z.longitude
            })
        } catch (z) {
            t({
                title: "Erro de localização",
                description: z.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        } finally {
            h(null)
        }
    }
      , {data: E} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/users", {
            role: "vendedor"
        }],
        queryFn: async () => await dr("GET", "/api/users?role=vendedor"),
        enabled: !!e && ["admin", "coordinator", "administrative"].includes(e.role || "")
    })
      , {data: R, isLoading: U, refetch: O} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/sales-cards/by-date", n.startDate, n.sellerId],
        queryFn: async () => {
            if (!n.startDate)
                return {
                    cards: []
                };
            const G = await fetch(`/api/sales-cards/by-date/${n.startDate}${n.sellerId !== "all" ? `?sellerId=${n.sellerId}` : ""}`, {
                credentials: "include"
            });
            if (!G.ok)
                throw new Error("Erro ao buscar cards de visita");
            return G.json()
        }
    })
      , M = R != null && R.cards ? {
        visits: R.cards.map(G => {
            var z, de, Ce, se, k;
            return {
                id: G.id,
                customerId: G.customerId,
                sellerId: G.sellerId,
                sellerName: G.seller ? `${G.seller.firstName} ${G.seller.lastName}` : "N/A",
                scheduledDate: G.scheduledDate,
                routeDay: G.routeDay,
                recurrenceType: G.recurrenceType,
                isVirtual: ((z = G.customer) == null ? void 0 : z.virtualService) || !1,
                visitStatus: G.status === "completed" ? "completed" : G.status === "pending" ? "pending" : "missed",
                customerName: ((de = G.customer) == null ? void 0 : de.name) || "",
                customerLatitude: (Ce = G.customer) == null ? void 0 : Ce.latitude,
                customerLongitude: (se = G.customer) == null ? void 0 : se.longitude,
                customerAddress: (k = G.customer) == null ? void 0 : k.address,

            }

        }

        visits: [],
        pagination: {
            page: 1,
            pageSize: 50,
            total: 0,
            totalPages: 0
        }
    }
      , T = G => G < 1e3 ? `${Math.round(G)}m` : `${(G / 1e3).toFixed(1)}km`
      , D = async () => {
        try {
            await dr("POST", "/api/visit-agenda/generate"),
            O(),

                variant: "destructive"

        }
        if ((e == null ? void 0 : e.role) === "vendedor" && (!e.homeLatitude || !e.homeLongitude)) {

        }

            _(!1)

                return Math.sqrt(m * m + b * b)

                Math.abs(u.x) <= Math.abs(this.x) && Math.abs(u.y) <= Math.abs(this.y)
            },

        function Ce(u, m, b) {

        }
        var zf = Qt.linux && Qt.chrome ? window.devicePixelRatio : Qt.mac ? window.devicePixelRatio * 3 : window.devicePixelRatio > 0 ? 2 * window.devicePixelRatio : 1;
        function lh(u) {

        }
        function Ac(u, m) {

        }
        var pu = {

          , ch = G.extend({
            run: function(u, m, b, A) {
                this.stop(),
                this._el = u,
                this._inProgress = !0,
                this._duration = b || .25,
                this._easeOutPower = 1 / Math.max(A || .5, .2),
                this._startPos = Ul(u),
                this._offset = m.subtract(this._startPos),
                this._startTime = +new Date,
                this.fire("start"),
                this._animate()
            },
            stop: function() {
                this._inProgress && (this._step(!0),
                this._complete())
            },
            _animate: function() {
                this._animId = P(this._animate, this),
                this._step()
            },
            _step: function(u) {
                var m = +new Date - this._startTime
                  , b = this._duration * 1e3;
                m < b ? this._runFrame(this._easeOut(m / b), u) : (this._runFrame(1),
                this._complete())
            },
            _runFrame: function(u, m) {
                var b = this._startPos.add(this._offset.multiplyBy(u));
                m && b._round(),
                Mn(this._el, b),
                this.fire("step")
            },
            _complete: function() {
                V(this._animId),
                this._inProgress = !1,
                this.fire("end")
            },
            _easeOut: function(u) {
                return 1 - Math.pow(1 - u, this._easeOutPower)
            }
        })
          , Qr = G.extend({
            options: {
                crs: ce,
                center: void 0,
                zoom: void 0,
                minZoom: void 0,
                maxZoom: void 0,
                layers: [],
                maxBounds: void 0,
                renderer: void 0,
                zoomAnimation: !0,
                zoomAnimationThreshold: 4,
                fadeAnimation: !0,
                markerZoomAnimation: !0,
                transform3DLimit: 8388608,
                zoomSnap: 1,
                zoomDelta: 1,
                trackResize: !0
            },
            initialize: function(u, m) {
                m = x(this, m),
                this._handlers = [],

                this._zoomBoundLayers = {},
                this._sizeChanged = !0,

                this._initLayout(),
                this._onResize = o(this._onResize, this),
                this._initEvents(),
                m.maxBounds && this.setMaxBounds(m.maxBounds),
                m.zoom !== void 0 && (this._zoom = this._limitZoom(m.zoom)),
                m.center && m.zoom !== void 0 && this.setView(re(m.center), m.zoom, {
                    reset: !0
                }),
                this.callInitHooks(),
                this._zoomAnimated = Qa && Qt.any3d && !Qt.mobileOpera && this.options.zoomAnimation,
                this._zoomAnimated && (this._createAnimProxy(),
                zr(this._proxy, Zo, this._catchTransitionEnd, this)),
                this._addLayers(this.options.layers)
            },
            setView: function(u, m, b) {
                if (m = m === void 0 ? this._zoom : this._limitZoom(m),
                u = this._limitCenter(re(u), m, this.options.maxBounds),
                b = b || {},
                this._stop(),
                this._loaded && !b.reset && b !== !0) {
                    b.animate !== void 0 && (b.zoom = a({
                        animate: b.animate
                    }, b.zoom),
                    b.pan = a({
                        animate: b.animate,
                        duration: b.duration
                    }, b.pan));
                    var A = this._zoom !== m ? this._tryAnimatedZoom && this._tryAnimatedZoom(u, m, b.zoom) : this._tryAnimatedPan(u, b.pan);
                    if (A)
                        return clearTimeout(this._sizeTimer),
                        this
                }
                return this._resetView(u, m, b.pan && b.pan.noMoveStart),

            },
            setZoom: function(u, m) {
                return this._loaded ? this.setView(this.getCenter(), u, {
                    zoom: m
                }) : (this._zoom = u,
                this)
            },
            zoomIn: function(u, m) {
                return u = u || (Qt.any3d ? this.options.zoomDelta : 1),
                this.setZoom(this._zoom + u, m)
            },
            zoomOut: function(u, m) {
                return u = u || (Qt.any3d ? this.options.zoomDelta : 1),
                this.setZoom(this._zoom - u, m)
            },
            setZoomAround: function(u, m, b) {
                var A = this.getZoomScale(m)
                  , Z = this.getSize().divideBy(2)
                  , ie = u instanceof z ? u : this.latLngToContainerPoint(u)
                  , Le = ie.subtract(Z).multiplyBy(1 - 1 / A)
                  , Ye = this.containerPointToLatLng(Z.add(Le));
                return this.setView(Ye, m, {
                    zoom: b
                })
            },
            _getBoundsCenterZoom: function(u, m) {
                m = m || {},
                u = u.getBounds ? u.getBounds() : q(u);
                var b = Ce(m.paddingTopLeft || m.padding || [0, 0])
                  , A = Ce(m.paddingBottomRight || m.padding || [0, 0])
                  , Z = this.getBoundsZoom(u, !1, b.add(A));
                if (Z = typeof m.maxZoom == "number" ? Math.min(m.maxZoom, Z) : Z,
                Z === 1 / 0)
                    return {
                        center: u.getCenter(),
                        zoom: Z
                    };
                var ie = A.subtract(b).divideBy(2)
                  , Le = this.project(u.getSouthWest(), Z)
                  , Ye = this.project(u.getNorthEast(), Z)
                  , it = this.unproject(Le.add(Ye).divideBy(2).add(ie), Z);
                return {
                    center: it,
                    zoom: Z
                }
            },
            fitBounds: function(u, m) {
                if (u = q(u),
                !u.isValid())
                    throw new Error("Bounds are not valid.");
                var b = this._getBoundsCenterZoom(u, m);
                return this.setView(b.center, b.zoom, m)
            },
            fitWorld: function(u) {
                return this.fitBounds([[-90, -180], [90, 180]], u)
            },
            panTo: function(u, m) {
                return this.setView(u, this._zoom, {
                    pan: m
                })
            },
            panBy: function(u, m) {
                if (u = Ce(u).round(),
                m = m || {},
                !u.x && !u.y)
                    return this.fire("moveend");
                if (m.animate !== !0 && !this.getSize().contains(u))
                    return this._resetView(this.unproject(this.project(this.getCenter()).add(u)), this.getZoom()),
                    this;
                if (this._panAnim || (this._panAnim = new ch,
                this._panAnim.on({
                    step: this._onPanTransitionStep,
                    end: this._onPanTransitionEnd
                }, this)),
                m.noMoveStart || this.fire("movestart"),
                m.animate !== !1) {
                    Ir(this._mapPane, "leaflet-pan-anim");
                    var b = this._getMapPanePos().subtract(u).round();
                    this._panAnim.run(this._mapPane, b, m.duration || .25, m.easeLinearity)
                } else
                    this._rawPanBy(u),
                    this.fire("move").fire("moveend");
                return this
            },
            flyTo: function(u, m, b) {
                if (b = b || {},
                b.animate === !1 || !Qt.any3d)
                    return this.setView(u, m, b);
                this._stop();
                var A = this.project(this.getCenter())
                  , Z = this.project(u)
                  , ie = this.getSize()
                  , Le = this._zoom;
                u = re(u),
                m = m === void 0 ? Le : m;
                var Ye = Math.max(ie.x, ie.y)
                  , it = Ye * this.getZoomScale(Le, m)
                  , jt = Z.distanceTo(A) || 1
                  , nr = 1.42
                  , Ar = nr * nr;
                function tn(Yn) {
                    var ei = Yn ? -1 : 1
                      , tN = Yn ? it : Ye
                      , rN = it * it - Ye * Ye + ei * Ar * Ar * jt * jt
                      , my = 2 * tN * Ar * jt
                      , Cp = rN / my
                      , lg = Math.sqrt(Cp * Cp + 1) - Cp
                      , py = lg < 1e-9 ? -18 : Math.log(lg);
                    return py
                }
                function Ja(Yn) {
                    return (Math.exp(Yn) - Math.exp(-Yn)) / 2
                }
                function aa(Yn) {
                    return (Math.exp(Yn) + Math.exp(-Yn)) / 2
                }
                function Co(Yn) {
                    return Ja(Yn) / aa(Yn)
                }
                var Si = tn(0);
                function gh(Yn) {
                    return Ye * (aa(Si) / aa(Si + nr * Yn))
                }
                function Jb(Yn) {
                    return Ye * (aa(Si) * Co(Si + nr * Yn) - Ja(Si)) / Ar
                }
                function Cd(Yn) {
                    return 1 - Math.pow(1 - Yn, 1.5)
                }
                var nl = Date.now()
                  , ec = (tn(1) - Si) / nr
                  , eN = b.duration ? 1e3 * b.duration : 1e3 * ec * .8;
                function og() {
                    var Yn = (Date.now() - nl) / eN
                      , ei = Cd(Yn) * ec;
                    Yn <= 1 ? (this._flyToFrame = P(og, this),
                    this._move(this.unproject(A.add(Z.subtract(A).multiplyBy(Jb(ei) / jt)), Le), this.getScaleZoom(Ye / gh(ei), Le), {
                        flyTo: !0
                    })) : this._move(u, m)._moveEnd(!0)
                }
                return this._moveStart(!0, b.noMoveStart),
                og.call(this),
                this
            },
            flyToBounds: function(u, m) {
                var b = this._getBoundsCenterZoom(u, m);
                return this.flyTo(b.center, b.zoom, m)
            },
            setMaxBounds: function(u) {
                return u = q(u),
                this.listens("moveend", this._panInsideMaxBounds) && this.off("moveend", this._panInsideMaxBounds),
                u.isValid() ? (this.options.maxBounds = u,
                this._loaded && this._panInsideMaxBounds(),
                this.on("moveend", this._panInsideMaxBounds)) : (this.options.maxBounds = null,
                this)
            },
            setMinZoom: function(u) {
                var m = this.options.minZoom;
                return this.options.minZoom = u,
                this._loaded && m !== u && (this.fire("zoomlevelschange"),
                this.getZoom() < this.options.minZoom) ? this.setZoom(u) : this
            },
            setMaxZoom: function(u) {
                var m = this.options.maxZoom;
                return this.options.maxZoom = u,
                this._loaded && m !== u && (this.fire("zoomlevelschange"),
                this.getZoom() > this.options.maxZoom) ? this.setZoom(u) : this
            },
            panInsideBounds: function(u, m) {
                this._enforcingBounds = !0;
                var b = this.getCenter()
                  , A = this._limitCenter(b, this._zoom, q(u));
                return b.equals(A) || this.panTo(A, m),
                this._enforcingBounds = !1,
                this
            },
            panInside: function(u, m) {
                m = m || {};
                var b = Ce(m.paddingTopLeft || m.padding || [0, 0])
                  , A = Ce(m.paddingBottomRight || m.padding || [0, 0])
                  , Z = this.project(this.getCenter())
                  , ie = this.project(u)
                  , Le = this.getPixelBounds()
                  , Ye = k([Le.min.add(b), Le.max.subtract(A)])
                  , it = Ye.getSize();
                if (!Ye.contains(ie)) {
                    this._enforcingBounds = !0;
                    var jt = ie.subtract(Ye.getCenter())
                      , nr = Ye.extend(ie).getSize().subtract(it);
                    Z.x += jt.x < 0 ? -nr.x : nr.x,
                    Z.y += jt.y < 0 ? -nr.y : nr.y,
                    this.panTo(this.unproject(Z), m),
                    this._enforcingBounds = !1
                }
                return this
            },
            invalidateSize: function(u) {
                if (!this._loaded)
                    return this;
                u = a({
                    animate: !1,
                    pan: !0
                }, u === !0 ? {
                    animate: !0
                } : u);
                var m = this.getSize();
                this._sizeChanged = !0,
                this._lastCenter = null;
                var b = this.getSize()
                  , A = m.divideBy(2).round()
                  , Z = b.divideBy(2).round()
                  , ie = A.subtract(Z);
                return !ie.x && !ie.y ? this : (u.animate && u.pan ? this.panBy(ie) : (u.pan && this._rawPanBy(ie),
                this.fire("move"),
                u.debounceMoveend ? (clearTimeout(this._sizeTimer),
                this._sizeTimer = setTimeout(o(this.fire, this, "moveend"), 200)) : this.fire("moveend")),
                this.fire("resize", {
                    oldSize: m,
                    newSize: b
                }))
            },
            stop: function() {
                return this.setZoom(this._limitZoom(this._zoom)),
                this.options.zoomSnap || this.fire("viewreset"),
                this._stop()
            },
            locate: function(u) {
                if (u = this._locateOptions = a({
                    timeout: 1e4,
                    watch: !1
                }, u),
                !("geolocation"in navigator))
                    return this._handleGeolocationError({
                        code: 0,
                        message: "Geolocation not supported."
                    }),
                    this;
                var m = o(this._handleGeolocationResponse, this)
                  , b = o(this._handleGeolocationError, this);
                return u.watch ? this._locationWatchId = navigator.geolocation.watchPosition(m, b, u) : navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(m, b, u),
                this
            },
            stopLocate: function() {
                return navigator.geolocation && navigator.geolocation.clearWatch && navigator.geolocation.clearWatch(this._locationWatchId),
                this._locateOptions && (this._locateOptions.setView = !1),
                this
            },
            _handleGeolocationError: function(u) {
                if (this._container._leaflet_id) {
                    var m = u.code
                      , b = u.message || (m === 1 ? "permission denied" : m === 2 ? "position unavailable" : "timeout");
                    this._locateOptions.setView && !this._loaded && this.fitWorld(),
                    this.fire("locationerror", {
                        code: m,
                        message: "Geolocation error: " + b + "."
                    })
                }
            },
            _handleGeolocationResponse: function(u) {
                if (this._container._leaflet_id) {
                    var m = u.coords.latitude
                      , b = u.coords.longitude
                      , A = new K(m,b)
                      , Z = A.toBounds(u.coords.accuracy * 2)
                      , ie = this._locateOptions;
                    if (ie.setView) {
                        var Le = this.getBoundsZoom(Z);
                        this.setView(A, ie.maxZoom ? Math.min(Le, ie.maxZoom) : Le)
                    }
                    var Ye = {
                        latlng: A,
                        bounds: Z,
                        timestamp: u.timestamp
                    };
                    for (var it in u.coords)
                        typeof u.coords[it] == "number" && (Ye[it] = u.coords[it]);
                    this.fire("locationfound", Ye)
                }
            },
            addHandler: function(u, m) {
                if (!m)
                    return this;
                var b = this[u] = new m(this);
                return this._handlers.push(b),
                this.options[u] && b.enable(),
                this
            },
            remove: function() {
                if (this._initEvents(!0),
                this.options.maxBounds && this.off("moveend", this._panInsideMaxBounds),
                this._containerId !== this._container._leaflet_id)
                    throw new Error("Map container is being reused by another instance");
                try {
                    delete this._container._leaflet_id,
                    delete this._containerId

            },

            },

        function Vr(u, m, b) {
            var A, Z = [1, 4, 2, 8], ie, Le, Ye, it, jt, nr, Ar, tn;
            for (ie = 0,
            nr = u.length; ie < nr; ie++)
                u[ie]._code = Ta(u[ie], m);
            for (Ye = 0; Ye < 4; Ye++) {
                for (Ar = Z[Ye],
                A = [],
                ie = 0,
                nr = u.length,
                Le = nr - 1; ie < nr; Le = ie++)
                    it = u[ie],
                    jt = u[Le],
                    it._code & Ar ? jt._code & Ar || (tn = Hl(jt, it, Ar, m, b),
                    tn._code = Ta(tn, m),
                    A.push(tn)) : (jt._code & Ar && (tn = Hl(jt, it, Ar, m, b),
                    tn._code = Ta(tn, m),
                    A.push(tn)),
                    A.push(it));
                u = A
            }
            return u
        }
        function Sn(u, m) {
            var b, A, Z, ie, Le, Ye, it, jt, nr;
            if (!u || u.length === 0)
                throw new Error("latlngs not passed");
            na(u) || (console.warn("latlngs are not flat! Only the first ring will be used"),
            u = u[0]);
            var Ar = re([0, 0])
              , tn = q(u)
              , Ja = tn.getNorthWest().distanceTo(tn.getSouthWest()) * tn.getNorthEast().distanceTo(tn.getNorthWest());
            Ja < 1700 && (Ar = us(u));
            var aa = u.length
              , Co = [];
            for (b = 0; b < aa; b++) {
                var Si = re(u[b]);
                Co.push(m.project(re([Si.lat - Ar.lat, Si.lng - Ar.lng])))
            }
            for (Ye = it = jt = 0,
            b = 0,
            A = aa - 1; b < aa; A = b++)
                Z = Co[b],
                ie = Co[A],
                Le = Z.y * ie.x - ie.y * Z.x,
                it += (Z.x + ie.x) * Le,
                jt += (Z.y + ie.y) * Le,
                Ye += Le * 3;
            Ye === 0 ? nr = Co[0] : nr = [it / Ye, jt / Ye];
            var gh = m.unproject(Ce(nr));
            return re([gh.lat + Ar.lat, gh.lng + Ar.lng])
        }
        function us(u) {
            for (var m = 0, b = 0, A = 0, Z = 0; Z < u.length; Z++) {
                var ie = re(u[Z]);
                m += ie.lat,
                b += ie.lng,
                A++
            }
            return re([m / A, b / A])
        }
        var qs = {
            __proto__: null,

        function Bn(u, m) {
            if (!m || !u.length)
                return u.slice();
            var b = m * m;
            return u = vd(u, b),
            u = ka(u, b),
            u
        }
        function Hs(u, m, b) {
            return Math.sqrt(Wl(u, m, b, !0))
        }
        function Ws(u, m, b) {
            return Wl(u, m, b)
        }
        function ka(u, m) {
            var b = u.length
              , A = typeof Uint8Array < "u" ? Uint8Array : Array
              , Z = new A(b);
            Z[0] = Z[b - 1] = 1,
            Xo(u, Z, m, 0, b - 1);
            var ie, Le = [];
            for (ie = 0; ie < b; ie++)
                Z[ie] && Le.push(u[ie]);
            return Le
        }
        function Xo(u, m, b, A, Z) {
            var ie = 0, Le, Ye, it;
            for (Ye = A + 1; Ye <= Z - 1; Ye++)
                it = Wl(u[Ye], u[A], u[Z], !0),
                it > ie && (Le = Ye,
                ie = it);
            ie > b && (m[Le] = 1,
            Xo(u, m, b, A, Le),
            Xo(u, m, b, Le, Z))
        }
        function vd(u, m) {
            for (var b = [u[0]], A = 1, Z = 0, ie = u.length; A < ie; A++)
                Uf(u[A], u[Z]) > m && (b.push(u[A]),
                Z = A);
            return Z < ie - 1 && b.push(u[ie - 1]),
            b
        }
        var vp;
        function Vf(u, m, b, A, Z) {
            var ie = A ? vp : Ta(u, b), Le = Ta(m, b), Ye, it, jt;
            for (vp = Le; ; ) {
                if (!(ie | Le))
                    return [u, m];
                if (ie & Le)
                    return !1;
                Ye = ie || Le,
                it = Hl(u, m, Ye, b, Z),
                jt = Ta(it, b),
                Ye === ie ? (u = it,
                ie = jt) : (m = it,
                Le = jt)
            }
        }
        function Hl(u, m, b, A, Z) {
            var ie = m.x - u.x, Le = m.y - u.y, Ye = A.min, it = A.max, jt, nr;
            return b & 8 ? (jt = u.x + ie * (it.y - u.y) / Le,
            nr = it.y) : b & 4 ? (jt = u.x + ie * (Ye.y - u.y) / Le,
            nr = Ye.y) : b & 2 ? (jt = it.x,
            nr = u.y + Le * (it.x - u.x) / ie) : b & 1 && (jt = Ye.x,
            nr = u.y + Le * (Ye.x - u.x) / ie),
            new z(jt,nr,Z)
        }
        function Ta(u, m) {
            var b = 0;
            return u.x < m.min.x ? b |= 1 : u.x > m.max.x && (b |= 2),
            u.y < m.min.y ? b |= 4 : u.y > m.max.y && (b |= 8),
            b
        }
        function Uf(u, m) {
            var b = m.x - u.x
              , A = m.y - u.y;
            return b * b + A * A
        }
        function Wl(u, m, b, A) {
            var Z = m.x, ie = m.y, Le = b.x - Z, Ye = b.y - ie, it = Le * Le + Ye * Ye, jt;
            return it > 0 && (jt = ((u.x - Z) * Le + (u.y - ie) * Ye) / it,
            jt > 1 ? (Z = b.x,
            ie = b.y) : jt > 0 && (Z += Le * jt,
            ie += Ye * jt)),
            Le = u.x - Z,
            Ye = u.y - ie,
            A ? Le * Le + Ye * Ye : new z(Z,ie)
        }
        function na(u) {
            return !j(u[0]) || typeof u[0][0] != "object" && typeof u[0][0] < "u"
