        function Gl(u, m) {
            var b, A, Z, ie, Le, Ye, it, jt;
            if (!u || u.length === 0)
                throw new Error("latlngs not passed");
            na(u) || (console.warn("latlngs are not flat! Only the first ring will be used"),
            u = u[0]);
            var nr = re([0, 0])
              , Ar = q(u)
              , tn = Ar.getNorthWest().distanceTo(Ar.getSouthWest()) * Ar.getNorthEast().distanceTo(Ar.getNorthWest());
            tn < 1700 && (nr = us(u));
            var Ja = u.length
              , aa = [];
            for (b = 0; b < Ja; b++) {
                var Co = re(u[b]);
                aa.push(m.project(re([Co.lat - nr.lat, Co.lng - nr.lng])))
            }
            for (b = 0,
            A = 0; b < Ja - 1; b++)
                A += aa[b].distanceTo(aa[b + 1]) / 2;
            if (A === 0)
                jt = aa[0];
            else
                for (b = 0,
                ie = 0; b < Ja - 1; b++)
                    if (Le = aa[b],
                    Ye = aa[b + 1],
                    Z = Le.distanceTo(Ye),
                    ie += Z,
                    ie > A) {
                        it = (ie - A) / Z,
                        jt = [Ye.x - it * (Ye.x - Le.x), Ye.y - it * (Ye.y - Le.y)];
                        break
                    }
            var Si = m.unproject(Ce(jt));
            return re([Si.lat + nr.lat, Si.lng + nr.lng])
        }

          , yd = {
            project: function(u) {
                return new z(u.lng,u.lat)
            },
            unproject: function(u) {

            },

          , xu = {
            R: 6378137,
            R_MINOR: 6356752314245179e-9,
            bounds: new se([-2003750834279e-5, -1549657073972e-5],[2003750834279e-5, 1876465623138e-5]),
            project: function(u) {
                var m = Math.PI / 180
                  , b = this.R
                  , A = u.lat * m
                  , Z = this.R_MINOR / b
                  , ie = Math.sqrt(1 - Z * Z)
                  , Le = ie * Math.sin(A)
                  , Ye = Math.tan(Math.PI / 4 - A / 2) / Math.pow((1 - Le) / (1 + Le), ie / 2);
                return A = -b * Math.log(Math.max(Ye, 1e-10)),
                new z(u.lng * m * b,A)
            },
            unproject: function(u) {
                for (var m = 180 / Math.PI, b = this.R, A = this.R_MINOR / b, Z = Math.sqrt(1 - A * A), ie = Math.exp(-u.y / b), Le = Math.PI / 2 - 2 * Math.atan(ie), Ye = 0, it = .1, jt; Ye < 15 && Math.abs(it) > 1e-7; Ye++)
                    jt = Z * Math.sin(Le),
                    jt = Math.pow((1 - jt) / (1 + jt), Z / 2),
                    it = Math.PI / 2 - 2 * Math.atan(ie * jt) - Le,
                    Le += it;
                return new K(Le * m,u.x * m / b)
            }
        }

        var Hf = el.extend({
            initialize: function(u, m, b) {
                if (typeof m == "number" && (m = a({}, b, {
                    radius: m
                })),
                x(this, m),

            _project: function() {
                var u = this._latlng.lng
                  , m = this._latlng.lat
                  , b = this._map
                  , A = b.options.crs;
                if (A.distance === ke.distance) {
                    var Z = Math.PI / 180
                      , ie = this._mRadius / ke.R / Z
                      , Le = b.project([m + ie, u])
                      , Ye = b.project([m - ie, u])
                      , it = Le.add(Ye).divideBy(2)
                      , jt = b.unproject(it).lat
                      , nr = Math.acos((Math.cos(ie * Z) - Math.sin(m * Z) * Math.sin(jt * Z)) / (Math.cos(m * Z) * Math.cos(jt * Z))) / Z;

                    this._point = it.subtract(b.getPixelOrigin()),
                    this._radius = isNaN(nr) ? 0 : it.x - b.project([jt, u - nr]).x,
                    this._radiusY = it.y - Le.y
                } else {
                    var Ar = A.unproject(A.project(this._latlng).subtract([this._mRadius, 0]));
                    this._point = b.latLngToLayerPoint(this._latlng),
                    this._radius = this._point.x - b.latLngToLayerPoint(Ar).x
                }
                this._updateBounds()
            }
        });

                if (A) {

                    ie = 0; ie < Z; ie++)
                        Le[ie] = this._map.latLngToLayerPoint(u[ie]),
                        b.extend(Le[ie]);
                    m.push(Le)
                } else

                        this._projectLatlngs(u[ie], m, b)
            },
            _clipPoints: function() {
                var u = this._renderer._bounds;
                if (this._parts = [],
                !(!this._pxBounds || !this._pxBounds.intersects(u))) {
                    if (this.options.noClip) {
                        this._parts = this._rings;

                            Z++))
                }
            },

                for (var u = this._parts, m = this.options.smoothFactor, b = 0, A = u.length; b < A; b++)

                this._simplifyPoints(),

                this._renderer._updatePoly(this)

                    return !1;

        function Ql(u, m) {
            var b = u.type === "Feature" ? u.geometry : u, A = b ? b.coordinates : null, Z = [], ie = m && m.pointToLayer, Le = m && m.coordsToLatLng || tl, Ye, it, jt, nr;
            if (!A && !b)
                return null;
            switch (b.type) {
            case "Point":
                return Ye = Le(A),
                Nd(ie, u, Ye, m);
            case "MultiPoint":
                for (jt = 0,
                nr = A.length; jt < nr; jt++)
                    Ye = Le(A[jt]),
                    Z.push(Nd(ie, u, Ye, m));
                return new Ui(Z);
            case "LineString":
            case "MultiLineString":
                return it = jd(A, b.type === "LineString" ? 0 : 1, Le),
                new ya(it,m);
            case "Polygon":
            case "MultiPolygon":
                return it = jd(A, b.type === "Polygon" ? 1 : 2, Le),
                new Kl(it,m);
            case "GeometryCollection":
                for (jt = 0,
                nr = b.geometries.length; jt < nr; jt++) {
                    var Ar = Ql({
                        geometry: b.geometries[jt],
                        type: "Feature",
                        properties: u.properties
                    }, m);
                    Ar && Z.push(Ar)
                }
                return new Ui(Z);
            case "FeatureCollection":
                for (jt = 0,
                nr = b.features.length; jt < nr; jt++) {
                    var tn = Ql(b.features[jt], m);
                    tn && Z.push(tn)
                }
                return new Ui(Z);
            default:
                throw new Error("Invalid GeoJSON object.")
            }
        }

            _prepareOpen: function(u) {

                    m = null;

                            m = b[A];
                            break
                        }

                        return !1;

            },

                return document.createElement("div")
            },
            getTileSize: function() {
                var u = this.options.tileSize;
                return u instanceof z ? u : new z(u,u)
            },
            _updateZIndex: function() {
                this._container && this.options.zIndex !== void 0 && this.options.zIndex !== null && (this._container.style.zIndex = this.options.zIndex)
            },
            _setAutoZIndex: function(u) {
                for (var m = this.getPane().children, b = -u(-1 / 0, 1 / 0), A = 0, Z = m.length, ie; A < Z; A++)
                    ie = m[A].style.zIndex,
                    m[A] !== this._container && ie && (b = u(b, +ie));
                isFinite(b) && (this.options.zIndex = b + u(-1, 1),
                this._updateZIndex())
            },
            _updateOpacity: function() {
                if (this._map && !Qt.ielt9) {
                    za(this._container, this.options.opacity);
                    var u = +new Date
                      , m = !1
                      , b = !1;
                    for (var A in this._tiles) {
                        var Z = this._tiles[A];
                        if (!(!Z.current || !Z.loaded)) {
                            var ie = Math.min(1, (u - Z.loaded) / 200);
                            za(Z.el, ie),
                            ie < 1 ? m = !0 : (Z.active ? b = !0 : this._onOpaqueTile(Z),
                            Z.active = !0)
                        }
                    }
                    b && !this._noPrune && this._pruneTiles(),
                    m && (V(this._fadeFrame),
                    this._fadeFrame = P(this._updateOpacity, this))
                }
            },
            _onOpaqueTile: f,
            _initContainer: function() {
                this._container || (this._container = Dr("div", "leaflet-layer " + (this.options.className || "")),
                this._updateZIndex(),
                this.options.opacity < 1 && this._updateOpacity(),
                this.getPane().appendChild(this._container))
            },
            _updateLevels: function() {
                var u = this._tileZoom
                  , m = this.options.maxZoom;
                if (u !== void 0) {
                    for (var b in this._levels)
                        b = Number(b),
                        this._levels[b].el.children.length || b === u ? (this._levels[b].el.style.zIndex = m - Math.abs(u - b),

                      , Z = this._map;

                    A
                }
            },
            _onUpdateLevel: f,
            _onRemoveLevel: f,
            _onCreateLevel: f,
            _pruneTiles: function() {
                if (this._map) {
                    var u, m, b = this._map.getZoom();
                    if (b > this.options.maxZoom || b < this.options.minZoom) {
                        this._removeAllTiles();
                        return
                    }
                    for (u in this._tiles)
                        m = this._tiles[u],
                        m.retain = m.current;
                    for (u in this._tiles)
                        if (m = this._tiles[u],
                        m.current && !m.active) {
                            var A = m.coords;
                            this._retainParent(A.x, A.y, A.z, A.z - 5) || this._retainChildren(A.x, A.y, A.z, A.z + 2)
                        }
                    for (u in this._tiles)
                        this._tiles[u].retain || this._removeTile(u)
                }
            },
            _removeTilesAtZoom: function(u) {
                for (var m in this._tiles)
                    this._tiles[m].coords.z === u && this._removeTile(m)
            },
            _removeAllTiles: function() {
                for (var u in this._tiles)
                    this._removeTile(u)
            },
            _invalidateAll: function() {
                for (var u in this._levels)
                    ds(this._levels[u].el),
                    this._onRemoveLevel(Number(u)),
                    delete this._levels[u];
                this._removeAllTiles(),
                this._tileZoom = void 0
            },
            _retainParent: function(u, m, b, A) {
                var Z = Math.floor(u / 2)
                  , ie = Math.floor(m / 2)
                  , Le = b - 1
                  , Ye = new z(+Z,+ie);
                Ye.z = +Le;
                var it = this._tileCoordsToKey(Ye)
                  , jt = this._tiles[it];
                return jt && jt.active ? (jt.retain = !0,
                !0) : (jt && jt.loaded && (jt.retain = !0),
                Le > A ? this._retainParent(Z, ie, Le, A) : !1)
            },
            _retainChildren: function(u, m, b, A) {
                for (var Z = 2 * u; Z < 2 * u + 2; Z++)
                    for (var ie = 2 * m; ie < 2 * m + 2; ie++) {
                        var Le = new z(Z,ie);
                        Le.z = b + 1;
                        var Ye = this._tileCoordsToKey(Le)
                          , it = this._tiles[Ye];
                        if (it && it.active) {
                            it.retain = !0;
                            continue
                        } else
                            it && it.loaded && (it.retain = !0);
                        b + 1 < A && this._retainChildren(Z, ie, b + 1, A)
                    }
            },
            _resetView: function(u) {
                var m = u && (u.pinch || u.flyTo);
                this._setView(this._map.getCenter(), this._map.getZoom(), m, m)
            },
            _animateZoom: function(u) {
                this._setView(u.center, u.zoom, !0, u.noUpdate)
            },
            _clampZoom: function(u) {
                var m = this.options;
                return m.minNativeZoom !== void 0 && u < m.minNativeZoom ? m.minNativeZoom : m.maxNativeZoom !== void 0 && m.maxNativeZoom < u ? m.maxNativeZoom : u
            },
            _setView: function(u, m, b, A) {
                var Z = Math.round(m);
                this.options.maxZoom !== void 0 && Z > this.options.maxZoom || this.options.minZoom !== void 0 && Z < this.options.minZoom ? Z = void 0 : Z = this._clampZoom(Z);
                var ie = this.options.updateWhenZooming && Z !== this._tileZoom;
                (!A || ie) && (this._tileZoom = Z,
                this._abortLoading && this._abortLoading(),

                this._resetGrid(),

                this._noPrune = !!b),
                this._setZoomTransforms(u, m)
            },
            _setZoomTransforms: function(u, m) {
                for (var b in this._levels)
                    this._setZoomTransform(this._levels[b], u, m)
            },
            _setZoomTransform: function(u, m, b) {
                var A = this._map.getZoomScale(b, u.zoom)
                  , Z = u.origin.multiplyBy(A).subtract(this._map._getNewPixelOrigin(m, b)).round();
                Qt.any3d ? Cc(u.el, Z, A) : Mn(u.el, Z)
            },
            _resetGrid: function() {
                var u = this._map
                  , m = u.options.crs
                  , b = this._tileSize = this.getTileSize()
                  , A = this._tileZoom
                  , Z = this._map.getPixelWorldBounds(this._tileZoom);
                Z && (this._globalTileRange = this._pxBoundsToTileRange(Z)),
                this._wrapX = m.wrapLng && !this.options.noWrap && [Math.floor(u.project([0, m.wrapLng[0]], A).x / b.x), Math.ceil(u.project([0, m.wrapLng[1]], A).x / b.y)],
                this._wrapY = m.wrapLat && !this.options.noWrap && [Math.floor(u.project([m.wrapLat[0], 0], A).y / b.x), Math.ceil(u.project([m.wrapLat[1], 0], A).y / b.y)]
            },
            _onMoveEnd: function() {
                !this._map || this._map._animatingZoom || this._update()
            },
            _getTiledPixelBounds: function(u) {
                var m = this._map
                  , b = m._animatingZoom ? Math.max(m._animateToZoom, m.getZoom()) : m.getZoom()
                  , A = m.getZoomScale(b, this._tileZoom)
                  , Z = m.project(u, this._tileZoom).floor()
                  , ie = m.getSize().divideBy(A * 2);
                return new se(Z.subtract(ie),Z.add(ie))
            },
            _update: function(u) {
                var m = this._map;
                if (m) {
                    var b = this._clampZoom(m.getZoom());
                    if (u === void 0 && (u = m.getCenter()),
                    this._tileZoom !== void 0) {
                        var A = this._getTiledPixelBounds(u)
                          , Z = this._pxBoundsToTileRange(A)
                          , ie = Z.getCenter()
                          , Le = []
                          , Ye = this.options.keepBuffer
                          , it = new se(Z.getBottomLeft().subtract([Ye, -Ye]),Z.getTopRight().add([Ye, -Ye]));
                        if (!(isFinite(Z.min.x) && isFinite(Z.min.y) && isFinite(Z.max.x) && isFinite(Z.max.y)))
                            throw new Error("Attempted to load an infinite number of tiles");
                        for (var jt in this._tiles) {
                            var nr = this._tiles[jt].coords;
                            (nr.z !== this._tileZoom || !it.contains(new z(nr.x,nr.y))) && (this._tiles[jt].current = !1)
                        }
                        if (Math.abs(b - this._tileZoom) > 1) {
                            this._setView(u, b);
                            return
                        }
                        for (var Ar = Z.min.y; Ar <= Z.max.y; Ar++)
                            for (var tn = Z.min.x; tn <= Z.max.x; tn++) {
                                var Ja = new z(tn,Ar);
                                if (Ja.z = this._tileZoom,
                                !!this._isValidTile(Ja)) {
                                    var aa = this._tiles[this._tileCoordsToKey(Ja)];
                                    aa ? aa.current = !0 : Le.push(Ja)
                                }
                            }
                        if (Le.sort(function(Si, gh) {
                            return Si.distanceTo(ie) - gh.distanceTo(ie)
                        }),
                        Le.length !== 0) {
                            this._loading || (this._loading = !0,
                            this.fire("loading"));
                            var Co = document.createDocumentFragment();
                            for (tn = 0; tn < Le.length; tn++)
                                this._addTile(Le[tn], Co);
                            this._level.el.appendChild(Co)
                        }
                    }
                }
            },
            _isValidTile: function(u) {
                var m = this._map.options.crs;
                if (!m.infinite) {
                    var b = this._globalTileRange;
                    if (!m.wrapLng && (u.x < b.min.x || u.x > b.max.x) || !m.wrapLat && (u.y < b.min.y || u.y > b.max.y))
                        return !1
                }
                if (!this.options.bounds)
                    return !0;
                var A = this._tileCoordsToBounds(u);
                return q(this.options.bounds).overlaps(A)
            },
            _keyToBounds: function(u) {
                return this._tileCoordsToBounds(this._keyToTileCoords(u))
            },
            _tileCoordsToNwSe: function(u) {
                var m = this._map
                  , b = this.getTileSize()
                  , A = u.scaleBy(b)
                  , Z = A.add(b)
                  , ie = m.unproject(A, u.z)
                  , Le = m.unproject(Z, u.z);
                return [ie, Le]
            },
            _tileCoordsToBounds: function(u) {
                var m = this._tileCoordsToNwSe(u)
                  , b = new B(m[0],m[1]);
                return this.options.noWrap || (b = this._map.wrapLatLngBounds(b)),
                b
            },
            _tileCoordsToKey: function(u) {
                return u.x + ":" + u.y + ":" + u.z
            },
            _keyToTileCoords: function(u) {
                var m = u.split(":")
                  , b = new z(+m[0],+m[1]);
                return b.z = +m[2],
                b
            },
            _removeTile: function(u) {
                var m = this._tiles[u];
                m && (ds(m.el),
                delete this._tiles[u],
                this.fire("tileunload", {
                    tile: m.el,

                }))
            },
            _initTile: function(u) {
                Ir(u, "leaflet-tile");
                var m = this.getTileSize();
                u.style.width = m.x + "px",
                u.style.height = m.y + "px",
                u.onselectstart = f,
                u.onmousemove = f,
                Qt.ielt9 && this.options.opacity < 1 && za(u, this.options.opacity)
            },
            _addTile: function(u, m) {
                var b = this._getTilePos(u)
                  , A = this._tileCoordsToKey(u)
                  , Z = this.createTile(this._wrapCoords(u), o(this._tileReady, this, u));
                this._initTile(Z),
                this.createTile.length < 2 && P(o(this._tileReady, this, u, null, Z)),

                    el: Z,
                    coords: u,
                    current: !0
                },
                m.appendChild(Z),
                this.fire("tileloadstart", {
                    tile: Z,
                    coords: u
                })
            },
            _tileReady: function(u, m, b) {
                m && this.fire("tileerror", {
                    error: m,
                    tile: b,
                    coords: u
                });
                var A = this._tileCoordsToKey(u);

                this._pruneTiles()),
                m || (Ir(b.el, "leaflet-tile-loaded"),
                this.fire("tileload", {
                    tile: b.el,
                    coords: u
                })),

                this.fire("load"),
                Qt.ielt9 || !this._map._fadeAnimated ? P(this._pruneTiles, this) : setTimeout(o(this._pruneTiles, this), 250)))
            },
            _getTilePos: function(u) {
                return u.scaleBy(this.getTileSize()).subtract(this._level.origin)
            },
            _wrapCoords: function(u) {
                var m = new z(this._wrapX ? h(u.x, this._wrapX) : u.x,this._wrapY ? h(u.y, this._wrapY) : u.y);
                return m.z = u.z,
                m
            },
            _pxBoundsToTileRange: function(u) {
                var m = this.getTileSize();
                return new se(u.min.unscaleBy(m).floor(),u.max.unscaleBy(m).ceil().subtract([1, 1]))
            },
            _noTilesToLoad: function() {
                for (var u in this._tiles)
                    if (!this._tiles[u].loaded)
                        return !1;
                return !0
            }
        });

        var Xl = mh.extend({
            options: {

            },
            getTileUrl: function(u) {
                var m = {
                    r: Qt.retina ? "@2x" : "",
                    s: this._getSubdomain(u),

            },

            },
            _tileOnError: function(u, m, b) {

                A && m.getAttribute("src") !== A && (m.src = A),
                u(b, m)
            },
            _onTileRemove: function(u) {
                u.tile.onload = null
            },
            _getZoomForUrl: function() {
                var u = this._tileZoom
                  , m = this.options.maxZoom
                  , b = this.options.zoomReverse
                  , A = this.options.zoomOffset;

            },

                        })
                    }
            },

                var m = this._tiles[u];
                if (m)
                    return m.el.setAttribute("src", R),
                    mh.prototype._removeTile.call(this, u)
            },
            _tileReady: function(u, m, b) {
                if (!(!this._map || b && b.getAttribute("src") === R))
                    return mh.prototype._tileReady.call(this, u, m, b)
            }

        var Jl = zn.extend({
            options: {
                padding: .1
            },

                c(this),

            },

            },

                this.off("update", this._updatePaths, this),

            },

                };
                return this._zoomAnimated && (u.zoomanim = this._onAnimZoom),

            },

            },

            },

                  , A = this._map.getSize().multiplyBy(.5 + this.options.padding)
                  , Z = this._map.project(this._center, m)
                  , ie = A.multiplyBy(-b).add(Z).subtract(this._map._getNewPixelOrigin(u, m));

            },

            },

                for (var u in this._layers)

            },

                for (var u in this._layers)

                this._center = this._map.getCenter(),
                this._zoom = this._map.getZoom()
            }

          , sg = Jl.extend({
            options: {
                tolerance: 0
            },
            getEvents: function() {

                u
            },
            _onViewPreReset: function() {
                this._postponeUpdatePaths = !0
            },

                this._draw()
            },
            _initContainer: function() {

            },

            },
            _updatePaths: function() {
                if (!this._postponeUpdatePaths) {
                    var u;
                    this._redrawBounds = null;
                    for (var m in this._layers)
                        u = this._layers[m],
                        u._update();
                    this._redraw()
                }
            },
            _update: function() {
                if (!(this._map._animatingZoom && this._bounds)) {
                    Jl.prototype._update.call(this);
                    var u = this._bounds
                      , m = this._container
                      , b = u.getSize()
                      , A = Qt.retina ? 2 : 1;
                    Mn(m, u.min),
                    m.width = A * b.x,
                    m.height = A * b.y,
                    m.style.width = b.x + "px",
                    m.style.height = b.y + "px",
                    Qt.retina && this._ctx.scale(2, 2),
                    this._ctx.translate(-u.min.x, -u.min.y),
                    this.fire("update")
                }
            },
            _reset: function() {
                Jl.prototype._reset.call(this),
                this._postponeUpdatePaths && (this._postponeUpdatePaths = !1,
                this._updatePaths())
            },
            _initPath: function(u) {
                this._updateDashArray(u),
                this._layers[c(u)] = u;
                var m = u._order = {
                    layer: u,
                    prev: this._drawLast,
                    next: null
                };
                this._drawLast && (this._drawLast.next = m),
                this._drawLast = m,
                this._drawFirst = this._drawFirst || this._drawLast
            },
            _addPath: function(u) {
                this._requestRedraw(u)
            },
            _removePath: function(u) {
                var m = u._order
                  , b = m.next
                  , A = m.prev;
                b ? b.prev = A : this._drawLast = A,
                A ? A.next = b : this._drawFirst = b,
                delete u._order,
                delete this._layers[c(u)],
                this._requestRedraw(u)
            },
            _updatePath: function(u) {
                this._extendRedrawBounds(u),
                u._project(),
                u._update(),
                this._requestRedraw(u)
            },
            _updateStyle: function(u) {
                this._updateDashArray(u),
                this._requestRedraw(u)
            },
            _updateDashArray: function(u) {
                if (typeof u.options.dashArray == "string") {
                    var m = u.options.dashArray.split(/[, ]+/), b = [], A, Z;
                    for (Z = 0; Z < m.length; Z++) {
                        if (A = Number(m[Z]),
                        isNaN(A))
                            return;
                        b.push(A)
                    }
                    u.options._dashArray = b
                } else
                    u.options._dashArray = u.options.dashArray
            },
            _requestRedraw: function(u) {
                this._map && (this._extendRedrawBounds(u),
                this._redrawRequest = this._redrawRequest || P(this._redraw, this))
            },
            _extendRedrawBounds: function(u) {
                if (u._pxBounds) {
                    var m = (u.options.weight || 0) + 1;
                    this._redrawBounds = this._redrawBounds || new se,
                    this._redrawBounds.extend(u._pxBounds.min.subtract([m, m])),
                    this._redrawBounds.extend(u._pxBounds.max.add([m, m]))
                }
            },
            _redraw: function() {
                this._redrawRequest = null,
                this._redrawBounds && (this._redrawBounds.min._floor(),
                this._redrawBounds.max._ceil()),
                this._clear(),
                this._draw(),
                this._redrawBounds = null
            },
            _clear: function() {
                var u = this._redrawBounds;
                if (u) {
                    var m = u.getSize();
                    this._ctx.clearRect(u.min.x, u.min.y, m.x, m.y)
                } else
                    this._ctx.save(),
                    this._ctx.setTransform(1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0),
                    this._ctx.clearRect(0, 0, this._container.width, this._container.height),
                    this._ctx.restore()
            },
            _draw: function() {
                var u, m = this._redrawBounds;
                if (this._ctx.save(),
                m) {
                    var b = m.getSize();
                    this._ctx.beginPath(),
                    this._ctx.rect(m.min.x, m.min.y, b.x, b.y),
                    this._ctx.clip()
                }
                this._drawing = !0;
                for (var A = this._drawFirst; A; A = A.next)
                    u = A.layer,
                    (!m || u._pxBounds && u._pxBounds.intersects(m)) && u._updatePath();
                this._drawing = !1,
                this._ctx.restore()
            },
            _updatePoly: function(u, m) {
                if (this._drawing) {
                    var b, A, Z, ie, Le = u._parts, Ye = Le.length, it = this._ctx;
                    if (Ye) {
                        for (it.beginPath(),
                        b = 0; b < Ye; b++) {
                            for (A = 0,
                            Z = Le[b].length; A < Z; A++)
                                ie = Le[b][A],
                                it[A ? "lineTo" : "moveTo"](ie.x, ie.y);
                            m && it.closePath()
                        }
                        this._fillStroke(it, u)
                    }
                }
            },
            _updateCircle: function(u) {
                if (!(!this._drawing || u._empty())) {
                    var m = u._point
                      , b = this._ctx
                      , A = Math.max(Math.round(u._radius), 1)
                      , Z = (Math.max(Math.round(u._radiusY), 1) || A) / A;
                    Z !== 1 && (b.save(),
                    b.scale(1, Z)),
                    b.beginPath(),
                    b.arc(m.x, m.y / Z, A, 0, Math.PI * 2, !1),
                    Z !== 1 && b.restore(),
                    this._fillStroke(b, u)
                }
            },
            _fillStroke: function(u, m) {
                var b = m.options;
                b.fill && (u.globalAlpha = b.fillOpacity,
                u.fillStyle = b.fillColor || b.color,
                u.fill(b.fillRule || "evenodd")),
                b.stroke && b.weight !== 0 && (u.setLineDash && u.setLineDash(m.options && m.options._dashArray || []),
                u.globalAlpha = b.opacity,
                u.lineWidth = b.weight,
                u.strokeStyle = b.color,
                u.lineCap = b.lineCap,
                u.lineJoin = b.lineJoin,
                u.stroke())
            },
            _onClick: function(u) {
                for (var m = this._map.mouseEventToLayerPoint(u), b, A, Z = this._drawFirst; Z; Z = Z.next)
                    b = Z.layer,
                    b.options.interactive && b._containsPoint(m) && (!(u.type === "click" || u.type === "preclick") || !this._map._draggableMoved(b)) && (A = b);
                this._fireEvent(A ? [A] : !1, u)
            },
            _onMouseMove: function(u) {
                if (!(!this._map || this._map.dragging.moving() || this._map._animatingZoom)) {
                    var m = this._map.mouseEventToLayerPoint(u);
                    this._handleMouseHover(u, m)
                }
            },
            _handleMouseOut: function(u) {
                var m = this._hoveredLayer;
                m && (An(this._container, "leaflet-interactive"),
                this._fireEvent([m], u, "mouseout"),
                this._hoveredLayer = null,
                this._mouseHoverThrottled = !1)
            },
            _handleMouseHover: function(u, m) {
                if (!this._mouseHoverThrottled) {
                    for (var b, A, Z = this._drawFirst; Z; Z = Z.next)
                        b = Z.layer,
                        b.options.interactive && b._containsPoint(m) && (A = b);
                    A !== this._hoveredLayer && (this._handleMouseOut(u),
                    A && (Ir(this._container, "leaflet-interactive"),
                    this._fireEvent([A], u, "mouseover"),
                    this._hoveredLayer = A)),
                    this._fireEvent(this._hoveredLayer ? [this._hoveredLayer] : !1, u),
                    this._mouseHoverThrottled = !0,
                    setTimeout(o(function() {
                        this._mouseHoverThrottled = !1
                    }, this), 32)
                }
            },
            _fireEvent: function(u, m, b) {
                this._map._fireDOMEvent(m, b || m.type, u)
            },
            _bringToFront: function(u) {
                var m = u._order;
                if (m) {
                    var b = m.next
                      , A = m.prev;
                    if (b)
                        b.prev = A;
                    else
                        return;
                    A ? A.next = b : b && (this._drawFirst = b),
                    m.prev = this._drawLast,
                    this._drawLast.next = m,
                    m.next = null,
                    this._drawLast = m,
                    this._requestRedraw(u)
                }
            },
            _bringToBack: function(u) {
                var m = u._order;
                if (m) {
                    var b = m.next
                      , A = m.prev;
                    if (A)
                        A.next = b;
                    else
                        return;
                    b ? b.prev = A : A && (this._drawLast = A),
                    m.prev = null,
                    m.next = this._drawFirst,
                    this._drawFirst.prev = m,
                    this._drawFirst = m,
                    this._requestRedraw(u)
                }
            }
        });

        var Kf = wt.extend({
            addHooks: function() {
                if (!this._draggable) {
                    var u = this._map;
                    this._draggable = new Tr(u._mapPane,u._container),
                    this._draggable.on({
                        dragstart: this._onDragStart,
                        drag: this._onDrag,
                        dragend: this._onDragEnd
                    }, this),
                    this._draggable.on("predrag", this._onPreDragLimit, this),
                    u.options.worldCopyJump && (this._draggable.on("predrag", this._onPreDragWrap, this),
                    u.on("zoomend", this._onZoomEnd, this),
                    u.whenReady(this._onZoomEnd, this))
                }
                Ir(this._map._container, "leaflet-grab leaflet-touch-drag"),
                this._draggable.enable(),
                this._positions = [],
                this._times = []
            },
            removeHooks: function() {
                An(this._map._container, "leaflet-grab"),
                An(this._map._container, "leaflet-touch-drag"),
                this._draggable.disable()
            },
            moved: function() {
                return this._draggable && this._draggable._moved
            },
            moving: function() {
                return this._draggable && this._draggable._moving
            },
            _onDragStart: function() {
                var u = this._map;
                if (u._stop(),
                this._map.options.maxBounds && this._map.options.maxBoundsViscosity) {
                    var m = q(this._map.options.maxBounds);
                    this._offsetLimit = k(this._map.latLngToContainerPoint(m.getNorthWest()).multiplyBy(-1), this._map.latLngToContainerPoint(m.getSouthEast()).multiplyBy(-1).add(this._map.getSize())),
                    this._viscosity = Math.min(1, Math.max(0, this._map.options.maxBoundsViscosity))
                } else
                    this._offsetLimit = null;
                u.fire("movestart").fire("dragstart"),
                u.options.inertia && (this._positions = [],
                this._times = [])
            },
            _onDrag: function(u) {
                if (this._map.options.inertia) {
                    var m = this._lastTime = +new Date
                      , b = this._lastPos = this._draggable._absPos || this._draggable._newPos;
                    this._positions.push(b),
                    this._times.push(m),
                    this._prunePositions(m)
                }
                this._map.fire("move", u).fire("drag", u)
            },
            _prunePositions: function(u) {
                for (; this._positions.length > 1 && u - this._times[0] > 50; )
                    this._positions.shift(),
                    this._times.shift()
            },
            _onZoomEnd: function() {
                var u = this._map.getSize().divideBy(2)
                  , m = this._map.latLngToLayerPoint([0, 0]);
                this._initialWorldOffset = m.subtract(u).x,
                this._worldWidth = this._map.getPixelWorldBounds().getSize().x
            },
            _viscousLimit: function(u, m) {
                return u - (u - m) * this._viscosity
            },
            _onPreDragLimit: function() {
                if (!(!this._viscosity || !this._offsetLimit)) {
                    var u = this._draggable._newPos.subtract(this._draggable._startPos)
                      , m = this._offsetLimit;
                    u.x < m.min.x && (u.x = this._viscousLimit(u.x, m.min.x)),
                    u.y < m.min.y && (u.y = this._viscousLimit(u.y, m.min.y)),
                    u.x > m.max.x && (u.x = this._viscousLimit(u.x, m.max.x)),
                    u.y > m.max.y && (u.y = this._viscousLimit(u.y, m.max.y)),
                    this._draggable._newPos = this._draggable._startPos.add(u)
                }
            },

var Bwe = /["'&<>]/;
function no(e) {
    if (typeof e == "boolean" || typeof e == "number")
        return "" + e;
    e = "" + e;
    var t = Bwe.exec(e);
    if (t) {
        var r = "", n, a = 0;
        for (n = t.index; n < e.length; n++) {
            switch (e.charCodeAt(n)) {
            case 34:
                t = "&quot;";
                break;
            case 38:
                t = "&amp;";
                break;
            case 39:
                t = "&#x27;";
                break;
            case 60:
                t = "&lt;";
                break;
            case 62:
                t = "&gt;";
                break;
            default:
                continue
            }
            a !== n && (r += e.substring(a, n)),
            a = n + 1,
            r += t
        }
        e = a !== n ? r + e.substring(a, n) : r
    }
    return e
}

            i.current && (i.current.remove(),

            return;

        }
        );

                dashArray: "10, 5"
            }).addTo(c);

            })

              , x = parseFloat(p.checkpointLongitude);

                return;

              , v = (y == null ? void 0 : y.checkInPhotoUrl) && p.checkpointType === "check_in"

                    }), s.jsx("circle", {
                        cx: "12",
                        cy: "13",

                    })]

              , E = tc.marker([_, x], {

                    longitude: y.checkInLongitude || p.checkpointLongitude
                })
            }
            );
            const R = v ? `<strong>📸 ${p.checkpointType === "check_in" ? "Check-in" : "Check-out"}</strong><br>
           ${new Date(p.checkpointTime).toLocaleString("pt-BR")}<br>
           <em style="color: #9333ea;">Clique no ícone para ver a foto</em>` : `<strong>${p.checkpointType === "check_in" ? "Check-in" : "Check-out"}</strong><br>
           ${new Date(p.checkpointTime).toLocaleString("pt-BR")}`;
            E.bindPopup(R)
        }
        ),
        g.length > 0) {
            const p = [[e.latitude, e.longitude], ...g];
            tc.polyline(p, {
                color: "#ef4444",
                weight: 4,
                opacity: .8
            }).addTo(c)
        }
    }
    , [e, t, r, n, l]),
    l ? s.jsx("div", {
        ref: o,
        className: "w-full h-[500px] rounded-lg border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700",
        "data-testid": "route-map"
    }) : s.jsx("div", {
        className: "w-full h-[500px] rounded-lg border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-50 dark:bg-gray-800",
        children: s.jsxs("div", {
            className: "text-center",
            children: [s.jsx(Sr, {
                className: "h-12 w-12 mx-auto text-gray-400 mb-2"
            }), s.jsx("p", {
                className: "text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400",
                children: "Coordenadas inválidas"
            }), s.jsx("p", {
                className: "text-sm text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-500",
                children: "Configure as coordenadas de casa para visualizar o mapa"
            })]
        })
    })
}
function s8(e, t, r, n) {
    const i = (r - e) * Math.PI / 180
      , o = (n - t) * Math.PI / 180
      , l = Math.sin(i / 2) * Math.sin(i / 2) + Math.cos(e * Math.PI / 180) * Math.cos(r * Math.PI / 180) * Math.sin(o / 2) * Math.sin(o / 2);
    return 6371e3 * (2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(l), Math.sqrt(1 - l)))
}

                })]
            })
        })]
    })
}
const Wbe = Ge.object({
    email: Ge.string().email("Email inválido"),
    password: Ge.string().min(6, "Senha deve ter no mínimo 6 caracteres"),
    firstName: Ge.string().min(1, "Nome é obrigatório"),
    lastName: Ge.string().min(1, "Sobrenome é obrigatório"),
    role: Ge.enum(["admin", "coordinator", "administrative", "vendedor", "telemarketing", "motorista"]),
    route: Ge.string().optional(),
    isActive: Ge.boolean().default(!0)
});
function kZ() {
    const {toast: e} = en()
      , [t,r] = C.useState(!1)
      , [n,a] = C.useState(!1)
      , [i,o] = C.useState(!1)
      , [l,c] = C.useState(!1)
      , [d,h] = C.useState(null)
      , [f,g] = C.useState("all")
      , {data: p=[], isLoading: _} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/users", f],
        queryFn: async () => {
            const z = new URLSearchParams;
            f !== "all" && z.append("role", f);
            const de = await fetch(`/api/users?${z.toString()}`);
            if (!de.ok)
                throw new Error("Failed to fetch users");
            return de.json()
        }
    })
      , x = Bu({
        resolver: N0(Wbe),
        defaultValues: {
            email: "",
            password: "",
            firstName: "",
            lastName: "",
            role: "vendedor",
            route: "",
            isActive: !0
        }
    })
      , y = Ge.object({
        role: Ge.enum(["admin", "coordinator", "administrative", "vendedor", "telemarketing", "motorista"])
    })
      , v = Ge.object({
        password: Ge.string().min(6, "Senha deve ter no mínimo 6 caracteres")
    })
      , N = Bu({
        resolver: N0(y),
        defaultValues: {
            role: "vendedor"
        }
    })
      , j = Bu({
        resolver: N0(v),
        defaultValues: {
            password: ""
        }
    })
      , E = Gt({
        mutationFn: async z => {
            const de = await fetch("/api/users", {
                method: "POST",
                headers: {
                    "Content-Type": "application/json"
                },
                body: JSON.stringify(z)
            });
            if (!de.ok)
                throw new Error("Failed to create user");
            return de.json()
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            En.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/users"]
            }),
            e({
                title: "Usuário criado",
                description: "O usuário foi criado com sucesso."
            }),
            r(!1),
            x.reset()
        }
        ,
        onError: z => {
            e({
                title: "Erro ao criar usuário",
                description: z.message || "Ocorreu um erro ao criar o usuário.",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , R = Gt({
        mutationFn: async ({id: z, isActive: de}) => {
            const Ce = await fetch(`/api/users/${z}`, {
                method: "PUT",
                headers: {
                    "Content-Type": "application/json"
                },
                body: JSON.stringify({
                    isActive: de
                })
            });
            if (!Ce.ok)
                throw new Error("Failed to update user status");
            return Ce.json()
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            En.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/users"]
            }),
            e({
                title: "Status atualizado",
                description: "O status do usuário foi atualizado com sucesso."
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: z => {
            e({
                title: "Erro ao atualizar status",
                description: z.message || "Ocorreu um erro ao atualizar o status.",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , U = Gt({
        mutationFn: async ({id: z, role: de}) => {
            const Ce = await fetch(`/api/users/${z}`, {
                method: "PUT",
                headers: {
                    "Content-Type": "application/json"
                },
                body: JSON.stringify({
                    role: de
                })
            });
            if (!Ce.ok)
                throw new Error("Failed to update user role");
            return Ce.json()
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            En.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/users"]
            }),
            e({
                title: "Perfil atualizado",
                description: "O perfil do usuário foi atualizado com sucesso."
            }),
            a(!1),
            h(null)
        }
        ,
        onError: z => {
            e({
                title: "Erro ao atualizar perfil",
                description: z.message || "Ocorreu um erro ao atualizar o perfil.",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , O = Gt({
        mutationFn: async ({id: z, password: de}) => {
            const Ce = await fetch(`/api/users/${z}/password`, {
                method: "PUT",
                headers: {
                    "Content-Type": "application/json"
                },
                body: JSON.stringify({
                    password: de
                })
            });
            if (!Ce.ok) {
                const se = await Ce.json();
                throw new Error(se.message || "Failed to update password")
            }
            return Ce.json()
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            En.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/users"]
            }),
            e({
                title: "Senha atualizada",
                description: "A senha do usuário foi atualizada com sucesso."
            }),
            o(!1),

        }
        ,

                title: "Erro ao atualizar senha",
                description: z.message || "Ocorreu um erro ao atualizar a senha.",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , M = Gt({
        mutationFn: async z => {
            const de = await fetch(`/api/users/${z}`, {
                method: "DELETE"
            });
            if (!de.ok) {

                throw new Error(Ce.message || "Failed to delete user")
            }
            return de.json()
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            En.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/users"]
            }),
            e({
                title: "Usuário excluído",
                description: "O usuário foi excluído com sucesso."
            }),
            c(!1),
            h(null)
        }
        ,

                title: "Erro ao excluir usuário",

        }

                            }), s.jsx(Yt, {

                                children: "Ações"
                            })]
                        })
                    }), s.jsxs(Rl, {
                        children: [p.map(z => s.jsxs(Zn, {
                            "data-testid": `row-user-${z.id}`,
                            children: [s.jsxs(Rt, {
                                className: "font-medium",
                                children: [z.firstName, " ", z.lastName]
                            }), s.jsx(Rt, {
                                children: z.email
                            }), s.jsx(Rt, {
                                children: s.jsx($t, {
                                    variant: D(z.role),
                                    children: T(z.role)
                                })
                            }), s.jsx(Rt, {
                                children: z.route || "-"
                            }), s.jsx(Rt, {
                                children: s.jsx($t, {
                                    variant: z.isActive ? "default" : "secondary",
                                    children: z.isActive ? "Ativo" : "Inativo"
                                })
                            }), s.jsx(Rt, {
                                className: "text-right",
                                children: s.jsxs("div", {
                                    className: "flex justify-end gap-2",
                                    children: [s.jsxs(je, {
                                        variant: "outline",
                                        size: "sm",
                                        onClick: () => V(z),
                                        "data-testid": `button-edit-role-${z.id}`,
                                        children: [s.jsx("i", {
                                            className: "fas fa-user-edit mr-2"
                                        }), "Editar Perfil"]
                                    }), s.jsxs(je, {
                                        variant: "outline",
                                        size: "sm",
                                        onClick: () => Q(z),
                                        "data-testid": `button-edit-password-${z.id}`,
                                        children: [s.jsx("i", {
                                            className: "fas fa-key mr-2"
                                        }), "Editar Senha"]
                                    }), s.jsx(je, {
                                        variant: "outline",
                                        size: "sm",
                                        onClick: () => R.mutate({
                                            id: z.id,
                                            isActive: !z.isActive
                                        }),
                                        disabled: R.isPending,
                                        "data-testid": `button-toggle-status-${z.id}`,
                                        children: z.isActive ? s.jsxs(s.Fragment, {
                                            children: [s.jsx("i", {
                                                className: "fas fa-ban mr-2"
                                            }), "Desativar"]
                                        }) : s.jsxs(s.Fragment, {
                                            children: [s.jsx("i", {
                                                className: "fas fa-check mr-2"
                                            }), "Ativar"]
                                        })
                                    }), s.jsxs(je, {
                                        variant: "destructive",
                                        size: "sm",
                                        onClick: () => Y(z),
                                        "data-testid": `button-delete-${z.id}`,
                                        children: [s.jsx("i", {
                                            className: "fas fa-trash mr-2"
                                        }), "Excluir"]
                                    })]
                                })
                            })]
                        }, z.id)), p.length === 0 && s.jsx(Zn, {
                            children: s.jsx(Rt, {
                                colSpan: 6,
                                className: "text-center text-gray-500 py-8",
                                children: "Nenhum usuário encontrado"
                            })
                        })]
                    })]
                })
            })]
        })]
    })
}
function TZ() {
    console.log("✅ HRManagement component rendered!");
    const {user: e} = po()
      , t = new Date
      , [r,n] = C.useState((t.getMonth() + 1).toString())
      , [a,i] = C.useState(t.getFullYear().toString())
      , o = ["admin", "coordinator", "administrative"].includes((e == null ? void 0 : e.role) || "")
      , {data: l, isLoading: c} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/hr/monthly-mileage", r, a],
        queryFn: async () => {
            const x = await fetch(`/api/hr/monthly-mileage?month=${r}&year=${a}`);
            if (!x.ok)
                throw new Error("Erro ao buscar quilometragem");
            return x.json()
        }
        ,
        enabled: !!r && !!a
    })
      , {data: d, isLoading: h} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/hr/monthly-hours", r, a],
        queryFn: async () => {
            const x = await fetch(`/api/hr/monthly-hours?month=${r}&year=${a}`);
            if (!x.ok)
                throw new Error("Erro ao buscar carga horária");
            return x.json()
        }
        ,
        enabled: !!r && !!a
    })
      , {data: f, isLoading: g} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/hr/daily-attendance", r, a],
        queryFn: async () => {
            const x = await fetch(`/api/hr/daily-attendance?month=${r}&year=${a}`);
            if (!x.ok)
                throw new Error("Erro ao buscar performance de atendimento");
            return x.json()
        }
        ,
        enabled: !!r && !!a
    })
      , p = [{
        value: "1",
        label: "Janeiro"
    }, {
        value: "2",
        label: "Fevereiro"
    }, {
        value: "3",
        label: "Março"
    }, {
        value: "4",
        label: "Abril"
    }, {
        value: "5",
        label: "Maio"
    }, {
        value: "6",
        label: "Junho"
    }, {
        value: "7",
        label: "Julho"
    }, {
        value: "8",
        label: "Agosto"
    }, {
        value: "9",
        label: "Setembro"
    }, {
        value: "10",
        label: "Outubro"
    }, {
        value: "11",
        label: "Novembro"
    }, {
        value: "12",
        label: "Dezembro"
    }]
      , _ = Array.from({
        length: 5
    }, (x, y) => {
        const v = t.getFullYear() - y;
        return {
            value: v.toString(),
            label: v.toString()
        }
    }
    );
    return s.jsxs("div", {
        className: "container mx-auto p-6 space-y-6",
        children: [s.jsx("div", {
            className: "mb-4",
            children: s.jsxs(je, {
                variant: "outline",
                size: "sm",
                onClick: () => window.location.href = "/",
                className: "flex items-center gap-2",
                "data-testid": "button-back-dashboard",
                children: [s.jsx(vc, {
                    className: "h-4 w-4"
                }), "Voltar ao Dashboard"]
            })
        }), s.jsxs("div", {
            className: "flex items-center justify-between",
            children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                children: [s.jsxs("h1", {
                    className: "text-3xl font-bold flex items-center gap-2",
                    "data-testid": "title-rh",
                    children: [s.jsx(qa, {
                        className: "h-8 w-8 text-honest-blue"
                    }), o ? "Recursos Humanos" : "Minhas Métricas"]
                }), s.jsx("p", {
                    className: "text-muted-foreground mt-1",
                    children: o ? "Controle de quilometragem e carga horária dos vendedores" : "Acompanhe sua quilometragem e carga horária"
                })]
            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                className: "flex gap-4",
                children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                    className: "flex items-center gap-2",
                    children: [s.jsx(Vs, {
                        className: "h-5 w-5 text-gray-500"
                    }), s.jsxs(yr, {
                        value: r,
                        onValueChange: n,
                        children: [s.jsx(pr, {
                            className: "w-[140px]",
                            "data-testid": "select-month",
                            children: s.jsx(wr, {
                                placeholder: "Mês"
                            })
                        }), s.jsx(xr, {
                            children: p.map(x => s.jsx(Ue, {
                                value: x.value,
                                children: x.label
                            }, x.value))
                        })]
                    })]
                }), s.jsxs(yr, {
                    value: a,
                    onValueChange: i,
                    children: [s.jsx(pr, {
                        className: "w-[100px]",
                        "data-testid": "select-year",
                        children: s.jsx(wr, {
                            placeholder: "Ano"
                        })
                    }), s.jsx(xr, {
                        children: _.map(x => s.jsx(Ue, {
                            value: x.value,
                            children: x.label
                        }, x.value))
                    })]
                })]
            })]
        }), s.jsxs(X1, {
            defaultValue: "mileage",
            className: "space-y-4",
            children: [s.jsxs(Wx, {
                className: "grid w-full max-w-3xl grid-cols-3",
                children: [s.jsxs(mc, {
                    value: "mileage",
                    "data-testid": "tab-mileage",
                    children: [s.jsx(Qd, {
                        className: "h-4 w-4 mr-2"
                    }), "Quilometragem"]
                }), s.jsxs(mc, {
                    value: "hours",

                    }), "Carga Horária"]
                }), s.jsxs(mc, {
                    value: "attendance",
                    "data-testid": "tab-attendance",
                    children: [s.jsx(tu, {
                        className: "h-4 w-4 mr-2"
                    }), "Atendimento"]
                })]
            }), s.jsx(pc, {
                value: "mileage",
                className: "space-y-4",
                children: c ? s.jsx(Oe, {
                    children: s.jsx(Re, {
                        className: "pt-6",
                        children: s.jsx("div", {
                            className: "text-center text-muted-foreground",
                            children: "Carregando dados..."
                        })
                    })
                }) : !l || l.length === 0 ? s.jsx(Oe, {
                    children: s.jsx(Re, {
                        className: "pt-6",
                        children: s.jsx("div", {
                            className: "text-center text-muted-foreground",
                            children: "Nenhum dado de quilometragem encontrado para este período"
                        })
                    })
                }) : l.map(x => s.jsxs(Oe, {
                    children: [s.jsxs(ut, {
                        children: [s.jsxs(ht, {
                            className: "flex items-center justify-between",
                            children: [s.jsx("span", {
                                children: x.sellerName
                            }), s.jsxs("span", {

                                children: [x.totalDistance.toFixed(2), " km"]
                            })]
                        }), s.jsx(Oi, {
                            children: x.sellerEmail
                        })]
                    }), s.jsx(Re, {
                        children: x.dailyData.length === 0 ? s.jsx("div", {
                            className: "text-center text-muted-foreground py-4",
                            children: "Nenhuma rota registrada neste mês"
                        }) : s.jsx("div", {
                            className: "overflow-x-auto",
                            children: s.jsxs(Ol, {
                                children: [s.jsx(Il, {
                                    children: s.jsxs(Zn, {
                                        children: [s.jsx(Yt, {
                                            children: "Data"
                                        }), s.jsx(Yt, {
