                                            children: "Distância (km)"
                                        }), s.jsx(Yt, {
                                            className: "text-right",
                                            children: "Visitas Completadas"
                                        })]
                                    })
                                }), s.jsxs(Rl, {
                                    children: [x.dailyData.map( (y, v) => s.jsxs(Zn, {
                                        "data-testid": `row-mileage-${v}`,
                                        children: [s.jsx(Rt, {
                                            children: kn(new Date(y.date), "dd/MM/yyyy", {
                                                locale: ys
                                            })
                                        }), s.jsx(Rt, {
                                            children: kn(new Date(y.date), "EEEE", {
                                                locale: ys
                                            })
                                        }), s.jsx(Rt, {
                                            className: "text-right font-medium",
                                            children: y.distance.toFixed(2)
                                        }), s.jsx(Rt, {
                                            className: "text-right",
                                            children: y.visits
                                        })]
                                    }, v)), s.jsxs(Zn, {
                                        className: "bg-muted/50 font-bold",
                                        children: [s.jsx(Rt, {
                                            colSpan: 2,
                                            children: "Total do Mês"
                                        }), s.jsxs(Rt, {
                                            className: "text-right text-honest-blue",
                                            children: [x.totalDistance.toFixed(2), " km"]
                                        }), s.jsx(Rt, {
                                            className: "text-right",
                                            children: x.dailyData.reduce( (y, v) => y + v.visits, 0)
                                        })]
                                    })]
                                })]
                            })
                        })
                    })]
                }, x.sellerId))
            }), s.jsx(pc, {
                value: "hours",
                className: "space-y-4",
                children: h ? s.jsx(Oe, {
                    children: s.jsx(Re, {
                        className: "pt-6",
                        children: s.jsx("div", {
                            className: "text-center text-muted-foreground",
                            children: "Carregando dados..."
                        })
                    })
                }) : !d || d.length === 0 ? s.jsx(Oe, {
                    children: s.jsx(Re, {
                        className: "pt-6",
                        children: s.jsx("div", {
                            className: "text-center text-muted-foreground",
                            children: "Nenhum dado de carga horária encontrado para este período"
                        })
                    })
                }) : d.map(x => s.jsxs(Oe, {
                    children: [s.jsxs(ut, {
                        children: [s.jsxs(ht, {
                            className: "flex items-center justify-between",
                            children: [s.jsx("span", {
                                children: x.sellerName
                            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                className: "flex items-center gap-4",
                                children: [s.jsxs("span", {
                                    className: "text-sm font-normal text-muted-foreground",
                                    children: ["Meta: ", x.totalExpectedHours, "h"]
                                }), s.jsxs("span", {
                                    className: `text-2xl font-bold ${x.totalDifference >= 0 ? "text-green-600" : "text-red-600"}`,
                                    children: [x.totalMonthlyHours.toFixed(2), "h", x.totalDifference !== 0 && s.jsxs("span", {
                                        className: "text-sm ml-2",
                                        children: ["(", x.totalDifference > 0 ? "+" : "", x.totalDifference.toFixed(2), "h)"]
                                    })]
                                })]
                            })]
                        }), s.jsx(Oi, {
                            children: x.sellerEmail
                        })]
                    }), s.jsxs(Re, {
                        className: "space-y-6",
                        children: [x.dailyData.length === 0 ? s.jsx("div", {
                            className: "text-center text-muted-foreground py-4",
                            children: "Nenhum check-in registrado neste mês"
                        }) : s.jsxs("div", {
                            children: [s.jsxs("h3", {
                                className: "font-semibold mb-3 flex items-center gap-2",
                                children: [s.jsx(Vs, {
                                    className: "h-4 w-4"
                                }), "Registro Diário"]
                            }), s.jsx("div", {
                                className: "overflow-x-auto",
                                children: s.jsxs(Ol, {
                                    children: [s.jsx(Il, {
                                        children: s.jsxs(Zn, {
                                            children: [s.jsx(Yt, {
                                                children: "Data"
                                            }), s.jsx(Yt, {
                                                children: "Dia"
                                            }), s.jsx(Yt, {
                                                children: "1º Check-in"
                                            }), s.jsx(Yt, {
                                                children: "Último Check-out"
                                            }), s.jsx(Yt, {
                                                className: "text-right",
                                                children: "Horas Trabalhadas"
                                            }), s.jsx(Yt, {
                                                className: "text-right",
                                                children: "Meta"
                                            }), s.jsx(Yt, {
                                                className: "text-right",
                                                children: "Diferença"
                                            })]
                                        })
                                    }), s.jsx(Rl, {
                                        children: x.dailyData.map( (y, v) => s.jsxs(Zn, {
                                            "data-testid": `row-hours-${v}`,
                                            children: [s.jsx(Rt, {
                                                children: kn(new Date(y.date), "dd/MM/yyyy", {
                                                    locale: ys
                                                })
                                            }), s.jsx(Rt, {
                                                className: "font-medium",
                                                children: y.dayOfWeek
                                            }), s.jsx(Rt, {
                                                children: y.firstCheckIn ? kn(new Date(y.firstCheckIn), "HH:mm", {
                                                    locale: ys
                                                }) : "-"
                                            }), s.jsx(Rt, {
                                                children: y.lastCheckOut ? kn(new Date(y.lastCheckOut), "HH:mm", {
                                                    locale: ys
                                                }) : "-"
                                            }), s.jsxs(Rt, {
                                                className: "text-right font-medium",
                                                children: [y.hoursWorked.toFixed(2), "h"]
                                            }), s.jsxs(Rt, {
                                                className: "text-right text-muted-foreground",
                                                children: [y.expectedHours, "h"]
                                            }), s.jsxs(Rt, {
                                                className: `text-right font-medium ${y.difference >= 0 ? "text-green-600" : "text-red-600"}`,
                                                children: [y.difference > 0 ? "+" : "", y.difference.toFixed(2), "h"]
                                            })]
                                        }, v))
                                    })]
                                })
                            })]
                        }), x.weeklyTotals && x.weeklyTotals.length > 0 && s.jsxs("div", {
                            children: [s.jsxs("h3", {
                                className: "font-semibold mb-3 flex items-center gap-2",
                                children: [s.jsx(tu, {
                                    className: "h-4 w-4"
                                }), "Totais Semanais (Meta: 44h/semana)"]
                            }), s.jsx("div", {
                                className: "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4",
                                children: x.weeklyTotals.map(y => s.jsxs(Oe, {
                                    className: "bg-muted/30",
                                    children: [s.jsx(ut, {
                                        className: "pb-3",
                                        children: s.jsxs(ht, {
                                            className: "text-sm",
                                            children: ["Semana ", y.weekNumber]
                                        })
                                    }), s.jsx(Re, {
                                        children: s.jsxs("div", {
                                            className: "space-y-1",
                                            children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                                                className: "flex justify-between text-sm",
                                                children: [s.jsx("span", {
                                                    className: "text-muted-foreground",
                                                    children: "Trabalhadas:"
                                                }), s.jsxs("span", {
                                                    className: "font-bold",
                                                    children: [y.hoursWorked.toFixed(2), "h"]
                                                })]
                                            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                                className: "flex justify-between text-sm",
                                                children: [s.jsx("span", {
                                                    className: "text-muted-foreground",
                                                    children: "Meta:"
                                                }), s.jsxs("span", {
                                                    children: [y.expectedHours.toFixed(2), "h"]
                                                })]
                                            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                                className: `flex justify-between text-sm font-medium ${y.difference >= 0 ? "text-green-600" : "text-red-600"}`,
                                                children: [s.jsx("span", {
                                                    children: "Diferença:"
                                                }), s.jsxs("span", {
                                                    children: [y.difference > 0 ? "+" : "", y.difference.toFixed(2), "h"]
                                                })]
                                            })]
                                        })
                                    })]
                                }, y.weekNumber))
                            })]
                        })]
                    })]
                }, x.sellerId))
            }), s.jsx(pc, {
                value: "attendance",
                className: "space-y-4",
                children: g ? s.jsx(Oe, {
                    children: s.jsx(Re, {
                        className: "pt-6",
                        children: s.jsx("div", {
                            className: "text-center text-muted-foreground",
                            children: "Carregando dados..."
                        })
                    })
                }) : !f || f.length === 0 ? s.jsx(Oe, {
                    children: s.jsx(Re, {
                        className: "pt-6",
                        children: s.jsx("div", {
                            className: "text-center text-muted-foreground",
                            children: "Nenhum dado de atendimento encontrado para este período"
                        })
                    })
                }) : f.map(x => s.jsxs(Oe, {
                    "data-testid": `card-attendance-${x.sellerId}`,
                    children: [s.jsxs(ut, {
                        children: [s.jsxs(ht, {
                            className: "flex items-center justify-between",
                            children: [s.jsx("span", {
                                "data-testid": `text-seller-name-${x.sellerId}`,
                                children: x.sellerName
                            }), s.jsxs("div", {
                                className: "flex items-center gap-4",
                                children: [s.jsxs("span", {
                                    className: "text-sm font-normal text-muted-foreground",
                                    "data-testid": `text-monthly-average-${x.sellerId}`,
                                    children: ["Média Mensal: ", x.monthlyAverage.toFixed(2), "%"]
                                }), s.jsxs("span", {
                                    className: `text-2xl font-bold ${x.overallPercentage >= 80 ? "text-green-600" : x.overallPercentage >= 60 ? "text-yellow-600" : "text-red-600"}`,
                                    "data-testid": `text-overall-percentage-${x.sellerId}`,
                                    children: [x.overallPercentage.toFixed(2), "%"]
                                })]
                            })]
                        }), s.jsxs(Oi, {
                            "data-testid": `text-seller-summary-${x.sellerId}`,
                            children: [x.sellerEmail, " • ", x.totalCompleted, "/", x.totalScheduled, " visitas completadas"]
                        })]
                    }), s.jsx(Re, {
                        children: x.dailyData.length === 0 ? s.jsx("div", {
                            className: "text-center text-muted-foreground py-4",
                            "data-testid": "text-no-routes",
                            children: "Nenhuma rota registrada neste mês"
                        }) : s.jsx("div", {
                            className: "overflow-x-auto",
                            children: s.jsxs(Ol, {
                                children: [s.jsx(Il, {
                                    children: s.jsxs(Zn, {
                                        children: [s.jsx(Yt, {
                                            children: "Data"
                                        }), s.jsx(Yt, {
                                            children: "Dia da Semana"
                                        }), s.jsx(Yt, {
                                            className: "text-right",
                                            children: "Agendadas"
                                        }), s.jsx(Yt, {
                                            className: "text-right",
                                            children: "Completadas"
                                        }), s.jsx(Yt, {
                                            className: "text-right",
                                            children: "% Atendimento"
                                        })]
                                    })
                                }), s.jsxs(Rl, {
                                    children: [x.dailyData.map( (y, v) => s.jsxs(Zn, {
                                        "data-testid": `row-attendance-${x.sellerId}-${v}`,
                                        children: [s.jsx(Rt, {
                                            "data-testid": `cell-date-${v}`,
                                            children: kn(new Date(y.date), "dd/MM/yyyy", {
                                                locale: ys
                                            })
                                        }), s.jsx(Rt, {
                                            "data-testid": `cell-weekday-${v}`,
                                            children: kn(new Date(y.date), "EEEE", {
                                                locale: ys
                                            })
                                        }), s.jsx(Rt, {
                                            className: "text-right",
                                            "data-testid": `cell-scheduled-${v}`,
                                            children: y.scheduledVisits
                                        }), s.jsx(Rt, {
                                            className: "text-right font-medium",
                                            "data-testid": `cell-completed-${v}`,
                                            children: y.completedVisits
                                        }), s.jsxs(Rt, {
                                            className: `text-right font-bold ${y.attendancePercentage >= 80 ? "text-green-600" : y.attendancePercentage >= 60 ? "text-yellow-600" : "text-red-600"}`,
                                            "data-testid": `cell-percentage-${v}`,
                                            children: [y.attendancePercentage.toFixed(2), "%"]
                                        })]
                                    }, v)), s.jsxs(Zn, {
                                        className: "bg-muted/50 font-bold",
                                        "data-testid": `row-total-${x.sellerId}`,
                                        children: [s.jsx(Rt, {
                                            colSpan: 2,
                                            children: "Total do Mês"
                                        }), s.jsx(Rt, {
                                            className: "text-right",
                                            "data-testid": `cell-total-scheduled-${x.sellerId}`,
                                            children: x.totalScheduled
                                        }), s.jsx(Rt, {
                                            className: "text-right",
                                            "data-testid": `cell-total-completed-${x.sellerId}`,
                                            children: x.totalCompleted
                                        }), s.jsxs(Rt, {
                                            className: `text-right ${x.overallPercentage >= 80 ? "text-green-600" : x.overallPercentage >= 60 ? "text-yellow-600" : "text-red-600"}`,
                                            "data-testid": `cell-total-percentage-${x.sellerId}`,
                                            children: [x.overallPercentage.toFixed(2), "%"]
                                        })]
                                    })]
                                })]
                            })
                        })
                    })]
                }, x.sellerId))
            })]
        })]
    })
}
function Gbe() {
    const {user: e, isLoading: t} = po()
      , [r,n] = C.useState("dashboard");
    if (t)
        return s.jsx("div", {
            className: "min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center",
            children: s.jsx("div", {
                className: "animate-spin rounded-full h-32 w-32 border-b-2 border-honest-blue"
            })
        });
    const a = () => {
        switch (r) {
        case "dashboard":
            return s.jsx(MA, {});
        case "sales-cards":
            return s.jsx(npe, {});
        case "customers":
            return s.jsx(kpe, {});
        case "sales-goals":
            return s.jsx(OH, {
                user: e
            });
        case "products":
            return s.jsx(Tpe, {});
        case "billings":
            return s.jsx(DH, {});
        case "whatsapp":
            return s.jsx(Ape, {});
        case "omie":
            return s.jsx(Fpe, {});
        case "sellers":
            return s.jsx(IH, {});
        case "telemarketing":
            return s.jsx(RH, {});
        case "sales-schedule":
            return s.jsx(vG, {});
        case "visit-routes":
            return s.jsx(AG, {});
        case "daily-route":
            return s.jsx(EZ, {});
        case "overdue-debts":
            return s.jsx(yG, {});
        case "blocked-orders":
            return s.jsx(wG, {
                user: e
            });
        case "order-sale":
            return s.jsx(Ag, {
                step: "sale"
            });
        case "order-billing":
            return s.jsx(Ag, {
                step: "billing"
            });
        case "order-billed":
            return s.jsx(Ag, {
                step: "billed"
            });
        case "order-awaiting-route":
            return s.jsx(Ag, {
                step: "awaiting-route"
            });
        case "order-in-route":
            return s.jsx(Ag, {
                step: "in-route"
            });
        case "locations":
            return s.jsx(Swe, {});
        case "delivery-dashboard":
            return s.jsx(_G, {});
        case "delivery-management":
            return s.jsx(bG, {});
        case "driver-management":
            return s.jsx(kG, {});
        case "delivery-reports":
            return s.jsx(TG, {});
        case "users":
            return s.jsx(kZ, {});
        case "rh":
            return s.jsx(TZ, {});
        default:
            return s.jsx(MA, {})
        }
    }
    ;
    return s.jsx($$, {
        activeView: r,
        setActiveView: n,
        user: e,
        children: a()
    })
}
function Zbe() {
    const {toast: e} = en()
      , t = os()
      , [r,n] = C.useState(!1)
      , {register: a, handleSubmit: i, formState: {errors: o}} = Bu()
      , l = Gt({
        mutationFn: async d => {
            const h = await fetch("/api/auth/local-login", {
                method: "POST",
                body: JSON.stringify(d),
                headers: {
                    "Content-Type": "application/json"
                },
                credentials: "same-origin"
            });
            if (!h.ok) {
                const f = await h.json();
                throw new Error(f.message || "Login failed")
            }
            return h.json()
        }
        ,
        onSuccess: () => {
            e({
                title: "Login realizado com sucesso",
                description: "Bem-vindo ao sistema Honest Sucos!"
            }),
            t.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/auth/user"]
            }),
            window.location.href = "/"
        }
        ,
        onError: d => {
            console.error("Erro no login:", d),
            e({
                title: "Erro no login",
                description: d.message === "Invalid credentials" ? "Usuário ou senha incorretos" : "Erro interno do servidor",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , c = d => {
        n(!0),
        l.mutate(d)
    }
    ;
    return s.jsx("div", {
        className: "min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-green-50 to-orange-50 dark:from-green-950 dark:to-orange-950",
        children: s.jsxs(Oe, {
            className: "w-full max-w-md mx-4",
            children: [s.jsxs(ut, {
                className: "text-center",
                children: [s.jsx("div", {
                    className: "flex justify-center mb-4",
                    children: s.jsx("div", {
                        className: "w-16 h-16 bg-green-600 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center",
                        children: s.jsx(VC, {
                            className: "h-8 w-8 text-white"
                        })
                    })
                }), s.jsx(ht, {
                    className: "text-2xl font-bold text-green-700 dark:text-green-400",
                    children: "Honest Sucos"
                }), s.jsx(Oi, {
                    children: "Sistema de Gestão - Acesso Administrativo"
                })]
            }), s.jsxs(Re, {
                children: [s.jsxs("form", {
                    onSubmit: i(c),
                    className: "space-y-4",
                    children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "space-y-2",
                        children: [s.jsx(We, {
                            htmlFor: "username",
                            children: "Usuário"
                        }), s.jsx(xt, {
                            id: "username",
                            type: "text",
                            placeholder: "Digite seu usuário",
                            ...a("username", {
                                required: "Usuário é obrigatório",
                                minLength: {
                                    value: 2,
                                    message: "Usuário deve ter pelo menos 2 caracteres"
                                }
                            }),
                            disabled: r
                        }), o.username && s.jsx("p", {
                            className: "text-sm text-red-600",
                            children: o.username.message
                        })]
                    }), s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "space-y-2",
                        children: [s.jsx(We, {
                            htmlFor: "password",
                            children: "Senha"
                        }), s.jsx(xt, {
                            id: "password",
                            type: "password",
                            placeholder: "Digite sua senha",
                            ...a("password", {
                                required: "Senha é obrigatória",
                                minLength: {
                                    value: 6,
                                    message: "Senha deve ter pelo menos 6 caracteres"
                                }
                            }),
                            disabled: r
                        }), o.password && s.jsx("p", {
                            className: "text-sm text-red-600",
                            children: o.password.message
                        })]
                    }), s.jsx(je, {
                        type: "submit",
                        className: "w-full bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white",
                        disabled: r || l.isPending,
                        children: r || l.isPending ? s.jsxs(s.Fragment, {
                            children: [s.jsx(ba, {
                                className: "mr-2 h-4 w-4 animate-spin"
                            }), "Entrando..."]
                        }) : "Entrar"
                    })]
                }), s.jsx("div", {
                    className: "mt-6 text-center",
                    children: s.jsx("p", {
                        className: "text-sm text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400",
                        children: "Credenciais administrativas específicas"
                    })
                })]
            })]
        })
    })
}
function Kbe() {
    const {user: e, isLoading: t} = po()
      , [r,n] = C.useState("blocked-orders");
    return t ? s.jsx("div", {
        className: "min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center",
        children: s.jsx("div", {
            className: "animate-spin rounded-full h-32 w-32 border-b-2 border-honest-blue"
        })
    }) : s.jsx($$, {
        activeView: r,
        setActiveView: n,
        children: s.jsx(wG, {
            user: e
        })
    })
}
const a8 = [{
    value: "Seg",
    label: "Segunda"
}, {
    value: "Ter",
    label: "Terça"
}, {
    value: "Qua",
    label: "Quarta"
}, {
    value: "Qui",
    label: "Quinta"
}, {
    value: "Sex",
    label: "Sexta"
}, {
    value: "Sab",
    label: "Sábado"
}, {
    value: "Dom",
    label: "Domingo"
}];
function Qbe() {
    const {toast: e} = en()
      , [t,r] = C.useState(!1)
      , [n,a] = C.useState(null)
      , {data: i=[], isLoading: o} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/routes"]
    })
      , l = Bu({
        resolver: N0(_ie.extend({
            weekdays: Ge.string().refine(y => {
                try {
                    const v = JSON.parse(y);
                    return Array.isArray(v) && v.length > 0
                } catch {
                    return !1
                }
            }
            , {
                message: "Selecione pelo menos um dia da semana"
            })
        })),
        defaultValues: {
            name: "",
            weekdays: "[]",
            sellerId: null,
            isActive: !0
        }
    })
      , c = Gt({
        mutationFn: y => dr("/api/routes", "POST", y),
        onSuccess: () => {
            En.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/routes"]
            }),
            e({
                title: "Rota criada com sucesso!"
            }),
            r(!1),
            l.reset()
        }
        ,
        onError: y => {
            e({
                title: "Erro ao criar rota",
                description: y.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , d = Gt({
        mutationFn: ({id: y, data: v}) => dr(`/api/routes/${y}`, "PUT", v),
        onSuccess: () => {
            En.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/routes"]
            }),
            e({
                title: "Rota atualizada com sucesso!"
            }),
            r(!1),
            a(null),
            l.reset()
        }
        ,
        onError: y => {
            e({
                title: "Erro ao atualizar rota",
                description: y.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , h = Gt({
        mutationFn: y => dr(`/api/routes/${y}`, "DELETE"),
        onSuccess: () => {
            En.invalidateQueries({
                queryKey: ["/api/routes"]
            }),
            e({
                title: "Rota removida com sucesso!"
            })
        }
        ,
        onError: y => {
            e({
                title: "Erro ao remover rota",
                description: y.message,
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        }
    })
      , f = y => {
        y ? (a(y),
        l.reset({
            name: y.name,
            weekdays: y.weekdays,
            sellerId: y.sellerId,
            isActive: y.isActive
        })) : (a(null),
        l.reset({
            name: "",
            weekdays: "[]",
            sellerId: null,
            isActive: !0
        })),
        r(!0)
    }
      , g = () => {
        r(!1),
        a(null),
        l.reset()
    }
      , p = y => {
        n ? d.mutate({
            id: n.id,
            data: y
        }) : c.mutate(y)
    }
      , _ = y => {
        const v = JSON.parse(l.getValues("weekdays") || "[]")
          , N = v.includes(y) ? v.filter(j => j !== y) : [...v, y];
        l.setValue("weekdays", JSON.stringify(N))
    }
      , x = y => {
        try {
            return JSON.parse(y).map(N => {
                var j;
                return (j = a8.find(E => E.value === N)) == null ? void 0 : j.label
            }
            ).filter(Boolean).join(", ")
        } catch {
            return ""
        }
    }
    ;
    return s.jsxs("div", {
        className: "space-y-6",
        children: [s.jsxs(Oe, {
            children: [s.jsxs(ut, {
                className: "flex flex-row items-center justify-between",
                children: [s.jsxs(ht, {
                    className: "flex items-center gap-2",
                    children: [s.jsx(Sr, {
                        className: "h-5 w-5"
                    }), "Gerenciamento de Rotas"]
                }), s.jsxs(je, {
                    onClick: () => f(),
                    "data-testid": "button-create-route",
                    children: [s.jsx(uf, {
                        className: "h-4 w-4 mr-2"
                    }), "Nova Rota"]
                })]
            }), s.jsx(Re, {
                children: o ? s.jsx("div", {
                    className: "text-center py-8",
                    children: "Carregando rotas..."
                }) : i.length === 0 ? s.jsx("div", {
                    className: "text-center py-8 text-muted-foreground",
                    children: 'Nenhuma rota cadastrada. Clique em "Nova Rota" para criar.'
                }) : s.jsx("div", {
                    className: "space-y-2",
                    children: i.map(y => s.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "flex items-center justify-between p-4 border rounded-lg hover:bg-accent/50 transition-colors",
                        "data-testid": `route-item-${y.id}`,
                        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "flex-1",
                            children: [s.jsx("h3", {
                                className: "font-medium",
                                "data-testid": `route-name-${y.id}`,
                                children: y.name
                            }), s.jsxs("p", {
                                className: "text-sm text-muted-foreground",
                                "data-testid": `route-weekdays-${y.id}`,
                                children: ["Dias: ", x(y.weekdays)]
                            })]
                        }), s.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "flex gap-2",
                            children: [s.jsx(je, {
                                variant: "outline",

        queryKey: ["/api/omie/contas-receber"],

    })
      , d = (i == null ? void 0 : i.titulos.reduce( (x, y) => {
        const v = y.data_previsao ? new Date(y.data_previsao.split("/").reverse().join("-")) : null
          , N = new Date;
        N.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
        const j = y.valor_a_receber || 0;
        return v && v < N && j > 0 && (x.vencidos++,
        x.totalVencido += j),
        x.totalGeral += j,
        x
    }
    , {
        vencidos: 0,
        totalVencido: 0,
        totalGeral: 0
    })) || {
        vencidos: 0,
        totalVencido: 0,
        totalGeral: 0
    }
      , h = (i == null ? void 0 : i.titulos.filter(x => {
        var U, O, M;

        if (!(((U = x.razao_social) == null ? void 0 : U.toLowerCase().includes(y)) || ((O = x.cnpj_cpf) == null ? void 0 : O.includes(e)) || ((M = x.numero_documento) == null ? void 0 : M.includes(e))))

function nNe() {
    const {user: e} = po()
      , t = ["admin", "coordinator", "administrative"].includes((e == null ? void 0 : e.role) || "")
      , [r,n] = C.useState("all")
      , [a,i] = C.useState(null)
      , [o,l] = C.useState("")
      , {data: c} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/users"],
        enabled: t
    })
      , d = (c == null ? void 0 : c.filter(x => x.role === "vendedor")) || []
      , {data: h, isLoading: f} = Bt({
        queryKey: ["/api/check-in-photos", r],
        queryFn: async () => {
            const x = new URLSearchParams;
            r && r !== "all" && x.append("sellerId", r);
            const y = await fetch(`/api/check-in-photos?${x}`, {
                credentials: "include"
            });
            if (!y.ok)
                throw new Error("Falha ao carregar fotos");
            return y.json()
        }
    })
      , g = (h == null ? void 0 : h.photos) || []
      , p = g.filter(x => x.customerName.toLowerCase().includes(o.toLowerCase()) || x.sellerName.toLowerCase().includes(o.toLowerCase()))
      , _ = x => {
        const y = document.createElement("a");
        y.href = x.checkInPhotoUrl,
        y.download = `checkin-${x.customerName}-${kn(new Date(x.checkInTime), "yyyy-MM-dd-HHmm")}.jpg`,
        y.click()
    }
    ;
    return s.jsxs("div", {
        className: "container mx-auto p-6 max-w-7xl",
        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
            className: "mb-6",
            children: [s.jsxs("h1", {
                className: "text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white flex items-center gap-2",
                children: [s.jsx(Hd, {
                    className: "h-8 w-8 text-honest-blue"
                }), "Fotos de Check-in"]
            }), s.jsx("p", {
                className: "text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 mt-1",
                children: "Visualize todas as fotos capturadas durante os check-ins dos vendedores"
            })]
        }), s.jsx(Oe, {
            className: "mb-6",
            children: s.jsx(Re, {
                className: "pt-6",
                children: s.jsxs("div", {
                    className: "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4",
                    children: [s.jsxs("div", {
                        children: [s.jsx("label", {
                            className: "block text-sm font-medium mb-2",
                            children: "Buscar"
                        }), s.jsx(xt, {
                            placeholder: "Cliente ou vendedor...",
                            value: o,

        })]

        queryKey: ["/api/users"],

    })

                            children: [s.jsx(Ts, {
                                className: "h-4 w-4 mr-2"
                            }), "Visita fora da rota planejada • Status: ", v.validation_status]
                        })]
                    }, `${v.origem}-${v.id}`))
                })
            })]
        })]
    })
}
function sNe() {
    const [,e] = FM()
      , [t,r] = C.useState([])
      , [n,a] = C.useState("Iniciando limpeza...")
      , i = o => {
        r(l => [...l, o])
    }
    ;
    return C.useEffect( () => {
        (async () => {
            try {
                if (a("Desregistrando Service Worker..."),
                "serviceWorker"in navigator) {
                    const l = await navigator.serviceWorker.getRegistrations();
                    for (let c of l)
                        await c.unregister(),
                        i("Service Worker desregistrado")
                }
                if (a("Limpando caches..."),
                "caches"in window) {
                    const l = await caches.keys();
                    for (let c of l)
                        await caches.delete(c),
                        i(`Cache "${c}" removido`)
                }
                a("Limpando localStorage..."),
                localStorage.clear(),
                i("localStorage limpo"),
                a("Limpando sessionStorage..."),
                sessionStorage.clear(),
                i("sessionStorage limpo"),
                a("✅ Limpeza concluída!"),
                i("Redirecionando para Auditoria de Check-ins..."),
                setTimeout( () => {
                    window.location.href = "/auditoria-checkins"
                }
                , 2e3)
            } catch (l) {
                const c = l;
                a("❌ Erro: " + c.message),
                i("ERRO: " + c.message),
                setTimeout( () => {
                    window.location.href = "/auditoria-checkins"
                }
                , 3e3)
            }
        }
        )()
    }
    , [e]),
    s.jsx("div", {
        className: "min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-green-600 to-green-800 flex items-center justify-center p-4",
        children: s.jsxs("div", {
            className: "bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-2xl p-8 max-w-md w-full",
            children: [s.jsx("h1", {
                className: "text-2xl font-bold text-green-800 mb-4 text-center",
                children: "🔄 Limpando Cache"
            }), s.jsx("div", {
                className: "flex justify-center mb-6",
                children: s.jsx("div", {
                    className: "animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-4 border-green-200 border-t-green-600"
                })
            }), s.jsx("div", {
                className: "text-center text-lg text-gray-700 mb-4",
                children: n
            }), s.jsx("div", {
                className: "bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-4 max-h-64 overflow-y-auto",
                children: t.map( (o, l) => s.jsxs("div", {
                    className: "text-sm text-gray-600 mb-2 pl-4 border-l-2 border-green-500",
                    children: ["✓ ", o]
                }, l))
            })]
        })
    })
}

                                                })
                                            })

                                            children: _(x.operationType)
                                        }), s.jsx(Rt, {
                                            children: g(x.status)
                                        })]
                                    }, x.id)
                                }
                                )
                            })]
                        })
                    })
                })]
            })]
        })
    })
}
